definition.en: The personality is action, and as I have shown myself to you in sessions, this has added to the action of the sessions.
definition.zh: 人格即行动，正如我在课程中向你们展示的那样，这为课程的行动增添了活力。

definition.en: Each personality is free. Time has open ends in all directions or such a thing as probabilities would not exist.
definition.zh: 每个人格都是自由的。时间在所有方向都有开放的端点，否则概率这类事物就不会存在。

definition.en: The whole self is a composite formed by the various aspects of the personality as it is seen in the waking and dream states, and at other levels of operation.
definition.zh: 整个自己是由人格在醒时状态、梦境状态及其他运作层面所显现的各种面向组合而成的复合体。

definition.en: There is nothing, neither knowledge nor beauty nor truth, that exists independently of consciousness or personality.
definition.zh: 没有任何事物——无论是知识、美还是真理——能独立于意识或人格而存在。

definition.en: The basic personality, that is the primary personality, has not been changed and will not change except through the personality itself.
definition.zh: 基本人格，即首要人格，未曾改变，也不会改变，除非通过人格自身。

explanation: 人格是行动本身，而非静止的实体。它由多重同时发生的行动构成，包括清醒自我、梦境自我、过去与未来的转世人格。人格并非囚禁于时间中，而是自由流动的——当下的行动能帮助“过去”的人格，未来的潜能也能介入当下。核心人格（主人格）不会因外在建议或环境改变而根本变化，它只能通过自身主动转变。人格系统具有弹性：当某些行动无法被整合时，会形成次级人格作为紧急措施，防止系统崩溃；未被利用的能力会在梦境中被启用。人格在物理世界、梦境宇宙及其他存在层面同时运作，其表现（如微笑或悲伤的面孔）只是不同面向的呈现，不改变基本本质。自我（ego）只是人格中高度专门化的部分，并非最强大或最明智的，它受内我控制，

quotes.text: In other words, the inclusion of my personality characteristics with the material will take away any long white gowned spiritualistic connotations, and put the survival personality thesis in a more proper light. As any good writer should know, tell Ruburt he need not explain my characteristics; simply include excerpts that show them. If he does this to the best of his ability, he will consider his excerpts from two standpoints--what to say, and how I say it, so that the personality and the material are clearly shown together. It will make it lively. (Long pause) The personality is action, and as I have shown myself to you in sessions, this has added to the action of the sessions.
quotes.translation: 换言之，将我的个性特征融入资料中，将消除任何长袍白须的唯灵论联想，并以更恰当的角度呈现存续人格的论点。任何优秀作者都应明白，告诉鲁柏无需解释我的特征，只需摘录能展现这些特征的片段即可。若他尽力为之，便应从两个角度考量摘录内容——该说什么，以及我如何表达，使人格与资料清晰共现。这将赋予其生命力。（长停顿）人格即行动，正如我在课程中向你们展现的那样，这已为课程增添了行动力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This is actually not as bad an analogy as I first thought, in that oftentimes a particular personality will be like the right arm of the entity as a whole, while another particular personality will have both feet on the ground. To get back however to the original point I wish to make, there is a point beyond which the most suggestible personality will be beyond reach, no matter what the circumstances are. Manifestations of the personality may follow the lines that suggestion commands. This is bad enough, but it only means that the personality has been forced to change its mode of action in the physical world. The personality seems shattered because the actions seem so changed. And here again we have your cause and effect, misapplied. The basic personality, that is the primary personality, has not been changed and will not change except through the personality itself.
quotes.translation: 这个比喻其实比我最初所想更贴切，因为特定人格常如整体存有的右臂，而另一个人格则双足踏地。但回到我原本想强调的要点：无论环境如何，最易受暗示的人格终将触及某个无法逾越的临界点。人格的表层表现或许会遵循暗示的指令，这已足够糟糕，但仅意味着人格被迫改变了其在物质世界的行动模式。人格看似支离破碎，只因行动变化如此剧烈。这里我们又误用了因果律。基本人格，即原初人格，从未改变，且除非通过人格自身，否则永不会改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: (I should write a few notes regarding last night's session, before I forget. John Bradley was here. The session began as usual; Seth said that the other personality was also involved. Afler first break, before session was to resume, I felt the pyramid effect that usually signals the other personality. The effect wasn't very strong, though; I wasn't sure when to "plunge in", wondered if the time was right, etc. Then, o. k., and the other personality began to speak. For a moment I wondered again if trance depth was sufficient as sounds in room bothered me. But as personality spoke, definitely deepened.
quotes.translation: （趁记忆犹新，需记录昨晚课程笔记。约翰·布拉德利在场。课程照常开始；赛斯说另一个人格也参与其中。首次休息后，在课程恢复前，我感受到通常预示另一个人格的"金字塔效应"。但效应并不强烈；我不确定何时"切入"，犹豫时机是否恰当等。随后，好吧，另一个人格开始发言。因房间声响干扰，我一度怀疑出神深度是否足够。但人格发言时，深度明显加深。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You and your reincarnated selves, or personalities, are not imprisoned in time. There is a constant interchange going on between what you think of as your present self, and your past and future selves. If this were not the case, then I would not be speaking here, for I am not Ruburt's past self. Each personality is free. Time has open ends in all directions or such a thing as probabilities would not exist. Therefore, actions that you make now can help a so-called past personality; and a so-called future personality may step in and help you along your weary way.
quotes.translation: 你与你的转世自我或人格，并非囚禁于时间之中。你所认为的当下自我，与你的过去及未来自我之间，存在着持续不断的交流。若非如此，我便不会在此发言，因我并非鲁柏的过去自我。每个人格都是自由的。时间在所有方向都敞开着开口，否则概率这类事物便不会存在。因此，你此刻的行动能帮助所谓的过去人格；而所谓的未来人格也可能介入，助你走过疲惫之路。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Without such a secondary regrouping of actions for example, a much more serious open breakage, a deep personality cleavage, might in some cases result. In some cases the secondary personality is, again, an emergency measure that will eventually tide the whole personality over, allow for the expression of actions before their explosion completely disrupts the personality system; and then the secondary personality structure may be dispensed with for all practical purposes, to be recalled however upon another emergency.
quotes.translation: 若无此类行动的次级重组，某些情况下可能导致更严重的公开断裂，即深刻的人格分裂。在某些案例中，次级人格再次成为应急措施，最终帮助整体人格渡过难关，允许行动在彻底瓦解人格系统前得以表达；此后，次级人格结构可被实际弃用，但会在另一次紧急状况中被召回。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Abilities unused by the waking personality are utilized in the dream state. A study of dream activities will often allow the waking personality to recognize abilities of which it is not aware, to discover talents that are not being used. Such a study can be most beneficial in allowing the personality to utilize all of its capabilities. There is no doubt that the whole self is a composite formed by the various aspects of the personality as it is seen in the waking and dream states, and at other levels of operation.
quotes.translation: 清醒人格未使用的能力在梦境状态中被运用。对梦境活动的研究，常能让清醒人格认识到自身未察觉的能力，发现未被运用的天赋。此类研究极有益处，能让人格运用其全部能力。毫无疑问，整体自我是由人格在清醒状态、梦境状态及其他运作层面所呈现的各个面向复合而成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Many so-called cases of possession can be laid to this alone. The dominant personality can be likened on your plane to the dominant entity. Please understand that I am using an analogy here. As the personality on your plane actually changes, expands and grows according to its potentialities, as it presents at various times varied images to the world, such as--if you'll excuse me for using clichés--a smiling face, a sorrowful face, but is still basically the same personality, so on another level does the entity present at various times a varied appearance and speak in a different voice. As the smiling and the sorrowful face also express and expand the personality, so too do the various reincarnated personalities express and expand the entity as a whole.
quotes.translation: 许多所谓的附身案例都可归因于此。主导人格在你们层面可比拟为主导本体。请理解我在此使用类比。正如你们层面的人格根据其潜能实际改变、扩展和成长，在不同时期向世界呈现不同形象——请原谅我使用陈词滥调——如笑脸、悲容，但本质上仍是同一个人格；同样在另一层面，本体在不同时期呈现不同面貌，以不同声音说话。正如笑脸与悲容也表达并扩展人格，各种转世人格同样表达并扩展作为整体的本体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The personality then changes course in midstream. Some, but not all, cases of insanity represent the personality's inability to handle a particular problem, while at the same time it refuses to obey the orders from the inner senses to change course. On such occasions data from past lives rushes up or through the inner senses. The personality is no longer capable of shielding itself from this material when it goes beyond a certain point. That is, the personality is now working against itself.
quotes.translation: 人格随后在中途改变方向。某些（但非全部）精神错乱案例，代表人格无法处理特定问题，同时拒绝服从内在感官改变方向的指令。此时，前世资料会通过内在感官涌上。当超过某临界点时，人格再也无法屏蔽这些资料。也就是说，人格正在与自己对抗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You cannot probe into the one system without affecting the others. It is basically meaningless to consider the personality as separate from the simultaneous actions of which it is composed. The personality, as you know, has also a reality within the dream universe. It should be obvious that in a most basic and practical manner the personality however is not involved with physical time to any degree. Only a part of the personality, the ego, is so involved. It is obvious of course that the personality system will react to stimuli that seem, to the ego, to be far divorced in time. That is, the personality may react to a stimuli in the present that occurred originally twenty years ago, to the ego's understanding of time.
quotes.translation: 你无法探究一个系统而不影响其他系统。将人格视为独立于构成它的同时性行动之外，基本上毫无意义。如你所知，人格在梦境宇宙中也具有实相。显然，在最基本且实际的方式中，人格根本不受物理时间影响。只有人格的一部分——自我——才受其影响。当然，人格系统会对那些在自我看来时间上相距甚远的刺激产生反应。也就是说，人格可能对当下发生的刺激产生反应，而该刺激最初发生在二十年前——以自我对时间的理解而言。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The dependent portion of the personality is literally appalled at the more aggressive aspects of the whole personality. In the case of Philip, we find these aggressive tendencies welcomed. But because basically Philip is able to unite the various levels of the self, there is no such deep and persistent physical problem. The aggressiveness is given reign and acceptance. The tendency toward division in Philip's personality shows itself in this tendency toward secrecy, which affects most deeply the nature of his home life.
quotes.translation: 人格中依赖的部分，对整体人格更具侵略性的面向感到惊骇。在菲利普的案例中，我们发现这些侵略性倾向受到欢迎。但由于菲利普基本上能整合自我的各个层面，因此没有产生深刻而持续的生理问题。侵略性被允许释放并接纳。菲利普人格中的分裂倾向，表现为这种隐秘性，这最深地影响了他家庭生活的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: (From the 242nd session for March 16, 1966:) The ego is not the most powerful or the most knowledgeable portion of the self. It is simply a well-specialized part of the personality, fully equipped to operate under certain circumstances21 ... When those conditions no longer exist [after "death"], then other layers of the self take over the dominant position, and the personality realigns its psychological components. The ego does not disappear, however; it merely takes a back seat in some respects, as your own subconscious does during physical existence. The ego is under the control of what may loosely be called "the inner self." The survival or nonphysical personality has somewhat the same relationship to the ego as the dreaming personality has to it in physical life.
quotes.translation: （摘自1966年3月16日第242节课程：）自我并非自我最强大或最博学的部分。它只是人格中高度专门化的部分，完全装备好在特定环境下运作……当那些条件在"死后"不再存在时，自我的其他层面便接管主导地位，人格重新调整其心理组成。然而自我并未消失；它只是在某些方面退居次要位置，如同你们在世时潜意识所处的位置。自我受控于可粗略称为"内在自我"的部分。存续或非物理人格与自我的关系，某种程度上如同梦中人格与它在物质生命中的关系。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I mentioned earlier that the personality is an excellent example of action as it is sometimes projected into the physical field, while not appearing within it in tangible form. For here we see many of actions characteristics: the mobility that does not necessarily involve space, the thrusts outward, and the corresponding thrusts inward. We see action acting upon itself and constant change. A thorough study of the personality will be an excellent exercise, and will lead you close to the nature of action itself. The experiences about which you asked, for example, involved actions of the personality and not, of course, of the ego. Expansion and contraction occur constantly as characteristic of action, as I have explained.
quotes.translation: 我先前提到，人格是行动投射到物理场域时的绝佳范例——它有时以无形形式出现其中。因为在此我们看到行动的许多特性：不必然涉及空间的流动性、向外的推力，以及相应的向内的推力。我们看到行动作用于自身并持续变化。彻底研究人格将是极佳的练习，将使你接近行动本身的本质。例如，你所询问的经历涉及人格的行动，而非自我的行动。如我所解释，扩张与收缩作为行动的特性持续发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is nothing, neither knowledge nor beauty nor truth, that exists independently of consciousness or personality. My personality is such that it is not intimate or understandable to you, now, simply because it is a personality based upon different root assumptions than your own, and has its prime existence in dimensions that are composed of personality structures and gestalts based on alien psychological activities.
quotes.translation: 没有任何事物——无论是知识、美还是真理——能独立于意识或人格而存在。我的人格之所以对你而言既不亲密也不可理解，仅仅是因为它基于与你不同的根本假设，并且其主要存在于由人格结构与完形所构成的维度中，而这些结构基于异于常人的心理活动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: While indeed I try to understand his ways, nevertheless I find it most difficult to understand on his part these mountains of self-doubt. I am hardly a portion of his personality. Were I a secondary personality of his, I would exhibit those characteristics that are inhibited in his personality, though I must admit I find it difficult to discover where he is inhibited. A less inhibited personality is difficult to find.
quotes.translation: 尽管我确实试图理解他的方式，但我仍觉得他那些堆积如山的自我怀疑极难参透。我绝非他的人格片段。若我是他的次人格，我本该展现那些被他压抑的人格特质——尽管我必须承认，我实在难以发现他何处受到压抑。如此不受压抑的人格实属罕见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The overall needs of the personality are always taken into consideration by what I have called in the past the inner ego. Now this portion of the self is indeed self-conscious in the highest meaning of the term--aware of the subconscious portion of the personality, aware of the primary conscious framework that you call your ego, and constantly directs the overall activities. This portion is aware of the complicated workings of the nervous system and all bodily functions. It is the overseer. It knows when to allow subconscious needs and wishes their fulfillment. It knows when to put fulfillment off for a time. It is this part of the personality that is in charge of overall stability.
quotes.translation: 人格的整体需求始终被我曾称为"内在自我"的部分所考量。这个自我部分确实具有该词最高意义上的自我意识——它觉察人格的潜意识部分，觉察你称为自我的主要意识框架，并持续引导整体活动。此部分知晓神经系统与所有身体机能的复杂运作。它是监督者。它知道何时允许潜意识需求与愿望获得满足，也知道何时暂缓实现。正是人格的这一部分负责整体稳定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Such understanding simply cannot follow logical lines. The intellect may indeed grasp some of this understanding from the intuitions, but the intellect itself is aware of only minute portions of the whole personality. Again, this is not meant to minimize the value of the intellect. The fact remains that answers sought by a personality can only be found through a traveling within the actions that compose the self. Within our last session, I explained some of the basic psychological heritage that resides within the action makeup of the personality. There is no escaping this heritage, and it is so important that without it the personality system could not be built up.
quotes.translation: 这种理解根本无法遵循逻辑脉络。理智或许能从直觉中捕捉部分领悟，但理智本身仅能觉察整体人格的微小片段。这并非贬低理智的价值。事实是：人格寻求的答案，唯有通过穿越构成自我的行动内在旅程才能获得。在上次课程中，我解释了存于人格行动构成中的部分基本心理传承。这种传承无可逃避，其重要性足以决定人格系统能否建立。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: On the part of any human personality, therefore, it is extremely important that methods be learned to let action follow its normal directive bent within the personality, therefore avoiding these abortive offshoots that impede main directives and purposes of the unit as a whole. The integration of the whole personality as a psychological unit, and as an effective psychic gestalt, is obviously dependent upon the free and unimpeded flow of action. Any impediments here can be most threatening to the integrity of the personality itself, for one aspect of the personality would benefit at the expense of other aspects.
quotes.translation: 因此，对任何人类人格而言，学会让行动在人格内遵循其正常导向至关重要，从而避免那些阻碍整体单元主要导向与目的的畸形分支。将整个人格整合为心理单元与有效的心灵完形，显然取决于行动的自由无阻流动。此处的任何阻碍都可能严重威胁人格本身的完整性，因为人格的某方面会以牺牲其他方面为代价获益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: In these circumstances, when the personality attaches itself at conception, there is almost without exception strong past-life connections between parents and child, or there is an unceasing and almost obsessional desire to return to the earthly situation -- either for a specific purpose, or because the reincarnating personality is presently obsessed with earthly existence. This is not necessarily detrimental. The personality can simply realize that it takes to physical experience well, is presently earth-oriented, and finds earthly atmosphere a rich dimension for the growth of its own abilities.
quotes.translation: 在这些情况下，当人格在受孕时附着，父母与孩子之间几乎必然存在强烈的前世关联，或存在一种持续且近乎执着的重返尘世情境的渴望——要么出于特定目的，要么因为转世人格当前沉迷于尘世存在。这未必有害。人格可以单纯认识到自己擅长体验物质实相，当前以地球为导向，并发现地球氛围是滋养自身能力的丰饶维度。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: But also Adam will have changed, at this point. He will be drawing energy from this other personality. He will be able to do more. But he will still be your version. Later if the process is continued, you will make valid contact with the personality for whom Adam now stands. This personality will then speak, communicate through Adam. Adam will then take on the characteristics of that other personality. He will still not be that personality. He will indeed be the psychological bridge, the psychological framework, structure and image through which that personality can communicate. Do you follow me?
quotes.translation: 但此时亚当也会有所改变。他将从这个其他人格中汲取能量，能够做到更多事情，但他仍将是你的版本。若此过程持续进行，你终将与亚当此刻所代表的人格建立有效联系。这个人格将通过亚当说话、沟通，而亚当将逐渐具备那个人格的特质。他仍不会成为那个人格，而是作为心理桥梁、心理框架、结构与意象，让那个人格得以通过他进行沟通。你明白我的意思吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The basic personality would be fearful of such communications, knowing instinctively the weakness of the ego. The ego would be extremely insecure. On the other hand, the personality would almost welcome a strong organizing force, regardless of its source, and could tend to latch onto it as much as possible. A study of secondary personalities is most fascinating, since such a study would give you an excellent idea of the manner in which the ego in general is formed, for it is but a unity of energy under auspices of the strongest actions characteristic within the given personality system.
quotes.translation: 基本人格会本能地意识到自我的脆弱，因而畏惧这类沟通。自我会极度缺乏安全感。另一方面，人格却几乎会欢迎任何强大的组织力量——无论其来源为何——并倾向于尽可能依附其上。对次级人格的研究极为引人入胜，因为这类研究能让你清晰了解自我通常是如何形成的——它不过是在特定人格系统内最强烈行动特质主导下形成的能量统一体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Almost everyone is familiar with something else, however, and that is the psychological experience which may have no observable physical effect, and yet can change a personality to a large degree. Now the change in the personality may have secondary physical effects. The personality may act in certain ways in the physical world as a result of a psychological experience. But these physical effects are secondary to the experience, and the experience of itself makes no physical effect upon the material world. Any such effects are made after the experience by the personality involved.
quotes.translation: 然而几乎每个人都熟悉另一种情况：某种心理体验可能不产生可观测的物理效应，却能极大改变人格。人格的改变可能引发次级物理效应——人格可能因心理体验而在物质世界以特定方式行动。但这些物理效应相对于体验本身是次要的，体验本身对物质世界不产生物理影响，任何此类影响都是体验发生后由相关人格造成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is when significant actions, important to the whole personality, are so rejected that the difficulties arise. It is also true however that these refusals to assimilate action on the egos part are also an integral part of the characteristics of the personality as a whole action. In each individual, certain categories of action may be habitually denied. As the characteristics of a personality may be somewhat deduced from those actions which the ego accepts, so also much may be learned about any given personality by a study of those actions which the ego habitually denies.
quotes.translation: 当对整体人格至关重要的重大行动遭到如此排斥时，困难便随之产生。但同样真实的是，自我层面拒绝同化行动的行为，本身也是人格作为整体行动的特质组成部分。每个个体都可能习惯性否认某些类别的行动。正如人格特质可从自我接受的行动中略窥一二，通过研究自我习惯性否认的行动，也能深入了解特定人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: A certain portion of Adam was: the version was... You had a body consciousness of a protective nature, but this was only one portion of an entire personality who has yet to appear. Now there is a reason for the bridge framework. The bridge framework takes exercise, understanding, and knowledge on both of your parts, therefore there would be no communication of a strong valid nature until your personality is able to maintain it, for the bridge will not be strong enough to hold. Otherwise there would be too many implications and personality difficulties that could arise.
quotes.translation: 亚当的某一部分是：这个版本是……你曾拥有保护性质的体意识，但这仅是尚未显现的完整人格的一部分。桥梁框架的存在自有其道理。这个框架需要你们双方共同锻炼、理解与积累知识，因此在你的人格能够维持它之前，不会产生强而有效的沟通——因为桥梁尚不够坚固。否则可能引发过多隐含问题与人格困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: However, we have among us this evening indeed a secondary personality, a strong and savage one. We have here this evening a secondary personality that attempts to rule the complete life of the personality of whom we have been speaking, and its name is ulcer. For where lies the difference? The personality literally lives its life about the existence of the ulcer. It is hardly worth it, for the personality must be led to see that it itself has created the ulcer, both psychologically and physically, in most actual terms, and that it itself can indeed cast it out.
quotes.translation: 然而今晚我们之中确实存在一个次级人格——一个强悍而野蛮的次级人格。这个试图主宰我们谈论之人全部生活的次级人格，它的名字叫溃疡。区别究竟何在？人格简直是在围绕溃疡的存在而活。这根本不值得，因为必须引导人格看清：它自己从最实际的意义上，在心理与生理层面创造了溃疡，而它自己确实能够将其驱逐。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: At one time the personality's sister was a father to the present personality. Since many of the building plans involved the construction of various kinds of temples, the personality has always been interested in acquiring knowledge concerning the nature of reality. There has been little concern with commerce. There is a need on the present personality's part to understand its own nature, and to use its abilities constructively. The personality has not come to grips with itself truly, but has the inner persistence and intuitiveness to do so.
quotes.translation: 人格的姊妹曾是其现在的父亲。由于许多建造计划涉及各种庙宇的构筑，此人一直对获取关于实相本质的知识感兴趣，对商业则鲜有关注。现在的人格需要理解自身的本质，并建设性地运用其能力。此人尚未真正面对自己，但内在的坚持与直觉足以使其做到这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The peculiar and individualistic aspects of personality are the result of those camouflaging abilities of which we have spoken earlier. Those portions of the personality which escape ego's attempts to dominate are held suspect in egos eyes. ego considers them as invalid and dangerous to its own supremacy. When ego is forced to admit that personality changes, it will do its best to avoid this knowledge. The more rigid an ego is, the more danger there is that the individual will have difficulties in all kinds of adjustments.
quotes.translation: 人格独特而个性化的面向，是我们先前讨论过的那些伪装能力的结果。人格中那些逃脱自我支配的部分，在自我眼中备受质疑。自我视其为无效且对其至高地位构成威胁。当自我被迫承认人格会改变时，它会竭力回避这一认知。自我越僵化，个体在各类调适过程中遭遇困难的风险就越大。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. If the basic personality is fairly well balanced, then his existence in the dream reality will reinforce his physical existence. The opposite will also hold true. You are involved in a juggling of realities. The dream reality is simply the nearest reality with which you are concerned outside of your physical preoccupation. It is necessary to see the personality as it operates within both realities, if you are interested in viewing the personality as a whole. And even then unless you delve deeply you will fall short.
quotes.translation: 现在。若基本人格相当平衡，那么他在梦境实相中的存在将强化其物质存在。反之亦然。你正参与一场实相的杂耍。梦境实相不过是你脱离物质执念后最贴近的实相。若想将人格视为整体来审视，就必须观察它在两种实相中的运作。即便如此，若不深入探究，你仍会有所欠缺。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In dreaming, such a dissociated state as Ruburt reached is of course the rule, only here the ability is used to form the dream images. But these dream images work for the entity as a whole and serve as a means for the various personalities to communicate. That is, in many cases for the previous incarnated personalities to correspond with the present personality. It is a means of acquainting the present personality with its past and also of reminding it of its goals, without disturbing that blatant awake ego.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中，鲁柏所达到的那种解离状态实属常态，只是此处这种能力被用于构建梦境影像。但这些梦境影像为整体存有服务，并作为各个人格沟通的媒介。也就是说，在许多情况下，这是前世人格与现世人格交流的方式。它让现世人格了解其过去，并提醒其目标，同时不惊扰那个张扬的清醒自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Different outer senses are necessary at different levels and on various planes to interpret the different camouflage patterns. These outer senses are developed to cope with these particular camouflage patterns which the personality will meet in its various environments. The inner senses always operate regardless of the particular environment in which the personality is presently involved. The inner senses provide the whole personality with balance, and enable it to keep in contact with its vitality source.
quotes.translation: 不同层面与不同境界需要不同的外在感官来解读不同的伪装模式。这些外在感官被发展出来，以应对人格在不同环境中将遭遇的特定伪装模式。无论人格当前处于何种特定环境，内在感官始终运作。内在感官为整体人格提供平衡，使其能与生命力源头保持联系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Knowledge does not exist independently of the one who knows. Someone gave Cayce the material. It did not come out of thin air. It came from an excellent source, a pyramid gestalt personality, with definite characteristics, but the alien nature of the personality was too startling to Cayce, and he could not perceive it. (Pause.) I am giving you the material through a personality that you can understand; one that is mine, one of my favorite selves. (Smile.) In this way the point is made so that it is clear.
quotes.translation: 知识并非独立于认知者而存在。有人向凯西提供了这些资料。它并非凭空而来。它源自一个卓越的源头——一个具有明确特征的金字塔格式人格，但该人格的异质性对凯西而言过于惊人，使他无法感知。（停顿。）我正通过一个你能理解的人格——即属于我的、我最钟爱的自我之一——向你传递这些资料。（微笑。）如此，要点便得以清晰呈现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Therefore, consciousness-of-self can appear with or without the existence of an ego. Consciousness-of-self is an attribute then of all physical species, regardless of their classification. Personality, human personality, is simply the name given to this class of self, as applied and seen within human beings. Personality changes and acts upon all other action. Personality, then, can be seen to operate as a field of action in identity; but identity that is conscious of its relation to action as a whole.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我意识可以在有或没有自我存在的情况下出现。自我意识是所有物质物种的属性，无论其分类如何。人格，人类人格，只是赋予这类自我的名称，应用于人类并被视为人类的一部分。人格改变并作用于所有其他行动。因此，人格可以被视为身份中的一个行动场域；但这是意识到自身与整体行动关系的身份。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In this existence however the personality of its own free will chose to understand in a different context, and work out problems faced so poorly in the earlier life. This time the personality is John's wife, being cared for, you see, rather than caring for; being physically dependent. The personality could not and would not, out of fear, try to understand the circumstances and position of the crippled daughter. Not for a moment could he then bear to contemplate the inner reality in personal terms.
quotes.translation: 然而，在这一存在中，人格凭借其自由意志选择在不同的背景下理解，并解决早期生活中处理得很糟糕的问题。这一次，人格是约翰的妻子，被照顾着，你看，而不是照顾别人；在身体上依赖他人。出于恐惧，这个人格无法也不愿去理解那个残疾女儿的情况和处境。那时他片刻都无法以个人角度去思考内在实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Indeed, oftentimes they serve to preserve the integrity of the whole psychological system, and to point out the existence of inner problems. Often they serve temporary functions, leading the personality from other more severe areas of difficulty. I am not here saying that all illness is good. I am saying that illness is a portion of the action of which any personality is composed, and therefore it is purposeful, and cannot be considered as an alien force that attacks the personality from without.
quotes.translation: 事实上，它们常常有助于维护整个心理系统的完整性，并指出内在问题的存在。它们常常发挥临时功能，引导人格远离其他更严重的困难领域。我并不是说所有疾病都是好的。我是说疾病是构成任何人格的行动的一部分，因此它是有目的的，不能被视为从外部攻击人格的外来力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It dabbles in both your future and your past, speaking now in your terms. As you create a painting, and the painting is still an aspect of yourself, so it creates the whole personality, which is an aspect of itself. It operates in both the waking and the dream state. It often forms the content of each. It is more knowledgeable than any one aspect of the personality. It is more knowledgeable than all other aspects of the personality, for it forms them together into a cohesive whole.
quotes.translation: 它涉足你的未来和过去，现在用你的术语来说。就像你创作一幅画，而画仍然是你的一个面向，所以它创造了整个人格，而人格是它自身的一个面向。它在清醒状态和梦境状态中都运作。它常常构成两者的内容。它比人格的任何单一面向都更有知识。它比人格的所有其他面向都更有知识，因为它将它们整合成一个凝聚的整体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: That is the analogy. In actuality the mind is but a which looks out for the personality on the camouflage plane. Your guardian angel legends and such refer to this part of the entity, which is the mind and which is attached to the present personality during this particular existence. The mind helps to keep the personality from going too far astray. I use the term personality to include the whole person. I use it to express the entirety manifested in physical form, in one life.
quotes.translation: 这就是类比。实际上，心智只是人格在伪装层上的一个瞭望者。你的守护天使传说等指的是存有的这一部分，即心智，在这一特定存在期间与当前人格相连。心智有助于防止人格偏离太远。我使用人格一词来包括整个人。我用它来表达在一生中以物质形式显现的整体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: (12:21.) These characters become portions of the inner literature of the mind. Suppose an inhabitant from another reality saw [one of those three programs] and realized that people were watching it. Pretend he wanted to add more depth to the show. He might then come on himself in the guise of [the hero detective], but enlarging upon the characterization, adding more dimension to the plot. So, often when some personality from another station wants to help change the programming, he comes on in the form of a personality already known in fact or fiction. However, you must realize that that personality is larger than fact or fiction. "It" is independent at its own level, yet it is also a part of the portion of the private and mass psyche that is so represented.
quotes.translation: （12:21。）这些角色成为心智内在文学的一部分。假设来自另一个实相的居民看到了[那些节目之一]，并意识到人们在观看它。假设他想为节目增添更多深度。那么他可能会以[英雄侦探]的伪装亲自出现，但扩展角色塑造，为情节增加更多维度。因此，当来自另一个站台的人格想要帮助改变节目编排时，他常常以已知的事实或虚构中的人格形式出现。然而，你必须意识到，那个人格比事实或虚构更宏大。"它"在其自身层面上是独立的，但它也是所代表的私人及大众心灵的一部分。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 711
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It floundered like a wet rag in a foul wind. This all ties in with the personality fragments which we discussed earlier. In like manner the personality is divided, one part conscious of the primary self and another disconnected and waiting formation into something new. On a subconscious basis this is exactly how you both created the images at York Beach, the difference being that the personality split occurred on the subconscious level.
quotes.translation: 它像一块湿布在恶风中飘摇。这完全与我们之前讨论的人格碎片有关。同样地，人格被分裂了，一部分意识到原初自性，另一部分则断开连接，等待形成新的东西。在潜意识层面上，这正是你们俩在约克海滩创造那些影像的方式，区别在于人格分裂发生在潜意识层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When the personality is well integrated, then even when it operates as a separate unit the ego still fulfills the basic purposes of the personality as a whole. It is the communication between the very areas of the self which is so important here, as in many other matters. It is possible for the ego to realize its position as but one part of the whole personality, while it still behaves in a directive manner toward physical manipulation.
quotes.translation: 当人格高度整合时，即使它作为一个独立单元运作，自我仍能实现人格整体的基本目的。自我各区域之间的沟通在此至关重要，正如在许多其他事情中一样。自我有可能认识到自己只是整体人格的一部分，同时仍能对物质操控发挥指导作用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: We have to some extent explained the reality of the personality within the electrical system. We have to some extent explained its basic origin within inner reality. We have explained the fact that the potentialities of the personality and of the self are basically unlimited. But during its alliance within the physical system, it is diffused within the cellular structure, and interrelating actions between the biological system, the electrical system, and the personality structure actually form the reality of the human individual.
quotes.translation: 我们在某种程度上解释了电性系统内人格的实相。我们在某种程度上解释了它在内在实相中的基本起源。我们解释了人格和自性的潜能基本无限这一事实。但在物质系统内的结合期间，它分散在细胞结构中，生物系统、电性系统和人格结构之间的相互作用实际上形成了人类个体的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There is usually strain involved here, since points of reference must be changed. The personality is already immersed in a dimensional transformation; when the emotional need of those within the physical plane call out for communication, they add to the pull or force of the attraction still present, binding portions of the personality to the physical field, and can add to the resistance encountered by personalities in transformation.
quotes.translation: 这里通常涉及压力，因为参考点必须改变。人格已沉浸于维度转化中；当物质层面的人的情感需求呼唤沟通时，他们增加了仍存在的吸引力或拉力，将人格的部分束缚在物质领域，并可能增加转化中人格所遇到的阻力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The personality is on its own, with what you may call the power of self-determination and free will. If you had thoroughly remembered our material on value fulfillment, you would know that the only detriment to so-called free will is the built-in necessity for value fulfillment. The personality must gain experience, in other words, on a particular level of existence, on which or within which it operates, and it cannot choose otherwise. It must experience existence on the particular level on which it has been projected.
quotes.translation: 人格是独立的，拥有你们所谓的自决力和自由意志。如果你们彻底记住了我们关于价值完成的资料，就会知道所谓自由意志的唯一损害是价值完成的内在必要性。换言之，人格必须在它运作的特定存在层面上获得经验，它无法选择其他方式。它必须体验它被投射到的特定层面的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Ruburt was correct in his assumptions about your cat. All of this has to do with the nature of existence and personality, for your personality directly affects your plants. Personality can have a corrosive or soothing effect upon such unlikely things as the paint upon your walls. So smoothly and yet so constantly do these effects change as personalities come and go that your universe as it seems to you, seems to continue to exist.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏对你们猫的假设是正确的。这一切都与存在和人格的本质有关，因为你们的人格直接影响你们的植物。人格甚至可能对诸如墙上的油漆之类看似无关的东西产生腐蚀或安抚的效果。随着人格的来来去去，这些效果如此平稳又如此持续地变化，以至于你们所看到的宇宙似乎继续存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now, no psychological structure is easy to describe in words. Simply to explain the nature of personality as it is generally known, all kinds of terms are used: id, subconscious, ego, superego; all of these to differentiate the interweaving actions that make up the physical personality. The dreaming self is just as complicated. So you can say that certain portions of it deal with physical reality, physical manipulation, and plans; some with deeper levels of creativity and achievement that insure physical survival; some with communication, with even more extensive elements of the personality now generally unknown; some with the continuing experience and existence of what you may call the soul or overall individual entity, the true multidimensional self.
quotes.translation: 没有任何心理结构是容易用语言描述的。仅就一般所知的人格本质而言，人们使用了各种术语：本我、潜意识、自我、超我——所有这些术语都是为了区分构成物质人格的交织活动。做梦的自我同样复杂。因此，你可以说它的某些部分处理物质实相、物质操控和计划；某些部分处理更深层的创造力和成就层面，以确保物质生存；某些部分处理沟通，涉及人格中目前普遍未知的更广泛元素；某些部分处理你所谓灵魂或整体个体存有——即真正的多维自体的持续经验与存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The nonphysical personality does not think in terms of words, but experiences concepts in a much more direct manner. This sort of thing simply could not be understood by the physically focused individual ... The survival personality's inner self gives this reassembled ego ideas in the same way that, often, the subconscious gives the ego concepts in physical existence. This reassembled ego then attempts to perceive these insights in terms of sense perceptions, which are sent to the physical individual at the other end. Sometimes the communications are made directly, though they must be sifted through the subconscious of the one who is physical. When that person is trained along these lines, however [as Ruburt is], he or she helps in this process, and a psychological framework, like a bridge,22 is erected that serves to connect the two personalities.
quotes.translation: 非物质人格不以文字思考，而是以更直接的方式体验概念。这种事根本不可能被聚焦于物质世界的个体所理解……生存人格的内在自我以同样方式给予这个重组后的自我观念，就像在物质存在中，潜意识常常给予自我概念一样。这个重组后的自我随后试图以感官感知的方式理解这些洞见，并将其传送给另一端的物质个体。有时沟通是直接进行的，尽管它们必须通过物质个体的潜意识进行筛选。然而，当那个人在这方面受过训练时（如鲁柏那样），他或她会协助这个过程，并建立起一个类似桥梁的心理架构，用以连接这两个人格。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The portrait is of Joseph and Ruburt. These are not portraits of yourselves as past personalities in your terms, or of particular re-incarnational selves. They are pictorial representatives of the whole selves that you are. In your terms the selves that are the sum of your re-incarnational personalities. These whole selves then are a part of your entity. Your probable selves are also a part of your entity, however. If you want to think in terms of guides, in quotes "angels," then you have the reality behind those terms. Ruburt and Joseph are the names I use for you, for these names themselves imply your greater goals. These personalities are aware of your present existence, and give you advice when you are in the sleep state. They are a source of strength. You can draw upon their knowledge, and you can also draw upon the knowledge of your own re-incarnational selves, past, in quotes, and future.
quotes.translation: 这幅画像是约瑟和鲁柏。这些不是你们所谓过去人格或特定转世自我的画像。它们是你们所是的整体自体的图像化代表。用你们的说法，这些自体是你们所有转世人格的集合。然而，这些整体自体是你们存有的一部分。你们的可能自体也是存有的一部分。如果你想用"指导灵"或引号中的"天使"来思考，那么这些术语背后确实有其实相。鲁柏和约瑟是我用来称呼你们的名字，因为这些名字本身就暗示了你们更伟大的目标。这些人格知晓你们当前的存在，并在你们处于睡眠状态时给予建议。他们是力量的源泉。你们可以汲取他们的知识，也可以汲取你们自己"过去"和"未来"转世自我的知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In this particular context however the dream world will be considered in its relationship to the personality. In many ways the dream universe does operate within this context, and is part of the personality framework. As the personality is changed by any experience or any action, so it is changed by its own dreams. Here again we see how energy or action operates within itself. We can even trace the actions and interactions.
quotes.translation: 然而，在此特定脉络下，我们将探讨梦境世界与人格的关系。在许多方面，梦宇宙确实在此脉络中运作，并且是人格架构的一部分。正如人格会因任何经验或行动而改变，它也会因自己的梦境而改变。在此我们再次看到能量或行动如何在自身内部运作。我们甚至可以追踪这些行动与互动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, involving the performance on Ruburts part this evening, we have here once more another example of the nature in which action is changed by itself. For indeed, as it was possible for Ruburt to some slight degree to allow her friend to speak, nevertheless the action involved in the whole situation nevertheless changed not only Ruburt, but also necessarily changed her Father Trainor, in that any action of its own nature can never remain the same. His personality, that is the Father Trainor personality, was of necessity changed by this communication in the same manner that any experience will always change any personality.
quotes.translation: 今晚涉及鲁柏的表现，我们再次看到行动如何被自身改变的一个例子。因为，正如鲁柏能在某种程度上让她的朋友说话，整个情境所涉及的行动不仅改变了鲁柏，也必然改变了她的父亲特雷纳——因为任何行动就其本质而言，永远不可能保持不变。他的人格，即父亲特雷纳的人格，必然因这次沟通而改变，正如任何经验总会改变任何人格一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now and then with Ruburt, when I am allowed to manifest myself to a smaller or lesser degree, my own habits therefore show through, for I manipulate his muscles in a different way than he does. But, scientifically, this would not be proof of my existence as an independent personality who has survived physical death. Not that this concerns me, for it does not ... Or, if you are thinking in terms of secondary personalities,20 you can prove nothing one way or another. A secondary personality could indeed use gestures that are different [from Ruburt's]. Either way, this would be no proof as to my independent nature. (With humor:) I am glad to see that it has been bothering you. You have had a good think session!
quotes.translation: 偶尔，当鲁柏允许我以较小程度显现时，我自己的习惯便会显露出来，因为我操控他肌肉的方式与他不同。但科学上，这并不能证明我是一个独立人格且已超越物质死亡而存在。不过这并不让我担心，因为事实并非如此……或者，如果你考虑的是次人格，那么你无论如何都无法证明任何事。次人格确实可能使用与鲁柏不同的手势。无论哪种情况，这都不能证明我的独立本质。（带着幽默：）我很高兴看到这件事一直困扰着你。你进行了一次很好的思考！
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."

This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: We have discussed this subject to some degree. However we have not begun a study in depth. It is now time for us to do so. The personality as you know is composed of energy gestalts. The dreams created by the personality can be considered therefore as a part of the changing personality. We are speaking here in one context only, for we know that the dream universe is also to some extent independent of personality.
quotes.translation: 我们已在一定程度上讨论过这个主题，但尚未开始深入研究。现在正是时候。人格如你所知是由能量完形所组成。因此人格创造的梦境可被视为变化中人格的一部分。我们在此仅从一个脉络讨论，因为我们知道梦境宇宙在某种程度上也独立于人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The excitement however is counterfeit at present. The questioner hunts out an object, another personality, when she basically believes the personality is unattainable. The other personality is not sought for because of any inherent qualities of his own. He serves, instead, as a substitute in a quest that the questioner has not yet begun.
quotes.translation: 然而目前这种兴奋是虚假的。提问者追寻一个目标、另一个人格，而她根本相信这个人格是无法企及的。她寻求另一个人格并非因其本身固有的特质，而是作为她尚未开始的追寻中的替代品。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Each reader, however, should in one way or another sense his own vitality in a way quite new to him, and find avenues of expansion opening within himself of which he was earlier unaware. The very nature of this book, the method of its creation and delivery, in themselves should clearly point out the fact that human personality has far more abilities than those usually ascribed to it. By now you should understand that all personalities are not physically materialized. As this book was conceived and written by a nonphysical personality, and then made physical, so do each of you have access to greater abilities and methods of communication than those usually accepted.
quotes.translation: 然而每位读者都应以某种前所未有的方式感知自身的活力，并发现内在展开的、先前未曾察觉的扩展途径。本书的本质、其创作与传递方式本身，应清楚指明人类人格拥有远超通常归因于它的能力。此刻你们应明白所有人格并非都以物质形态显现。正如本书由非物质人格构思书写而后物质化，你们每个人也都能触及比通常接受的更伟大的能力与沟通方法。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Each reader, being presently ensconced within a physical form, I presume (humorously), knows only a small portion of himself -- as I mentioned earlier. The entity is the overall identity of which his personality is one manifestation -- an independent and eternally valid portion. In these communications, therefore, Ruburt's consciousness expands, and yet focuses in a different dimension, a dimension between his reality and mine, a field relatively free of distraction. Here I impress certain concepts upon him, with his permission and assent. They are not neutral, in that all knowledge or information bears the stamp of the personality who holds it or passes it on.
quotes.translation: 我假设（幽默地）每位读者目前安坐于物质形体中，只认识自身的一小部分——如我先前所述。存有是整体身份，人格是其一种显现——独立且永恒有效的部分。因此在这些通讯中，鲁柏的意识扩展，却聚焦于不同维度——介于他的实相与我的实相之间的维度，一个相对无干扰的场域。在此我经他允许与同意将某些概念烙印于他。这些概念并非中立，因为所有知识或信息都带有持有或传递它的人格印记。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In certain terms, and in certain terms only, and speaking now as the psychological bridge personality, then what you perceive in me and these abilities represents a portion of Ruburt that is utterly free in those directions -- a portion of the human mind, as you understand it, goes beyond the threshold of itself into other dimensions of actuality; then, as best it can, it translates what it learns, sees, and experiences. It goes out of itself -- it launches itself on paths that it does not understand, taking journeys that even Ruburt does not understand; and yet, that one portion of Ruburt's human personality is that free. And so you can see what happens!
quotes.translation: 以特定术语而言（且仅限特定术语），现在作为心理桥梁人格发言，那么你在我身上感知到的这些能力，代表鲁柏在那些方向上完全自由的部分——人类心智的一部分（如你所理解）超越自身门槛进入实相的其他维度；然后尽其所能翻译所学、所见与所体验。它走出自身——将自己投射到连它自己都不理解的路径上，进行连鲁柏都不理解的旅程；然而，鲁柏人类人格的那部分就是如此自由。因此你能看到发生了什么！
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Now I'll refer the reader to Note 6 for Session 711, which is the session for which I'm assembling this chronology to begin with. In that note I presented some material on ancient connections with the name, Seth, then quoted Seth on the subject of names from the ESP class session for April 17, 1973. For instance:)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Again, you are doing very well. Bega is learning my material in our own classes, but he must also interpret this, and as I said earlier he tailors it for you, knowing you so well. Now, I adopt the personality that you know, and it is quite legitimate, but it is only one of my personalities. Know then that other personalities are also here, and in ways that you do not understand, and that is the end of the sentence. (To me, humorously.) The familiar human component is necessary, and it is by my characteristics that you know me, but the entity is an ancient one, and we are far more concerned with other things than your position at your bank.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，你做得很好。贝加在我们自己的课堂上学习我的资料，但他也必须诠释这些内容，如我先前所说，他为你量身定制，因他如此了解你。现在我采用你所认识的人格，这完全合理，但这只是我众多人格之一。须知其他人格也在此，以你们不理解的方式存在，这句话到此为止。（对我幽默地说）熟悉的人类成分是必要的，你正是通过我的特征认识我，但存有是古老的，我们远比关心你在银行的职位更关心其他事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I have a few matters to discuss here. The probable realities of which I have spoken are separated from your own, not in terms of space but in terms of energy focus. Survival personalities, as you term them, are not separated from you in space either, but in terms of energy focus.You do not perceive them physically. The direction of focus for them has changed. In the case of probable realities the focus of energy has always been different from your own. It is quite possible, as you should know, under certain circumstances, to contact survival personalities. It is highly difficult however for you to contact your own probable personalities.
quotes.translation: 我在此有几件事要讨论。我所说的那些或然实相与你们的实相并不以空间区分，而是以能量焦点区分。你们所谓的存续人格与你们之间也不以空间分隔，而是以能量焦点分隔。你们无法以肉体感知它们。它们的焦点方向已经改变。就或然实相而言，其能量焦点始终与你们的不同。如你所知，在某些情况下，与存续人格接触是完全可能的。然而，要与你们自己的或然人格接触则极为困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The human personality is far more open to all kinds of stimuli than is supposed. If information is thought to come to the self only through physical means, then of course heredity and environment must be seen behind human motivation. When you realize that the personality can and does have access to other kinds of information than physical, then you must begin to wonder what effects those data have on the formation of character and individual growth. Children do already possess character at birth, and the entire probable intent of their lives exists then as surely as does the probable plan for the adult body they will later possess.
quotes.translation: 人类人格对各种刺激的开放程度远超想象。如果人们认为信息只能通过物质途径到达自我，那么当然会将遗传和环境视为人类动机背后的因素。当你意识到人格能够且确实能获取物质以外的信息时，就必须开始思考这些数据对性格形成和个人成长产生的影响。儿童出生时已具备性格，他们整个生命的或然意图在那时便已存在，正如他们未来将拥有的成人身体的或然计划一样确凿。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 827, MARCH 13, 1978
9:59 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: It is true that Priestley speaks in terms of consciousness being retained at this stage, but a consciousness devoid of personality is an odd bird indeed. The personality structure changes, it is true, but consciousness of overall identities within any given unit of consciousness is always retained. There is no blending or merging, willy-nilly, into a gigantic ever-rushing-on spirit of life. And the spirit of life in these terms cannot be considered as something apart and separate from, and outside of, those consciousnesses which illuminate it, and through which they are illuminated. And here is our second difficulty with Priestley.
quotes.translation: 普里斯特利确实谈到意识在此阶段得以保留，但缺乏人格的意识实属怪异之物。人格结构确实会改变，但任何意识单元内整体身份的觉知始终得以保留。不存在随意混合或融合成一股奔腾不息的生命之灵的情况。而生命之灵在此意义上不能被视作与照亮它的那些意识相分离、相割裂或存在于其外的东西——这些意识既照亮生命之灵，也通过生命之灵被照亮。这便是我们与普里斯特利的第二个分歧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: As in many cases an old man will appear womanish, so a personality reincarnated steadily as a male will develop strong and overly compensated for female characteristics, as is the case with Loren in this existence. The very fact that the personality evades a female reincarnation is evidence of an already developed fear. The personality of Loren, you see, is basically female despite the fact that he has never had a female reincarnation. This led to the confusion.
quotes.translation: 正如许多情况下老人会显现女性特质，一个持续转世为男性的人格也会发展出强烈且过度补偿的女性特征，洛伦在此生便是如此。人格逃避女性转世这一事实本身，就是已发展出恐惧的证据。你看，洛伦的人格本质上是女性化的，尽管他从未有过女性转世。这导致了混淆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Dictation: Luckily the human mind and body are far more flexible, durable and creative than ever given credit for. Many cases like Augustus's never come to light. The individuals involved cure themselves. Sometimes this is done when such a person chooses to undergo a traumatic experience -- often one part of the personality will plan this quite deliberately while the other portion closes its eyes. These events can seem to be disasters or near disasters, and yet they can sufficiently mobilize the entire personality for survival's sake. In a moment of high critical tension the personality may put itself together again.
quotes.translation: 口授：幸运的是，人类心智与身体的灵活性、耐久性和创造力远超人们所给予的认可。许多像奥古斯都这样的案例从未被揭露。涉及的个人自行疗愈。有时这种情况发生在当事人选择经历创伤性体验时——往往人格的一部分会相当刻意地策划此事，而另一部分则闭目无视。这些事件看似灾难或近乎灾难，却能为了生存而充分动员整个人格。在高度紧张的临界时刻，人格可能重新整合自身。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This fact is responsible to a large degree for your death shock, and for the more powerful birth shock, when the new personality awakes to the prisonlike clutch of rigid camouflage pattern. Other levels have different and sometimes severe problems of a different type. One of the basic purposes of existence on your plane is to enable the personality to focus powerfully and to form basic vitality into creative pattern. Sometimes the lesson is learned too well. However, it is extremely difficult for personalities to learn to organize vitality well enough to give it form, and therefore some troubles are to be expected.
quotes.translation: 这一事实在很大程度上导致了你们的死亡冲击，以及更强烈的出生冲击——当新人格在僵化伪装模式的牢笼般束缚中苏醒时。其他层面存在不同类型且有时严重的难题。你们层面存在的基本目的之一，是使人格能够强力聚焦，并将基本生命力塑造成创造性模式。有时这个功课学得太好了。然而，人格要学习充分组织生命力以赋予其形态是极其困难的，因此某些困扰是可以预见的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The personality structure can be studied from many viewpoints. We are now studying it in relation to its basic reality as action. While it may seem that the personality would be a result of a series of actions, this is not basically the case. The personality in actuality is simultaneous action, that is composed of actions within actions. Portions of it are conscious of its awareness as a part of action, and portions of it attempt to stand aside from action.
quotes.translation: 人格结构可从许多角度加以研究。我们现在正从它作为行动的基本实相来探讨。虽然人格看似是系列行动的结果，但本质上并非如此。人格实际上是同时性的行动，由行动中的行动所组成。其部分意识到自身作为行动一部分的觉知，而部分则试图置身于行动之外。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There are interchanges of energy within you constantly, as you know. Your personality per se changes in this life. It is never static. The components of Ruburt's personality and of your own, Joseph, have changed since our sessions began. Now, Ruburt's whole personality had to assimilate the knowledge that he was receiving, but this automatically changed the personality from what it was.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，你内在不断进行着能量交换。你的人格本身在此生中不断变化。自我们的课程开始以来，鲁柏和你约瑟的人格组成都已改变。现在，鲁柏的整个人格必须吸收他所接收的知识，但这自动改变了人格原有的样貌。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It should be emphasized however that dream experiences can have a more lasting and vital effect upon the personality than many so-called physical experiences, for the dream experiences are not blocked nearly as much as waking experience is blocked. The suggestion that also occurs within the dream state works even more effectively upon the whole personality than any suggestion works under ordinary circumstances. And dreams certainly do contain suggestions, and they are reacted to by the personality, not only on a subconscious basis and a psychological basis, but they affect the whole system.
quotes.translation: 然而必须强调，梦境体验对人格的影响比许多所谓的物质体验更持久且更具活力，因为梦境体验受到的阻碍远少于清醒体验。在梦境状态中发生的暗示，对整个人格的作用效果甚至比任何普通情况下的暗示更显著。梦境确实包含暗示，人格不仅会在潜意识层面和心理层面做出反应，这些暗示还会影响整个系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There has been the inner sense of avoid to be filled, a fear of identity escaping and running outward--my cup runneth over, and there will be none of me left, you see. On the other hand it has always been natural for the personality to turn outward in an easy manner, and with exuberance, so that in past lives we find two lives strongly devoted to the nurture of others. But in these cases the personality was filled with an inner dread, and to some extent resented those he helped. If he were out helping others, then who will mind the store? He was afraid his stock would be gone.
quotes.translation: 内在始终存在一种需要填补的空虚感，一种害怕身份逃逸外泄的恐惧——我的杯子满溢，将不再有自我留存，你明白吗。另一方面，人格向来自然地以轻松愉悦的方式向外展现，因此在过去世中我们发现有两世强烈致力于滋养他人。但在这些案例中，人格充满内在恐惧，并在某种程度上怨恨他所帮助的对象。若他外出助人，谁来照看店铺？他害怕自己的库存会耗尽。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The survival personality therefore momentarily inserts his ego in its old position. It can then interpret this data in terms that can be received and understood. This reassembly however does cause some disorientation on the part of the survival personality. The ego, back in its dominant position, finds the circumstances difficult to deal with. It is being asked to manipulate in a manner unfamiliar to it. The survival personality's inner self gives this reassembled ego concepts in the same way that, often, the subconscious gives the ego concepts in physical existence.
quotes.translation: 因此存续人格会暂时将自我置回其原有位置。这样它就能以可接收和理解的方式解读这些资料。但这种重组确实会造成存续人格一定程度的迷失方向。当自我回到主导位置时，会发现难以应对当前处境。它被要求以不熟悉的方式运作。存续人格的内在自我会向这个重组后的自我传递概念，其方式正如物质存在中潜意识常向自我传递概念一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The peculiar nature of the impeding action or illness has much to do with its persistence. The whole focus of the personality can shift from constructive areas to a concentration of main energies in the area of the impeding action or illness. In such a case the illness actually represents a new unifying system. Now, if the old unifying system of the personality has broken down, the illness, serving as a makeshift, temporary emergency measure, may hold the integrity of the personality intact until a new constructive unifying principle replaces the original.
quotes.translation: 阻碍性行动或疾病的特殊性质与其持续性密切相关。人格的整个焦点可能从建设性领域转移，将主要能量集中于阻碍性行动或疾病的领域。在这种情况下，疾病实际上代表一种新的统一系统。若人格原有的统一系统已经崩溃，作为临时应急措施的疾病，可能维持人格的完整性，直到新的建设性统一原则取代原有原则。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Entities, if they prefer, and under various conditions, when they become acquainted with others, may introduce to each other if they so prefer, various portions of their personalities. These various portions will be able to help each other and to aid in development. Take for example entity A and entity B. Self A personality of entity A may get along quite nicely with B's self B. As self 2 and B's self 2 may not get along well at all, so the entities will shift to those personalities which have the greatest rapport, and use them to establish a relationship.
quotes.translation: 存有们若愿意，且在各种条件下，当他们结识他人时，可以依其偏好向对方介绍自身人格的不同部分。这些不同部分将能相互帮助并促进发展。以存有A与存有B为例：存有A的自我A人格可能与B的自我B相处得极为融洽，而A的自我2与B的自我2却可能完全不合，因此存有们会转向最具共鸣的人格面向，并以此建立关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Until the new personality enters, the fetus regards itself as a part of the organism of the mother. This support is suddenly denied at birth. If the new personality has not entered earlier to any full extent, it usually does so at birth, in order to stabilize the new organism. It comforts the new organism, in other words. The new personality, therefore, will experience birth to varying degrees according to when it has entered this dimension.
quotes.translation: 在新人格进入之前，胎儿视自身为母体有机体的一部分。这种支撑在出生时骤然消失。若新人格此前未完全进入，通常会在出生时完成这一过程，以稳定新生有机体。换言之，它安抚着这个新生命。因此，新人格会根据其进入此维度的时机，以不同程度体验出生过程。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We are dealing here, again, merely with the various aspects of action. As a personality itself is an action gestalt, within the inner self there is a capsule comprehension of the purposes and intents of the whole personality. These are indeed within the very structure, both psychic and physical, of the personality itself. The ego, on its own as a separate unit, does not have such data, although since it is after all a portion of the whole self, it does have such information available. But when it acts as a unit it does not use such information.
quotes.translation: 我们在此再次仅探讨行动的不同面向。由于人格本身即是行动完形，内在自体之中存有对整体人格目的与意图的胶囊式理解。这些确实存在于人格自身的灵性与物质结构中。自我作为独立单元运作时并不拥有此类数据，尽管它终究是整体自体的一部分，确实可获取这些信息。但当它作为单元运作时，并不运用此类信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: There was a village in the southern part of France. 1230. The personality was a primitive mason. A crib turns over, a child is killed. 1643. Belgium. The personality died in infancy. Later the personality returns to Belgium after a lapse of fifteen years. Also a drummer boy in a civil war. There has been trouble with a hand, also an ear. At times a throat difficulty.
quotes.translation: 法国南部曾有个村庄。1230年。该人格是名粗陋的石匠。摇篮翻覆，孩童丧生。1643年。比利时。该人格在襁褓中夭折。十五年后该人格重返比利时。还曾在内战中当过鼓手。曾有过手部与耳部疾患。时而出现喉部不适。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: For a portion of the self that is relatively so powerless, this is quite presumptive. It is obviously no coincidence that almost the entire survival of the organism is held under the responsibility of the subconscious. To be somewhat prosaic here, it is nevertheless true that the whole efficiency of the personality can be improved if the inclinations of the subconscious are taken into consideration, in the manner of clothes and accessories and living surroundings in general. The personality is simply not pulling against itself so much.
quotes.translation: 对于自体中相对无力的部分而言，这相当僭越。有机体几乎全部存续责任都由潜意识承担，这显然绝非偶然。说得平实些，若以衣着配饰及整体生活环境等方式考量潜意识倾向，人格的整体效能确实能得到提升。人格便不会如此严重地自我对抗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The uniqueness that is your own personality is to be cherished. It has (underlined) a meaning. You have no more right to crush it than you have to crush a flower. The particular purpose of your present (underlined) personality can only be met in the present circumstances, in the way that is best overall. The challenges can be met at another time and in another life, this is true, but the particular people that you can help and the particular good that you can do, can never be done in precisely (underlined) the same way.
quotes.translation: 你自身人格的独特性值得珍视。它（着重号）具有意义。你无权摧毁它，正如无权摧折花朵。你当前（着重号）人格的特定目的，只能在当下情境中以最周全的方式实现。诚然，挑战可在另一时空、另一生命阶段应对，但你能帮助的特定之人、能成就的特定善举，永远无法以完全（着重号）相同的方式完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It should be obvious that there is nothing strange in the fact that the dreaming self and the waking self appear so unfamiliar to each other. The study of hypnotism will greatly enlarge man's understanding of human personality in general. These separate states of consciousness, these multiple levels of awareness, these seemingly unrelated personality aspects, are not unnatural artificial productions, brought about through hypnosis. Hypnotism is merely a method that allows you to study the personality directly.
quotes.translation: 显而易见，做梦的自我与清醒的自我彼此显得如此陌生，这并没有什么奇怪之处。对催眠术的研究将大大拓展人类对人格整体的理解。这些分离的意识状态、这些多层次的觉知、这些看似互不相关的人格面向，并非通过催眠产生的不自然的人为产物。催眠术只是一种让你能直接研究人格的方法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is not to say that other realities do not exist. I have been conscious before your earth was formed. To write this book -- and in most of my communications with Ruburt -- I adopt from my own bank of past personalities those characteristics that seem appropriate. There are many of us, personalities like myself, unfocused in physical matter or time. Our existence seems strange to you only because you do not realize the true potentials of personality, and you are hypnotized by your own limited concepts.
quotes.translation: 这并非说其他实相不存在。在你们地球形成之前，我就已经拥有意识。为了撰写这本书——以及在与鲁柏的大部分沟通中——我从自己过去人格的储备中选取那些看似合适的特质。有许多像我这样的人格，并不聚焦于物质或时间之中。我们的存在对你们而言显得奇怪，只是因为你们尚未认识到人格的真正潜能，并且被自己有限的观念所催眠。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We shall discuss this later. A personality, or personalized energy, is never destroyed; but transformation of form remains a necessity for continuation of each personality, and in some cases an emotional denial on the part of the living, of this fact, can lead to resistance in so far as the personality of those no longer connected with the physical field. This resistance must then be coped with, and results in difficulties that could be lessened through understanding on the part of those so-called living.
quotes.translation: 我们稍后会讨论这一点。人格，或人格化的能量，永远不会被摧毁；但形式的转化仍是每个人格延续的必要条件，在某些情况下，生者对此事实的情感否认，可能导致那些已不再与物质场域相连的人格产生抗拒。这种抗拒必须被处理，并造成困难，而这些困难本可通过所谓生者的理解而减轻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is no such lapse in many other personality structures. Events, many events, are simultaneously perceived. Reactions are also nearly instantaneous in your terms. Growth and challenge is provided not in terms of achievement or development in time, but instead in terms of intensities. Such a personality is able, in your terms, not only to react and appreciate event A, say, in your present time, but also to experience and understand event A in all of its ramifications, and all of its probabilities.
quotes.translation: 在许多其他人格结构中并不存在这种断裂。事件——许多事件——是被同时感知的。反应在你们的时间尺度上也几乎是即时的。成长与挑战并非以时间中的成就或发展来衡量，而是以强度来衡量。用你们的话说，这样一个人格不仅能对事件A（比如你们当前时间中的事件）做出反应并欣赏它，还能体验并理解事件A的所有分支及其所有可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The psychic experiences are then used as poetic subjects, and this cycle of creativity is always enriched as the whole personality continually develops itself and grows. Any undue tampering disrupts this function. The personality could not approach its own promise until the poetic nature led to the psychic development. When this occurred, some personality adjustments were required. The ego felt threatened in direct proportion to the strength of the newly felt abilities, and performed a huge trick.
quotes.translation: 灵性体验随后被用作诗意的主题，随着整个人格不断自我发展成长，这个创造循环总是更加丰富。任何不当的干预都会扰乱这一功能。人格无法接近其自身潜能，除非诗意本性引领了灵性发展。当这种情况发生时，就需要进行一些人格调整。自我感受到的威胁与新获得的能力强度成正比，于是它耍了一个大把戏。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Channels, psychological and psychic, always exist, sending communications back and forth through the various levels of the self, and the ego accepts necessary information and data from inner portions of the personality without question. Its position in fact depends in a large manner upon this unquestioning acceptance of inner data. The ego, in other words, the "exterior" self that you think of as your self -- that portion of you maintains its safety and its seeming command precisely because inner layers of your own personality constantly uphold it, keep the physical body operating, and maintain communications with the multitudinous stimuli that come both from outside conditions and inside conditions. The soul or entity is not diminished but expanded through reincarnations, through existence and experience in probable realities -- something that I will explain later.
quotes.translation: 心理与灵性的通道始终存在，在自我的各个层面之间来回传递信息，而自我不加质疑地接受来自人格内在部分的必要信息与数据。事实上，它的地位在很大程度上依赖于这种对内在数据的不加质疑的接受。换句话说，自我——你视为自己的那个"外在"自我——它之所以能维持安全感和表面的掌控力，恰恰是因为你自身人格的内在层次不断支撑着它，维持着肉体的运作，并与来自外在条件和内在条件的无数刺激保持沟通。灵魂或存有并不会因转世、因在可能性实相中的存在与体验而减少，反而会扩展——这一点我稍后会解释。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: But the personality is always in a state of becoming, and forever changes. The personality is an excellent example of action in one aspect. It is important here also to realize that while the personality is always in motion, the motion involved here is not one of mobility in space as you know it. It is most definitely motion in terms of value fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 但人格始终处于形成状态，且永远在变化。人格是行动在一个面向上的绝佳范例。此处同样重要的是要认识到，虽然人格始终在运动，但这里涉及的运动并非你们所认知的空间移动。它绝对是价值完成意义上的运动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Both of you realize this intuitively. (Long pause.) As personalities however you have worked out your relationship. When you come together, one or the other insists upon domination. You have decided not to work out any further relationships together. often problems with one personality are worked out by relationships with another, different personality.
quotes.translation: 你们俩都直觉地明白这一点。（长停顿。）然而作为人格，你们已经解决了彼此的关系。当你们聚在一起时，总有一方坚持要主导。你们已经决定不再共同处理任何进一步的关系。通常一个人格的问题会通过与另一个不同人格的关系来解决。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json
