source_raw.title: (Continuation of Session 458, January 20, 1969, after break at 9:47. This material is not included in the records.

quotes.text: Selves that ascend like stairs... Yet in order to speak to you intelligently I must use this image at times. Therefore when I tell you that this other personality behind Adam may be a future self of your own, I am in no way telling you that this personality is a part of your personality structure as you think of it, or as your psychologists think of it.
quotes.translation: 自我如同阶梯般层层上升……但为了能明智地向你们说明，我有时必须使用这个意象。因此当我告诉你们，亚当背后的这个另一个人格可能是你们自己的未来自我时，我绝非在说这个人格是你们所认为的、或你们心理学家所认为的人格结构的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In some instances this happens despite the personality's attempt to hide the weight of the past. Also on many occasions the personality escapes the problems entirely. What happens here is that the subconscious communicates with the entity through the inner senses, to the effect that the present personality is not strong enough to handle the problem.
quotes.translation: 在某些情况下，尽管人格试图隐藏过去的重量，这种情况仍会发生。此外在许多场合，人格完全逃避了问题。这里发生的是，潜意识通过内在感官与存有沟通，传达出当前人格不够强大到能处理这个问题的信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: These energies are naturally drawn from within the whole personality. What is not generally recognized is the fact that the ego itself constantly changes. It is only when the change is unusually vivid, and definitely perceivable, that you speak of secondary personalities. But the main characteristic drives of any given personality shift continually; for all its attempts in the opposite direction, the ego must change just to exist, and its very permanence is dependent upon its flexibility.
quotes.translation: 这些能量自然源自整个人格内部。未被普遍认知的事实是，自我本身也在不断变化。只有当变化异常鲜明且明确可感知时，你们才会谈论次人格。但任何特定人格的主要特征驱动力都在持续转变；尽管自我试图朝相反方向努力，但为了存在它必须改变，而其持久性恰恰依赖于它的灵活性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The personality ego structure had to be strong, for the whole personality is in many respects a transparent one through which we can speak and through which other realities can be seen. In most basic respects this statement is meant literally and not symbolically. The personality in itself is formed from components existing in many realities...
quotes.translation: 人格自我结构必须强大，因为整个人格在许多方面是透明的，通过它我们可以说话，通过它可以看到其他实相。在最基本的层面上，这句话是字面意思而非象征性的。人格本身由存在于许多实相中的成分构成……
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There is now an earnest desire to travel inward, but in the past the personality was involved with outward communication. The personality will always have communication as a main aspect. Nevertheless this life begins a new phase, where the communication involved will be, indeed, of a different variety. The knot of energy, among other things, quite a few other things, is caused by the temporary inability to change the focus of interests from outward to inward methods of communication.
quotes.translation: 如今有一种诚挚的渴望转向内在探索，但过去人格主要参与外在沟通。沟通始终是人格的主要面向。不过这一生开启了一个新阶段，其中所涉及的沟通确实将属于不同种类。能量结节——除此之外还有不少其他因素——是由于暂时无法将兴趣焦点从外在沟通方式转向内在沟通方式所致。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: An illness, as an impeding action for example, may nevertheless be a constructive action at any given time, in that it may prevent action within the personality from following more destructive actions. When this destructive possibility has passed however, an illness that is still maintained would therefore become a definite impeding action; for any seemingly impeding action cannot be judged alone, but in the context of other action elements of which any given personality is involved.
quotes.translation: 例如，疾病作为一种阻碍性行动，在特定时刻仍可能具有建设性，因为它能防止人格内部采取更具破坏性的行动。然而当这种破坏性可能性过去后，若疾病仍被维持，就会成为明确的阻碍性行动；因为任何看似阻碍性的行动都不能孤立判断，而必须放在该人格所涉的其他行动元素的脉络中看待。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: We are also helped here by several characteristics of the personality, in that it is forever changing, and its flexibility will be of benefit. We merely want to change the direction in which it moves, or rather the direction in which some of its energy moves. It must be seen by the personality that the impeding action is a hardship on the part of the whole structure, and that this particular portion of the self is not basic to the original personality structure, but only adopted.
quotes.translation: 人格的若干特性在此也对我们有所助益：它永远在变化，其灵活性将带来益处。我们只需改变它移动的方向，更确切地说，是改变其部分能量流动的方向。必须让人格认识到：阻碍性行动对整个结构而言是一种负担，而自我的这个特定部分并非原始人格结构的基础，只是后来才被采纳的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In such a case, however, the shifting still come from within. The active gestalt of the personality is indeed so complex, the actions that compose it are so intertwined, that only the deep, interior intuitions of the personality involved will ever come close to a complete understanding of the workings of the particular personality system.
quotes.translation: 然而在这种情况下，转变仍来自内在。人格的活跃完形确实如此复杂，构成它的行动如此交织缠绕，只有该人格深层的内在直觉才能接近完全理解这个特定人格系统的运作方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The present personality cannot travel to the complete entity, again because of these very real laws; that is, while caught in or under the influence of the field of your plane, the personality cannot travel to the entity. The personality can and should be aware of the whole self of which it is a part, and that part of the whole self which the ego ignores, is the one part which can enter into the field influence of the entity, though it cannot travel to the entity itself.
quotes.translation: 当前人格无法旅行到完整存有，再次因为那些非常真实的法则；也就是说，当被困在或受制于你们层面的场域影响时，人格无法旅行到存有。人格能够且应该觉察到它所从属的整体自体，而自我所忽略的整体自体的那个部分，正是能够进入存有场域影响的部分——尽管它无法旅行到存有本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: A steady program, such as I have outlined, because of its conditioning routine, will allow the personality a progressive and safe entry into psychic experience that is firm, and will also strengthen the ego in its relation to environment. This is not to suggest that the ego is weak in this case, for it is not. But its ability to relate to others on the physical plane needs strengthening, particularly since the personality is vitally concerned with psychic investigation.
quotes.translation: 一个稳定的计划，如我所概述的，因其条件化的常规训练，将允许人格渐进且安全地进入坚实的灵性体验，同时也能强化自我与环境的关系。这并非暗示在此案例中自我是软弱的，因为它并非如此。但它在物质层面上与他人建立关系的能力需要加强，特别是由于该人格正热切关注灵性探索。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: To some extent the greater expression of consciousness can be experienced under usual waking conditions, but only when a personality is flexible enough and secure enough to alter the focus of consciousness. This way, other unperceived data become available. The unknown reality is not beyond your experience, therefore. Any of your scientific or religious disciplines could benefit from a study of the dreaming consciousness, for there the basic nature of reality exists as clearly as you can perceive it. The inner condition of dreaming is valid. You find yourselves in other times and places because basically neither time nor space exists as you suppose.7
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上，意识更伟大的表达可以在通常的清醒状态下被体验到，但只有当人格足够灵活且足够安全，能够改变意识的焦点时才能如此。这样，其他未被感知的数据就变得可得。因此，未知的实相并非超出你的经验。任何科学或宗教的学科都可以从对做梦意识的研究中获益，因为在那里，实相的基本性质清晰得如同你能感知到的那样。做梦的内在状态是有效的。你发现自己身处其他时空，因为基本上，时间和空间都不像你所假设的那样存在。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 723
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: A-5 opens up a dimension in which the vital consciousness of any personality can at least theoretically be contacted. This involves communicating not only with past personalities in your terms, but future ones. It is a level of consciousness very seldom reached. It is not, for example, the layer used by most mediums. It is a meeting ground in which personalities from any time or place or probable system can communicate with each other in clear terms understood by all.
quotes.translation: A-5开启了一个维度，在其中，任何人格的关键意识至少在理论上可以被接触到。这不仅涉及与你所谓过去的人格沟通，也包括未来的人格。这是一个极少达到的意识层次。例如，它并非大多数灵媒所使用的层面。它是一个交汇点，任何时间、地点或可能系统中的所有人格都能以清晰的语言相互沟通，且为所有参与者所理解。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As the number of rejected impulses grows, more and more energy is of course concentrated in this area, the energy that is inherent within the impulses themselves. This sort of grouping together of rejected impulses will occur mainly when the ego's restrictions are too severe, so hampering that very deep and basic needs of the whole personality are being denied expression. It is therefore for the benefit of the whole personality that these impulses be given expression.
quotes.translation: 随着被拒绝的冲动数量增加，越来越多的能量自然集中在这个区域，这些能量是冲动本身所固有的。这种被拒绝冲动的聚集主要发生在自我限制过于严苛时，以至于阻碍了整个人格深层且基本的需求得到表达。因此，为了整个人格的利益，这些冲动应当被表达出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: When in such dreams your perceptions seem exceedingly clear, you can be certain that the inner ego is operating. Now all portions of the personality, of the present personality, belong to this inner ego. It functions constantly, and yet it is always in a state of becoming. It is more than what you are at any given moment in your time. It contains, and j^, the psychological blueprint containing the full potential of the present personality within any given incarnation.
quotes.translation: 当在这样的梦中你的感知显得异常清晰时，你可以确定内在自我正在运作。现在，人格的所有部分，即当前人格的所有部分，都属于这个内在自我。它持续运作，却又始终处于一种“成为”的状态。它超越你在任何特定时间点所是的那个你。它包含，并且就是，那包含任何特定转世中当前人格全部潜能的心理蓝图。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Again, the nature of space and time is glimpsed more clearly as it appears to the sleeping self, for in the dream state reality is to a large measure uncamouflaged, and the personality appears in a freer state. It should also be borne in mind that all aspects of the personality are part of the whole self. As such there is an overall communication between the various aspects of the self, although the separate aspects of the self may not be aware of the communications.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，空间和时间的本质在睡眠自我看来更为清晰，因为在梦境状态中，实相在很大程度上是未经伪装的，人格以更自由的状态显现。还应记住，人格的所有方面都是整体自我的一部分。因此，自我的各个方面之间存在全面的沟通，尽管自我的各个独立方面可能并未意识到这些沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There are different depths to be probed in reincarnational existences. Some choose to "go all the way." These personalities specialize in physical existence, and their knowledge of this system is most comprehensive. For these there is a movement through each of your racial types -- a requirement that is not laid upon most. There is intensive preoccupation with historical periods. Many of these personalities live comparatively short lives, but very intense ones, and they experience more lives than most other individuals. They return, in other words, in as many historical times as possible, finally helping to shape the world as you know it.
quotes.translation: 在转世存在中，有不同深度可供探索。有些人选择“走完全程”。这些人格专精于物质存在，他们对这个系统的知识最为全面。对于他们来说，会经历你们每一种种族类型——这一要求并非强加于大多数人。他们与历史时期有深入的关联。这些人格中的许多寿命相对较短，但非常强烈，并且他们经历的生命比大多数其他个体更多。换句话说，他们尽可能多地回到各种历史时期，最终帮助塑造了你们所知道的世界。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: He merely moved in the circle, the outer circle, of your acquaintance at that time. There is no reason in particular why you met him this time, except for this sense of familiarity. It does not follow, in other words, that everyone with which you are concerned involved themselves with you in past lives. You always meet completely new and different personalities in various existences as well as old ones. Many times in fact you solve problems that arose with certain personalities by helping other personalities in other lives.
quotes.translation: 他当时只是在你相识圈的外围活动。这次相遇并无特殊缘由，纯粹源于熟悉感。换言之，并非所有与你相关的人都曾在往世与你有过交集。你在不同存在中既会遇见全新的人格，也会重逢旧识。事实上，你常通过在其他生命阶段帮助不同人格，来解决与某些人格产生的课题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The personality of Christ is an idealization, and a clue to the entity of which each individual personality is composed. And as far as prayer is concerned, though I realize that neither of you pray in those terms, someone does indeed listen. The self who prays listens, and makes necessary adjustments and improvements. For the individual is part of All That Is, and therefore partakes of the abilities of the psychic gestalts of which we have so sketchily spoken.
quotes.translation: 基督人格是一种理想化形态，也是每个个体人格所组成的存有之线索。至于祈祷——尽管我知道你们二人都不以那种方式祈祷——确实有倾听者存在。那个祈祷的自我在倾听，并做出必要的调整与提升。因为个体是万有的一部分，因此也具备我们粗略提及的心灵完形能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The personality is that consciousness of self of which I have spoken, which is aware of itself within, and a part of, action. The ego attempts to stand apart from action, and to stand apart from the personality, and to mold the personality into a more or less permanent and stable, dependent portion of the ego itself.
quotes.translation: 人格即我所说的自我意识，它觉察到自身存在于行动之中，并作为行动的一部分。自我试图脱离行动，脱离人格，并将人格塑造成相对恒常稳定、依附于自我的从属部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. Although you have chosen to form a particular group of qualities into a field pattern of a particular personality, upon which you focus the bulk of your energy, there are also other more shadowy, less well-constructed possibilities of personality selves that exist loosely within the psychic framework of the dominant personality, and these also have their influence. They also attempt physical constructions to a limited degree, and with limited success.
quotes.translation: 现在。虽然你选择将特定品质组合成特定人格的场域模式，并将主要能量聚焦其上，但在主导人格的心灵架构中，仍松散存在着其他更模糊、建构较不完整的人格自我可能性。这些可能性同样具有影响力，它们也会尝试有限度的物质建构，但成效有限。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: At the time of choosing, therefore, the personality is already preparing itself to leave for another existence. In your terms of time this in-between period can last for centuries. It can last only a few years. Again, however, there are exceptions. There are cases in which a personality goes very quickly into another physical life, in perhaps a matter of hours. This is usually unfortunate, and is caused by an obsessive desire to return to physical life.
quotes.translation: 因此在选择之际，人格已开始为进入另一存在做准备。以你们的时间概念而言，这个过渡期可能持续数百年，也可能仅持续数年。但同样存在例外情况：有些人格会在数小时内迅速进入另一物质生命。这通常是不幸的，源于对重返物质生命的执念。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Anything rigid breaks easily when any new pressures are applied. Therefore, when such a rigid, psychotic personality suddenly discovers a way for release through opening the subconscious, then the rigid rock at its core explodes into a lava of uncontrollable fantasy; and the terror at the base of such a personality is then externalized, and the individual forced to face under the worst possible conditions, those personal disruptions buried for so long.
quotes.translation: 任何僵固之物在承受新压力时都容易碎裂。因此，当这种僵化的精神病态人格突然找到通过开启潜意识释放的途径时，其核心的僵石便会爆裂成失控幻想的熔岩；该人格底层的恐惧随之外显，迫使个体在最恶劣的条件下直面那些深埋已久的个人崩解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: (To SW and CW) I do have one point to make. The child was a girl... 1432... France... and at one time your sister... Strong literary abilities... some interest in music... Should not be pampered for the personality is already given to indulgence. There may be an allergy to wheat... early in life... Was also known to this one here in Spain, the country now called Spain... in 801 as an uncle then a warrior-type personality, but again given to indulgence.
quotes.translation: （对SW和CW说）我有一点要说明。那个孩子是个女孩……1432年……法国……曾是你妹妹……很强的文学才能……对音乐有些兴趣……不应娇惯，因为此人个性已倾向于放纵。可能对小麦过敏……早年时期……在西班牙（现称西班牙的国家）于801年曾以叔父身份存在，当时是战士型人格，但同样倾向于放纵。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is very difficult for them to understand your ideas of past, present and future. Now give us a moment. (No real pause.) In other dimensions, or if you prefer at other stages of development, the multidimensional personality is aware of its primary identity, and is also aware simultaneously of personality offshoots that it has sent into many realities, into probable systems, as it pursues all of the probable acts and creations inherent in its nature.
quotes.translation: 他们很难理解你们对过去、现在和未来的概念。现在请稍等片刻。（没有真正停顿。）在其他维度，或若你偏好其他发展阶段，多重人格性知晓其首要身份，同时知晓它已送入许多实相、送入或然系统的分支人格，因它正追寻其本性中固有的一切或然行动与创造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The beneficial or detrimental effect of the emergence of secondary personalities must and may be judged by its effect for good or bad on the dominant personality, for in your existence the dominant personality is necessary and must be maintained in an authoritative position, to deal with the physical world.
quotes.translation: 次要人格浮现的利弊必须通过其对主导人格的善恶影响来判断，因为在你们的存在中，主导人格是必要的，且必须维持权威地位以处理物质世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The personality is less and less apparent within the physical organism. The personality itself has not disintegrated. Its control over the organism, for various reasons, has lessened. In these cases the personality gradually makes inroads into the next reality. It gathers its energy within the next system.
quotes.translation: 人格在物质有机体内越来越不明显。人格本身并未瓦解。它因各种原因对有机体的控制力减弱。在这些案例中，人格逐渐进入下一实相。它在下一系统中聚集能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I will at various times use as an example your friend's ulcer, simply because the ulcer represents an excellent example of an impeding action or illness. It must therefore be clearly understood that an impeding illness is a creation of the personality itself. The very effectiveness and nature of the personality, and health of the personality, is dependent upon the manner in which it handles its ability to choose between various kinds of action.
quotes.translation: 我将在不同时候以你朋友的溃疡为例，只因溃疡是阻碍性行动或疾病的绝佳范例。因此必须清楚理解：阻碍性疾病是人格本身的创造。人格的效能、本质及健康，完全取决于它如何在各种行动间运用选择能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This electrical pattern the personality, with all the experiences of its earthly time. It then can join or partake of the inner self. In other words, though the ego was adopted originally by the inner self, and was a product of physical heredity and environment, it does not die; but its existence is changed from physical reality into electrical reality. It is still individual. No individuality is lost, but it becomes a part of the inner self, and its experiences are added to the total experience of the many personalities that have composed the inner self.
quotes.translation: 这个电性模式承载着人格及其尘世所有经验。它随后能融入或参与内在自己。换言之，虽然自我最初由内在自己所采用，且是物质遗传与环境的产物，但它不会消亡；其存在从物质实相转变为电性实相。它仍保持个体性。没有个体性会丧失，但它成为内在自己的一部分，其经验被添加到构成内在自己的众多人格的总经验中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Another dimension in your terms is simply added, a more extensive one, and when this training is done properly, as I have tried to do, then the medium's personality is not only strengthened but its abilities used far above the usual normal. The process however is highly involved with perception, and is largely a matter in learning to handle, recognize and use constructively perceptions that other personalities are not equipped to handle.
quotes.translation: 用你们的话来说，只是增加了一个维度，一个更广阔的维度。当这种训练像我试图做的那样得当时，通灵者的人格不仅得到强化，其能力也远超寻常水平。然而这个过程与感知高度相关，主要在于学习处理、识别并建设性地运用其他人格无法处理的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It must be understood that the personality is indeed an action within action, and that it is therefore never stationary. Indeed suggestions, being the directions in which action moves, represent the very impetus that constantly changes the action of any given personality. It goes without saying, once more, that all of these designations imply a separation which does not exist in fact, and imply definite boundaries which are not present.
quotes.translation: 必须理解，人格确实是行动中的行动，因此它绝非静止不变。事实上，暗示作为行动的方向，代表着不断改变任何特定人格行动的原动力。不言而喻，所有这些称谓都暗示着一种实际上并不存在的分离，并暗示着并不存在的明确界限。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: Of course two lives would be sufficient to give you the three roles, but in some cases a personality does not function into adulthood, and therefore does not experience motherhood or fatherhood. Also for one reason or another a personality may not have offspring. Beside the three necessary roles there is another quality, different in dimension, which is also necessary for the personality, and this involves the fullest use of potential.
quotes.translation: 当然，两世人生足以让你体验三种角色，但在某些情况下，人格并未发展至成年阶段，因此未能经历为人父母。此外，由于种种原因，人格可能没有子嗣。除了这三种必要角色之外，还有另一种不同维度的品质对人格同样必要，这涉及潜能的充分运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: With the exception of the ego, the various parts of the personality do not react to time as a series of moments. All is experienced as present. The child therefore within the adult personality is not dead, nor are his reactions considered, basically, as reactions which are part of a past behavior pattern; but these reactions exist side by side with adult reactions.
quotes.translation: 除了自我之外，人格的各个部分并不将时间视为一系列时刻。一切都被体验为当下。因此，成人人格中的孩童并未死去，其反应基本上也不被视为过去行为模式的一部分；这些反应与成人反应并存。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The personality characteristics therefore will in themselves be adequate proof to all but nincompoops, that a fully independent and highly articulate personality is behind it. If I may say so myself my personality does much (amused) to lift any pseudo spiritualistic elements from this affair.
quotes.translation: 因此，人格特征本身对除愚钝者外的所有人而言，足以证明其背后有一个完全独立且高度清晰的人格。恕我直言，我的人格（忍俊不禁）在很大程度上提升了这场事件中任何伪灵性元素的层次。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Bridge perhaps is better. This psychological framework is in itself capable of growth, in terms of development. It represents on Ruburt's part a psychological expansion, and indeed on my own part also. It is formed partially by abilities inherent within all personalities, psychic abilities, and it is composed of energy. It is not a secondary personality, for it exists in quite a different dimension than secondary personalities.
quotes.translation: 或许"桥梁"一词更为贴切。这个心理框架本身在发展的意义上具有成长能力。它代表鲁柏的心理扩展，也代表我自身的扩展。它部分由所有人格固有的能力——灵性能力——构成，并由能量组成。它不是次人格，因为它存在于与次人格完全不同的维度中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The personality is given the greatest gift of all; you get exactly what you want to get. You create from nothing the experience that is your own. If you do not like your experience, then look within yourself and change it. But realize also that you are responsible for your joys and triumphs, and that the energy to create any of these realities comes from the inner self. What you do with it is up to the individual personality.
quotes.translation: 人格被赋予了最伟大的礼物：你得到的正是你想要的。你从无中创造出属于自己的体验。若你不喜欢自己的体验，那就向内审视并改变它。但也要明白，你对自己的喜悦与成就负有责任，而创造这些实相的能量皆来自内在自我。如何运用它，则取决于个体人格本身。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. This inner ego can also operate within the dream state, and in certain awake-seeming dreams it is the portion that realizes that the personality is not in its normal waking condition. It is this portion of the self that is with you in the most excellent projections. The inner ego is the part of the personality that contains the highest aspirations and capabilities. It has been called by psychologists the subliminal self.
quotes.translation: 这个内在自我也能在梦境状态中运作，在某些看似清醒的梦中，正是它意识到人格并未处于正常的清醒状态。正是自我的这一部分，在最卓越的投射中与你同在。内在自我是人格中蕴含最高志向与能力的部分，心理学家称之为潜意识自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Any true psychic development of personality, however, is bound to lead to an understanding of the nature of the psyche that is far too large for any such confusion of basic identity with sexuality. The concept of reincarnation itself clearly shows the change of sexual orientation, and the existence of a self that is apart from its sexual orientation, even while it is also expressed through a given sexual stance. To a good extent, sexual beliefs are responsible for the blocking-out of reincarnational awareness. Such "memory" would necessarily acquaint you with experiences most difficult to correlate with your current sexual roles. Those other-sex existences are present to the psyche unconsciously. They are a portion of your personality. In so specifically identifying with your sex, therefore, you also inhibit memories that might limit or destroy that identification.
quotes.translation: 然而，任何真正的人格灵性发展，都必然导向对心灵本质的理解——这种理解远非将基本身份与性别相混淆所能企及。转世概念本身就清晰展现了性取向的变化，以及一个独立于性取向的自我之存在——即便它同时通过特定的性别立场来表达。在很大程度上，性别信念正是导致转世认知被屏蔽的原因。这种"记忆"必然会让你接触到与当前性别角色最难调和的经历。那些异性的存在在潜意识中呈现于心灵，它们是你人格的一部分。因此，当你如此明确地认同自己的性别时，你也在抑制那些可能限制或摧毁这种认同的记忆。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am speaking now for your convenience simply. There are four cornerstone personalities involved in your seminar. Now three of these personalities are yours: one is not yours. One is not"yours" in your terms as of this time. When you look up and recognize, you will accept that which you do not now recognize as yourself, as yourself. If you looked up now, you would not recognize the self that you will recognize. Because the Spacious present exists as it is, the recognition has already been made. You have not yet caught up with it, you see. You are slowpokes. My friend Ruburt in many respects is also a slowpoke. The environment is not where you think it is. I refer to these seminars. The voice that does not"speak" in your terms is yours, but the instructor is not yourself as you know yourself. It is a self you do not as yet know in your terms.
quotes.translation: 我现在为方便你们理解而简单说明。你们的研讨班涉及四个基石人格。其中三个属于你，一个不属于你。以你们目前的说法，有一个并非"你的"。当你抬头认出时，你会接受那个你现在尚未认作自己的自己。若你现在抬头，你认不出那个你将来会认出的自己。因为广袤当下如其本然地存在，这认出早已完成。你只是尚未赶上它，明白吗？你们都是慢吞吞的家伙。我的朋友鲁柏在许多方面也是个慢吞吞的家伙。环境并非你以为的那个所在。我指的是这些研讨班。那个以你们说法"不发言"的声音是你的，但指导者并非你所认识的自己。以你们的说法，那是一个你尚未认识的自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The human personality is free. Any limitations are those created by itself. If you will not be limited, then do not create artificial limitations. If you would see through space and time then do not give any validity to the distortions of space and time. You can hardly follow your dreams while you consider your dreams hallucinations. You can hardly grow into your full potential if you think you are a physical creatures bounded and limited by the physical limitations of time and space, soon to fall corrupted into an early and filthy grave. If you think that is what you are, then for all practical purposes, for now, that is what you shall be. If you realize on the other hand that you are unlimited, that you are a part of All That Is, then indeed it shall be so as it is.
quotes.translation: 人类人格是自由的。任何限制都是它自己创造的。若你不想被限制，就不要制造人为的限制。若你想看穿时空，就不要赋予时空扭曲任何有效性。当你把梦境视为幻觉时，你几乎无法追随自己的梦。若你认为自己只是受限于时空物理限制、很快会腐朽堕入肮脏坟墓的肉体生物，你就几乎无法成长到自己的全部潜能。若你认为自己就是那样，那么从所有实际目的来看，此刻你确实就是那样。但若你认识到自己不受限制，是万有的一部分，那么事实确将如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: If physical laws were the only basis for actuality, then telepathy would be impossible. But then, dreams would be equally impossible. For in the dream state the personality is molded and changed through actions that do not exist within the physical universe. The personality reacts to dream experiences as it reacts to any other experience. It does not discriminate, as the ego does, between one kind of experience and another.
quotes.translation: 若物理法则是实相的唯一基础，那么心电感应就不可能存在。但同样，梦境也将不可能存在。因为在梦境状态中，人格通过物理宇宙中不存在的行动被塑造和改变。人格对梦境体验的反应，如同对其他任何体验的反应一样。它不像自我那样区分不同种类的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: When you think in terms of mankind solving its own problems, remember that reincarnation is involved, and not a group of persons in existence for only a particular time. When the personality is thoroughly ready to leave the body, nothing, including transplants, will keep it within the body. And if personalities refuse to inhabit a new body, then no science will be able to give life to the newly formed but uninhabited body.
quotes.translation: 当你们思考人类解决自身问题时，请记住这涉及转世，而非仅存在于特定时期的一群人。当人格彻底准备好离开身体时，包括器官移植在内的任何事物都无法将其留在体内。若人格拒绝栖居新身体，那么任何科学都无法赋予这具新造却无人居住的身体以生命。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Benefits received by personalities who are in deep trance are not nearly as long-lasting as they are in my method. It is true that in the trance state the subconscious learns. However, the subconscious knowledge eventually must be transferred to the personality-consciousness. In other methods than my own this transference takes place at a later time, usually on a midplane after the death of the personality on your plane.
quotes.translation: 处于深度出神状态的人格所获得的益处，远不及采用我的方法时持久。诚然，潜意识在出神状态中能够学习，但潜意识知识最终必须转移至人格意识。在非我传授的其他方法中，这种转移会在较晚阶段发生——通常是在你们层面的人格死亡后的中阴阶段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now you are looking at the personality with the ego as your starting point. Other portions of the personality however perceive, or attempt to perceive, the whole self from their own starting point. The ego is seen in quite a different light when it is viewed by other portions of the self. It is not viewed--this was a poor term--as much as it was experienced, for no portion of the personality can be viewed as an object.
quotes.translation: 此刻你们以自我为起点来审视人格，但人格的其他部分却从自身起点感知（或试图感知）完整自体。当被自体其他部分观察时，自我会呈现出截然不同的面貌。它并非被"观察"——这个措辞欠妥——而是被"体验"，因为人格的任何部分都无法被当作客体来审视。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is a chemical necessity, as I have said, that makes dreaming inevitable. But then these dreams in turn affect the personality in general, and affect the actions of that personality in a physical universe. It goes without saying that telepathy operates within the dreaming state quite as effectively as it operates while the individual is awake. In the waking state it operates subconsciously. But in all times there is no boundary, generally speaking, that exists to separate one psychological unit from another. There are differences between psychological units, and you concentrate upon these differences. Nevertheless one man's dreams affect another's, and that man is in turn affected by the dreams of his neighbor.
quotes.translation: 如我所言，存在某种化学必要性使梦境成为必然。但这些梦境反过来又会影响整体人格，并影响该人格在物质宇宙中的行为。不言而喻，心电感应术在梦境状态中的运作效率，与个体清醒时同样高效。清醒状态下它潜意识地运作，但总体而言，任何时刻都不存在分隔不同心理单元的绝对界限。心理单元之间确实存在差异，而你们专注于这些差异。然而，一个人的梦境会影响他人，而此人又反过来受邻人梦境的影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There is a basic difference you see between a survival personality, and the personality as you know it. The individual in physical life shows his surface face, so to speak, outward. Inner psychological realities are hidden beneath the physically-oriented ego simply because it cannot afford to deal with them. Its one main purpose is simply to allow the personality to operate effectively within its physical environment.
quotes.translation: 你们明白，存续人格与你们所知的人格存在根本差异。可以说，物质生命中的个体将表面面孔朝外展现，内在心理现实则隐藏在面向物质的自我之下——只因它无力应对这些现实。其主要目的仅在于让人格能在物质环境中有效运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The ego, then, is as much characterized by those types of action which it habitually denies, as by those types of actions which it habitually accepts. It is not the only organizing aspect of the personality, however. It is simply the organizing aspect of the personality in its dealings with the physical environment. The inner ego is another organizing feature of the personality in its dealings with inner environment.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我既由其习惯性接纳的行为类型所定义，也同样由其习惯性否认的行为类型所定义。然而，它并非人格唯一的组织面向，而只是人格处理物质环境时的组织面向。内在自我则是人格处理内在环境时的另一组织特征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It operates within you and for you in any case. The awareness of its existence however has strong reassuring elements on a conscious level. You see you are not the low man on the totem pole however. There are lesser, so to speak, personalities within every dominant physical personality, and lesser identities quite independent within each personal system. To these the physical personality would seem like a supraself.
quotes.translation: 它无论如何都在你之内为你运作。然而，意识到它的存在，在意识层面上具有强烈的安抚作用。你看，你并非图腾柱上最低的那一个。每个主导性的物质人格之内，都有所谓次要的人格，而每个个人系统之内，也存在着完全独立的次要身份。对这些次要身份而言，物质人格就像是一个超我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: As a rule, secondary personalities are given their energy as a direct result, so to speak, of a too-rigorous and rejecting ego. In many, though not all instances, such a secondary personality may represent simply the whole personality's quite healthy attempts at expression that have been too long denied. You get a regrouping of unifying principle actions, and a division of energies about two different ego systems.
quotes.translation: 通常来说，次要人格的能量是直接由过于严苛且排斥性的自我所导致的。在许多（尽管并非全部）情况下，这样的次要人格可能仅仅代表着整体人格长期被压抑的、相当健康的表达尝试。你会看到统一原则行动的重组，以及能量围绕两个不同自我系统的分裂。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In other cases where the symptom is interior itself, as in ulcers, this is a sign that the inner self has not yet come to such a point. The personality is not yet willing to face the problems even to that extent and the symptom itself is shielded from physical sight, quite rightly symbolically speaking. The relative observability of a symptom is a clue therefore as to the personality's attitude toward its problem.
quotes.translation: 在其他情况下，当症状本身是内在的，比如溃疡，这表示内在自我尚未达到那样的地步。人格甚至还不愿面对问题到那种程度，而症状本身被遮蔽于物质视线之外，从象征意义上说，这非常恰当。因此，症状的相对可观察性，是了解人格对其问题态度的一个线索。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: God can only be experienced, and you experience him whether or not you realize it, through your own existence. He is not male or female, however, and I use the terms only for convenience's sake. In the most inescapable truth, he is not human in your terms at all, nor in your terms is he a personality. Your ideas of personality are too limited to contain the multitudinous facets of his multidimensional existence.
quotes.translation: 神只能被体验，而你通过自己的存在体验到他，无论你是否意识到这一点。然而，他并非男性或女性，我使用这些术语只是为了方便。在最不可逃避的真相中，他根本就不是你们所理解的人类，也不是你们所理解的人格。你们对人格的观念太过局限，无法容纳他多维存在的无数面向。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I will have more to say concerning this after I have developed certain subject matter that is important. If I did not make it clear, let me repeat that the personality is a portion of the inner self. There are interchanges here, so that certain parts of the personality will seem to vanish. In such cases, for various reasons, the inner self simply sees no reason for their continued focus in the physical field.
quotes.translation: 在我阐述了某些重要的主题之后，我会对此有更多说明。如果我没有说清楚，让我重复一遍：人格是内在自我的一部分。这里存在着交换，因此人格的某些部分似乎会消失。在这种情况下，出于各种原因，内在自我只是看不到它们在物质领域继续聚焦的理由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Emotions take up a certain amount of what we call psychic space within the personality's awareness. As the intensity of the emotion fades, so it seems to you that it recedes in time. But this is an illusion caused by the limitations of your outer senses. Now. In the dream state the outer senses are to a large degree restrained in their activity. Therefore the dream state more clearly represents the actual nature of time. Intense emotions within the dream state are experienced as present time, and the personality moves easily through these emotional intensities without experiencing the sense of passing time, although any given dream may contain within it its own time element.
quotes.translation: 情绪在人格的意识中占据了一定量的我们所谓的心理空间。随着情绪强度的减弱，在你看来，它似乎在时间中退去。但这是由你外在感官的局限性所造成的一种幻觉。现在。在梦境状态中，外在感官的活动在很大程度上受到抑制。因此，梦境状态更清晰地代表了时间的实际本质。梦境状态中的强烈情绪被体验为当下，而人格在这些情绪强度中轻松移动，不会体验到时间的流逝感，尽管任何特定的梦境都可能包含其自身的时间元素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: It is energy concentrated to a degree quite unbelievable to you. It contains potentials unlimited, but it must work out its own identity and form its own worlds. It carries within it the burden of all being. Within it are personality potentials beyond your comprehension. Remember, this is your own soul or entity I am speaking of, as well as soul or entity in general. You are one manifestation of your own soul. How many of you would want to limit your reality, your entire reality, to the experience you now know? You do this when you imagine that your present self is your entire personality, or insist that your identity be maintained unchanged through an endless eternity.
quotes.translation: 它是浓缩到你们难以置信程度的能量。它包含无限的潜能，但必须发展出自己的身份并形成自己的世界。它承载着所有存在的重担。其内蕴藏着超越你们理解的人格潜能。请记住，我所说的正是你们自己的灵魂或存有，也是泛指的灵魂或存有。你们是自己灵魂的一种显现。你们中有多少人愿意将自己的实相——整个实相——局限在当下所知的体验中？当你们想象现在的自己是全部人格，或坚持自己的身份必须永恒不变时，你们就在这样做。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In your York Beach experience had you not been able through your peculiar creative abilities to form those images outside of yourselves, and so endow them with a physical reality, you might very well have instead turned yourself into schizophrenic personalities. Even your psychologists know that the schizoid is at least temporarily two personalities, a primary or dominant personality and an inferior one.
quotes.translation: 在你们的约克海滩经历中，若非你们凭借独特的创造能力，将那些影像投射到自身之外，并赋予它们物质实相，你们很可能就会将自己变成精神分裂人格。连你们的心理学家都知道，分裂型人格至少暂时拥有两种人格——一个主要或主导人格，以及一个次要人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I now suggest your break, and I do myself indeed enjoy your pleasant summer evening. I would like to make it plain here, however, that on a surface psychological level, the personality plunges into activity, and it is for the present this portion of the personality with whom we must deal. Nevertheless, beneath there is a denial of involvement, and a strong desire for permanency, both of which are repressed, and the stronger the efforts put forth by the ego to repress these tendencies, then these tendencies will explode with inadequate stimuli. There will be an over action on the part of the ego to compensate for the refusal to accept involvement on deeper levels.
quotes.translation: 我建议你们现在休息，我自己也确实享受你们宜人的夏夜。不过我想在此说明，在表层心理层面，人格会投入活动，而目前我们必须处理的就是人格的这一部分。然而，在表层之下存在着对参与的否认，以及对永恒性的强烈渴望，这两者都被压抑着。自我越是努力压抑这些倾向，这些倾向就越会在不充分的刺激下爆发。自我会过度反应，以补偿在更深层次上拒绝接受参与的行为。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As a personality is molded by his exterior circumstances, so is he also molded by the dreams that he creates, and which help to form his interior or psychic environment. To the whole self there is little differentiation made between actions that are of an exterior nature, and actions that are of an interior nature. While the ego makes these distinctions, the basic core of the personality does not do so.
quotes.translation: 正如人格被外在环境塑造，它也被自己创造的梦境所塑造，这些梦境有助于形成其内在或心灵环境。对于整体自我而言，外在性质的行为与内在性质的行为之间几乎没有区别。虽然自我会做出这些区分，但人格的基本核心不会。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: An excellent question. Schizophrenia is caused by a personality fragment that is broken off, so to speak, from the primary acting personality, operating often in direct opposition to the primary personality, but in any case operating as a secondary personality.
quotes.translation: 问得好。精神分裂症是由人格碎片造成的，可以说，这个碎片从主要行动人格中脱离出来，常常与主要人格直接对立运作，但无论如何，它作为次要人格在运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Many individuals imagine the soul to be an immortalized ego, forgetting that the ego as you know it is only a small portion of the self; so this section of the personality is simply projected onward, ad infinitum, so to speak. Because the dimensions of your reality are so little understood, your concepts are bound to be limited. In considering "immortality," mankind seems to hope for further egotistical development, and yet he objects to the idea that such development might involve change. He says through his religions that he has a soul indeed, without even asking what a soul is, and often he seems to regard it, again, as an object in his possession.
quotes.translation: 许多人将灵魂想象成不朽的自我，忘记了你们所知的自我只是自性的一小部分；所以人格的这一部分只是被无限地投射下去。由于你们对实相的维度知之甚少，你们的概念必然受限。在思考"不朽"时，人类似乎希望自我能进一步发展，却又反对这种发展可能涉及改变。他们通过宗教声称自己确实拥有灵魂，却从不追问灵魂是什么，而且常常再次将其视为自己拥有的一个物件。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The medium perceives so clearly the reality of the surviving personality that the medium to some extent directly perceives that reality. You see the correlation here with what I told you in the past about experiencing concepts. That is one thing. To experience the reality of another does not necessarily mean that the medium negates her own personality--only that momentarily she allows it to perceive as directly as possible the experience of what it is to be the other. This involves a high degree of cooperation from the other person who does not exist in your physical terms, an opening of his reality to the medium rather than an invasion of the medium.
quotes.translation: 灵媒如此清晰地感知到存续人格的真实性，以至于灵媒在某种程度上直接感知到了那种真实。你看到这与过去我告诉你的关于体验概念的相关性。这是一回事。体验他人的真实并不一定意味着灵媒否定自己的人格——只是暂时允许自己尽可能直接地感知成为他人的体验。这需要那个不以你们物质形态存在的他人高度配合，即向灵媒敞开其真实，而非入侵灵媒。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You are truly multidimensional personalities, as I have said before. At some point in your development you will become more and more aware of the true nature of your identity. There is, for example, a part of you who is very aware of the pulsations you have just been discussing, and who is aware of the pulse-like nature of memory. When the pulse is in this physical reality, then you, as you know yourselves, have memory of this existence. When the pulse is in another dimension, there is memory of that existence. Now a portion of your entire identity has memory of both. The entire personality structure dwells in many dimensions, and simultaneously.
quotes.translation: 正如我之前所说，你们确实是多维人格。在你们发展的某个阶段，你们会越来越意识到自己身份的真实本质。例如，你们有一部分非常清楚你们刚刚讨论的脉动，并且意识到记忆的脉动本质。当脉动处于这个物质实相时，你们所认知的自己便拥有此生的记忆。当脉动处于另一个维度时，便拥有那个存在的记忆。现在，你们整体身份的一部分拥有两者的记忆。整个人格结构同时存在于许多维度中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Again, teachers are available to explain the true situation. Various therapies are used. For example, the personality may be led back to the events prior to the decision. Then the personality is allowed to change the decision. An amnesia effect is induced, so that the suicide itself is forgotten. Only later is the individual informed of the act, when he is better able to face it and understand it.
quotes.translation: 同样，有导师可解释真实情况。会使用各种疗法。例如，人格可能被引导回决定之前的事件。然后允许人格改变决定。会诱发失忆效果，以便自杀本身被遗忘。只有当个体能够更好地面对并理解这一行为时，才告知其这一行为。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We find once again a basic reality, that of the personality, which is accepted and recognized within the physical field, even while it does not appear there as a definite physical unit. It can indeed be examined but the examination itself, being action, changes it. For the personality, true to the roles of action, will seize upon the new action and form of it new realities and unities with itself.
quotes.translation: 我们再次发现一个基本实相，即人格的实相，它在物质场域中被接受和认可，即使它并不以明确的物质单位出现在那里。它确实可以被检视，但检视本身作为行动会改变它。因为人格，忠实于行动的角色，会抓住新的行动，并从中形成新的实相和与自身的统一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When it is not allowed to flow unimpeded, following the patterns or channels for its expression that have been evolved by the personality, then various blockages of energy occur; with such lockups of inhibited action, small blockages occur frequently, and the blockages or impediments themselves must be understood, not as something apart from the personality, but a part of the changing personality.
quotes.translation: 当它不被允许无阻碍地流动，遵循人格演化出的表达模式或渠道时，就会发生各种能量阻塞；随着受抑制行动的锁定，小阻塞频繁发生，而阻塞或障碍本身必须被理解，并非作为人格之外的东西，而是作为变化中人格的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: China and Egypt, lives in various religious capacities, however, without the necessary sense of responsibility. Unfortunately taking advantage instead of the fortunes made available to those in ruling classes throughout the ages. For this reason the abilities have not as yet come to fruition. Only in this existence is there finally some understanding, and a growing sense of responsibility. The personality in the past used psychic abilities for the wrong purposes. Therefore they did not fully develop and the personality was at a standstill.
quotes.translation: 中国和埃及，以各种宗教身份生活，然而缺乏必要的责任感。不幸的是，反而利用了历代统治阶级可获得的财富。因此，这些能力尚未结出果实。只有在这一生中，才终于有了一些理解，以及日益增长的责任感。过去的人格为了错误的目的使用了灵性能力。因此它们未能充分发展，人格处于停滞状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (And once again, as she'd done for the session of last December 28, she wanted tonight's material to be presented as part of regular Session 393. I was glad to do it--and note that Jane's class sessions usually are in marked contrast to those we hold for ourselves, for books or whatever in the future. As would be expected of a gathering, class sessions were full of energy and repartee and questions and serious thinking both with and without Seth.

quotes.text: This book is Seth's way of demonstrating that human personality is multidimensional, that we exist in many realities at once, that the soul or inner self is not something apart from us, but the very medium in which we exist. He emphasizes that "truth" is not found by going from teacher to teacher, church to church, or discipline to discipline, but by looking within the self. The intimate knowledge of consciousness, the "secrets of the universe," are not esoteric truths to be hidden from the people, then. Such information is as natural to man as air, and as available to those who honestly seek it by looking to the source within.
quotes.translation: 这本书是赛斯展示人类人格具有多维度性、我们同时存在于多重实相、灵魂或内在自我并非与我们分离之物而是我们存在的媒介本身的方式。他强调"真理"并非通过辗转于导师、教会或修行法门之间获得，而是通过向内探索自我。对意识的深层认知、"宇宙的奥秘"并非需要向世人隐藏的秘传真理。这些信息对人类而言如同空气般自然，任何诚心向内求索者皆可触及。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: Since suggestion is used constantly, and by every cell in your body, then it is not a question of whether or not you can use suggestion, but of how to use it more effectively. And this will involve a balanced personality, for in such a personality action will be allowed freedom of expression. The ego will gain and not lose in the process, but we will not have an autocratic and willful ego, but a reasonable and even disciplined ego that is aware of its position, aware of its own dependency, as well as of its own peculiar and unique perceptive apartness. For the apartness is dependent upon its being a part of the whole gestalt.
quotes.translation: 由于暗示被持续运用且被体内每个细胞所使用，因此问题不在于你是否能运用暗示，而在于如何更有效地运用它。这将涉及一个平衡的人格，因为在这种人格中，行动将被允许自由表达。自我在此过程中将获得而非失去，但我们不会拥有专横任性的自我，而是拥有理性甚至自律的自我——它知晓自身位置，明白自身依赖性，也清楚自身独特而分离的感知视角。因为这种分离性正依赖于它作为整体完形的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Earlier I recommended a good hypnotist, hoping that the woman might find her way if positive suggestions were given; for even if the inner self had solved its problems, it would need help, psychological help, in reversing the physical trend. I hoped such a hypnotist could act therefore as a guide, if the personality was ready to begin a journey to health. The inner personality was not ready.
quotes.translation: 早些时候我推荐了一位优秀的催眠师，希望若给予积极暗示，那位女士或可找到出路；因为即使内在自我已解决其问题，仍需要心理层面的帮助来逆转生理趋势。我期望这样的催眠师能充当向导——前提是人格已准备好踏上健康之旅。但当时内在人格尚未准备就绪。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The inner ego directs all activities which are deeply subjective. The outer ego as you know deals with the manipulation of the self in the physical environment. You must remember that the whole self is more than the sum of its parts; and also, since it is action, it is never the same. It is therefore impossible at any moment to pinpoint the personality. Therefore the whole self is not only the sum of the personality as you know it in your time, it is also the sum of what it has been and what it shall be. For as I have explained action is simultaneous, and time as you think of it is caused by your own physical perception.
quotes.translation: 内在自我主导所有深层主观活动。外在自我如你所知处理物理环境中的自我操控。你必须谨记：整体自我大于其部分之和；同时，由于它是行动，它永不相同。因此任何时刻都无法精准定位人格。故整体自我不仅是你认知中当下人格的总和，更是其过去与未来状态的总和。正如我所解释的，行动是同时性的，你所认知的时间源于你自身的物理感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Here we have Roarck's overall entity, laughing with mirth but also with compassion, for while the entity enjoys all that is, the personalities have often turned their backs upon very much, in order to pursue esthetic purpose. At another time we will go into this more deeply, but Roarck recognized the picture, and subconsciously saw himself. In many ways he and Mark have opposing personalities, and yet basically the entities are similar to some startling degree.
quotes.translation: 此处我们看到罗阿克的全我实体，既带着欢愉也带着悲悯在笑——因为当全我享受一切存在时，人格们却常为追求审美目的而背弃诸多可能性。我们日后将深入探讨这点，但罗阿克认出了那幅画，并在潜意识中看到了自己。他与马克在许多方面拥有对立人格，然而本质上两者的全我惊人地相似。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Particularly when the voices or communications give orders to be obeyed, they represent powerful, otherwise repressed, images and desires, strong enough to form about themselves their own personifications. Some may seem relatively genuine in terms of presenting a fairly well-rounded representation of a normal personality. That is a fairly rare occurrence, however. Usually you are presented with, say, semi-personalities, or even with lesser versions (dash)--fragmentary expressions of impulses and desires that are dramatically presented only in snatches, heard by the person as a voice, or perceived as a presence.
quotes.translation: 特别是当声音或通讯下达必须服从的指令时，它们代表着强大且被压抑的意象与欲望，其强度足以围绕自身形成人格化形象。有些可能看似相对真实，能呈现相当完整的人格表征。但这实属罕见。通常你遇到的是半人格，甚至更次级的版本——那些仅以片段方式戏剧化呈现的冲动与欲望的碎片化表达，被当事人感知为声音或存在感。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The more prosaic elements of the personality then take whatever measures seem necessary at the time, while new orientation is tried out. These methods may seem to lead to great distortions, particularly in contrast with the sensed possibilities of development. In one way or another, however, they still provide a framework in which the personality feels itself free to pursue its goals. The built-in impetuses provide clue points. When the new sensed reality is strong enough to provide not only greater comprehensions but also to construct a new framework, then the old framework is seen as limiting, and discarded.
quotes.translation: 人格中较为平凡的部分随后会采取当时看似必要的任何措施，同时尝试新的取向。这些方法似乎会导致巨大的扭曲，尤其是与感知到的发展可能性相比时。然而，它们仍以某种方式提供了一个框架，让人格在其中感到自由地追求其目标。内在的驱动力提供了线索点。当新感知到的现实足够强大，不仅能带来更深刻的理解，还能构建一个新框架时，旧的框架便被视为限制而被抛弃。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (11:38. Now Jane came through with several pages of material for herself. Some of it was quite personal, but one part consisted of Seth's response to an assessment she'd written after supper tonight, wherein she examined her progress since the inauguration of her psychic abilities late in 1963. Seth, here, adds to our understanding of Jane's reactions to some of the challenges she took up 11 years ago. His material is also an extension of much that he gave in the 679th session for Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality, when he discussed the early background of the probable Jane who chose to live in this physical reality, and how that Jane began to contend with her strongly mystical nature. See especially Note 8 for Session 679, and Appendix 1.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now: Each reader is a portion of his or her own entity, and is developing toward the same kind of existence that I know. In childhood and in the dream state, each personality is aware to some extent of the true freedom that belongs to its own inner consciousness. These abilities of which I speak, therefore, are inherent characteristics of consciousness as a whole and of each personality.
quotes.translation: 现在：每位读者都是自己存有的一部分，并且正在朝着我所知晓的那种存在状态发展。在童年和梦境状态中，每个人格都在某种程度上意识到属于其内在意识的真正自由。因此，我所谈论的这些能力，是意识整体以及每个人格固有的特性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am using you here and the physician probability as an example. Art, you see, is also closely connected with healing. The projections of which I spoke do happen occasionally and spontaneously on both of your parts. Various aspects of the personality are being developed, you see. Reincarnation is but a part of this probability system, the part that falls within your particular universe. This all involves value fulfillment, which is at its basis. It is obvious then that you perceive consciously only a small part of your own overall reality. The doctor obviously has his own ego, though not within your system.
quotes.translation: 我在这里以你和那位医生概率为例。你看，艺术也与疗愈密切相关。我所提到的投射确实偶尔会在你们双方身上自发发生。你看，人格的各个方面正在被发展。转世只是这个概率系统的一部分，是落在你们特定宇宙中的那一部分。这一切都涉及价值完成，这是其基础。那么显而易见，你只能有意识地感知到自己整体实相的一小部分。那位医生显然拥有他自己的自我，尽管不在你们的系统之内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now, the personalities that are reached under ordinary seance， quote ，"conditions", are not personalities such as mine. They are personalities recently dead, in your terms, with strong connections to your environment, and not aware as yet generally of their own larger existence. In other words, this is not what I am.
quotes.translation: 现在，在普通降神会“条件”下所接触到的那些人格，并非像我这样的人格。用你们的话说，他们是最近死去的人格，与你们的环境有强烈联系，并且通常尚未意识到自己更宏大的存在。换句话说，这不是我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The creative abilities have full reign within the dream state, and it is here that the personality first tests its creative intensities and methods. The personality's physical environment therefore is greatly colored and formed by his dream existence. There is some leakage from waking-life experience to dream experience, but this leakage usually represents the material needed, or the problem to be solved. Mental events and dream events are primary. The individual first manipulates situations within the dream reality, and then transposes his characteristic method of handling them upon the physical reality.
quotes.translation: 创造能力在梦境状态中完全自由发挥，正是在这里，人格首次测试其创造性的强度和方法。因此，人格的物质环境在很大程度上被其梦境存在所着色和塑造。从清醒生活经验到梦境经验存在一些渗漏，但这种渗漏通常代表所需的材料或需要解决的问题。心灵事件和梦境事件是首要的。个体首先在梦境实相中操控情境，然后将其处理情境的特征性方法转换到物质实相上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: He has been reading various sections of the material, including portions having to do with the ego, personality and action, and you see attempted to set himself aside from the action in which his whole personality was intimately involved. As impossible [to do] as the ego's general attempt to insist upon some sort of permanent, unchanging, stable identity, since it is composed of action.
quotes.translation: 他一直在阅读资料的不同部分，包括涉及自我、人格和行动的部分，你看，他试图将自己置身于其整个人格密切参与的行动之外。这就像自我一般试图坚持某种永久、不变、稳定的身份一样不可能，因为它本身就是由行动构成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: But identity is much more than this, and basic identity, while using the perceptive abilities, is not that dependent upon them. It is true that the personality is a gestalt, and that every identity has any number of potential egos. It is also true that on occasion one potential ego will take over from another. But this is all highly simplified, for the ego structure is not one thing, but a changing, never constant, actually quite informal grouping of psychological patterns. Each ego uses and interprets the organisms perceiving apparatus in a way that in the overall is characteristic and distinctive.
quotes.translation: 但身份远不止于此，而基本身份在运用感知能力的同时，并不那么依赖它们。人格确实是一个完形，每个身份都有无数潜在的自我。有时一个潜在自我确实会取代另一个，但这都是高度简化的说法，因为自我结构并非单一实体，而是一组不断变化、从不恒定、实际上相当非正式的心理模式集合。每个自我都以整体上独特而鲜明的方式运用并诠释有机体的感知机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: No doubt here of jumbled relationships as far as the personality is concerned. We find here a personality once a warrior in the very early period of the Ottoman empire, and no coincidence that the personality is now involved with that country.
quotes.translation: 就人格而言，这里无疑存在混乱的关系。我们发现此人格曾是奥斯曼帝国早期的一名战士，而该人格如今与那个国家有所牵连绝非巧合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: One point: There is involved here a freedom from your physical time that can be gained in no other way. This freedom is extremely refreshing, and has therapeutic results unless the experience is overindulged in. There is a benefit for the physical body also. It is momentarily free of any irritating demands put upon it by a divided personality, automatically for example free from aggressions and unhealthy aspects of this nature. I mentioned that double and even triple projections can occur as you adopt forms. These forms represent forms that your personality will take in future existences.
quotes.translation: 有一点：这里涉及一种无法通过其他方式获得的、脱离你们物理时间的自由。这种自由极为清新，具有治疗效果，除非过度沉溺于这种体验。它对肉体也有益处——肉体能暂时摆脱分裂人格施加的刺激性要求，例如自动摆脱攻击性及此类不健康特质。我提到过，当你们采取形体时，可能发生双重甚至三重投射。这些形体代表你们人格在未来存在中将要采取的形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is, momentarily, literally accepted by the personality as a part of the self, and here lies its danger. It is not just symbolically accepted, and I am not speaking in symbolic terms. The impeding action, as seen in an illness for example, is quite literally accepted by the personality structure, and by all corresponding systems, as a portion of the self. Once this occurs, a conflict instantly develops. The self does not want to give up a portion of itself, even while that portion may be painful or disadvantageous. There are many psychological reasons behind such a psychological truth.
quotes.translation: 它被人格暂时真正接纳为自我的一部分，危险正在于此。这不仅是象征性的接纳，我也不是在说象征性术语。阻碍性行动（例如疾病中所见的）确实被人格结构及所有对应系统接纳为自我的一部分。一旦发生这种情况，冲突便立即产生。自我不愿放弃自身的一部分，即使那部分可能带来痛苦或不利。这种心理真相背后存在许多心理原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Without the choice there would be no personality. The exaltations and triumphs of the personality are as much a result of this ability to choose between actions, as are its illnesses and disasters. In almost all cases, impeding actions are the result of a refusal to allow action to flow unhampered in certain directions. It seeks other outlets, and these outlets are caused by fear.
quotes.translation: 没有选择就没有人格。人格的狂喜与胜利，与其疾病和灾难一样，都是这种在行动间选择能力的结果。几乎在所有情况下，阻碍性行动都是拒绝让行动在某些方向畅通无阻的结果。它会寻求其他出口，而这些出口由恐惧造成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It was necessary for the ego, in its origins, to objectify itself as much as possible. Now however the stability of the ego, generally speaking, as a part of the human personality is established. It can now afford to be much more elastic, to include, in other words, more and more of reality within its awareness. Such an inclusion would be most beneficial. It would of course however to some extent change the ego, and any change is resisted by the ego.
quotes.translation: 自我在其起源时，有必要尽可能地将自身客观化。但如今，一般而言，自我作为人类人格一部分的稳定性已经确立。它现在可以变得更有弹性，换言之，将越来越多的实相纳入其觉知中。这样的包容将极为有益。然而这当然会在某种程度上改变自我，而任何改变都会遭到自我的抗拒。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I may add here that they chose to renew this relationship, that is, free will operating in this case as in all others. There are always varieties of personal problems to be worked out, but the time, place and relationship is left to choice. For that matter, a personality can choose to ignore the problems completely, though this is at best a cowardly solution and simply holds the personality back. There is very much detail involved here. Needless to say, Throckmorton could have tried to make reparation to his daughter in a variety of ways, and not necessarily by being her husband.
quotes.translation: 我在此补充说明，他们选择重建这段关系——自由意志在此运作，一如在所有其他情况中。总会有各种个人问题需要解决，但时间、地点和关系都留给选择。就此而言，人格可以完全选择忽略这些问题，尽管这充其量是懦弱的解决方式，只会阻碍人格的发展。其中涉及非常多的细节。毋庸置疑，斯洛克莫顿本可以尝试以多种方式向女儿赎罪，而不一定非要成为她的丈夫。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The entity itself does not have to keep constant check on its personalities, because in each personality there is an inner self-conscious part that knows its origin. This part, for now, I will call the self-conscious beyond the subconscious. The breather and the dreamer are not so automatically controlled as it would seem. I have mentioned before that some part of you knows exactly how much oxygen the lungs breathe, and how much energy it takes to pace a floor, and this is the part of you of which I spoke. It is the part, and the self-conscious part, that receives all inner data.
quotes.translation: 存有本身不必持续监控其人格，因为每个人格内部都有一个知晓自身源头的内在自意识部分。此刻我将这部分称为"超潜意识的自意识"。呼吸者与做梦者并非如表面所见那般被自动控制。我先前曾提及，你内在的某个部分精确知晓肺部吸入多少氧气、踱步需要消耗多少能量——这正是我所指的那个部分。它是接收所有内在数据的自意识部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This has happened, although in what you would call primitive societies. Such personalities were more sheltered than they would be in yours. This could result in a temporary, but thoroughly frightening existence between planes that would require utmost caution on the part of the entity. Each plane necessitates its own orientation, and such a personality would have none. If the situation should ever arise I would advise that neither of you experiment with such drugs. Ruburt in particular, but this also applies to you, Joseph, and there is absolutely no distortion in this statement.
quotes.translation: 这种情况确实发生过，尽管是在你们所谓的原始社会中。那些人格比在你们社会受到更多庇护。这可能导致在层面之间产生暂时却彻底骇人的存在状态，需要存有以最大谨慎应对。每个层面都需要其特定的定向，而此类人格将毫无定向。若出现这种情况，我建议你们二人都不要实验此类药物。鲁柏尤其要注意，但这也适用于你约瑟，此言绝无扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Nevertheless, when you think in terms of the entity and its various personality manifestations throughout your earth time then you realize that the basic self, the entity, cannot be destroyed in any particular earth life. You are, I know, acquainted with the idea of regeneration. If you will imagine the various reincarnated personalities--and this is a most unpleasant analogy--as the various limbs and other faculties of the entity, then you will see why if one fragment is disintegrated it can be regenerated in the same manner that a physical cell of your body can be regenerated.
quotes.translation: 然而，当你们以存有及其贯穿地球时间的各种人格显现来思考时，便会认识到基本自体（即存有）无法在任何特定地球生命中毁灭。我知道你们熟悉"再生"的概念。若你们将各种转世人格——这是个极不愉快的类比——想象为存有的不同肢体与官能，便会明白为何当某个片段瓦解时，它能以你们身体细胞再生的相同方式获得再生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: How many people? Very few would take this amount of their camouflage time to deal with it. It takes a peculiar set of abilities and interests for such work to be even partially successful or even accepted by the personalities involved; and for many personalities it would be difficult to maintain discipline and balance, while allowing for the necessary freedom that is necessarily involved. That is, this is a controlled experiment, with both of you allowing yourselves certain freedoms of control in certain instances and not in others. This is no easy trick. Is that what you meant?
quotes.translation: 有多少人？极少有人会花费如此多的伪装时间来处理此事。要使这类工作获得部分成功甚至被相关人格接受，需要特殊的能力组合与兴趣；而对许多人格而言，在允许必要自由的同时维持纪律与平衡实属困难。也就是说，这是场受控实验，你们二人在某些情况下允许自己拥有控制自由，在其他情况下则不然。这绝非易事。你问的是这个意思吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now many personalities have extraordinary talents along specific lines, and these may show up again and again in succeeding existences. They may be tempered, used in various combinations, and yet overall still remain a personality's strongest mark of individuality and uniqueness. While most people adopt different trades, occupations, and interests, for example, throughout the reincarnational cycle, with some there will be a very noticeable line of continuity. It may be broken occasionally, but it is always there. They may be priests or teachers, for example, almost exclusively.
quotes.translation: 许多人格在特定领域拥有非凡才能，这些才能会在后续存在中反复显现。它们可能被锤炼、以不同组合运用，但始终作为人格最强烈的个体性与独特性印记。例如，虽然大多数人在转世循环中会采用不同行业、职业与兴趣，但某些人身上会存在非常明显的连续性脉络。它可能偶尔中断，却始终存在。举例而言，他们可能几乎专一地担任祭司或教师。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As for others all fragments have （pause） are throw offs or projections. Difficult to explain, I am not doing well. In a physical sense this board is a projection of wood or a tree, but in this case the board has less properties than the parent tree. The tree can grow, the board cannot. A personality fragment on the other hand never has less properties than its parent. This is the difference. A personality fragment has all the properties of its parents inherent, though it may not know how to use them. The board however cannot learn to grow, even though you stick it in the earth.
quotes.translation: 至于其他碎片，它们所拥有的（停顿）只是投射或抛射物。这很难解释，我讲得不太好。从物理意义上说，这块木板是树木的投射，但在此情况下，木板拥有的属性比母树少。树木能生长，木板却不能。然而，人格碎片拥有的属性绝不会少于其母体。这就是区别。人格碎片天生具备母体的全部属性，尽管它可能不知道如何运用它们。但即使你把木板插进土里，它也无法学会生长。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This personality will refer to the historical Christ, will recognize his relationship with that personality; but within him the three personality groupings will form a new psychic entity, a different psychological gestalt. As this metamorphosis takes place, it will initiate a metamorphosis on a human level also (emphatically), as man's inner abilities are accepted and developed.
quotes.translation: 这个人格将指向历史上的基督，会认出自己与那个人格的关系；但在他之内，这三个人格群体会形成一个崭新的心灵实体，一种不同的心理完形。当这种蜕变发生时，它也会在人类层面上引发蜕变（强调地），因为人类的内在能力被接受并发展了。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Nor could he purposely set out for such a journey as a rule. Animals, many times using their own inner senses, have made such journeys, but their conscious apparatus alone would not permit it. In like manner such choice possibilities exist for human personalities, but to all intents and purposes they do not exist because the personality is too limited to take advantage of them.
quotes.translation: 他通常也无法刻意踏上这样的旅程。动物们常常运用自己的内在感官进行此类旅程，但仅凭它们的意识机制是无法做到的。同样，人类人格也存在这样的选择可能性，但就实际效果而言，它们并不存在，因为人格过于局限而无法利用它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There exists infinities of diversity and opportunity for the personalities, and this diversity is given to it, to it meaning the personality, by the entity. Your own dreams are fragments, even as in a much larger sense you are fragments of your entity. An unrecognized unity and organization lies within all of your dreams, beneath their diversity. And your dreams, while part of you, actually exist apart. That is, you have given them a certain independence. This is difficult to explain clearly, and may be rather difficult for you to swallow whole. I hope you don't choke.
quotes.translation: 人格存在着无限的多样性与可能性，这种多样性是由存有赋予它的——即赋予人格。你自己的梦境就是碎片，正如在更宏大的意义上，你是存有的碎片。在你所有梦境的多样性之下，潜藏着一种未被认知的统一与组织。而你的梦境，虽是你的一部分，实际上却独立存在。也就是说，你赋予了它们某种独立性。这很难解释清楚，对你们而言可能相当难以全盘接受。希望你们别噎着。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: We are dealing with inherent abilities of human personality, whether or not the personality is focused within physical matter, but I am indeed aware of the difficulties which shall be encountered. I appreciate your interest and concern. I have some difficulties with Ruburt's own rather stubborn attitude at times; but we must also take this into consideration, and so we shall.
