quotes.translation: 我们探讨的是人类人格的内在能力，无论人格是否聚焦于物质实相中，但我确实意识到将会遇到的困难。我感激你们的兴趣与关切。有时我对鲁柏那相当固执的态度也有些头疼；但我们也必须考虑到这一点，所以我们会这样做的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Suggestions made by the waking personality are also carried out by the sleeping self. The characteristics of the sleeping personality therefore partially determine the physical existence of the waking self. Solutions to problems are sought and received and worked for in the dream state. The physical environment is directly affected then by the activities of the dreaming self.
quotes.translation: 清醒人格提出的建议也会由睡眠自我执行。因此，睡眠人格的特性部分决定了清醒自我的物质存在。在梦境状态中，问题的解决方案被寻求、接收并为之努力。因此，物质环境直接受到做梦自我活动的影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The situation here can be eased, and it is within the ability of the present personality to do so. There is an inner generosity and a psychic, if you will forgive the word, sensitivity, that will be of great benefit to the personality. There is also, and I believe always has been, the desire on the part of the personality to untie or dissolve this knot of immobilized energy.
quotes.translation: 此处情况可获缓解，且当前人格有能力做到。若蒙见谅，内在的慷慨与心灵层面的敏感度，将对此人格大有裨益。此外——我相信向来如此——人格始终怀有解开或消融这团凝滞能量之结的意愿。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now, this same sort of emotional system operates in the sleeping state as well as in the waking state, though there are differences in that the personality will allow greater leeway in the dream state. But even in the sleeping condition, as should be obvious, the individual accepts and attracts certain experiences and blocks out others. You know that telepathy and clairvoyance operate rather freely in the dream state. However the nature of such experiences is strongly dependent upon the particular emotional system that is characteristic of any given personality.
quotes.translation: 这种情感系统在睡眠状态与清醒状态中同样运作，尽管差异在于人格在梦境中会给予更大自由度。但即便在睡眠状态下，显而易见的是，个体仍会接纳并吸引某些经验，同时排斥其他经验。诸位皆知，心电感应与千里眼在梦境中运作相当自由。然而此类经验的性质，强烈取决于特定人格所特有的情感系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: At one time the personality was involved with very early paper manufacturing, in I believe Belgium. The personality was then a male. The personality has always been involved with communication in one form or another in various lives.
quotes.translation: 该人格曾涉足早期造纸业，据信是在比利时。当时该人格为男性。在诸多转世中，该人格始终以某种形式与沟通交流相关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Such people, however, in their fashion refuse to accept standardized versions of reality. Even though they are so uncertain of themselves that their psychological patterns do follow those of culture, religion, science, or whatever, they try to use those patterns in their own individual ways. They are actually in the process of putting their own personalities together long after most people have settled upon one official version or another--and so their behavior gives glimpses of the ever-changing give-and-take among the various elements of human personality.
quotes.translation: 然而这类人以其独特方式拒绝接受标准化的现实版本。即便他们如此缺乏自信，以致心理模式确实遵循文化、宗教、科学或其他体系，他们仍试图以个人方式运用这些模式。当大多数人早已选定某种官方版本时，他们实际上仍在拼凑自身人格——因此其行为会显露人类人格各元素间永恒变动的互动关系。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Death simply does not exist to the whole personality. Only the physically oriented portions of the self accept this as a finality. (Long pause.) Whenever you use abilities that to you seem supernormal, you are drawing upon the ability of the supraself. It is the whole I and yet more than the sum of its parts. It is action highly aware, and quite able to change its components. It consists also of course of the probable selves of which we have spoken, and it unites and directs infinitely larger portions of action than possible for the physical personality.
quotes.translation: 对整体人格而言，死亡根本不存在。唯有面向物质层面的自我部分，才将死亡视为终结。（长停顿）每当你运用看似超常的能力时，你其实是在调用超我（supraself）的能力。它是完整的我，却又超越各部分之和。它是高度觉知的行动，且能自如改变其组成。它自然包含我们曾提及的可能自我，并统合与引导着远非物质人格所能企及的更大行动面向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The personality when it leaves your plane for good will have developed its potentials as far as it possibly can. This does not mean that all personalities who have left your plane are at the same level. Since their potential has individual variety, it depends a good deal upon the personality's ability to utilize energy as a unit, or to transform energy into unit patterns.
quotes.translation: 当人格永久离开你们的层面时，它已尽可能充分地发展了自身潜能。这并不意味着所有离开你们层面的人格都处于相同层次。由于潜能具有个体差异性，这在很大程度上取决于人格将能量作为单元运用，或将能量转化为单元模式的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The very nature of the ego and of the personality is formed by the ability to choose between actions or stimuli; but life as it is not connected to a highly differentiated ego, rejoices in all stimuli, as sensation, whether it is pleasurable or painful, for these distinctions do not exist in your terms. In the beginning of our sessions I spoke in a general manner, for example, saying that trees and plant life had a consciousness, but not a developed ego system. The tree, therefore, is conscious of the pain connected with, say, the severing of a limb.
quotes.translation: 自我与人格的本质正是由在行动或刺激之间做出选择的能力所塑造；但尚未与高度分化的自我相连的生命，会以感受的形式欢庆所有刺激，无论其愉悦或痛苦——因为这类区分在你们的认知中并不存在。在课程初期我曾泛泛而谈，例如说树木与植物拥有意识，却未发展出自我体系。因此，树木能感知到譬如断枝时伴随的痛苦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The personality itself, as you know, is a gestalt of action, and as such it is necessary that the flow of action within it follow the overall directives of the entity and the inner self. When for example the ego is allowed to apply too tightly and too rigorously its inhibitory functions, then this freedom of action within the personality is seriously divided and impeded.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，人格本身是行动的综合体，因此其内部行动之流必须遵循存有与内在自我的整体指令。举例而言，当自我被允许过度严苛地施加其抑制功能时，人格内部的行动自由便会遭到严重割裂与阻碍。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: These abilities have manifested themselves in various ways, and he has often taken upon himself tasks also of a sacrificial nature. In past lives he never enjoyed the fleshy nature with which you Joseph, and Ruburt, and Mark were so outlandishly endowed. He was in almost all cases an esthetic personality, four times a woman; two of these times a priestess, and once as a nun in the Middle Ages. The personality in many respects has been rigid, in that its purpose was so undeviatingly certain and severe that it allowed no room for levity or diversion.
quotes.translation: 这些能力以多种方式显现，他常承担具有牺牲性质的任务。在过往转世中，他从未享受过你们约瑟、鲁柏与马克那般异乎寻常的丰沛肉体本性。他几乎始终是审美型人格，四次转世为女性：其中两次担任女祭司，一次是中世纪修女。此人格在许多方面都显得僵化，因其目标如此坚定不移且严苛，不容丝毫轻浮或偏离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: One aside here: while I am myself as you know me, I am also the other personality that sometimes speaks. This does not mean that what I am as you know me, ends, or is finished, in what he is. (Humorously.) I am overjoyed to be the self that you know (. smile•), and I do indeed take pleasure in that existence, and in meeting its responsibilities. (Pause.) The other personality (smile), which is also myself, has a warm spot in its heart for me (stronger, forceful voice), though again, he would not put it in those terms. He enjoys his own existence.
quotes.translation: 此处插叙：虽然我如你所知是此刻的我，但有时发言的也是另一个人格。这并不意味着你们所认知的"我"在"他"之中终结或完结。（幽默地）我为自己能成为你们所知的这个自我而欣喜若狂（微笑），并确实享受这份存在及其责任。（停顿）另一个也是我的人格（微笑），心中对我存有温情（语气更强而有力），尽管他不会用这种措辞。他享受自己的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The process could or could not have developed, according to the probabilities and the circumstances. Even the early environment, so abhorred by the ego, were chosen in order to deepen the desire for truth and to force the personality to face the issues of life and death, evil and goodness, full face. Ruburt's ego would have avoided the questions and taken the easy road, and this easy road would not have developed the full potentials that were necessary if the personality were to use its creative and intuitional abilities in any important manner.
quotes.translation: 根据或然性与情境，这个过程本可能发展或未发展。即便是被自我深恶痛绝的早期环境，也是为加深对真理的渴望、迫使人格直面生死善恶的终极命题而选择。鲁柏的自我本会回避这些问题而选择捷径，但若人格要以重要方式运用其创造与直觉能力，这条捷径将无法发展必要的全部潜能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I tell you this, and at the same time remind you that your present personality is never lost. Now another word for the soul is entity. You see it is not a simple matter of giving you a definition of a soul or entity, for even to have a glimpse in logical terms you would have to understand it in spiritual, psychic, and electromagnetic terms, and understand the basic nature of consciousness and action as well. But you can intuitively discover the nature of the soul or entity, and in many ways intuitive knowledge is superior to any other kind.
quotes.translation: 我告知你们这些，同时提醒：你们当前的人格永不消失。灵魂的另一个称谓是存有。你们明白，这并非简单给出灵魂或存有的定义——即便要以逻辑术语窥见其貌，也需从灵性、心灵与电磁角度理解，并通晓意识与行动的基本本质。但你们能凭直觉发现灵魂或存有的本质，而在许多方面，直觉知识优于其他任何形式的知识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Rarely. There are just too many interconnections. This will have to wait for later sessions. On your plane mental enzymes cause many chemical reactions. On some other planes the mental enzymes are unnecessary, since the personality on a conscious level can work such transformations; and here again we run into an apparent contradiction, because while these transformations occur consciously on certain levels it is also true that the personalities concerned do not have to be conscious of the transformations. But they can be if they prefer.
quotes.translation: 很少。因为其中的关联实在太多，这得留待以后的课再说。在你们的层面上，心灵酵素引发许多化学反应。在其他某些层面上，心灵酵素并非必要，因为人格在有意识的层面上就能运作这类转化；而这里我们又遇到了一个表面上的矛盾，因为虽然这些转化在特定层面上是有意识地发生的，但同样真实的是，相关的人格并不需要意识到这些转化。不过，如果他们愿意，也可以意识到。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: A very delicate network of imbalances is here maintained. The ego must not be too rigid, or too much a disciplinarian, or it ceases to speak for the whole personality, and becomes a warden, imprisoning the main expressive urges of the deeper self. It must not on the other hand be composed of too disorganized a system of actions, for in this case it is not capable of maintaining a consistent sense of identity or purpose, and is not strong enough to act in a magnetic manner, that will attract or hold the basic energies of the personality.
quotes.translation: 这里维持着一套非常精妙的不平衡网络。自我不能过于僵化，也不能太过严苛，否则它就不再代表整个人格说话，而变成了一个狱卒，囚禁着深层自体的主要表达冲动。另一方面，它也不能由过于混乱的行动系统构成，因为在这种情况下，它无法维持一致的认同感或目的感，也不够强大，无法以磁性的方式行动，从而吸引或维系人格的基本能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The stronger those natural inclinations are, the more the child is directed to ignore them in your society, since certain characteristics, again, are considered exclusively male or female. The child is also coerced into ignoring or denying those portions of the personality that correspond with the sex it is being taught it cannot identify with. This squeezing of personality into a sexual mold begins early, then. Continuing guilt is generated because the child knows unerringly that its own reality transcends such simple orientation.
quotes.translation: 这些自然倾向越强烈，在你们的社会中，孩子就越被引导去忽视它们，因为某些特质再次被视为专属于男性或女性。孩子还被强迫忽视或否认人格中与它被教导不能认同的性别相对应的部分。这种将人格挤入性别模子的行为，因此很早就开始了。持续的罪恶感由此产生，因为孩子准确无误地知道，自己的实相超越了这种简单的取向。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It follows then that I am aware of the other Seth personality, and he of me. Because of your time misconceptions you make serious errors whenever you attempt any predictions into life after death, or life within other systems than your own. It is most difficult for you to conceive of an ego who experiences events not in serial form. When any contact is attempted in so-called mediumistic situations, then it is expected that the survival personality will "remember," in quotes, events as you do; but events no longer exist in that way.
quotes.translation: 由此可见，我知道另一个赛斯人格，他也知道我。由于你们对时间的误解，每当你们试图对死后生命或你们自身系统之外的其他系统中的生命做出任何预测时，都会犯下严重错误。你们很难想象一个不以连续形式体验事件的自我。当在所谓的通灵情境中尝试任何接触时，人们便期望存续的人格会像你们一样“记住”事件，但事件已不再以那种方式存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We are bringing all aspects into balance this way. Ruburt's personality has held itself in excellent bonds, being flexible, and it is this flexibility that is extremely important. It is this flexibility, in both of your personality patterns, that gives us needed strength and balance, and I am speaking now of a subconscious flexibility, basic to your personalities.
quotes.translation: 我们正以这种方式将所有面向带入平衡。鲁柏的人格以极佳的约束力维系自身，具有灵活性，而这种灵活性极为重要。正是你们两人人格模式中的这种灵活性，赋予了我们所需的力量和平衡，我现在说的是潜意识的灵活性，它是你们人格的基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is this ability which is ever a strong force on your plane, having to do with the building up of particular elements, atoms, neurons and so forth, into camouflage patterns. On your plane you must use this organizing ability to form the camouflage pattern. There are planes with much simpler camouflage patterns, and some inhabited by personalities too weak or limited in this ability, and others inhabited by personalities strong in this ability to use energy, but who no longer need to use it in such a camouflage pattern.
quotes.translation: 这种能力在你们的层面上始终是一股强大的力量，与将特定元素、原子、神经元等构建成伪装模式有关。在你们的层面上，你必须运用这种组织能力来形成伪装模式。有些层面的伪装模式简单得多，有些层面则居住着在此能力上过于薄弱或受限的人格，还有些层面居住着在此运用能量的能力上很强的人格，但他们已不再需要以这种伪装模式来运用它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Dreams do express a personality's basic reality. Negative dreams tend to reinforce the negative aspects of the personality, helping to form vicious circles of unfortunate complications. Upon suggestion dream actions can be turned toward fulfilling constructive expectations, which can themselves effect a definite change for the better in the personality involved.
quotes.translation: 梦境确实表达了一个人格的基本实相。负面梦境往往会强化人格的负面面向，助长不幸境遇的恶性循环。通过暗示，梦境行为可转向实现建设性预期，这些预期本身就能对相关人格产生明确的改善效果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In the past lives, again, desire for communication was strong. It is strong now. However, it is as if the personality stands before another door, where the abilities for communication can turn the knob, but he will not turn the knob. The personality stands in an anteroom, with all his knotted energies, in indecision, and will not open the door leading inward, and will not turn in the other direction, in the direction from which he has come, to the door that leads outward. It is the indecision here that is important.
quotes.translation: 在过往生命中，沟通的渴望同样强烈。如今这份渴望依然强烈。然而，人格仿佛站在另一扇门前，沟通能力已能转动门把，他却不愿转动。人格带着所有纠结的能量，站在前厅犹豫不决，既不愿打开通往内在的门，也不愿转身走向来时的方向——那扇通往外在的门。关键在于这份犹豫不决。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The window cannot see through itself, but you can see through the window. So this personality does not always know what it is about, and yet the results can be seen. The personality is transparent also with your nature, and learning to use those abilities which are natural to it, can indeed then rather easily learn to merge consciousness with natural phenomena.
quotes.translation: 窗户无法看见自身，但你能透过窗户看见事物。因此这个人格并不总是清楚自己的本质，但其结果却能被看见。人格也如你的本性般透明，学习运用那些与生俱来的能力，确实能相当轻易地让意识与自然现象融合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I am speaking of the portion of you who is taking part in this particular period piece, however; and that particular portion of your entire personality is so focused within this drama that you are not aware of the others in which you also play a role. You do not understand your own multidimensional reality; therefore it seems strange or unbelievable when I tell you that you live many existences at one time. It is difficult for you to imagine being in two places at once, much less in two or more times, or centuries.
quotes.translation: 然而，我指的是参与这出特定时代剧的那部分你；你整体人格中这个特定部分如此专注于这出戏剧，以至于意识不到你也在其他戏剧中扮演角色。你不理解自己的多维实相，因此当我告诉你同时经历多重存在时，这显得怪异或难以置信。你很难想象同时身处两地，更遑论同时存在于两个或更多时代、世纪。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They will be formed to impress world conditions at any given time, and therefore couched in symbols and events that will most impress the populace. This is craftily done, for the inner self knows exactly what will impress the ego, and what kinds of personalities will be best able to personify the message at any given time. When such a personality appears in history then, he is intuitively recognized, for the way has long been laid, and in many cases the prophecies announcing such an arrival have already been given.
quotes.translation: 它们会被塑造以在任何特定时期给世界状况留下印象，因此会采用最能震撼大众的象征与事件。这是精心设计的，因为内在自我清楚知道什么最能触动自我，什么类型的人格最能体现特定时期的信息。当这样的人格在历史上出现时，人们会凭直觉认出他，因为道路早已铺就，许多情况下宣告其到来的预言也已给出。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The intellect is brilliant, but on its own, now (underlined), it is indeed in its way isolated both in time and in space in a way that other portions of the personality are not. When it is overly stressed, with all of the usual frameworks or rationales that go along with it, it can indeed become frightened, paranoid, because it cannot really perceive events until they have already occurred. It does not know what will happen tomorrow, and since it is overly stressed, its paranoid tendencies can only fear the worst.
quotes.translation: 智力确实卓越，但单独来看（此处强调），它在时空中的孤立程度确实不同于人格的其他部分。当它被过度强调，伴随所有惯常的框架与理性时，确实会变得恐惧、偏执，因为它只能在事件发生后才能真实感知。它不知道明天会发生什么，既然被过度强调，其偏执倾向只会恐惧最坏的情况。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: Information must be sifted through the layers of the medium's personality. Any perception instantly alters the electromagnetic and neurological systems of the perceiver ... It is a logistic contradiction to imagine, with your physical systems, that any perception can be received without the perceiver's inner situation being altered. I am trying to make it as clear as possible: Information automatically blends with, is intermingled with, and enmeshed with, the entire physically valid structure of the personality.
quotes.translation: 信息必须通过灵媒人格的层层过滤才能被接收。任何感知都会立即改变感知者的电磁与神经系统……以你们的物理系统而言，认为任何感知能在不改变感知者内在状态的情况下被接收，这在逻辑上是矛盾的。我尽量说得清楚些：信息会自动与人格的整个有效物理结构融合、交织并纠缠在一起。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You are familiar through your reading with so-called secondary personalities. There have been cases of individuals with three separate personalities. Now this idea comes close to the relationship of the entity to its personalities. They are independent to varying degrees, and they operate on various planes for purposes of overall fulfillment and development.
quotes.translation: 通过阅读你们熟悉所谓的次人格。曾有案例显示个体拥有三个独立人格。这个概念接近存有与其人格之间的关系。它们在不同程度上保持独立，并在不同层面运作，以实现整体的圆满与发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The dream images however are projections sent out, so to speak, by the personality, and many astral projections occur within the dream state of which the waking personality is unaware. In this case the projection is simply of a kind that allows manipulation back and forth between two realities. The dreamer who dreams he was in Paris may well have been there.
quotes.translation: 然而，梦境影像是人格投射出的影像，许多星光体投射发生在梦境内，而清醒人格对此毫无察觉。在这种情况下，投射只是允许在两种实相之间来回操控的一种形式。梦见自己在巴黎的做梦者，很可能真的去过那里。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The whole self slowly regains knowledge of its own reincarnations, and learns of its relationship to its own entity. I have said that a personality may become another entity. There is no rule against it. It is a matter of inherent strength and ability and also of desire. Many personalities upon receiving knowledge of their entity prefer to remain part of it, though they are always independent individualities within the whole entity, as even the cells of your physical bodies are part of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 整体自我逐渐重获对其自身转世的知识，并了解自己与所属存有的关系。我曾说过，一个人格可能成为另一个存有。这并无规则禁止。这是内在力量、能力以及欲望的问题。许多人格在获知自己存有的知识后，宁愿保持为其一部分，尽管它们在整体存有中始终是独立的个体，就像你们身体细胞是整体自我的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Such subjective events therefore manipulate physical matter through the personality who experiences them. The field of reality for any given personality must and does include all these areas of activity, for they give form and dimension to his existence. I have said earlier that the individual could not exist in a physical universe if he did not also exist in the dream universe. Again, there are chemical and electromagnetic connections that cannot be severed between all these states of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因此，这类主观事件通过经历它们的人格操控物理物质。任何特定人格的实相领域必然且确实包含所有这些活动领域，因为它们赋予其存在以形式与维度。我之前说过，如果个体不存在于梦境宇宙中，他就无法存在于物质宇宙中。再次强调，所有这些意识状态之间存在无法切断的化学与电磁连接。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now each personality has set up conditions for itself, under which it can operate at its best. When these are upset various difficulties show themselves, until the conditions are met again, or until a new system of adequate conditions are settled upon. In Ruburts case the conditions mentioned earlier, in our last sessions, operate to his best advantage. Every effort should be made to maintain them, for they will bring about the highest conditions of maturity possible for his personality structure.
quotes.translation: 现在，每个人格都为自己设定了条件，在这些条件下它能最佳运作。当这些条件被扰乱时，各种困难便会显现，直到条件重新满足，或直到建立起新的适当条件系统。在鲁柏的案例中，我们上次课程提到的那些条件，正以对他最有利的方式运作。应尽一切努力维持这些条件，因为它们将为其人格结构带来可能达到的最高成熟状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The field that connects the personality to this kind of pseudo image is actually formed by extensions of psychic energy. Imagine it, the field, if you will, as a thin but sturdy thread that connects the pseudo image with the original image. There are some limitations here then as to range. These are not basic limitations, but have to do with the individual's ability to so extend himself. Many dreams involve such roamings on the part of the personality while it is within this sort of pseudo image.
quotes.translation: 连接人格与这种伪像的场域实际上是由灵性能量的延伸形成的。不妨将其想象为一条细韧的丝线，将伪像与原像相连。因此这里存在范围上的限制。这些并非根本性的限制，而是与个体自我延伸的能力有关。许多梦境都涉及人格在处于此类伪像状态时的漫游。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The midplane is indeed an excellent description of the semiplane which she now inhabits. It is as you deduced a waiting plane for personalities at certain stages of development. For example, I myself am not on a semiplane. The midplane or semiplane contains a conglomeration of fragments at all stages of development, except that they have not attained sufficient knowledge or manipulability to progress further at this point. That is, they may be at various stages of evolutionary development but they are on an only fair level of achievement. They have not excelled, neither have they failed; they are working out problems of their own in a rather dissociated fashion. In other words they do not belong as yet, or are not committed to the next plane of their advancement.
quotes.translation: 中平面确实是对她当前所处的半平面的绝佳描述。正如你所推断的，这是为特定发展阶段的人格准备的等待平面。例如，我本人并不处于半平面。中平面或半平面包含各发展阶段的碎片集合，只是它们尚未获得足够的知识或操控能力以在此阶段继续前进。也就是说，它们可能处于进化发展的不同阶段，但成就水平仅属中等。它们既未卓越，亦未失败；正以相当分离的方式处理自身问题。换言之，它们尚未归属或承诺进入下一个进阶平面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Such personalities will concentrate their main activities in such a way that they can best affect conceptual thought, and bring about necessary changes. Many large families are representative of this group. They appear and reappear in your histories, always as dominant and significant entities. Here the family represents an entity who has taken upon itself the nurturing of your civilization. Knowing intuitively those changes which must come about in your future, they try to bring them about by appearing in your past; though to them your future and the past are the same they must still work within probabilities, you see, and what they are doing is affecting probabilities within your system. Even your time is basically plastic, though it does not seem so to you.
quotes.translation: 这类人格会集中主要活动，以最佳方式影响概念性思维并促成必要变革。许多大家族正是这一群体的代表。它们在你的历史中反复出现，始终作为主导性的重要实体。在此，家族代表着一个承担起培育你们文明职责的实体。它们凭直觉预知你们未来必然发生的变革，并通过出现在你们的过去来促成这些变革；尽管对它们而言你们的未来与过去是同一回事，但它们仍需在概率中运作——它们所做的是影响你们系统内的概率。即使你们的时间本质上是可塑的，尽管你们并不这么认为。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is, if anything, more order in the inner reality than in your camouflage world, and more, not less discipline is required. Such drug experiments could have dire consequences. The camouflage pattern is completely broken up, the disorganized personality is afloat and could slip into a state where disorientation would prevent return to your level, while ignorance and lack of discipline prevented entry onto another level. The consequences would be completely disastrous in such a circumstance.
quotes.translation: 内在实相中的秩序甚至比你们的伪装世界更多，所需的纪律也更多而非更少。此类药物实验可能带来可怕后果。伪装模式被彻底打破，混乱的人格漂浮不定，可能滑入迷失方向的状态，既无法返回你们层面，又因无知和缺乏纪律而无法进入另一层面。在这种情况下，后果将是灾难性的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The energy personality who desires to be materialized upon your plane, himself becomes part of this plane through the use of the inner senses. Through a process of diffusion--and this incidentally is our ninth inner sense--the energy personality first diffuses himself into many parts. Since entry into this plane, as a member of this plane, cannot be made in any other manner, it must be made in the simplest terms and be built up on your plane, your sperm being of course an entry in this respect.
quotes.translation: 渴望在你们层面物质化的能量人格，通过使用内在感官成为该层面的一部分。通过扩散过程——这恰好是我们的第九内在感官——能量人格首先将自身扩散为多个部分。由于进入该层面作为其成员别无他法，必须以最基础的方式进入并在你们层面逐步构建，你们的精子正是此方面的入口。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now. Understand that the main power of your father's personality is already somewhere else (Pause), and is simply waiting for this errant portion. A portion therefore of your father's present personality fragment understands this. Now Ruburt has lately allowed his abilities more freedom and as in any endeavor he will make errors, and he must expect them.
quotes.translation: 现在请理解，你父亲人格的主要力量已存在于别处（停顿），只是在等待这迷途的部分。因此，你父亲当前人格碎片的一部分明白这一点。最近鲁柏让自己的能力获得更多自由，如同任何尝试都会犯错，他必须预料到这些错误。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Until this life the communications involved have been in outward manifestation. This time there is on the part of the personality an awareness of inner realities, of which the personality was not before concerned with. There is also a bewilderment, since in the past communication was easy. Now there is awareness of that which is not easy to communicate.
quotes.translation: 在此生之前，所涉及的沟通一直是外在显现。而这一次，人格开始觉察到内在实相——这是人格此前从未关注过的领域。同时伴随着困惑，因为过去的沟通轻而易举，如今却意识到那些难以言传的事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: At the same time, because of the methods we use, some translation is often necessary. In many cases this translation is done by the intervening psychological framework, which is simply the psychological point closest to the meeting of Ruburts personality and my own, for he does not fade out as a personality. He extends himself in an expansion. The psychological expansion on his end, and the psychological expansion on my end, form the gestalt, the psychological bridge, of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 正因我们采用的方法，时常需要某种转译。多数情况下，这种转译由介入的心理框架完成——这框架恰是鲁柏人格与我自身人格交汇处最近的心理节点，因为他并未消融人格特性，而是通过扩展延伸自身。他端的心理扩展与我端的心理扩展，共同构成了我提及的完形——那座心理桥梁。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: If indeed it is understood that this personality, as with many personalities, has been materialized in feminine form, then these perfectly natural dependent feelings are found to be merely residues from previous personality patterns. And a word here should be said, indeed, concerning the distortive ideas that arise concerning dependency and passivity.
quotes.translation: 若真能理解此人格（如同许多人格）曾以女性形态显化，那么这些看似自然的依赖感，不过是过往人格模式的残余。此处确需说明：关于依赖与被动性所产生的扭曲观念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The psychology of personality cannot be grasped unless reincarnation is taken into consideration, but even then this only represents energy operating within one system. The personality operates simultaneously within many systems. Projection represents practical application. Such experience allows you to unite various aspects of the self, and to bring the whole self into sharper focus. As a rule projection in some areas can only be achieved by those who are living their last earthly cycle.
quotes.translation: 若不考虑转世，人格心理学便无法被理解——但即便如此，这仅代表能量在一个系统内的运作。人格实则同时在多个系统中运作。投射即是实际应用。此类体验能使你统合自我的不同面向，让整体自我更清晰聚焦。通常而言，某些领域的投射唯有经历最后尘世轮回者方能达成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: （These sessions began when we contacted the Frank Watts personality through the Ouija board, in December 1963. The Frank Watts personality was replaced in the 4th session by Seth. Seth has dealt with Frank Watts to some degree in the following sessions: 4, 8, 11, 14, 15, 16, 21, 25, 29, 31, 51, 85, 88, 173, 184, 189, 224. See Volumes I through 5.）
quotes.translation: （这些课程始于1963年12月我们通过灵应盘接触弗兰克·沃茨人格之时。弗兰克·沃茨人格在第四节课程中被赛斯取代。赛斯在以下课程中曾不同程度处理弗兰克·沃茨人格：第4、8、11、14、15、16、21、25、29、31、51、85、88、173、184、189、224节。参见第一至五卷。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The personality is more integrated, yet through its acceptance of inner data, the ego, to use the term lightly, has expanded. It has not shrunk. It is now composed of more various elements from the whole personality. Retaining its own consciousness of reality it can now afford to step out of itself momentarily in order to gain further experience.
quotes.translation: 人格更为整合，但通过接纳内在资料，自我（姑且轻用此词）已然扩展——它非但未萎缩，反而由整体人格中更多元的元素构成。在保有自身实相意识的同时，它如今能暂时抽离自身，以获取更深体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There are obviously as many kinds of ghosts and apparitions as there are people. They are as alert or as unalert to their situation as you are to your own. They are not fully focused in physical reality, however, either in personality or in form, and this is their main distinction. Some apparitions are thought-forms sent by survival personalities out of lingering deep anxiety. They portray the same compulsive-type behavior that can be seen in many instances in your ordinary experience.
quotes.translation: 显然，鬼魂和幻影的种类与人类一样繁多。它们对自己处境的警觉程度，正如你们对自己处境的警觉程度一般。然而，它们无论是人格还是形态，都未完全聚焦于物质实相，这正是其主要区别。某些幻影是由幸存人格因挥之不去的深层焦虑所投射的思想形态，它们展现出的强迫性行为模式，与你们日常经验中常见的情形如出一辙。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As far as your system is concerned, they cannot be suddenly made flesh, to dwell among you. REM sleep or no REM sleep, your dreams exist constantly, beneath consciousness, even in the waking state. The personality is constantly affected by them. Their existence has its own dimension which is connected to the physical organism. It is impossible to deprive a human being of dreams, for even though you deprive him of sleep, this necessary mental function will be carried on subconsciously.
quotes.translation: 就你们的系统而言，它们无法突然化为血肉之躯与你们共存。无论是否有快速眼动睡眠，你们的梦境始终存在于意识之下，即便在清醒状态也是如此。人格持续受到梦境的影响。这些梦境的存在有其自身维度，与物质有机体相连。剥夺人类的梦境是不可能的，因为即便剥夺其睡眠，这种必要的心智功能仍会在潜意识层面持续运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: So does the personality, through negative charges, cause boundaries to be set about its own emotional system. It will accept most readily those thoughts and emotions, or electric actions, which attract it, which have a similarity to its own charged emotional climate; and it will have greater resistance to those which have the greatest dissimilarities. It is, therefore, most advantageous to study well those thoughts and emotions which are habitually accepted by any given personality.
quotes.translation: 同样地，人格通过负面电荷为其情感系统划定边界。它最易接纳那些具有吸引力、与自身带电情感氛围相似的念头与情绪（即电性行为），而对差异最大的那些则会产生更强的抗拒。因此，仔细研究任何特定人格习惯性接纳的念头与情绪，具有极大的益处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The shock of birth of course is worse, since the personality is not entirely focused as a personality, and it must make immediate and critical adjustments of the strongest nature. Death on your plane is a termination but does not involve a new immediately-critical adjustment, since there is a time for rest and a time to catch up, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 当然，出生的冲击更为剧烈，因为人格尚未完全聚焦为独立个体，必须立即做出最强烈的关键性调整。而你们层面的死亡虽为终结，却无需立即进行关键性调整——可以说，尚有休憩与追赶的时机。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Some sense impressions fall beneath the threshold of consciousness, these impressions coming from the outside environment. Some impressions however have their origin within inner reality, and the personality is receiving information not available to the egotistical self. If such inner data is to become at all conscious, it must be translated into terms that the ego can recognize. In other words, into sense data.
quotes.translation: 某些感官印象落在意识阈值之下，这些印象源自外部环境。然而，有些印象的起源在内在实相中，人格接收着自我无法获取的信息。若此类内在数据要进入意识层面，就必须转化为自我能够识别的形式——换言之，即转化为感官数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is from this layer that so-called secondary personalities may sometimes arise, usually due to one of the psychic earthquakes mentioned earlier. As earthquakes cause lava to boil up seemingly from the center of the earth, so do some secondary personalities in their explosive emersion bring with them debris from other levels of the subconscious, often personifying themselves in the guise of those buried and frightening fears that have, until then, found no vehicle for expression.
quotes.translation: 正是从这一层面，所谓的次人格有时会浮现，通常源于前文提及的某种心灵地震。正如地震使熔岩仿佛从地心翻涌而出，某些次人格在爆发性浮现时，也会携带潜意识其他层面的碎片，往往以那些被深埋的、令人恐惧的恐惧为伪装进行人格化——这些恐惧此前始终未能找到表达的载体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is able to use all of its vast information, gained through previous experience, and all of its knowledge, to solve the problem at hand. Literally, the whole inner personality is able to focus upon any given problem, completely free of distractions, using the subconscious language of symbols. This language is crisper in its fashion, and more concise and more inclusive than any written language. For as we have explained, each symbol has various meanings to all layers of the self.
quotes.translation: 它能运用通过过往经验积累的庞大信息库与全部知识来解决当前问题。实际上，整个内在人格能完全不受干扰地聚焦于任何特定问题，运用潜意识的象征语言。这种语言比任何书面语言都更清晰、更简洁、更包容。正如我们解释过的，每个象征对自我的各个层面都具有多重含义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The personality is extremely sensitive, it does not take me to see that, and intuitional. It is also very strong, and the personality fears its own strength simply because normal aggressiveness has been denied outlet; and building up a practice of quietly but firmly expressing his own viewpoints will also help to release the inner pressure.
quotes.translation: 人格极为敏感——这无需我说明——且充满直觉。它也非常强大，人格之所以恐惧自身的力量，仅仅因为正常的攻击性被压抑而无法宣泄；养成平静而坚定表达自身观点的习惯，也将有助于释放内在压力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is, as a rule, lack of knowledge on the part of the ego as to the nature of reality, and its part in it, and the resulting fear, that often prevents a personality from accepting spontaneous expression of emotions in general. The capacity to feel is important. When one fears to experience seemingly unpleasant emotions, the personality also tends to set up an emotional pattern of rejection that seriously cuts down, also, not only on the expression but the very perception of joy.
quotes.translation: 通常而言，正是自我对实相本质及其在其中角色的认知匮乏，以及由此产生的恐惧，往往阻碍人格接纳情绪的自发表达。感受能力至关重要。当人恐惧体验看似不愉快的情绪时，人格会建立排斥性的情绪模式，这不仅严重抑制了喜悦的表达，更切断了喜悦的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Ruburt is extremely cautious. This will not work to our disadvantage however, for his cautiousness in these matters acts as a strong balancing mechanism, so that he learns to deal with inner perceptions stage by stage. His personality is not overwhelmed therefore. We have taken his ego into consideration at all times, so that he can consciously assimilate what he has learned, as is preferable. At times this may mean that we progress slowly, but the progression is steady and firm.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏极为谨慎。但这不会成为我们的劣势，因为他在这些事务上的谨慎充当着强大的平衡机制，使他能循序渐进地处理内在感知。因此他的人格不会不堪重负。我们始终将他的自我纳入考量，以便他能有意识地消化所学内容——这更符合理想状态。有时这意味着进展缓慢，但每一步都稳健扎实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Various emotional factors within each personality cause what we may call a characteristic emotional climate. Certain types of thoughts and emotions are entertained therein. Since these are electrical actions, they set up strong electrical fields of attraction within the personality, easy electric paths. Uncharacteristic thoughts or emotions must then meet with some resistance. Habit, then, has not only a psychological, but an electrical and psychological nature and implication.
quotes.translation: 每个人格内部的各种情绪因素会形成我们可称之为"特征性情绪气候"的场域。特定类型的思维与情绪在此栖居。由于这些都是电性活动，它们会在人格内部建立强大的电性吸引场，形成顺畅的电性路径。非特征性的思维或情绪则必须遭遇某种阻力。因此，习惯不仅具有心理本质，更兼具电性与心理的双重属性与意涵。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Ruburt keeps track of intuitive details that neither of you are even conscious of, and so there shows an integrity that at least sometimes he is not aware of. You yourselves adopt personalities, though usually you are not aware of doing so. So I adopt a personality that can communicate with your own.33 In one manner of speaking mine is heroic, larger, and multidimensional. On the other hand, I can operate only mentally in your world. It is Ruburt who must walk down the street.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏追踪着连你们自己都未曾察觉的直觉细节，展现出至少他本人有时都意识不到的完整性。你们自身也在扮演人格角色——尽管通常对此毫无觉察。因此我采用一个能与你们人格沟通的人格形象。33从某种角度说，我的人格是英雄式的、更宏大的、多维度的。另一方面，我只能以心智方式运作于你们的世界。真正行走在街头的，是鲁柏。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Now I'll refer the reader to Note 6 for Session 711, which is the session for which I'm assembling this chronology to begin with. In that note I presented some material on ancient connections with the name, Seth, then quoted Seth on the subject of names from the ESP class session for April 17, 1973. For instance:)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You are becoming aware of higher levels of your own personality and you are trying to interpret them. The sensation was your own reaction to the psychological presence of your friend Ferd. He did not cause the sensations. But in another way he was their cause, since you interpreted his existence in that particular manner. Because of your own personality makeup you will lean to physical interpretations, and physical sensationsin an attempt to understand nonphysical impressions.
quotes.translation: 你正逐渐意识到自己人格的更高层面，并试图解读它们。那种感觉是你对朋友费德心理存在的个人反应。他并未引发这些感觉，但从另一角度而言，他又是其成因——因为你以那种特定方式诠释了他的存在。由于你自身人格的构成，你会倾向于用物理层面的解释和身体感受来理解非物质的印象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now do not look down upon the importance of personal encounters, or the effect of personality. Ruburt's personality shows in his writings and his individual interpretations; your personalities should always be considered as assets. To some extent they have also been affected by the material, and to that extent they are testaments of it.
quotes.translation: 切莫轻视人际相遇的重要性，或人格的影响力。鲁柏的人格显现在他的著作与个人诠释中；你们的人格始终应被视为资产。在某种程度上，它们也受到这些资料的影响，并因此成为其见证。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There are no barriers as far as development and experience are concerned, nor to creativity. A personality then, starting out with one main purpose, may find itself involved in experience that opens new areas, and it may pursue them. In nontime there is full recognition and sometimes use of time systems, but the personality realizes that it dwells in nontime, and it forms a time schedule or system to get where it wants to go in the same way that you would make a road or path.
quotes.translation: 就发展与体验而言，不存在任何障碍，创造力亦无界限。一个带着主要目标出发的人格，可能会发现自己卷入开启新领域的体验中，并可能继续探索。在非时间中，人格能完全认知并有时运用时间系统，但它明白自己栖居于非时间中，它会像你们修筑道路那样，为自己规划时间表或系统以抵达目标。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: They are indeed. The inner information must be consciously recognized. In your terms, by the time an individual is in his last physical life (pause), all portions of the personality are then familiar with it at the time of death. The personality is not swept willy-nilly back to another earthly existence, as might be the case otherwise.
quotes.translation: 确实如此。内在信息必须被有意识地认知。用你们的话说，当个体处于最后一世肉身时（停顿），人格的所有部分在死亡时刻都已熟悉它。人格不会像其他情况那样被随意抛回另一次尘世存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You must know your own personality and develop your own abilities, and this should be your quest now. There is a strength of character, and indeed a rather heartless determination. These can be used to strengthen the framework and extend the limitations of your own personality. You are not developing your abilities, but using vital energies in pursuit of something that you do not basically want to attain.
quotes.translation: 你必须了解自己的人格并发展自身能力，这应是你当下的追寻。其中蕴含着性格的力量，甚至某种近乎无情的决心。这些特质可用于强化人格架构、拓展其局限。你并非在发展能力，而是在用生命能量追逐你根本不想达成的目标。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: To a different degree it is filled with conscious semi personalities. I call them semi personalities merely to point out that they are not as developed as you are, as you are not as developed as your entity is. Nevertheless, that dream world experiences continuity. It is not aware of any break while, for example, you are sleeping. It does not know you sleep or wake. It merely exists to a fairly vivid degree while you sleep, and it sleeps but does not die while you are awake.
quotes.translation: 它不同程度地充满了有意识的半人格。我称其为半人格，仅是为了指出它们不如你们这般发展，正如你们不如自己的存有那般发展。然而，那个梦境世界体验着连续性。例如当你睡眠时，它意识不到任何中断。它不知你睡或醒。当你沉睡时，它生动地存在着；当你清醒时，它沉睡却不消亡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner ego however is to some degree still familiar with their activities. Solutions found by these dream personalities are automatically picked up by the inner ego, and transmitted to the various levels of the self. The dream world changes as the personality changes, so that it is always a part of the mobile personality framework.
quotes.translation: 然而，内在自我在某种程度上仍熟悉其活动。这些梦人格所找到的解决方案会自动被内在自我接收，并传递到自我的各个层面。梦的世界随人格变化而变化，因此它始终是动态人格框架的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: That image was of another personality type fragment from another plane. I have used the word plane to describe any other existence sphere with which you are not familiar. I am afraid we will have to cease this practice. From here on I will use the word plane to refer to existences having to do with your own levels. That is your Miss Callahan I will say is on another plane, since this involves the continuation in some manner of a personality concept which you can understand.
quotes.translation: 那个形象是来自另一个层面的另类人格片段。我曾用"层面"一词描述任何你不熟悉的存有领域。恐怕我们得停止这种用法。此后我将用"层面"指代与你自身层次相关的存有领域。也就是说，我会说你的卡拉汉小姐在另一个层面，因为这涉及你能理解的某种人格概念的延续方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Once physical symptoms actually appear within this system however, they are to some extent accepted as any other established pattern, at least by a portion of the personality. In some cases physical symptoms can actually make up a somewhat independent supersonality structure. This is the case with many chronically-ill individuals. The destructive tendencies are collected about a particularly Emotionally charged group of reactions, and cut off from the dominant personality.
quotes.translation: 然而，一旦身体症状实际出现在这个系统中，它们会在某种程度上被接受为其他既定模式，至少人格的一部分会如此。在某些情况下，身体症状实际上可能构成一个相对独立的超人格结构。许多慢性病患者就是这种情况。破坏性倾向会聚集在特别情绪化的反应群周围，并与主导人格分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is much here to be studied about personality. From your viewpoint the information available to you can be practically endless. There is much to be learned about perceiving other realities. Trance states are only a beginning. The self is made of action. Teaching the self to expand is most important, and the ways are nor difficult... this is what makes the experiment interesting. This is not beyond human abilities. The structure of the personality makes this possible.
quotes.translation: 关于人格，这里有许多值得研究之处。从你的视角来看，可获取的信息几乎是无穷无尽的。关于感知其他实相，有许多值得学习之处。出神状态只是开始。自我由行动构成。教导自我扩展最为重要，方法并不困难……这正是让实验变得有趣之处。这并未超出人类能力范围。人格的结构使这成为可能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Within the entire identity there may be, for example, several incipient selves, around whose nuclei the physical personality can form. In many instances one main personality is formed, and the incipient selves are drawn into it so that their abilities and interests become subsidiary, or remain largely latent. They are trace selves.
quotes.translation: 例如，在整个身份中可能存在几个初生自我，物理人格可围绕其核心形成。在许多情况下，会形成一个主要人格，初生自我被吸纳其中，使其能力和兴趣成为附属，或基本保持潜伏状态。它们是痕迹自我。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Some controls are still present. These struggle desperately to distort the past data, clothing it in all sorts of idea camouflages and fantasy. In this case insanity is actually a protective mechanism, in that the personality will face almost complete disorientation rather than confront truths in its past that bring up problems it cannot solve. At the same time such a personality will not let go, either, and will not change course. The dilemma is therefore a dire crisis.
quotes.translation: 某些控制仍然存在。它们拼命扭曲过去的数据，用各种观念伪装和幻想加以掩饰。在这种情况下，精神错乱实际上是一种保护机制，因为人格宁愿面对几乎完全迷失方向，也不愿直面过去那些引发其无法解决问题的事实。同时，这样的人格也不会放手，不会改变方向。因此，困境成为一场可怕的危机。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Again, the impressions received by the inner senses are actually concrete in a way that you do not yet understand. This data also has physical effects upon the brain. In the same manner that impressions received from outside stimuli affect the brain, they make their impression upon it. They change the personality as any experience changes a personality. To insist upon evidence in terms of outside sensual data is as ridiculous a notion as to expect a camera to play music.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，内在感官接收的印象实际上以一种你们尚不理解的方式是具体的。这些数据同样对大脑产生物理影响。正如来自外界刺激的印象会影响大脑一样，它们也在大脑上留下印记。它们改变人格，正如任何经历都会改变人格一样。坚持以外在感官数据作为证据，就像期望相机能演奏音乐一样荒谬。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Death is the personality's release from the physical plane, or we will use the term "the physical field," and that is all. To the ego this is a frightening future in prospect. To the ego, even sleep seems a slap in the face. Recognition in physical life of the whole self would do much to negate this death fear, since there are rather pleasant psychological experiences which are akin to the experience of death, and which would prepare the personality for this eventuality.
quotes.translation: 死亡是人格从物质层面——或者我们称之为"物质场域"——的释放，仅此而已。对自我而言，这是一个令人恐惧的未来前景。对自我来说，甚至连睡眠都像是一记耳光。在物质生活中认识到整体自体将大大消除这种对死亡的恐惧，因为存在一些相当愉快的心理体验，它们与死亡体验相似，并能为人格为这一最终结局做好准备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: All layers of the personality are indeed conscious layers. They simply operate in the manner of compartments, so that often one portion of the self is not aware of other portions. As a rule when you are awake you do not know your sleeping self; you know your neighbors far better, so your sleeping self appears mysterious indeed. When you are awake, as Ruburt himself has written, you cannot find the dream locations that have been so familiar to you only the night before.
quotes.translation: 人格的所有层次确实都是意识层次。它们只是以隔间的方式运作，因此自体的某一部分常常意识不到其他部分。通常当你清醒时，你并不了解你的睡眠自体；你更了解你的邻居，所以你的睡眠自体确实显得神秘。正如鲁柏自己所写，当你清醒时，你找不到前一天晚上还如此熟悉的梦境地点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There are whole areas of material here that we have not discussed so that this is spotty, but we will go into it more deeply. There are no laws to force personalities to use all their abilities. A personality will not choose unfavorable circumstances of rebirth until he himself sees that necessary discipline can be achieved in no other manner. Therefore extremely hot and extremely cold countries go largely undeveloped. But once development begins to occur it is swift.
quotes.translation: 这里还有大片的材料我们尚未讨论，因此这显得零散，但我们会更深入地探讨。没有任何法则强迫人格使用其所有能力。一个人格不会选择不利的转世环境，除非他本人看到没有其他方式能实现必要的纪律。因此，极热和极寒的国家大多发展不足。但一旦发展开始，就会迅速推进。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I am now in contact with your parent's entity and he tells me that subconsciously even his present personality, that is your father, appreciates this fact and loves you deeply. He himself, that is your father's entity, feels no pain because of the present personality's problems, since he is working out so many necessary kinks.
quotes.translation: 我现在正与你父母的存有联系，他告诉我，即使在潜意识层面，他当前的人格——也就是你的父亲——也欣赏这一事实并深爱着你。他本人，即你父亲的存有，并不会因当前人格的问题感到痛苦，因为他正在解决如此多必要的纠结。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: These differentiations come much later and on another level, and in a later evolutionary development. But because the personality is composed of action, the personality also contains within it this characteristic of action, in that it accepts all sensations as expressions of itself, and does not discriminate between stimuli.
quotes.translation: 这些分化要晚得多，发生在另一个层面，并在更晚的进化发展阶段。但由于人格由行动构成，人格本身也包含行动的这一特性，即它接受所有感觉作为自身的表达，并且不区分刺激。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is a giant step and a vital one, for without it the personality would be at the mercy so to speak of the very energy of which he is composed. He must learn to organize and command it, and your plane is one of the many where he gains practice and discipline in this respect. Otherwise you would have a willy-nilly chaotic arrangement, with the personality incapable of maintaining any discipline as far as his own chemical and electronic components were concerned.
quotes.translation: 这是一大步，也是至关重要的一步，否则人格可以说会任由构成他的能量本身摆布。他必须学会组织和驾驭这股能量，而你们的层面正是他在这方面获得实践与纪律训练的众多层面之一。否则，就会产生一种混乱无序的安排，人格在涉及自身的化学与电子成分时，无法维持任何纪律。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Ego concern is a very jealous concern, and it is directly connected to the personality's concept of survival necessities within the physical universe. The ego that is overly fearful for survival will allow little potential to show itself unless that potential is directly connected with physical survival. Actually what happens here is that the ego sells the personality short, out of fear, and denies those very abilities that are needed, and in practical terms.
quotes.translation: 自我关注是一种非常排他的关注，它直接与人格在物质宇宙内对生存必需品的概念相连。过度恐惧生存的自我，会很少允许潜能显现，除非该潜能直接与物质生存相关。实际上，这里发生的是，自我出于恐惧而低估了人格，否定了那些实际所需的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I am not, therefore, a product of Ruburt's subconscious, any more than he is a product of my subconscious mind. Nor am I a secondary personality, cleverly trying to undermine a precarious ego. I have seen to it in fact that all portions of Ruburt's personality are benefited, and their integrity maintained and honored.
quotes.translation: 因此，我并非鲁柏潜意识的产物，正如他也不是我潜意识的产物。我也不是某个试图巧妙破坏不稳定自我的次人格。事实上，我已确保鲁柏人格的所有部分都得到益处，其完整性得到维护与尊重。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They are only available however under certain circumstances, for each of them is coded within a specific intensity range. They exist simultaneously with the present personality, but the present personality as a rule cannot pick them up, so to speak. Sometimes there is a bleed through however. Also, the chemical nature of certain emotional experiences may cause a freak electrical storm within the identity system, so that a past life may suddenly be recalled.
quotes.translation: 然而，它们只在特定条件下才可获取，因为每一个都编码在特定的强度范围内。它们与当前人格同时存在，但可以说，当前人格通常无法接收到它们。不过，有时会有渗透现象。此外，某些情感体验的化学性质可能在身份系统内引发异常的电风暴，使得某一前世突然被忆起。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: To begin with, Augustus was brought up to believe that the inner self was dangerous, that individuals reacted because of inner conflicts over which they had little conscious control. (Gesturing:) He believed that the individual personality was relatively powerless to understand itself and that it stood precariously alone and undefended, with a chasm of evil beneath and with an unattainable, cold, just, but not compassionate Good (with a capital "G") above.
quotes.translation: 首先，奥古斯都在成长过程中被灌输这样的信念：内在自我是危险的，个体的反应源于他们几乎无法有意识控制的内在冲突。（做手势：）他相信个体人格相对无力理解自身，并且它孤立无援、毫无防备地危险站立着，下方是邪恶的深渊，上方是遥不可及、冷酷、公正但无慈悲的善（大写G）。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In parentheses: (There is also a probable system, of course, in which no reincarnational cycles exist, and a cycle of reincarnations in which no probabilities exist.) The openness and flexibility of the personality is highly important. Doorways to existences can be opened, and the personality can refuse to see them.
quotes.translation: 括号内：（当然，也存在一个没有转世循环的可能系统，以及一个没有可能性的转世循环。）人格的开放性与灵活性极为重要。通往存在的门户可以开启，而人格也可以拒绝看见它们。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The human personality is therefore endowed sexually and psychologically with a freedom from strict sexual orientation. This has contributed to the survival of the species by not separating any of its mental or psychological abilities into two opposite camps. Except for the physical processes of reproduction, the species is free to arrange its psychological characteristics in whatever fashions it chooses. There is no inner programming that says otherwise.
quotes.translation: 因此，人类的人格在性向与心理上被赋予不受严格性取向限制的自由。这有助于物种的生存，因为它没有将任何心智或心理能力划分为两个对立的阵营。除了生殖的生理过程外，物种可以自由地以任何它选择的方式安排其心理特征。没有内在的程序规定必须如此。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is always the danger in such discussions that effects which are studied separately will appear to be separate in essence. But what we have been discussing in all these topics is, indeed, the nature of action. The personality as you know it is action. As such the personality however is not physically materialized. You cannot hold it in your hand. You can only observe it in motion, for it is never still, and to probe into it yourself is to change it.
quotes.translation: 在这类讨论中，总有一种危险：被分开研究的效果，看起来似乎本质上是分开的。但我们在所有这些主题中讨论的，实际上正是行动的本质。你所知的人格就是行动。然而，作为行动，人格并没有在物理上具体化。你无法把它握在手中。你只能在它的运动中观察它，因为它从未静止，而你自己去探究它，就是在改变它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The dreaming self as you conceive of it, however, is but a shadow of its own reality, for the dreaming self is a psychological point of reference and, in your terms, [of] continuity, that brings together all portions of your identity. Of its deeper nature, only the most developed are aware. It represents, in other words, one strong uniting facet of your entire identity. Its experiences are as vivid and its "personality" as rich -- in fact richer -- in context as the physical personality you know.
quotes.translation: 然而，你所构想的做梦自己，只是它自身实相的一个影子，因为做梦自己是一个心理上的参考点，用你们的话说，也是一个连续性的参考点，它汇聚了你身份的所有部分。只有最进化的人才能意识到它更深层的本质。换句话说，它代表了你整个身份的一个强大的统一面向。它的体验同样生动，它的“人格”同样丰富——事实上，在情境中比你所知的物质人格更丰富。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Those who imagine they look upon nature with the most objective of eyes are those whose subjective beliefs blind them most of all, for they cannot see through their own misinterpretations. It has been said that statistics can be made to say two things at once, both contradictory; so the facts of nature can be read in completely different fashions as they are put together with the organizational abilities of the mind operating through the brain's beliefs. The exterior core of dreams is also blemished to that degree, but the inner core of dreams provides a constant new influx of material, feedback, and insight from the psyche, so that the personality is not at the mercy of its exterior experience only -- not confined to environmental feedback only, but ever provided with fresh intuitive data and direction.
quotes.translation: 那些以为自己用最客观的眼睛看待自然的人，正是那些主观信念最蒙蔽他们的人，因为他们无法看穿自己的误解。据说统计数字可以同时说出两件矛盾的事情；同样，自然的事实也可以以完全不同的方式被解读，这取决于心智通过大脑的信念运作的组织能力。梦的外在核心也因此受到玷污，但梦的内在核心则不断从心灵提供新材料、反馈和洞见，使人格不仅仅受制于外在经验——不仅仅局限于环境反馈，而是始终获得新鲜的直觉数据和方向。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "Now Ruburt had only one parent available most of the time, and he did not feel secure in that relationship--a situation chosen ahead of time, now. There is great leeway in the nature of such bondings.... With some people, they are so secure that they provide an overall, fairly permanent inner and outer framework. Ruburt's relationship with his mother left much to be desired. The bonding did not secure him that vital sense of safety, and he felt threatened by abandonment. His bonding to the cultural beliefs of religion was very strong to make up for that initial lack. The sinful-self material represents those ideas that were a strong element in his original belief structures. The 'troublesome' material remained relatively inactive until his curiosity and ability led him to actively challenge those ideas while [he was] also in a situation where the natural fear of abandonment might be suggested. At certain points, the assimilation of new information is so qualifiedly different from the original belief structure that in order to assimilate it the personality is left for a time between belief systems.
quotes.translation: “现在，鲁柏大部分时间只有一个父母可用，而他在那种关系中感到不安全——这是事先选择好的情况，现在。这种纽带关系的性质有很大的余地……对某些人来说，它们如此安全，以至于提供了一个整体性的、相当持久的内外框架。鲁柏与他母亲的关系有很多不足之处。这种纽带没有给他那种至关重要的安全感，他感到被遗弃的威胁。他对宗教文化信仰的纽带非常强烈，以弥补最初的那种缺失。有罪自己的材料代表了那些在他最初信念结构中作为强有力元素的观念。这些‘麻烦的’材料相对不活跃，直到他的好奇心和能力引导他积极挑战那些观念，同时他也处于一种可能暗示对遗弃的自然恐惧的情境中。在某些点上，新信息的同化与原始信念结构如此显著地不同，以至于为了同化它，人格会暂时处于信念系统之间。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 17. See the opening notes for Session 920, in this Chapter 9.

quotes.text: A death in a family, for example, is a physical occurrence. Various members of the family will react differently, as you know. The psychological experience will be intensely diversified, personal, unpredictable as far as each family member is concerned. You cannot observe this actual psychological experience with the outer senses. Even you yourself cannot see, smell, touch that inner experience. You cannot hold it in both hands and look it over. You cannot observe it in any objective manner, as you can observe a pencil on a table, yet it would be foolish to say that this psychological experience did not exist. It is too vivid to ignore, and oftentimes the personality is almost divorced from action because of this experience that is psychological, that cannot be observed with instruments, or even by the person involved.
quotes.translation: 例如，家庭中的死亡是一个物理事件。如你所知，家庭中的不同成员会有不同的反应。就每个家庭成员而言，心理体验将是高度多样化的、个人的、不可预测的。你无法用外在感官观察这种实际的心理体验。甚至你自己也无法看到、闻到、触摸到那种内在体验。你无法用双手握住它并仔细端详。你无法像观察桌上的铅笔那样以任何客观的方式观察它，然而，说这种心理体验不存在将是愚蠢的。它太生动而无法忽视，而且，由于这种心理上的体验——它无法用仪器观察，甚至无法被当事人自己观察——人格常常几乎与行动分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: As far as these drugs are concerned there are a few points I would like to make. One of your purposes as I have said is to learn to organize energy units and to focus your own energy along those lines. That is, you are the energy that you use. The self-consciousness is not to be blotted out but taken along. It is so to speak to walk side by side with the inner self. The use of these drugs sweeps the personality off its feet. Often the personality does receive a rewarding glimpse of the inner reality, but more often the ego is merely sent tumbling through frightening images of chaotic phantom realities formed by a suddenly-released subconscious, and with no guide. The experience is often vivid and long remembered, but so unorganized and undisciplined that no inner order is arrived at, no other organization glimpsed, and the ordinary but necessary camouflage footing suddenly dispensed with.
quotes.translation: 关于这些药物，我有几点想说明。正如我所说，你们的目的之一是学习组织能量单元，并沿着这些方向聚焦自身能量。也就是说，你们就是自己所使用的能量。自我意识不应被抹除，而应被携带前行——可以说，它应与内在自我并肩同行。使用这些药物会使人格失去平衡。人格确实常能瞥见内在实相的有益景象，但更常见的情况是，自我仅仅被抛入由突然释放的潜意识所构成的混乱幻象中，在无向导的情况下跌跌撞撞。这种体验往往生动且令人长久铭记，但因缺乏组织与纪律，既无法触及内在秩序，也无法瞥见其他组织形态，而日常却必要的伪装基础则被突然摒弃。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner ego knows when to apply safety valves, and is aware of the danger before the outer ego is alerted. The inner ego is concerned with maintaining the foundations and balance, which is very important, of the whole self, and it is open to messages from the overall entity. The inner ego receives messages through the inner senses, and is aware of realities which the outer ego cannot afford to recognize because of its specialization. In some important aspects the outer ego is supposed to represent to some degree the subdominant personalities who still dwell in the subconscious. When the outer ego is narrow, and poorly represents these subdominant personalities then they rise up in arms, and when conditions are favorable attempt to express themselves through a momentary weakness on the part of the dominant ego. But without even doing this they may momentarily take over or express themselves through a single function, such as speech or motion, while the outer ego is blissfully unaware.
quotes.translation: 内在自我知道何时启用安全阀，并在外在自我警觉之前就已察觉危险。内在自我致力于维持整体自我的根基与平衡——这至关重要——并且对来自整体存有的讯息保持开放。内在自我通过内在感官接收讯息，并知晓那些因专业化而无法被外在自我承认的实相。在某些重要方面，外在自我本应在一定程度上代表仍居于潜意识中的次人格。当外在自我过于狭隘，未能妥善代表这些次人格时，它们便会奋起反抗，并在条件有利时试图通过主导自我的瞬间弱点来表达自己。但即便不这样做，它们也可能暂时接管或通过单一功能（如言语或动作）来表达自己，而外在自我却浑然不觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: For the investigator himself, through his actions, inadvertently brings about, in specific instances, those results for which he looks. The particular experiment may then seem to suggest conditions which are by no means general ones, but which may appear so. In hypnosis the subject is not as much on guard as a subject of an experiment when the subject knows in advance that he will be awakened by the experimenter, when electrodes are attached to the physical organism, when the conditions of the sleep laboratory are substituted for his ordinary nightly environment. It is impossible to study dreams when an attempt is made to isolate the dreamer from his own personality, to treat dreams as if they were physical or mechanical. The only laboratory for a study of dreams is the laboratory of the personality.
quotes.translation: 研究者本人通过自身行为，在特定情境中会无意间促成他所寻求的结果。特定实验可能因此呈现出绝非普遍性的条件，但这些条件却可能显得具有普遍性。在催眠中，受试者不像实验对象那样保持警惕——当实验对象事先知道会被实验者唤醒、当电极连接在肉体组织上、当睡眠实验室的条件取代其日常夜间环境时。若试图将做梦者与其人格隔离，将梦境视为物理或机械现象，便无法研究梦境。研究梦境的唯一实验室，就是人格的实验室。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: These dreams go unrecognized by the conscious ego; but they do not go unrecorded by the inner self, and they therefore exist, and they form electromagnetic channels of their own to which--make that by which--the physical body itself is affected. The physical organism is constantly changed by all stimuli, whether or not the ego is aware of the stimuli. And it is affected by stimuli, whether or not science realizes that the particular stimuli even exists. Therefore, the physical organism reacts to this continuous unconscious Mental activity in the form of continuing dream experiences, whether or not the individual is awake or asleep. All of these realities go into the formation of the personality, and unless they are all understood the personality itself will remain a mystery.
quotes.translation: 这些梦境未被意识自我所识别，但内在自我却记录在案，因此它们确实存在，并形成自身的电磁通道——肉体本身正是通过这些通道受到影响。无论自我是否意识到刺激，肉体组织都持续被所有刺激所改变。而且，无论科学是否意识到特定刺激的存在，肉体都会受其影响。因此，无论个体是清醒还是睡眠，肉体组织都会以持续梦境体验的形式，对这种持续的无意识心智活动做出反应。所有这些实相都参与人格的形成，除非它们被完全理解，否则人格本身仍将是个谜。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The basic consciousness is never physical. Yet within your system it must collect experience within the physical system, hence the physical body. But experience itself is not physical, and cannot be contained within physical matter. Therefore this experience, collected within the physical field, is held in codified form by this inner self or astral identity. It is only by understanding the connection between the physical and nonphysical self, and the communication systems that operate here, that the true nature of human personality can be studied. While we are dealing now with your own species, it should be realized that all consciousness also possesses its own astral identity. The inner senses are part of this nonphysical self. They allow the personality to retain its relationship with nonphysical reality, permitting the material self to focus within its earthly environment.
quotes.translation: 基本意识从来不是物质的。然而在你们的系统内，它必须在物质系统中收集经验，因此才有了物质身体。但经验本身并非物质，也无法被物质所容纳。因此，在物质领域收集的经验，以编码形式被内在自我或星光体身份所保存。只有理解物质自我与非物质自我之间的联系，以及在此运作的沟通系统，才能研究人类人格的真实本质。虽然我们目前讨论的是你们这个物种，但应认识到所有意识也拥有自身的星光体身份。内在感官是非物质自我的一部分，它们使人格得以保持与非物质实相的关系，同时让物质自我聚焦于其地球环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: （Seth had some interesting things to say about using suggestion. The kernel of thought here is that it is important to use whatever suggestions we want to, daily; he stressed the importance of not missing a day. He explained that in a given period of say, thirty days, the suggestions on perhaps but three or four days within that period would be really effective, and that as of now we have no way of knowing the best days. So if we miss a day, we run a chance of missing out on a particularly effective day for suggestion. Seth said that on occasion suggestion will reach all levels of the personality, that our voice will be heard throughout the personality, and that effective action will follow. There was more here but the above is the main point made.
quotes.translation: （赛斯关于使用暗示有一些有趣的论述。这里的核心思想是：每天使用我们想要的任何暗示非常重要；他强调一天都不能中断的重要性。他解释说，在例如三十天的特定周期内，可能只有其中三四天的暗示会真正有效，而目前我们无法知道哪些是最佳日子。因此如果我们错过一天，就可能错过一个特别有效的暗示日。赛斯说，有时暗示会触及人格的所有层面，我们的声音会响彻整个人格，随后有效行动就会发生。这里还有更多内容，但以上是主要观点。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Individual life, or the life of the present individual, could be legitimately compared to the dream of an entity. While the individual suffers and enjoys his given number of years, these years are but a flash to the entity. The entity is concerned with these years in the same manner that you are concerned with your dreams. As you give inner purpose and organization to your dreams, and as you obtain insight and satisfaction from your dreams though they involve only a part of your life, so the entity to some extent directs and gives purpose and organization to his personalities during their existence. And so does the entity obtain insights and satisfactions from his existing personalities, although no one takes up all of his own attentions.
quotes.translation: 个体生命，或当前个体的生命，可合理比作一个存有之梦。当个体在其给定的岁月中受苦与享乐时，这些岁月对存有而言不过一瞬。存有关注这些岁月的方式，正如你关注自己的梦境。你赋予梦境内在目的与组织，并从梦境中获得洞见与满足——尽管它们仅涉及你生命的一部分——同样，存有在其人格存在期间，也在某种程度上引导、赋予其目的与组织。存有亦从其现存人格中获得洞见与满足，尽管没有任何一个人格能占据其全部注意力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The personality itself exists in many dimensions, as you know, and it has its reality within many other fields than the physical field, and is indeed basically not nearly as allied with the physical field as you may imagine. These unifying principles of which I spoke are themselves main, dominating groups of actions, about which the main energies of the personality group themselves.
quotes.translation: 人格本身存在于多个维度，如你所知，它在许多其他领域——而非仅物质领域——拥有实相，且其与物质领域的关联远不如你所想象的那般紧密。我所说的这些统一原则本身，正是主导性的行动集群，人格的主要能量围绕它们聚集。
