quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Animals have varying degrees of self-consciousness, as indeed people do. The consciousness that is within them is as valid and eternal as your own, however. There is nothing to prevent a personality from investing a portion of his own energy into an animal form. This is not transmigration of souls. It does not mean that a man can be reincarnated in an animal. It does mean that personalities can send a portion of their energy into various kinds of form.
quotes.translation: 动物拥有不同程度的自我意识，正如人类确实如此。然而，它们内在的意识与你的意识同样真实且永恒。没有任何事物能阻止人格将其部分能量注入动物形态。这并非灵魂转世，不意味着人能转生为动物，但确实意味着人格能将其部分能量发送至各种形态中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A particularly vivid dream is every bit as real to the inner self as a vivid psychological experience that occurs within the waking state. It is important here that we realize that as far as the basic self is concerned no distinctions are made in this respect. The personality creates its dreams; the dreams are then experienced. The experience is indelibly recorded, and then changes the personality, again, in the same manner that any experience would.
quotes.translation: 一个特别生动的梦境，对内在自我而言，其真实性丝毫不亚于清醒状态下发生的生动心理体验。此处重要的是，我们要认识到：就基本自我而言，它在这方面不作区分。人格创造其梦境，随后体验这些梦境。这种体验被不可磨灭地记录，进而改变人格——再次强调，其方式与任何其他体验相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: These four personalities existed however in one physical lifetime. Now to an observer whose time concept was still further segmented, and slowed down in comparison to your own, then theoretically within his time system the four personalities would indeed appear to be four separate existences in fact. In the same manner, you see, several manifestations of one identity appear to you to be stretched out in serial form within a successive time framework.
quotes.translation: 然而，这四个人格存在于同一物理生命期内。现在，对于一个时间概念被进一步分割、且相比你的时间更慢的观察者而言，理论上在其时间系统内，这四个人格确实会显现为四个独立的实存。同理，你看，同一身份的多重显现在你看来，是在连续时间框架内以序列形式延展开的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: For convenience's sake, you close out the multitudinous inner communications that leap between the tiniest parts of your flesh, yet even as physical creatures, you are to some extent a portion of other consciousnesses. There are no limitations to the self. There are no limitations to its potentials. (Pause.) You can adopt artificial limitations through your own ignorance, however. You can identify, for example, with your outer ego alone, and cut yourself off from abilities that are a part of you. You can deny, but you cannot change, the facts. The personality is multidimensional, even though many people hide their heads, figuratively speaking, in the sand of three-dimensional existence and pretend there is nothing more.
quotes.translation: 为方便起见，你关闭了在你肉体最微小部分之间跳跃的无数内在沟通，然而，即便作为物质生物，你在某种程度上也是其他意识的一部分。自我没有限制，其潜能亦无限制。（停顿。）不过，你可以通过自身的无知采用人为限制。例如，你仅认同外在自我，从而切断与属于你自身的能力的联系。你可以否认事实，但无法改变事实。人格是多维的，即便许多人——打个比方——将头埋入三维存在的沙堆中，假装别无他物。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We find that he relates well to the outside environment. And then we have this secrecy of which I said I would not speak. We also find, in your other friend, boundless energies and a genuine ability to relate to others. But the personality is torn against itself. It does not believe in what it is doing, and here we will find a comparison between this tendency toward secrecy on Philips part, and this divided nature on the part of your other friend.
quotes.translation: 我们发现他与外界环境相处融洽。接着还有我承诺过不提及的隐秘性。我们也发现，在你的另一位朋友身上，存在着无穷的能量和与他人相处的真实能力。但人格本身却处于分裂状态。它不相信自己所做之事，在此我们将看到菲利普的隐秘倾向与你另一位朋友的分裂本质之间的对比。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: These portions operate almost like a secondary personality, sometimes in actual conflict with the dominant one. Finally, you see, cases develop where the dominant personality is not in control of the physical image at all. Certain classic cases of hysteria can show this in a limited but dramatic fashion.
quotes.translation: 这些部分运作起来几乎像次人格，有时会与主导人格产生实际冲突。最终你看，会出现主导人格完全无法控制物质形象的情况。某些典型的歇斯底里症案例能以有限却戏剧化的方式展现这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: （In the 54th session Seth went into considerable detail in explaining the construction of entities. He could not give us this information earlier, he said, because we would have leaped to the conclusion that he was Ruburt's [Janes] subconscious mind; this is not so. As everything else does, entities constantly change. To quote Seth: "Ruburt is not myself now, in his present life; he is nevertheless an extension and materialization of the Seth that I was at one time... He grew, evolved and expanded in terms of a particular, personal set of value fulfillments... He is now an actual gestalt, a personality that was one of the probable personalities into which Seth could grow. I represent another, I am another. "
quotes.translation: （在第五十四节课中，赛斯详细解释了存有的构造。他说之前无法提供这些信息，是因为我们会妄下结论认为他是鲁柏（珍）的潜意识；事实并非如此。如同万物一样，存有也在不断变化。引用赛斯原话："鲁柏在今生并非现在的我，但他是我曾是的那个赛斯的延伸与物质化……他在特定个人价值完成方面成长、演化并扩展……他现在是一个实际完形，是赛斯可能发展出的众多可能人格之一。我代表另一个，我是另一个。"）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There are here also thrusts in all directions, with certain identifying pulsations that underlie all, and that have their origins within the inner self. As the vitality of the universe forms, of itself, the boundaries of the various fields of activity, and as vitality itself takes on the coloration of the various fields and forms the camouflage patterns within them, so also vitality, in the form of emotions that the camouflage patterns of the personality, even while this vitality forms both emotions and personality for every individual, every consciousness, may be thought of as a separate field of activity; and all the data relating to fields of activity may be seen to apply to any consciousness as well.
quotes.translation: 这里同样存在着向各个方向的推力，其下有某些贯穿一切的识别性脉动，这些脉动源于内在自体。正如宇宙的生命力自行形成各个活动领域的边界，正如生命力本身染上不同领域的色彩并在其中形成伪装模式，同样地，生命力以情绪形式构成人格的伪装模式——即使这生命力同时为每个个体、每个意识塑造情绪与人格——可被视为一个独立的活动领域；所有与活动领域相关的资料，同样适用于任何意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am no secondary personality. There is no case of multiple personality here. What you have if you take advantage of it, is Ruburt's personality, which with Josephs help is capable and willing to perceive more than one reality at once. You will not, my dear doctor, get a second chance in this endeavor.
quotes.translation: 我并非次人格。这里不存在多重人格案例。如果你善加利用，你所拥有的是鲁柏的人格——在约瑟的协助下，它有能力且愿意同时感知多重实相。我亲爱的医生，你不会再有第二次机会进行这项尝试。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your personalities, in a symbol now, form the two sides, the two banks, of the stream through which the material flows. The bottom represents the underground connections of your own past lives. The interworking's of your personalities form the various currents within the stream. The material is that which flows through the stream. I am the source of it, for your practical purposes. (Smile.) I am the land from which the two banks are formed.
quotes.translation: 你们的人格，以象征而言，构成了物质流经之河的两岸。河床代表你们各自过去世的地下连接。你们人格的交互运作形成了河中的各种水流。物质便是流经河流之物。就实用目的而言，我是其源头。（微笑）我是形成两岸的土地。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: These cannot be recounted, again, in one evening; nor would such a performance serve any purpose at this time; listed, so to speak. There are considerations that connect them that must be discussed, if any good will be done. The need for the ulcer was aggravated in the fairly recent past, but the personality is basically flexible enough so that adjustments can be made.
quotes.translation: 这些无法在一夜之间尽述；此刻罗列出来也无济于事。必须讨论将它们联系起来的考量，方能有所裨益。溃疡的需求在近期加剧，但人格本质上是足够灵活的，因此可以做出调整。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This does not mean that the personality must be completely swept away by an emotion, though this is what such an ego fears. Emotion replenishes even the ego. Emotions demand resiliency, and resiliency is both the result of spontaneity, inner assurance, and discipline. All this is action, for the personality itself is composed of action, and is constantly changing. This is action, therefore, delighting in the expression and form of itself.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着人格必须被情绪完全扫荡，尽管这正是自我所恐惧的。情绪甚至能滋养自我。情绪要求韧性，而韧性既是自发性的结果，也是内在确信与自律的结果。这一切都是行动，因为人格本身由行动构成，并不断变化。因此，这是行动，以其自身的表达与形式为乐。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There is always an overall order to the personality, even though it is in the background, so that in any given case all of the separate "selves," or other sources with whom the individual feels in contact, would together point toward the totality, or unity, that lies beneath. The outstanding mental phenomena, therefore, show in isolated fashions those elements of the personality that are not to be assimilated in the usual smooth fashion.
quotes.translation: 人格始终存在一种整体秩序，即便它处于背景之中，因此在任何特定情况下，所有分离的"自我"或个体感觉接触到的其他源头，都会共同指向底层的整体性或统一性。因此，突出的心灵现象以孤立的方式展现了人格中那些无法以通常顺畅方式被同化的元素。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: At the beginning of the notes for this 920th session I wrote that the session isn't dictation for Dreams. Yet it is, of course, since in it Seth illuminates from still another perspective his concept of value fulfillment.8 The session grew out of the encounter we had yesterday afternoon with an unexpected visitor from out of state. Seth hardly mentions the individual involved, however, but instead goes into the subject of mental illness in more inclusive terms. I see many correlations between this evening's material and that in Session 917 for Chapter 8; there, among other things, Seth had discussed the reasoning mind, the imaginative mind, and schizophrenia. That session had been triggered, at least in part, by a letter Jane had found to be quite upsetting.

quotes.text: A developed personality will perceive them as he would perceive new conditions in the physical environment. An undeveloped personality will keep his characteristic attitude and capabilities. There is some difference, naturally, but the degree of perception is determined by the personality itself.
quotes.translation: 一个发展完善的人格会像感知物理环境中的新状况一样感知它们。一个未发展完善的人格则会保持其惯常的态度与能力。自然存在一些差异，但感知的程度由人格本身决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Your own subconscious is the fountain of your individuality and personality. From it springs your talent. When the ego becomes too concerned with daily matters, with worry in other words, then the works of the tool become clogged. It becomes ineffective. Dissociation, and I will give you many ways of achieving it, unclogs the tool and is absolutely necessary. The freely working subconscious, or the inner you, is completely capable of taking care of all practical considerations, and will use the ego as a tool to see that this is done.
quotes.translation: 你自己的潜意识是你个体性与人格的源泉。你的才能从中涌现。当自我过于关注日常事务，换句话说，过于忧虑时，这个工具就会堵塞。它会变得无效。解离——我会给你许多实现它的方法——能疏通这个工具，并且是绝对必要的。自由运作的潜意识，或内在的你，完全有能力处理所有实际考量，并会利用自我作为工具来确保这一点得以实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: He believed in the specific nature of the creative self, so that it could only be trusted in certain areas. He believed he needed strong mental barriers as well as physical ones, set up against his own spontaneity. He is beginning to understand that the spontaneous and creative aspects of personality are the life-giving ones. They can and must be trusted. He knows now he does not have to slow down, and that relaxation leads to motion.
quotes.translation: 他相信创造性自我的特定本质，以至于只能在某些领域信任它。他相信自己需要强大的心智屏障以及身体屏障，来对抗自己的自发性。他开始理解，人格的自发与创造性面向是赋予生命的。它们能够且必须被信任。他现在知道，他不必放慢脚步，而放松会导向行动。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: We held the session in the living room, as usual. Jane yawned, then laughed as we waited for Seth to come through. "I keep trying to change that title, though...." After a prolonged juggling of titles and themes on her own, she'd finally acquired the book's title directly from Seth some seven weeks ago, or shortly before July 30, 1979; see the closing note for Session 869 in Chapter 10 of Mass Events. "I just think that 'value fulfillment' is a strange phrase to use in a book title," Jane said. "It's too unfamiliar--I'm afraid it'll confuse the reader. I keep thinking of something simpler, like Dreams and Evolution: A Seth Book. And without 'Evolution' being in quotes, too. Or how about Dreams, Evolution, and Creativity ...?"
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: Remember that in one way, your physical existence is the result of mass hallucination. Vast gulfs exist between one man's reality and another's. After death, experience has as much organization, highly intricate and involved, as you know now. You have your private hallucinations now, only you do not realize what they are. Such hallucinations as I have been speaking of, intense symbolistic encounters, can also occur in your sleep states, when the personality is at a time of great change, or when opposing ideas must be unified, or if one must give way to another. These are highly charged, significant psychological and psychic events, whether they happen before or after death.
quotes.translation: 请记住，从某方面来说，你们的物质存在是集体幻觉的结果。人与人之间的实相存在着巨大鸿沟。死后经历具有与你们现在所知同样高度复杂精密的组织。你们现在拥有私人的幻觉，只是没有意识到它们是什么。我一直在谈论的这种强烈象征性遭遇的幻觉，也可能发生在睡眠状态中，当人格处于重大转变时期，或当对立观念必须统一时，或当某个观念必须让位于另一个时。这些是高度充能、意义重大的心理与心灵事件，无论它们发生在生前还是死后。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The consciousness will expand on your planet, just as it expands for those who go beyond your plane. The scope of consciousness will be so broadened in the future that all personality fragments, split personality images, and even individual fragments in succeeding incarnations, will be held in clear focus without strain. It is toward this that evolution on the earthly plane is headed, though of course with its usual donkey-slow rate.
quotes.translation: 意识将在你们的星球上扩展，正如它为那些超越你们层面的人扩展一样。未来意识的范畴将如此广阔，以至于所有人格片段、分裂人格意象，甚至后续转世中的个体片段，都将被清晰聚焦而毫无压力。地球层面的进化正朝着这个方向前进，尽管当然是以它惯常的蜗牛般缓慢速度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Personality is itself an energy source. Now this is rather important. The personality operates and has always operated in this manner. Of itself it is like a peephole or a transparent area through which other areas can be glimpsed, and through which information from other dimensions can flow.
quotes.translation: 人格本身就是一个能量来源。这一点相当重要。人格以这种方式运作，并且一直以这种方式运作。它本身就像一个窥孔或透明区域，通过它可以瞥见其他区域，并且来自其他维度的信息可以通过它流动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There would still be repercussions, however, though less disastrous, that would be unavoidable. For again, basically the personality does not differentiate between a waking and a sleeping experience. The importance of any experience is judged by the personality according to its personal vividness and significance. It is only the ego who makes other distinctions.
quotes.translation: 然而，尽管灾难性较小，仍会有不可避免的反响。因为从根本上说，人格并不区分清醒体验与睡眠体验。任何体验的重要性都由人格根据其个人的生动性与意义来判断。只有自我才会做出其他区分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: (She described some subjective experiences she thought the personality was going to have her experience. A feeling of microscopic smallness approaching, the reverse of the giant feeling, etc. I told her she'd have to write out the data. She said the ideas were quickly leaving; the feelings were without words and she wasn't used to that yet. She thinks she panics and so shuts the voice off. The pyramid effect was dwindling by 11:15.
quotes.translation: （她描述了一些主观体验，她认为人格将要经历她的体验。一种接近微观渺小的感觉，与巨人感相反，等等。我告诉她必须把这些资料写下来。她说这些想法正在迅速消失；这些感觉没有语言，她还不习惯。她认为自己惊慌失措，于是关闭了声音。到11点15分，金字塔效应正在减弱。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I will tell you the book, in what Ruburt thinks of as its somewhat inane simplicity, is very profound. Nevertheless for others there are steps that must be followed through, and following these steps through brings the whole personality, including the intellect, to a more balanced understanding, which is my goal. The author, while basically correct, ignores for example the reality of reincarnation; and Ruburts protests to the contrary, reincarnation belongs both with metaphysics and psychology, and cannot be ignored.
quotes.translation: 我告诉你，鲁柏认为那本书有些空洞的简单，其实非常深奥。然而对其他人来说，有些步骤必须循序渐进地遵循，而遵循这些步骤会带来整个人格（包括智力）更平衡的理解，这是我的目标。那位作者虽然基本正确，却忽略了转世的实相；而鲁柏虽持相反意见，转世既属于形而上学也属于心理学，不容忽视。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This designation does not include the entity as a whole, however. The personality does have access to the entity, but the personality does not contain the entity. In other words the whole self as it exists on your plane does not contain the entity, although communication between the entity and the whole self can and does take place by means of the inner senses.
quotes.translation: 然而，这个称谓并不包含整体的存有。人格确实能接触到存有，但人格并不包含存有。换句话说，存在于你们层面的整体自我并不包含存有，尽管存有与整体自我之间可以通过内在感官进行沟通，而且确实如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The emotions belong to the personality, that is to the present personality, and are strongly connected both to the conscious ego and to the inner self, which is so often ignored. This is the rather difficult part for me to explain, I'm afraid. I'm not sure how to go about making this clear.
quotes.translation: 情绪属于人格，即当前的人格，并且与意识自我和常常被忽视的内在自我都有强烈联系。恐怕这部分对我来说相当难以解释。我不确定该如何说清楚这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The personality can survive well without the ulcer. If this sounds like a foolish statement it is not, for in many such cases the ulcer is so concentrated upon, and so much energy is used in its maintenance, and it is used as such a scapegoat, that the personality is loath to be rid of it.
quotes.translation: 没有溃疡，人格也能很好地存活。如果这听起来像句蠢话，其实不然，因为在许多此类案例中，溃疡被如此专注地对待，如此多的能量用于维持它，它被当作如此方便的替罪羊，以至于人格竟不愿摆脱它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is always within this framework, but not always does it maintain the same relative position within it. The stability of the personality depends in some degree upon the effectiveness with which it handles and manipulates these dream situations. It is realized that the personality manipulates within the physical universe, but the fact is not generally accepted that similar manipulations must be made within this dream universe.
quotes.translation: 它始终处在这个框架之内，但并非总是保持相同的相对位置。人格的稳定性在一定程度上取决于它处理并操控这些梦境情境的有效性。人们认识到人格在物质宇宙中运作，但同样必须在梦境宇宙中进行类似运作这一事实，却并未被普遍接受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I'm personally intrigued, of course, that this book was written through me, without my conscious mind there at every point, anxiously checking, organizing, and criticizing, as it does in my own work. Then, while my creative and intuitional abilities are given a good deal of freedom, the conscious mind is definitely in control. Yet this book was not written "by itself," in the same way that some poems seem to be. Often a writer will say that a certain book "wrote itself," and I know what that means. In this case, however, the book came from a specific source, not just from "out there," and it is colored by the author's personality, which is not mine.
quotes.translation: 当然，我个人感到好奇的是，这本书是通过我写成的，而我的意识心智并未在每个环节都像在我自己的作品中那样焦虑地检查、组织和批评。然后，当我的创造力和直觉能力被给予相当多的自由时，意识心智却明确地掌控着。然而，这本书并非像某些诗歌那样“自行”写成。作家常说某本书“自己写成了”，我明白那是什么意思。但在这个案例中，这本书来自一个特定的源头，并非仅仅来自“外面”，而且它被作者的人格所渲染，而那个人格并非我的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: In other portions of the Seth material these processes will be made very clear for those of you who desire to pursue the question further, or those who may be interested from a scientific point of view. Here, we are discussing such issues only because they touch upon the multidimensional aspect of personality. They allow you to materialize certain subjective experiences into three-dimensional reality. Before I leave the subject, however, let me remind you that these emanations in varying degrees rise from all consciousness, not simply your own. This includes cellular consciousness as well, so that an invisible network of electromagnetic units pervades your entire atmosphere; and upon this webwork and from it, the particles of physical matter are then formed.
quotes.translation: 在赛斯资料的其他部分，这些过程将为那些希望进一步探究这个问题的人，或那些可能从科学角度感兴趣的人，阐述得非常清楚。在此，我们讨论这些问题，仅仅是因为它们触及了人格的多维面向。它们允许你将某些主观体验物质化为三维现实。然而，在我离开这个主题之前，请让我提醒你，这些放射以不同程度源自所有意识，而不仅仅是你自己的。这还包括细胞意识，因此一个由电磁单元组成的无形网络弥漫于你们的整个大气之中；而物理物质的粒子便是在这个网络之上并从中形成的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The individual, when it is time then, begins to see beyond temporal life, to open up dimensions of awareness that in your terms he or she could not afford while involved in the intense physical focus of normal adult life. Unfortunately the personality has no system of beliefs, as a rule, to support such an expansion. The natural therapies, both physical and mental, are denied. Drugs are often used as depressants, clouding the clarity of what seems to be distorted vision. This is one of the most creative, valuable aspects of your lives. Instead the old are made to feel useless in your society. Often of course they share this value judgment, and their experience within your communities has in no way prepared them to face subjective experience.
quotes.translation: 当个体时机成熟时，便会开始超越现世生命，开启意识维度——用你们的说法，这些维度是他在投入正常成人生活强烈物质焦点时无法负担的。不幸的是，人格通常没有支持这种扩张的信念体系。自然疗法（无论是生理还是心理层面）都被否定了。药物常被用作抑制剂，遮蔽了看似扭曲的视野中的清晰度。这是你们生命中最具创造力、最有价值的面向之一。然而在你们社会中，老年人被弄得自觉无用。当然他们往往也认同这种价值判断，而他们在社群中的经历从未让他们准备好面对主观体验。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In terms of personality as you understand it, the individual chooses the abilities he or she will have, and the life challenges. In the present then each person has unlimited opportunity to draw upon the entity's energy, and the understanding and powers of all of its parts. (Long pause.) It goes without saying that any human being possesses the latent ability shown by a great artist or athlete, or statesman or philosopher. Within creaturehood there are wide ranges of abilities; these may be seldom used, but they are there as practical ideals that can be expressed within that system. In the same way, every individual possesses the abilities of its entity in latent form. These too serve as practical ideals, but in a different kind of context, for you have other centuries to play with and many existences instead of one.
quotes.translation: 就你们所理解的人格而言，个体选择自己将拥有的能力与人生挑战。因此在当下，每个人都有无限机会汲取存有的能量，以及其所有组成部分的理解与力量。（长停顿）不言而喻，任何人类都潜藏着伟大艺术家、运动员、政治家或哲学家所展现的能力。在生物性中存在广泛的能力范围；这些能力可能很少被使用，但它们作为可在该系统中表达的实践理想而存在。同样地，每个人都以潜在形式拥有其存有的能力。这些也作为实践理想，但处于不同的脉络中，因为你们还有数个世纪可以运用，且拥有多次存在而非仅此一生。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I'm more inclined to agree with what Seth told us in the 590th session in Chapter 22 of Seth Speaks: "You are not fated to dissolve into All That Is. The aspects of your personality as you presently understand them will be retained. All That Is is the creator of individuality, not the means of its destruction." And whenever I read about conventional Eastern conceptions of a supreme spirit, I remember what Seth had to say in the 596th session in the Appendix of Seth Speaks: "I have used the term 'expansion of consciousness' here rather than the more frequently used 'cosmic consciousness' because the latter implies an experience of proportions not available to mankind at this time. Intense expansions of consciousness by contrast to your normal state may appear to be cosmic in nature, but they barely hint at those possibilities of consciousness that are available to you now, much less begin to approach a true cosmic awareness."
quotes.translation: 我更倾向于认同赛斯在《赛斯书》第22章第590节中所言："你并非注定要消融于万有之中。你目前所理解的人格面向将被保留。万有是个体性的创造者，而非其毁灭的工具。"每当我读到传统东方关于至高灵性的概念时，便会想起赛斯在《赛斯书》附录第596节中的话："我在此使用'意识扩张'一词，而非更常用的'宇宙意识'，因为后者暗示了人类目前尚无法企及的意识比例。相较于你们的正常状态，强烈的意识扩张在本质上可能看似宇宙性的，但它们仅能勉强暗示你们当下可触及的意识可能性，更遑论接近真正的宇宙觉知。"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Every so often I've thought of averaging Jane's dictation time for Seth Speaks and Personal Reality in the same way, but haven't done so. I'm somewhat puzzled to note, however, that her very short working times for the Seth books seem to be either ignored or taken for granted by practically everyone -- or, perhaps, those factors just aren't understood in terms of ordinary linear time. Maybe I'm alone in my interest here, for even Jane doesn't express any great curiosity about the time she has invested in the Seth material; she just delivers it. But given her abilities, I think her speed of production is a close physical approach to, or translation of, Seth's idea that basically all exists at once -- that really there is no time, and that the Seth books, for example, are "there" to be had in final form for just the tuning in. (In Section 3 of this volume, Note 2 for Session 692 contains information on another way by which we can move closer to Seth's idea of simultaneity from our physical reality, but that method grows out of material not discussed here.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Your experience of yourself marks the seeming boundaries of yourself. In a manner of speaking, I am one personality and one program or station. Ruburt is another. We have learned to be aware of each other* to communicate between stations, to affect each other's programs and to change each other's worlds. I do not speak alone to Ruburt and Joseph, for example, but my words go out to the world that you know. Still within your framework, Ruburt tunes in to another station, translates it and broadcasts the information. To do this, however, he has to alter his own consciousness, withdraw momentarily from the official station to bring in this one. That means tuning in to other portions of the psyche, as well as another kind of reality. The final translation of my material has to come through his organism, however, or it would be meaningless to you.
quotes.translation: 你对自己的体验标示着你自身的表面界限。打个比方，我是一个人格、一个程序或频道。鲁柏是另一个。我们学会了彼此觉察*、在频道间沟通、影响彼此的程序并改变彼此的世界。例如，我并非只对鲁柏和约瑟说话，而是我的话语传向你们所知的世界。然而在你们的框架内，鲁柏调频至另一个频道，将其翻译并广播信息。但要做到这点，他必须改变自身意识，暂时脱离官方频道以接入这个频道。这意味着要调频至心灵的其他部分，以及另一种实相。我资料的最后翻译必须通过他的有机体完成，否则对你们将毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 711
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I speak as my whole self to you ... since my personality structure is more advanced than is usual for communications from other systems. Therefore, I do not need to adopt a past ego [of my own]. Perhaps because this is not necessary, the psychological bridge is required to make my messages comprehensible to Ruburt. This connecting framework does some of the translating for me that a reassembled ego would do. It delivers information to Ruburt in a way that he can understand. Occasionally [in your tests] I do impress him directly, telepathically (see Note 19), with a concept. When he receives data in the form of images the framework is operating. With my direction, this framework uses Ruburt's personal associations to direct his impressions toward the correct point. Then when we are successful I insert the right information.23
quotes.translation: 我以完整的自我对你们说话……由于我的人格结构比来自其他系统的通常通讯更为先进，因此我不需要采用[我自己的]过去自我。或许正因如此，才需要心理桥梁使我的讯息能为鲁柏所理解。这个连接框架替我完成了重组自我会做的部分翻译工作。它以鲁柏能理解的方式向他传递信息。偶尔（在你们的测试中）我会以心电感应（见注释19）直接向他灌输概念。当他以图像形式接收数据时，这个框架就在运作。在我的指引下，该框架利用鲁柏的个人联想，将他的印象导向正确方向。当我们成功时，我便插入正确信息。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: "Seth's data and my own on counterparts make sense to me. I feel (as Seth mentioned in the 721st session) that I wasn't Nebene, or two different Roman soldiers per se, but rather that my whole self chose to manifest such personalities together; that I, too, am such a manifestation at a "later" time, then, and that from my own vantage point I can tune in to those other lives. But I question, at least provisionally, any idea of past or counterpart lives that I lived one hundred percent. At this writing, I think that I am living my only one hundred percent life now, with the privilege of occasionally being able to focus upon scattered portions of those other existences emanating from my whole self, which has its basic reality outside of our space-time concepts.10
quotes.translation: "赛斯关于对等物的数据和我自己的理解对我而言是合理的。我感觉（如赛斯在第721节所述）我并非尼比尼，或两个不同的罗马士兵本身，而是我的完整自我选择同时显化这些人格；我自身也是'较晚'时间点的此类显化，因此从我自己的有利位置，我能调频至那些其他生命。但我至少暂时质疑任何我百分之百经历过的过去或对等生命的观念。在撰写本文时，我认为我正在经历自己唯一百分之百的生命，同时享有偶尔聚焦于那些从完整自我（其基本实相存在于我们时空概念之外）散发出的其他存在碎片的特权。"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 724)
