quotes.text: The part that translates inner data sifts it down through the subconscious, which is a barrier and also a threshold to the present personality as it operates on the camouflage plane. I have mentioned many times how vitality changes as it approaches and forms various planes. I have said that the topmost part of the subconscious contains personal memories. That beneath these are racial memories and so forth. Things are simply not layered in the way I speak of them. But continuing with the necessary analogy, on the other side of （or beneath to you） the racial memories, you no longer exist within your plane, and look out upon another with the face of this other self-conscious part of you. This part receives inner data, is in contact with the entity, to some greater degree than you are in contact with your dreams, and actually directs all the important functions that you think are either automatically controlled, or unconsciously controlled.
quotes.translation: 翻译内在数据的那部分会将其过滤至潜意识，潜意识既是屏障也是门槛，通向当前在伪装层面运作的人格。我曾多次提及生命力在接近并形成各个层面时如何变化。我曾说过潜意识最上层包含个人记忆，其下是种族记忆等。事物并非如我所述那般分层排列。但继续用必要的比喻来说，在种族记忆的另一侧（或对你而言的底层），你不再存在于自己的层面，而是以你内在自我意识另一部分的面孔望向另一个层面。这部分接收内在数据，与存有保持联系，其程度远超你与自身梦境的联系，并实际指挥着你认为自动控制或潜意识控制的所有重要功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Nevertheless it also partakes of the strange unity that unites all personalities beneath the camouflage pattern, while at the same time it is only partially connected to the camouflage pattern. In some respects art creations are a meeting of the dream world and the world of camouflage patterns, but in a deeper way art creations represent the appearance or materialization in the actual element of physical time of inner realities. That is, the inner individualistic self forces its vision and knowledge into the world of camouflage pattern, giving its dreams a physical reality denied to the usual dream. And here the use of energy for this purpose is conscious, that is the strong hidden self actually makes use of the camouflage conscious self and molds the two into a reality that combines two planes. This I hope will become clear as you read it over.
quotes.translation: 然而它也参与了那奇特的统一性——这种统一性将所有伪装模式下的各个人格联结起来，同时它又仅与伪装模式部分相连。在某些方面，艺术创作是梦境世界与伪装模式世界的交汇，但更深层而言，艺术创作代表着内在实相在物理时间实际元素中的显化或物质化。也就是说，内在的个体化自我将其愿景与知识强行注入伪装模式世界，赋予其梦境以寻常梦境所不具备的物理实相。在此过程中，能量为此目的的使用是有意识的——即强大的隐藏自我实际利用了伪装意识自我，并将两者融合成结合两个层面的实相。希望您反复阅读后能明白这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I would state furthermore that indeed Ruburt did have occasion to be angry at the chiropractor, since with an emotional fear unthinking suggestions such as his, made with only the flimsiest of evidence, can be most harmful and destructive. And in an unwary, emotionally upset personality, particularly if under stress, such a suggestion could cause a harmless and protective nodule to be changed by the strong powers of adverse expectation, or rather expectation poorly used, into the form of what is feared; as a slight but harmless irregularity of heartbeat, with the unthinking suggestion of a doctor, can become through the patient's fears an actual functional disorder, so could suggestion turn a relatively harmless formation like Ruburt's into an arthritic condition.
quotes.translation: 我还要进一步说明，鲁柏确实有理由对脊椎按摩师感到愤怒，因为像他那样基于情绪恐惧、仅凭最薄弱证据做出的轻率暗示，可能极具危害性和破坏性。在一个不设防且情绪不安的人格中，尤其在压力之下，这种暗示可能使无害的保护性结节被负面期待（或更准确地说，被误用的期待）的强大力量转化为所恐惧的形态；正如医生轻率的暗示可使轻微但无害的心律不齐，通过患者的恐惧演变为实际功能失调，同样，暗示也能将鲁柏这类相对无害的结节转化为关节炎症状。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is the ego or directive consciousness behind all personified aspects of the subconscious; in dormant fashion however, and contrary to Jung's propositions, within the subconscious and in those personified aspects of it will be found remnant memory personalities of past reincarnated selves. They may be called shadows and yet they are not powerless. The inner ego, the directive organizer of the subconscious, also is the part of the self which is familiar with activities and methods of which the outer ego is ignorant. It is this organizer who directs not only the movements of the physical body from within, but directs from within those intimate survival mechanisms, without which the physical body could not exist, and upon which the existence of the outer ego is so dependent.
quotes.translation: 这是潜意识的自我或指导性意识，存在于所有潜意识人格化面向的背后；然而以休眠状态存在，且与荣格的命题相反，在潜意识及其人格化面向中，将发现过去转世自我的残余记忆人格。它们可被称为阴影，却并非毫无力量。内在自我——潜意识的指导性组织者——也是熟悉外在自我所不知的活动与方法的自我部分。正是这位组织者不仅从内部指挥肉体的运动，还从内部指挥那些亲密的生存机制——没有这些机制，肉体无法存在，而外在自我的存在也如此依赖它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This involves on his part not a conscious, but a subconscious change of habit. The new habit he has acquired very well. The psychic explosions that have been fairly regular with him in the past, have been minimized to some considerable degree since our sessions began. No one is endeavoring to tamper with his personality, however, and it is his natural reaction to turn aggression, when it arises, outward in some manner, while he is almost superstitiously careful that it not be directed at another individual. This is with him a fairly healthy reaction, and less disruptive than he thinks. You have been distrustful to some degree concerning Ruburt's fidelity to the sessions, precisely because the sessions have become important to you. Ruburt at this time would not dispense with the sessions, although it is true that he sometimes consciously resents the discipline involved in their regularity.
quotes.translation: 这涉及他无意识而非有意识的习惯改变。他已很好地习得了新习惯。自我们的课程开始以来，过去与他相伴的相当规律的心理爆发，已在相当程度上被最小化。然而无人试图篡改他的人格，他自然反应是将升起的攻击性以某种方式向外释放，同时近乎迷信地小心避免指向他人。对他而言，这是相当健康的反应，且比他想象中更具建设性。您对鲁柏课程忠诚度的某种不信任，恰恰源于课程对您已变得重要。鲁柏此刻不会放弃课程，尽管他有时确实有意识地反感课程规律性所涉及的纪律。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have said before that you have lived many lives and that you can know these existences within yourself. I am not afraid that we shall be kicked out of our apartment. And I also am quite sure that as you grow to know Ruburt and as you grow to know me you will realize that there is a difference in our personalities and that indeed... when I tell you that my vitality spans both space and time, then you will know that I know whereof I am speaking... and that this vitality is your own... Then feel it within yourselves... Now it is being used simply to let you know of its existence... but realize that it is within you for you to use as you will... for your own good... and you (WL) are not powerless. I have no body... and I am not powerless... How, therefore, can you feel helpless... or you... or any of you?
quotes.translation: 我曾说过你们活过许多世，且能在自身之内知晓这些存在。我不担心我们会被人赶出公寓。我也确信，随着您逐渐了解鲁柏并逐渐了解我，您会意识到我们人格的差异，而且确实……当我告诉您我的生命力跨越时空时，您会明白我深知所言为何……而这生命力正是您自己的……现在请感受它存在于你们之内……此刻它被简单用于让你们知晓其存在……但请意识到它就在你们之内，供你们随心使用……为了你们自身的福祉……而您（WL）并非无力。我没有身体……却并非无力……因此，您怎能感到无助……或您……或你们任何人？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: That course would not give the results you might think with Ruburt, or anyone else. When that course works it is because knowingly or unknowingly the suggestions given follow the natural inclinations. In extrasensory perception s, so to speak, as in so-called normal perception, the natural inclinations of the personality dictate the kind of information that will be sought from any available field of data. The basic inclinations can be extended, for example, but not completely redirected, unless there is an extraordinary impetus. (Long pause.)There are many areas of knowledge in which any given individual is uninterested. He will not bother to use normal perception to obtain it. Much of the material dealing with perception that I have given makes this point quite clear. (Pause.) Ruburt is correct. I give him access to large fields of focus, I help him change the energy that he uses in perception into other directions, to turn it inward. I made information available to him. Then according to his basic characteristics, he used that information accordingly. I gave him nudges to lead him in the proper direction. Do you have questions?
quotes.translation: 那门课程不会产生你或鲁柏以为的结果。当课程奏效时，是因为建议有意或无意地遵循了自然倾向。在超感官感知中，如同所谓的正常感知，人格的自然倾向决定了它会从任何可用数据场中寻求何种信息。基本倾向可以被扩展，例如，但无法完全转向，除非有非凡的驱动力。（长停顿。）任何特定个体对许多知识领域都不感兴趣。他不会费心用正常感知去获取这些知识。我之前给出的许多关于感知的资料都清楚说明了这一点。（停顿。）鲁柏是对的。我让他接触广阔的焦点领域，帮助他改变用于感知的能量方向，将其转向内在。我向他提供信息，然后他根据自身基本特质运用这些信息。我给予引导，使他走向正确方向。你有问题吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The idea image of the physical body is of course retained by the individual. The idea shape may be used or not used, according to when and in which manners the personality wishes to extend itself. It is no longer necessary for locomotion, and its senses, electrically coded now, are no longer necessary, since they were adopted to meet the demands of a particular field in which the personality no longer has any prime interest.
quotes.translation: 个体当然保留着物质身体的概念形象。人格可根据其希望延伸自身的时间与方式，选择使用或不使用概念形态。它不再需要用于移动，其感官（现以电码编码）也不再必要，因为这些感官是为适应某个特定场域的需求而设，而人格对该场域已无主要兴趣。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Suggestions given by an individual on any kind of a conscious basis have to be given with the cooperation of the ego. Many suggestions bypass the ego entirely. Suggestion however, as you think of it, operates both ways. This is not usually understood. Suggestions may come therefore from the physical world, to act upon the personality. Suggestions may also come from within the personality to act upon the physical environment.
quotes.translation: 个体在任何有意识基础上给出的建议，都必须得到自我的配合。许多建议完全绕过了自我。然而，你所认为的建议是双向运作的——这一点通常不被理解。因此，建议可能来自物质世界，作用于人格；也可能来自人格内部，作用于物质环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: Oswald was always a personality fragment, as all psychopaths are. As fragments of a personality break off in the manner that I explained for schizophrenics, so in some cases part of an entity reincarnates before it should, does not carry its full mental gene blueprint, and therefore causes trouble and confusion. It is as though one of the wild images of a nightmare emerged with full physical power into the world of the day.
quotes.translation: 奥斯瓦尔德始终是人格碎片，如同所有精神病患者。正如我解释精神分裂症时所说，当人格碎片以那种方式分裂时，某些情况下实体的一部分会在时机未成熟时转世，未携带完整的心智基因蓝图，从而引发麻烦与混乱。这就像噩梦中的狂野意象带着完整的物质力量闯入白昼世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: As you become aware of the larger dimensions of action, so you will become more aware of what personality is. I have told you that you exist in more dimensions than you know. Now, these have been referred to by some as astral planes. They simply represent realities with which you are not consciously familiar, and they span the distortions of your time elements so that larger portions of the spacious present become apparent.
quotes.translation: 当你意识到行动更广阔的维度时，便会更清楚人格的本质。我告诉过你，你存在于比已知更多的维度中。这些维度曾被某些人称为星光层。它们只是代表你尚未有意识熟悉的实相，并跨越你时间元素的扭曲，使广袤当下的更大范围变得清晰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Outer physical time is a complete camouflage, unnecessary basically on your plane; but you have made it seem necessary because of your refusal to admit the inner self as part of your whole personality, and therefore you have not been able to utilize psychological time to its fullest advantage on your plane. Psychological time as I have said is a natural pathway, part of an inner sense, that was meant as an easy access from the inner to the outer world and back again. You do not use it as such.
quotes.translation: 外在物理时间是彻底的伪装，在你的层面上本非必要；但因你拒绝承认内在自己是整体人格的一部分，便使其看似必要，从而无法在你的层面上充分利用心理时间。如我所言，心理时间是自然通道，是内在感官的一部分，本意是作为从内在世界到外在世界再返回的便捷途径。你们并未如此运用它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The personalities possess a keen resiliency of both body and mind, and serve as a strong earth stock. It goes without saying that members of one family often marry into other families. Of course the same thing happens here. When this occurs new stability is inserted, for this particular family acts as a source-stock, providing physical and mental strength. Period. Physically speaking, these people often have many children, and usually the offspring do well in whatever area of life is chosen. (Pause.) Biologically speaking, they possess certain qualities that nullify "negative" codes in the genes.2 They are usually very healthy people, and marriage into this group can automatically end generations of so-called inherited weaknesses.3
quotes.translation: 这些人格特质展现出身心双方面的敏锐韧性，构成强健的地球血统。不言而喻，家族成员常与其他家族联姻。此处亦然。当此类联姻发生时，新的稳定性便注入其中——这个特殊家族作为源头血统，提供身心力量。句号。从生理层面而言，这些人常多子多孙，且后代无论选择何种人生领域通常都表现优异。（停顿）从生物学角度，他们具备某些能中和基因中"负面"编码的特质。他们通常极为健康，嫁入此家族可自动终结数代所谓的遗传性弱点。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Now these notes hark back to the end of the 732nd session, when I wrote a paragraph concerning Sue Watkins, our longtime friend who attends class as often as she can these days from the small town where she now lives, some 35 miles north of Elmira. Jane listed Seth's families of consciousness last month in Session 732, but wound up the evening's work thinking that several years ago, soon after she'd initiated the Sumari breakthrough, Sue had psychically tuned in on the name of a second family of consciousness -- one that Seth didn't give in the 732nd session. Jane thought the family name was similar to the "Gramada" that Seth had described; at session's end I wrote that I intended to check our records for the missing name, and to ask Seth about it -- but I neglected to do either of those things. One of the reasons for my failure to settle the matter right away was the lack of any immediate pressure to do so, for we hadn't seen Sue since before the 729th session was held; that's over five weeks ago now; newspaper work has often kept her too busy to make the trip to Elmira.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Many individuals are afraid that they will be swept away by inner explorations, that insanity will overtake them, when instead the physical stance of the body and personality is firmly rooted in these alternate organizations. There is nothing wrong with the conscious mind. You have simply put a lid on it, allowing it to be only so conscious, and no more. You have said: "Here it is safe to be conscious, and here it is not."
quotes.translation: 许多人恐惧内在探索会吞噬自我，害怕疯狂会降临，殊不知身体与人格的物理根基正深深扎根于这些交替组织之中。意识心智本身并无过错。你们只是给它加上了盖子，允许它只能意识到某个程度，不能再多。你们说："在此处保持意识是安全的，彼处则不然。"
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It must be thoroughly understood that under no circumstances is the personality a static or motionless construction. It is, instead, a collection of spontaneous actions. Only when it is viewed in this perspective can you begin to understand how it forms its own health. All basic adjustments to the personality, in a basic manner, must come from within, through regroupings of characteristic actions about unifying principles.
quotes.translation: 必须彻底理解：人格绝非静止或僵化的结构。相反，它是自发行动的集合体。唯有以此视角审视，方能理解它如何构建自身健康。所有对人格的基础调整，从根本上而言，都必须来自内在——通过围绕统一原则重组特征性行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In some personalities they will lead to what you call a mystic experience. They will carry the personality into new realms of perception. They will momentarily break up usual patterned organizations of perception. You will see with new inner eyes. To some extent you will view some aspects of reality apart from the usual physical structures that you impose upon it as a whole. There is therefore a freedom for the inner self.
quotes.translation: 在某些人格中，这些调整将导向你们所称的神秘体验。它们会带领人格进入全新的感知领域，暂时打破惯常的感知组织模式。你们将以新的内在之眼观看。在某种程度上，你们将脱离通常强加于现实整体的物理结构，窥见实相的某些面向。因此，内在自我获得了自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You as a physical being are also dependent upon many forces that you do not understand, so there is no contradiction in saying that the cells are individual and independent, and yet dependent upon stronger organization. There is no coercion put upon the cells, because each cell is what it is because of its innate ability and strength. Nor is there any coercion as far as a personality is concerned, which is a part of an entity. There are laws of development, which are the only real laws, and which govern such matters. Or really, such matters govern themselves. When capabilities grow there are ways of further growth which become open.
quotes.translation: 作为物质存在，你们同样依赖诸多自身不了解的力量，因此说细胞既独立自主又依赖更强组织并无矛盾。细胞未受强制，因为每个细胞之所以成为其本身，皆因内在能力与力量。就作为存有一部分的人格而言，亦无强制。存在发展法则——这是唯一真实的法则——统御此类事务。或者更确切地说，此类事务自行统御。当能力成长时，通往进一步成长的道路便会开启。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Projections involve many more aspects of the whole self, and are a mark that the personality is progressing in important ways. The inner senses are allowed their greatest freedom in projection states, and the whole self retains experience that it would not otherwise. When this knowledge becomes part of the usual waking consciousness, that is when you realize what you have done, then you have taken a gigantic step forward.
quotes.translation: 投射涉及整体自我的更多面向，标志着人格正在重要层面取得进展。内在感官在投射状态中获得最大自由，整体自我得以保留否则无法获得的经验。当这份知识成为日常清醒意识的一部分——即当你意识到自己已完成之事时——你便迈出了巨大的一步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I am not a physical personality. Basically, however, neither are you. Your experience now is physical. You are a creator translating your expectations into physical form. The world is meant to serve as a reference point. The exterior appearance is a replica of inner desire. You can change your personal world. You do change it without knowing it. You have only to use your ability consciously, to examine the nature of your thoughts and feelings and project those with which you basically agree.
quotes.translation: 我不是一个物质性的人格。然而，基本上你也不是。你现在的经验是物质性的。你是一个将期望转化为物质形态的创造者。世界被设计成参考点。外在表象是内在欲望的复制品。你可以改变你的个人世界。你确实在不知不觉中改变它。你只需有意识地运用你的能力，检视你思想和感受的本质，并投射那些你基本认同的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: On many other planes the vitality expresses itself in ways incomprehensible to you and at this point to me. The personality-entity concept involves only one main type process involving many planes and plane groups. But this is not All That Is or exists. It is extremely possible that many in the personality-existence grouping have been involved within other completely different plane groupings in some inconceivable past.
quotes.translation: 在许多其他层面上，生命力以你无法理解、此刻我也无法理解的方式表达自己。人格-本体概念只涉及一种主要过程，涵盖许多层面和层面群组。但这并非一切万有或存在的一切。极有可能的是，人格-存在群组中的许多成员，在某个难以想象的过去，曾涉足其他完全不同的层面群组。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: But would our time traveler ever want to give up his or her present mental and physical focus to enter completely into an earlier personality? I think not, in the overwhelming majority of cases--and perhaps never--for in those terms it would mean surrendering a portion of the whole self or entity that had, through a projection into our scheme of "present" time, attained a certain consciousness and physical form of a unique degree. Yet, on second thought I wouldn't dare rule out completely such bizarre developments. Perhaps transfers like that can and do take place within the vast arena of probable realities (which I'll also be discussing in this essay). If so, then, they would be strange only from our limited viewpoints.
quotes.translation: 但我们的时间旅行者会愿意放弃他或她当前的心智与物质焦点，完全进入一个更早的人格吗？我认为不会，在绝大多数情况下——或许永远不会——因为用那些术语来说，那将意味着放弃整体自己或本体的一部分，而这部分通过投射到我们“当下”时间的架构中，已经获得了某种独特程度的意识和物质形态。然而，转念一想，我不敢完全排除这种离奇的发展。或许这样的转移在可能实相的广阔领域（我在这篇文章中也会讨论）中能够且确实发生。如果是这样，那么它们只是从我们有限的视角看来才显得奇怪。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: When you say "I will do this myself," you are speaking with a limited idea of identity. You are more than you know. The you that paints your paintings is far more than the Bob Butts you call yourself, though you are that Bob Butts. There is a matter of terms. Now Ruburt, you may say, has done all the hard work leading to a recovery alone; but he has had help. The recovery itself was utterly dependent upon his belief in it, however. (Pause.) This was his primary battle, for he understood finally what the illness represented. Every personality is different. The prerequisites for recovery are therefore different in each case.
quotes.translation: 当你说“我要自己来做这件事”时，你是在用有限的自我认同概念说话。你比你所知道的更广大。那个画出你画作的“你”，远不止是你自称的鲍勃·巴茨，尽管你确实是那个鲍勃·巴茨。这是术语的问题。现在，鲁柏，你可能会说，他独自完成了所有导致康复的艰苦工作；但他得到了帮助。然而，康复本身完全依赖于他对它的信念。（停顿。）这是他的主要战斗，因为他最终理解了疾病代表什么。每个人格都不同。因此，康复的先决条件在每个案例中也不相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Often they are incipient forms given activity by the personality who encounters them. The nature of their activity, therefore, will be projected outward from the personality onto the relatively passive materialization. The person encountering these has only to turn his attention away to "deactivate" the phenomenon. This does not mean that the phenomenon is not real. Its nature is simply of a different kind and degree.
quotes.translation: 它们往往是初期的形态，由遇到它们的人格赋予活动。因此，它们活动的性质会从人格向外投射到相对被动的物质化上。遇到这些现象的人只需将注意力移开，就能“停用”该现象。这并不意味着该现象不真实。它的性质只是属于不同的种类和程度。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The child therefore until its teens dared not be anything but docile. The personality was a strong one however, and the rebellion found no outlet except for creativity. Now the present personality suffers pangs of remorse over the slightest imagined wrong it may do to another.
quotes.translation: 因此，这个孩子在十几岁之前除了温顺之外不敢有其他表现。然而，人格是强大的，除了创造力之外，反抗找不到任何出口。现在，当前的人格对自己可能对他人造成的哪怕最微小的想象错误，都会感到悔恨的痛苦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: These apparent inspirations from nowhere definitely come from somewhere, and this somewhere is that inner dreaming condition, which is a necessity on the part of every consciousness, human or otherwise. Here I am using the word consciousness to cover all organisms with awareness. This dream activity seems divorced from the conscious state itself, and came before the conscious state within your physical system. It cannot be turned off, and it will not cease. It will only be noticed, as a rule, when the aware portions of the personality are disconnected from their physical stimulations to some considerable degree.
quotes.translation: 这些看似凭空而来的灵感确实来自某处，而这某处就是内在的梦境状态，这是每个意识（无论是人类还是其他）的必要条件。此处我用"意识"一词涵盖所有具有知觉的生物体。这种梦境活动似乎与意识状态本身分离，并且在你们物质系统内的意识状态出现之前就已存在。它无法被关闭，也不会停止。通常只有当人格中具有觉知的部分与物质刺激相当程度地脱离时，它才会被注意到。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is turned inward mainly in terms of the ego. There is awareness here of the inner self, but the main energy is knotted in tensions and exhaustions. At the same time the personality does not refresh its energies. If the energies of the personality were turned further inward, or on the other hand turned further outward toward the outside world, there would be an improvement in terms of additional, recharged energy.
quotes.translation: 就自我而言，它主要转向内在。此处有对内在自我的觉知，但主要能量纠结于紧张与耗竭之中。同时，人格并未更新其能量。如果人格的能量进一步转向内在，或者另一方面进一步转向外在世界，那么在获得额外补充能量方面将有所改善。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Personalities are composed of action and of psychic components. This is what you are. It is what I am. There are at all times more various kinds of personalities than there are flower seeds--different varieties. Some mature and develop, some are in ways I have not yet explained, transitory. They merge into other gestalts, but what they are is never destroyed. They operate independently while part of other gestalts.
quotes.translation: 人格由行动与心灵组件构成。这就是你们之所是，也是我之所是。任何时候，人格的种类都比花籽的种类更多——不同的变种。有些成熟发展，有些则是我尚未解释过的、过渡性的。它们融入其他完形，但它们之所是从未被摧毁。当作为其他完形的一部分时，它们仍独立运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You, incidentally, can use this sense of loyalty, for you did not receive it in the past in this existence. It brings out the best in you and in your work, and represents a rich Emotional loam that you need to draw out certain elements of your own personality. On Ruburt's part it is the main tie with the physical universe. A strong statement. But secure in it, you both are free to reach into other existences. Without it you would not be tied securely enough to this earth. There is an interaction, naturally. The loyalty is there but you bring it out and it serves you both therefore. Without you, literally, Ruburt in this physical life would not be able to express nor free it. Do you have questions?
quotes.translation: 顺便一提，你可以运用这种忠诚感，因为你在这一生中过去并未获得它。它激发你与你工作中最美好的一面，代表着你需要用来引出自己人格某些元素的丰富情感沃土。就鲁柏而言，这是他与物质宇宙的主要联结。这是一个强烈的陈述。但安于此中，你们两人都能自由触及其他存在。没有它，你们与这个地球的联结就不够稳固。自然存在一种互动。忠诚就在那里，但你将其引发出来，因此它服务于你们两人。没有你，鲁柏在这一物质生命中根本无法表达或释放它。你有问题吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Such financial success is therefore important, and has its place, but when Ruburt allows himself to become overly concerned with this, then he identifies too closely with the ego alone. There are obvious financial moves he intends to make. Well and good. These moves are not however basically important to the personality as a whole. They should be taken simply, but the overall energies should be used in creativity. When he identifies too closely with the ego he loses inner direction.
quotes.translation: 因此，这种财务上的成功是重要的，有其位置，但当鲁柏允许自己过度关注此事时，他就过于与自我认同。他打算进行一些明显的财务举措。这很好。但这些举措对人格整体而言并非根本重要。它们应被简单执行，但整体能量应运用于创造力中。当他过于与自我认同时，他就失去了内在方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: A psychic gestalt is dependent upon matter, not for its identity but merely for its survival in the physical plane. Psychic gestalts or identities or individualities are for all practical purposes immortal. They may join other gestalts but they will never be less than they once were. Identity then is never broken down. Any apparent breaking down is never an actual fact, as the personality could be thought of as a breaking down of the entity; but this is not so. The personality did not exist as such before its creation by the entity, and once it becomes an identity, it retains that individuality.
quotes.translation: 心灵完形依赖物质，并非为了其身份，而仅仅为了在物质层面的存续。心灵完形或身份或个体性，就所有实际目的而言是不朽的。它们可能加入其他完形，但永远不会比它们曾经所是更少。因此身份永远不会被分解。任何看似分解的情况都非实际事实，正如人格可能被视为存有的分解；但事实并非如此。人格在被存有创造之前并不存在，而一旦它成为身份，它就保留了那种个体性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We have gone into this before, and I have no doubt that we will on endless occasions. And if I succeed in convincing you of my reality as a personality, I will have done extremely well ... Ruburt's subconscious has enough camouflage pattern to enable me to make contact, but not so much as to distort me out of all recognition. I am not his subconscious, though I speak through it. It is the atmosphere through which I can come to you, as the air is the atmosphere through which the bird flies. A certain reassembly of myself is necessary when I enter your plane, and this is done partially by myself, and by the combined subconscious efforts of you, Joseph, and Ruburt. Will this satisfy you for now?
quotes.translation: 我们之前探讨过这个，而且毫无疑问我们还会无数次地讨论。如果我成功让你相信我是一个真实的人格，那就算大功告成了……鲁柏的潜意识拥有足够的伪装模式让我建立联系，但又不至于扭曲到完全认不出我。我不是他的潜意识，尽管我通过它说话。它是我来到你们这里的媒介，就像空气是鸟儿飞翔的媒介。当我进入你们的层面时，我必须对自己进行某种重组，这部分由我自己完成，部分由你、约瑟和鲁柏的潜意识共同努力完成。这样你暂时满意了吗？
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In this field, electrical force is the main method by which inner energy expresses itself. This is rather difficult to explain, and yet later it will not seem so. Personality gestalts within this field are built up electrically, with electric components, without physical matter. In this field possibilities and actualities are electrically computed. Your own personalities in some manners exist within this field.
quotes.translation: 在这个领域中，电力是内在能量表达自身的主要方式。这相当难以解释，但以后就不会显得那么难懂了。这个领域内的人格完形是通过电力构建的，使用电力成分，没有物质实体。在这个领域中，可能性和现实性都是通过电力计算的。你们自己的人格在某些方面也存在于这个领域中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Irregardless of our particular interests, I look forward to long conversations with you on less formal topics... like yourself, I am independent. We have many fields of common interests... the personality should always be considered in an elemental way as patterns of action. It is never stable. When you attempt to tamper with various levels you change it. When you crack an egg to discover what is inside you ruin the egg. There are other ways to get inside the egg, and they are not too difficult to do... you have the sort of mind, Dr. Instream, that will be of great benefit to us here. We do not need a hammer to crack the eggshell. I am an egghead, but I do not need a hammer to be cracked.
quotes.translation: 不管我们各自的特殊兴趣如何，我期待能与你进行更轻松话题的长谈……就像你一样，我也是独立的。我们有许多共同的兴趣领域……人格应该始终被基本地视为行动的模式。它从来不是稳定的。当你试图篡改不同层面时，你就改变了它。当你敲开鸡蛋想看看里面是什么时，你就毁掉了鸡蛋。还有其他方法可以进入鸡蛋内部，而且并不太难做到……因斯特里姆博士，你拥有那种对我们这里非常有益的头脑。我们不需要锤子来敲碎蛋壳。我是个蛋头，但我不需要锤子来被敲开。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is a good deal of accomplishment in seven years for any personality, regardless of its status. For a nonphysical personality, it is astonishing indeed. To ascribe all of this activity to a figment of the unconscious seems rather much. (In the same amount of time I've published two books, finished another, and begun a fourth. I mention this to show that Seth hasn't been absorbing any of my own creativity.)
quotes.translation: 对于任何人格来说，无论其状态如何，七年内取得这么多成就都是相当了不起的。对于一个非物质人格来说，这确实令人震惊。把所有这些活动都归因于无意识的虚构产物，似乎有些过分了。（在同一段时间里，我出版了两本书，完成了另一本，并开始了第四本。我提到这个是为了表明赛斯并没有吸收我自己的任何创造力。）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: Historical knowledge and verifications of identity--identities--may be achieved through communication with those layers of the subconscious dealing with past lives. But no information may be gathered here that was unknown to the particular previous personality as a rule. Some particularly girted may use one of these levels as a focus point, looking outward even to the present personality, but this is unusual.
quotes.translation: 历史知识和身份验证——多重身份——可以通过与处理前世经历的潜意识层沟通来实现。但通常来说，这里无法收集到特定前世人格所不知道的信息。一些特别有天赋的人可能会利用这些层次中的一个作为焦点，甚至向外看向当前人格，但这并不常见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In the dream state these reactions are more easily triggered. This is the result of a lowering of egotistic guards, for the ego sets up controls that act as resistance to various channels, so that many connections are closed. All of these systems are interconnected. They all operate simultaneously. However, the personality is certainly not aware of their existence on a conscious level a good deal of the time.
quotes.translation: 在梦境状态中，这些反应更容易被触发。这是因为自我防卫的降低，自我设置了控制机制，对各种通道形成阻力，导致许多连接被关闭。所有这些系统都是相互连接的。它们同时运作。然而，人格在大多数时候当然不会在意识层面意识到它们的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: They were mine definitely. No control personality for example of any kind. But where I got the words; or what inner translations happened before I spoke them, I don't know. I wasn't aware of the original perceptions, in other words. There was no hesitancy and little groping around. Giving test data in the sessions, there are translations that I make and I am careful, trying to interpret what I get; here, the interpretations were already made; at a subconscious level? Presumably.
quotes.translation: 它们确实属于我。例如，没有任何控制人格。但那些话语从何而来，或在我说出它们之前发生了怎样的内在翻译，我不得而知。换言之，我并未意识到最初的感知。没有犹豫，也几乎无需摸索。在提供测试数据时，我会进行翻译并小心翼翼，试图解读我所接收到的信息；而在这里，解读已经完成——是在潜意识层面吗？大概如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Individuals are always warned of disasters, so that the organism can prepare itself ahead of time. The day of death is known. Consciously such knowledge is not given to the ego for obvious reasons, but every organism, through its inner senses, is equipped with subconscious knowledge of personal disasters, deaths, and so forth, the personality itself deciding beforehand what it considers disastrous; and the members of the species as a whole know in advance of their wars. As telepathy operates constantly at a subconscious level, as a basis for all language and communication, so clairvoyance operates continually so that the physical organism can prepare itself to face its challenges.
quotes.translation: 个体总会收到灾难的警告，以便有机体能提前做好准备。死亡之日是已知的。出于明显的原因，这种知识不会在意识层面给予自我，但每个有机体通过其内在感官，都具备对个人灾难、死亡等事件的潜意识知识——人格本身会预先决定何为灾难；而整个物种的成员则预先知晓它们的战争。正如心电感应持续在潜意识层面运作，作为所有语言和沟通的基础，千里眼也持续运作，以便物理有机体能做好准备面对其挑战。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In some respects this is meant to be a cozy, confidential session. Now. At long last our friend has really embarked upon our book. Now beside everything else, Joseph, there were stresses and strains put upon Ruburt's personality. They were not caused by me, and yet the experience itself, as any new experience, any worthwhile endeavor, any breakthrough, was bound to challenge the abilities of the personality.
quotes.translation: 在某些方面，这原本应是一场舒适、私密的课。现在。我们的朋友终于真正开始了我们的书。此外，约瑟夫，鲁柏的人格承受了各种压力和紧张。它们并非由我造成，但体验本身——如同任何新体验、任何有价值的努力、任何突破——必然会对人格的能力提出挑战。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: (8:51.) Through denying themselves, say, intellectual development in a given life, personalities also learn the value and purpose of that which they do not possess. The desire for it is then born within them -- if, for example, earlier they did not understand the purposes of the intellect. So in the time of choosing, personalities decide upon the ways in which they will develop in the following incarnation.
quotes.translation: （8:51分。）通过在某一生中否定自己，比如智力发展，人格也学会了它们所不拥有的东西的价值和目的。对它的渴望于是从内在诞生——例如，如果它们早期不理解智力的目的。因此，在选择之时，人格会决定它们在下一世中将如何发展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I will comment here for all of this fits into our discussion. Existence is not a game in the terms spoken of by our Mr. Watts, though he is often on the right track. We do not have a static god, recreating himself as he is in various guises. Using those terms, we have a god constantly in the process of creation, action acting upon itself, always with new possibilities, each existence bringing forth new varieties. (Pause.) Legitimately, each personality is a co-creator, and part of All That Is, but this All That Is constantly develops, and develops in terms of growth fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 我在此评论，因为这一切都符合我们的讨论。存在并非如我们的瓦茨先生所说的游戏，尽管他常常走在正确的轨道上。我们没有一个静态的神，以各种伪装重新创造自己。用那些术语来说，我们有一个不断在创造过程中的神，行动作用于自身，始终带着新的可能性，每个存在都带来新的变体。（停顿。）合法地说，每个人格都是一个共同创造者，是万有的一部分，但这个万有不断在发展，并以成长和圆满的方式发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: A personality is needed or the information would appear highly chaotic, and you would not know how to unscramble it, even if you were able to receive it. This is rather important. We not only give you information and help interpret it or translate it for you, but we also add to it our own experience with it. (Pause.) Your Seth would say we unscramble it for you, and then serve it neatly on a supper platter.
quotes.translation: 人格是必要的，否则信息会显得高度混乱，即使你能接收到它，也不知道如何解读。这相当重要。我们不仅给予你信息，并帮助你解读或翻译它，还加入我们自身对它的体验。（停顿。）你们的赛斯会说，我们为你解读它，然后整齐地盛在晚餐盘上端给你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now there are some who resist the new existence, even though they chose it, as long as possible. To some extent they must be present at birth, but they can still escape any full identification with the born infant. They hover within and about the form, but half reluctantly. There are many reasons for such behavior. Some personalities simply prefer in-between-life existence and are much more concerned with the theoretical solving of problems than the practical application necessarily involved. Others have discovered that physical existence does not meet their needs as well as they thought it would, and they will progress much better in other fields of reality and existence.
quotes.translation: 有些存有即便自己选择了新的存在，仍会尽可能抗拒它。他们必须在某种程度上参与出生过程，但依然可以完全避免与新生婴儿认同。他们徘徊在形体之内与周围，却带着半心半意的态度。这种行为有许多原因。有些人格单纯偏好中间生命状态，更关心理论上的问题解决而非必然涉及的实际应用。另一些则发现物质存在未能如预期般满足其需求，他们在其他实相与存在领域反而能进展得更顺利。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now personality, even as you know it, constantly changes, and not always in ways that are anticipated -- most often, in fact, in unpredictable ways. You insist upon focusing your attention upon the similarities that are woven through your own behavior; and upon these you build a theory that the self follows a pattern that you, instead, have transposed upon it. And the transposed pattern prevents you from seeing the self as it really is. Therefore, you also project this distorted viewpoint upon your conception of the reality of the soul. You think of the soul, therefore, in the light of erroneous conceptions that you hold regarding even the nature of your mortal selves.
quotes.translation: 人格即便如你所知，也在不断变化，且变化方式往往出人意料——事实上，多数时候是以不可预测的方式。你坚持将注意力聚焦于贯穿自身行为的相似性，并据此建构出"自我遵循某种模式"的理论——而这模式实则是你强加于其上的。这种强加的模式反而阻碍你看见自我的真实面貌。因此，你又将这种扭曲的观点投射到对灵魂实相的理解上。于是，你基于对自身凡俗本性的错误认知，来理解灵魂的本质。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You might say that the personalities then are but divisions of your self here. There is no competition between them. There never was any real division, but only a seeming one in which you played various roles, developed different abilities, learned to create in new and diverse ways. These reincarnational personalities continue to develop, but they also understand that their main identity is also yours.
quotes.translation: 你或许会说，这些人格不过是你在此世自我的分殊。它们之间并无竞争。从来就不存在真正的分裂，只有看似分裂的表象——在其中你扮演不同角色，发展不同能力，学习以新颖多元的方式创造。这些转世人格持续发展，但同时也明白它们的主要身份与你的身份是同一的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They serve quite clearly as human representatives of All That Is. Now since each individual is a part of All That Is, to some extent each of you serve in that same role. In such a religious drama however (long pause), the main personality is much more conscious of his inner knowledge, more aware of his abilities, far better able to use them, and exultantly familiar with his relationship to all of life.
quotes.translation: 它们清晰扮演着"一切万有"的人类代表。既然每个个体都是"一切万有"的一部分，某种程度上你们每个人都在扮演相同角色。然而在这种宗教戏剧中（长停顿），主要人格对其内在知识有更清晰的觉知，更清楚自身能力，更能善用这些能力，并欣喜地熟悉自己与所有生命的关系。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now that is the challenge and the ideal, and it is met to varying degrees by personalities at various stages of development. Obviously such personalities need far more than the neurological systems with which you are presently equipped. For such systems such experience is literally impossible. Now your neurological system is physical but it is based upon your own inner capabilities as or, quote, "now."
quotes.translation: 这正是挑战与理想所在，不同发展阶段的人格会以不同程度达成。显然，这类人格所需要的远超过你们当前配备的神经系统。对这类系统而言，这种体验根本不可能发生。你们的神经系统虽是物质的，却建立在你们"当下"的内在能力之上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: As within your universe, as a personality reincarnates into different form, you have the retention of the original personality, intact, with its memories in the subconscious; and you have the additional formation of a completely new personality time after time.
quotes.translation: 正如在你们的宇宙中，当人格转世为不同形体时，原始人格会完整保留，其记忆存于潜意识中；同时，你会一次又一次地形成全新的完整人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The three Christ personalities were born upon your planet, and indeed became flesh among you. None of these was crucified. The twelve disciples were materializations from the energies of these three personalities -- their combined energies. They were then fully endowed with individuality, however, but their main task was to clearly manifest within themselves certain abilities inherent within all men.
quotes.translation: 三位基督人格曾降生于你们的星球，并确实在你们中间成为肉身。他们中无一人被钉上十字架。十二门徒是由这三位人格的能量——他们结合的能量——物质化而成。然而，他们被充分赋予了各自的个体性，但其主要任务是清晰地彰显出全人类内在固有的某些能力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The personality is not the whole self. It is a portion of the whole self, which is activated during a particular existence. The ego, as I have explained, does not vanish. However, it must always be remembered here that the ego is not the self-conscious self in its entirety by any means. It is simply a portion, a field of focus whereby the self attempts to objectify itself within the world of matter.
quotes.translation: 人格并非完整的自体。它是完整自体的一部分，在特定存在期间被激活。如我所解释，自我并不会消失。然而，必须始终牢记，自我绝非全然等同于有意识的自己。它仅仅是一个部分，一个焦点领域，自体借此试图在物质世界中客观化自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In the sleeping state we see the personality as it is in operation. We see its abilities and its limitations. Our friend, the Jesuit, will do well to read our dream material, for dreams are a reflection of the needs of a personality and of the abilities. The focus of attention and concentration are magnified a thousand fold in the dream state, and dreams form the basis for your physical environment.
quotes.translation: 在睡眠状态中，我们能看到人格运作时的样貌。我们能看到它的能力与局限。我们的朋友，那位耶稣会士，若能研读我们的梦资料将大有裨益，因为梦是人格需求与能力的反映。在梦境中，注意力与专注力的焦点被放大千倍，而梦构成了你们物质环境的基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: All such projections have an electromagnetic and chemical reality that has its origin within the field of the given personality. This projection of energy is one of the main characteristics of your kind. Dreams and dream images are then projected by the individual in sleep, and also in the waking state, although on a subconscious basis. So are thoughts constantly sent outward, and other projections which we have not yet discussed. Therefore as the individual sends out these projections, so does he receive the projections of others. As you know, telepathy operates constantly beneath the dictates of the ego, and so is your intellectual climate formed.
quotes.translation: 所有此类投射都具有电磁与化学的真实性，其根源存在于特定人格的场域内。这种能量投射是你们这类存在的主要特征之一。梦与梦境意象随后由个体在睡眠中投射，也在清醒状态下投射——尽管是在潜意识层面。同样，思想不断向外发送，还有其他我们尚未讨论的投射。因此，当个体发出这些投射时，他也接收他人的投射。如你所知，心电感应持续在自我的指令下运作，你们的心智气候便由此形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: However, at the other end there is something else, and there is no point in continuing to construct the bridge unless you intend to get on the other side. When you begin to get to the other side, continuing our analogy, and with good luck and perseverance there will be someone else on the other side constructing their own bridge to meet yours. This personality will form a bridge in the same way that you do. However the two will meet and merge. You will have a strong structure; you then can communicate. But the structure is not the other personality.
quotes.translation: 然而，在另一端还有别的东西，除非你打算抵达对岸，否则继续建造桥梁毫无意义。继续我们的比喻，当你开始接近对岸时，若幸运且坚持不懈，对岸也会有另一个人正在建造他的桥梁来与你的相接。这个人格会以与你相同的方式建造桥梁。然而，两者将相遇并融合。你们将拥有一个坚固的结构；随后便能沟通。但结构并非另一个人格本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This actual gathering up of prime vitality for the purpose of physical construction is not however truly automatic, and it is not truly performed unconsciously. The strong self-conscious self of which I have spoken, the self-conscious self of which your own personality is not aware, this self that faces into the inner world of reality, quite consciously draws upon the vitality and stuff of what is.
quotes.translation: 这种为物质构造而实际聚集原始生命力的过程，并非真正自动发生，也并非真正在无意识中完成。我所提及的那个强大的有意识自己——你们自己人格尚未觉察的那个有意识自己——这个面向内在实相世界的自体，完全有意识地汲取着存在本身的活力与质料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I shall of course take advantage of the opportunity, but then you will have time to speak to me at your leisure. There are many points to be considered, and these matters certainly cannot be covered in one evening such as this. I hinted at our last discussion that it is indeed within the ability of the human personality to become aware of other realities while still keeping contact with physical reality. Manipulation in the physical universe is of course a necessity, but there are ways by which the human individual can become aware of other quite valid realities, and still maintain balance and control within his own more usual field of activity.
quotes.translation: 我当然会利用这个机会，但你可以从容地与我交谈。有许多要点需要考虑，这些事显然无法在一个晚上讨论完毕。上次讨论时我曾暗示，人类人格确实有能力在保持与物质实相接触的同时，觉察到其他实相。在物质宇宙中运作当然是必要的，但人类个体仍有方法可以觉察到其他同样有效的实相，同时在自己较熟悉的活动领域中维持平衡与控制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner ego looks inward, yet in looking inward it looks outward toward those vast portions of the self. Because there is always action within action, and because of the three dilemmas of which we have spoken earlier, the new personalities projected outward into other fields of perception, or other moment points, these other personalities in turn create new ones, and the cycle is again repeated.
quotes.translation: 内在自我向内观照，然而在向内观照时，它又向外望向自身那些广大的部分。由于行动中永远有行动，也由于我们先前谈过的三种困境，向外投射到其他感知领域或其它时间点的新人格，这些其他人格又会创造新的人格，如此循环往复。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Great adjustments would have had to occur in any case, and subconsciously he was aware of this. He could not have survived as a contributing psychological unit within your system otherwise. The causes began, generally speaking, about the year 1938, and were heightened in the years 1942 to 1947. At the time the course was set and the personality was developed, that had taken a wrong course, for it.
quotes.translation: 无论如何，重大的调整都必然会发生，他在潜意识层面也明白这一点。否则他无法在你的系统中作为有贡献的心理单元存活。大致而言，起因始于1938年左右，在1942至1947年间加剧。当时路径已被设定，人格也已发展成形，但对他而言，那是一条错误的路径。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The ego is a very specialized portion of your greater identity. It is a portion of you that arises to deal directly with the life that the larger You is living. The ego can feel cut off, lonely and frightened, however, if the conscious mind lets the ego run away with it. The ego and the conscious mind are not the same thing. The ego is composed of various portions of the personality -- it is a combination of characteristics, ever-changing, that act in unitary fashion -- the portion of the personality that deals most directly with the world.
quotes.translation: 自我是你更大身份中一个非常专门化的部分。它是你的一部分，为直接处理那个更大的"你"所经历的生命而升起。然而，如果意识心让自我牵着走，自我可能会感到隔绝、孤独与恐惧。自我与意识心并非同一回事。自我由人格的各个不同部分组合而成——它是不断变化的特质组合，以统一的方式运作——是人格中最直接与世界打交道的那部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In many cases he perceives in a dream a future physical event, and then within the dream situation acts out various possible solutions, until he hits upon the most agreeable one. In the dream state the personality actually has at its command a stupendous amount of subconscious information of which the ego is not aware. It is actually more practical therefore to seek the solution in the dreaming state, or in periods of dissociation if you prefer. The amount of data available to the subconscious is simply superior in quality and larger in quantity to that available to the ego, and this information can be used effectively through suggestion.
quotes.translation: 在许多情况下，他在梦中感知到未来的物质事件，然后在梦境情境中演练各种可能的解决方案，直到找到最合意的一个。在梦境状态中，人格实际上掌握着自我所不知的庞大潜意识信息。因此，在梦境状态或解离状态中寻求解决方案反而更实际。潜意识可获取的数据在质量上优于自我，在数量上也多于自我，这些信息可以通过暗示有效运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In each dimension the inner self begins to handle further aspects of reality. The primary personality must therefore deal with a much larger number of perceptions, while still maintaining its identity. It manipulates in a larger number of dimensions, until it is able you see to handle many, not just one, of its own egos at any given "time"--and you may put time in quotes--while still maintaining its own inner stability and individuality. It takes on more roles, you see, and the psychological structure becomes more complicated as the inner self becomes sure enough of itself to admit ever more stimuli, while still retaining its own core.
quotes.translation: 在每个维度中，内在自我开始处理实相的更多面向。因此，主要人格必须在维持自身身份的同时，处理数量大得多的感知。它在更多维度中运作，直到它能够在任何给定的"时间"——你可以把时间加上引号——同时操控多个自我（而非仅一个），同时仍保持自身的内在稳定与个体性。你看，它承担更多角色，随着内在自我对自己足够确信，能够接纳更多刺激而仍保有自身核心，心理结构也变得更加复杂。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

In the first experiment in the 179th session, Seth came through with one accurate impression. In the 18th experiment, held during the 212th session, a few more impressions were obtained; but overall the results were interfered with by other factors in a way that doesn't seem to happen these days. See Session 179 in Volume 4, and Session 212 in Volume 5.

quotes.text: Now. For your personalities in this existence, you both made the ideal choices. You had been waiting for each other. The possibilities of your relationship had the power to bring about the fullest possible developments of your personalities. Ruburt's energy has an explosive nature. Your more regulated pattern adds sustenance to his own, and sustains him when his energy output is low momentarily.
quotes.translation: 现在。你们在此生中的人格都做出了理想的选择。你们一直在等待彼此。你们关系的潜力足以促使你们的人格获得最充分的发展。鲁柏的能量具有爆发性特质，而你更有规律的节奏为他的能量提供了滋养，并在他的能量暂时低落时给予支撑。

quotes.text: Only a bold personality, and a courageous one, would attempt this. ually, both personalities will benefit. This is the last reincarnation for John's wife because of this decision. The personality will then have experience in other than earthly existences.
quotes.translation: 只有大胆而勇敢的人格才会尝试这一点。最终，双方人格都将受益。由于这个决定，约翰的妻子这是最后一次转世。此后，该人格将获得地球存在之外的体验。

quotes.text: Any material object is being constantly recreated, according to a form that may appear rigid and fairly permanent. It is however the passing through of individualized, highly specialized psychic personality patterns. It is the passing through of these personality patterns, within a certain field of organization that causes the appearance of both fairly rigid material which then seems to change.
quotes.translation: 任何物质客体都在被持续地重新创造，依据一种看似固定且相当持久的形态。然而，这其实是高度专门化的个性化心灵人格模式的通过。正是这些人格模式在特定组织场域内的通过，导致了看似相当固定的物质出现，随后又似乎发生变化。

quotes.text: In such circumstances these perceptions may find their way to the ego, appearing as inspirations or intuitive thought. It is obvious that many such intuitions appear when the personality is in a dreaming state or in states of dissociation. The intuitions themselves, while seemingly mental, are action, and as such they produce changes in the physical organism, both chemical and electromagnetic.
quotes.translation: 在此类情况下，这些感知可能抵达自我，表现为灵感或直觉思维。显然，当人格处于梦境或解离状态时，许多此类直觉会出现。直觉本身虽然看似心智活动，实则是行动，因此它们会在物质有机体内产生化学与电磁层面的改变。

quotes.text: This would seem to deny the idea of progression, since I tell you that all portions or all guises, or all aspects and all levels, of any given personality exist at once. The immediately conscious selves however do progress in their realization. It is not enough that the inner self knows. The various immediately conscious portions of personality evolve and change as they recognize these truths.
quotes.translation: 这似乎否定了进步的概念，因为我告诉过你，任何给定人格的所有部分、所有伪装、所有面向与所有层次都同时存在。然而，直接意识层面的自我确实在认知中进步。内在自我知晓是不够的。人格的各种直接意识部分在认知这些真理时会进化与改变。

quotes.text: Computer like, the data is instantly made available exactly when and where it is needed. The ego is indeed equipped to handle physical reality. Its purpose is the manipulation of the personality within the physical universe. Its most effective method of procedure however is to form the problem concisely, and then to feed it to the subconscious before the personality enters the dreaming state.
quotes.translation: 如同计算机般，数据会在需要时精准地即时提供。自我确实被配备来应对物质实相。其目的是在物质宇宙中操控人格。然而，其最有效的运作方式是：在人格进入梦境状态前，将问题简洁地形成，然后将其传递给潜意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: These brief definitions are very general: A paranoid is afflicted with systematic, logically-reasoned delusions of grandeur or persecution; the personality can be relatively stable otherwise. A schizophrenic suffers from a division between thought processes and emotions. The cause of schizophrenia is unknown, and the victim usually ends up hospitalized because of the severity of symptoms, which can include motor malfunctions, perceptual distortions involving hallucinations and delusions, strange behavior, and a withdrawal from reality. Yet the schizophrenic can also keep the use of his or her primary intellectual capacities.
quotes.translation: 这些简要定义非常笼统：偏执狂患者受系统化、逻辑推理的夸大妄想或被害妄想所苦；除此之外，人格可能相对稳定。精神分裂症患者则遭受思维过程与情感之间的分裂。精神分裂症的病因未知，患者通常因症状严重而最终住院，这些症状可能包括运动功能障碍、涉及幻觉和妄想的知觉扭曲、怪异行为以及脱离现实。然而，精神分裂症患者仍能保持其基本智力能力的运用。

quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As the body wants to grow from childhood on, so all of the personality's abilities want to grow and develop. Each person has his [or her] own ideals, and impulses direct those ideals naturally into their own specific avenues of development -- avenues meant to fulfill both the individual and his society. Impulses provide specifications, methods, meanings, definitions. They point toward definite avenues of expression, avenues that will provide the individual with a sense of actualization, natural power, and that will automatically provide feedback, so that the person knows he is impressing his environment for the better.
quotes.translation: 正如身体从童年起就渴望成长，人格的所有能力也渴望成长和发展。每个人都有自己的理想，而冲动自然地将这些理想引导到各自特定的发展途径——这些途径旨在同时成就个人及其社会。冲动提供规格、方法、意义和定义。它们指向明确的表达途径，这些途径将为个人提供一种实现感、自然的力量，并且会自动提供反馈，使个人知道自己正在以更好的方式影响环境。

quotes.text: Some extra care as you plan then will also serve to liven the spirits of the spontaneous self. Ruburt's particular personality can also find refreshment at his job; as the earlier, still somewhat lingering but largely vanishing sensitivity vanishes, it can be a source of refreshment. It is less symbolic in a negative manner, you see, than it was. While he insisted upon this rigorous discipline for himself, he was caught between trying to inflict it upon the children, and by his natural tendency to enter into their spontaneous ways. This largely contributing to the difficulties after work, as a result of the tension.
quotes.translation: 那么，你在计划时多加一些小心，也将有助于振奋自发自我的精神。鲁柏的特定人格也能在工作中找到焕然一新之感；随着早期那种仍有些挥之不去但已大致消失的敏感度消退，它可以成为焕然一新的源泉。你看，它在负面意义上比过去更少象征性。当他坚持对自己施以这种严格纪律时，他夹在试图将这种纪律强加给孩子，以及他自然倾向于融入他们自发方式之间。这很大程度上导致了工作后的困难，作为紧张的结果。

quotes.text: As far as witnesses are concerned, and as far as the wife is concerned, I would suggest that you meet upon another evening, when a session is not due to begin with, and leave the matter to Ruburt. As far as I am concerned, I would quite welcome another young woman. Nevertheless, the overall personality is what matters, and since Ruburt delivers the sessions I will leave the matter to him.
quotes.translation: 至于见证人方面，以及妻子方面，我建议你们在另一个晚上会面，那时没有预定要开始一节课，并把这件事留给鲁柏。就我而言，我很欢迎另一位年轻女性。不过，整体人格才是关键，既然鲁柏主持课程，我会把这件事留给他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now my relationship with you [and Ruburt] is indeed a strange one, since you do not relate to me as you do to each other. The -- I hope -- delightfully human egotistical characteristics that I show help calm your fears and show you that the self as you think of it continues to exist [after physical death]. I have a reservoir of personality banks upon which I can draw, and as a teacher I use the one that is most effective in any given system of reality; this is the one I use here. It is a portion of myself that is the most closely connected with earthly existence, and it is a self that I liked very well, indeed.
quotes.translation: 现在，我与你们（和鲁柏）的关系确实奇特，因为你们与我的关系不像你们彼此之间的关系。我所展现的——我希望——令人愉悦的人性化自我中心特质，有助于安抚你们的恐惧，并向你们展示你们所认为的自我（在肉体死亡后）继续存在。我拥有一个我能够汲取的人格库，作为老师，我在任何特定实相系统中使用最有效的那一个；这就是我在这里使用的。它是我自己与尘世存在最紧密相连的一部分，而且是一个我非常喜欢的自我，确实如此。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. quotes.text: Now. No (underlined) physical condition is irreversible, with the exception of loss of limbs and definite organs. The personality is always free to choose, in your terms, its future. But the choice is with the inner self, which is the real identity. There are of course other elements entering into any such situation. Telepathically received suggestions from others, and so forth. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 现在。没有（强调）身体状态是不可逆转的，除了肢体和特定器官的丧失。人格总是自由选择，用你们的说法，它的未来。但选择在于内在自我，那才是真正的身份。当然，还有其他元素进入任何此类情况。来自他人的心电感应接收到的建议，等等。（停顿。）

quotes.text: The personality has endeavored to right old wrongs, and has succeeded to a great degree, but at the risk of sacrificing inner spontaneity, and even at the risk of losing the very authoritative aspects of his nature, so that there is still a tendency to follow rather than to lead; simply because in the period of the Inquisition he was in a place of authority, he led; and he led men into atrocities committed in the fine name of principle and religion. For this reason, while he is still tempted to lead, he allows himself to lead only in small ways, not trusting yet the judgment which at one time betrayed him.
quotes.translation: 人格努力纠正过往的错误，并在很大程度上取得了成功，但代价是牺牲内在的自发性，甚至冒着失去本性中权威面向的风险，以至于仍有追随而非引领的倾向；仅仅因为在宗教裁判所时期他曾处于权威地位，他引领了；他以原则和宗教的美名引领人们犯下暴行。正因如此，尽管他仍受引领的诱惑，却只允许自己在小事上引领，尚未信任那曾背叛过他的判断力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Your ego gains assurance from what seems to be the memory of its immediate past. A man who loses memory of past events feels insecure and lost, but other types of personality gestalts operate far differently. Instead of a time sequence that governs or seems to govern thought, mental activity of any kind, and overt action, you have associative processes, offshoots, and possibilities. To some extent you can gain an idea of this through an examination of your own stream of consciousness. But the comparison is highly superficial, for here too continuity reigns, even though associations are given greater play.
quotes.translation: 你的自我从看似对近期过去的记忆中获取信心。一个失去过往事件记忆的人会感到不安全与迷失，但其他类型的人格完形运作方式截然不同。支配或看似支配思想、任何心智活动及外在行为的时间序列，被联想过程、分支与可能性所取代。某种程度上，你可以通过检视自己的意识流来理解这一点。但这种比较极为肤浅，因为即便联想得到更大发挥，连续性仍占主导地位。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The "you" who is capable of such expansion must be a far more creative and multidimensional personality than you earlier imagined. Many of the suggested small exercises given earlier in the book will also help you become acquainted with your own reality, will give you direct experience with the nature of your own soul or entity, and will put you in contact with those portions of your being from which your own vitality springs. You may or may not have your own encounters with past reincarnational selves or probable selves. You may or may not catch yourselves in the act of changing levels of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 能够进行如此扩展的"你"，必然比你先前想象的更具创造力与多维性。本书早前建议的许多小练习，也将帮助你熟悉自己的实相，让你直接体验自身灵魂或存有的本质，并让你接触那些生命活力所源出的存在部分。你或许会遭遇过去转世自我或可能自我，或许不会。你或许会在改变意识层次的过程中捕捉到自己，或许不会。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is also an access to energy far beyond that which is usually experienced. Ruburt sensed this quite well in the past, and feared to open those channels until he felt himself suitably ready and prepared. There exists, in other words, what could almost be compared to a psychological and psychic warp in dimensions, (pause) and that corner in Ruburt's personality is an apex point at which communication and contact can be made.
quotes.translation: 还存在一条通往远超通常体验能量的通道。鲁柏过去对此感知甚佳，却因恐惧而不敢开启那些通道，直到他自认准备妥当。换言之，存在一种几乎可比喻为维度间心理与心灵扭曲的（停顿）状态，而鲁柏人格中的那个角落，正是沟通与接触得以发生的顶点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You may say if you wish that I am a dream image lacking even an image -- but if so, then each individual whose life is changed by my words must question: "What is a dream?" In the same way that my personality exists without physical manifestation, so does your own. Your dreaming and waking experience has a direct effect upon the entire universe. The difference is that you are not consciously aware of what you are doing, but I am. I change a world to some extent, though in your terms I will not actually sit in a chair or walk the streets, or shake your hand, or see the twilight come, or the sunrise.
quotes.translation: 你若愿意，可以说我连影像都不存在的梦境形象——但若如此，每个因我话语而改变生命的人必须质疑："何谓梦境？"正如我的人格无需物质显化而存在，你的人格亦然。你的梦境与清醒体验直接影响整个宇宙。区别在于你未清醒意识到自身所为，而我却清醒知晓。我在某种程度上改变世界，尽管按你们说法，我无法真正坐在椅子上、漫步街头、与你握手，或目睹暮色降临、日出破晓。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Joy and the spontaneous expression of it will always bring increased strength and resiliency to the personality. It also brings deep and abiding satisfaction to the subconscious, which is much more joyful than it is given credit for. The subconscious, for example, the personal subconscious, takes great pleasure in its manipulation of the physical fibers in locomotion. The expression of joy also makes the ego more resilient, less fearful, less resentful of diverse conditions when they occur. The emotion itself is an automatic signal that unites the conscious and subconscious in shared experience.
quotes.translation: 喜悦及其自发表达，始终会为人格带来增强的力量与韧性。它也为潜意识带来深沉持久的满足——潜意识远比人们所认为的更加喜悦。例如，个人潜意识在操控身体纤维进行运动时获得极大愉悦。喜悦的表达也使自我更具弹性，减少恐惧，对遭遇不同状况时不再那么怨恨。这种情绪本身是自动信号，将意识与潜意识统一于共享体验中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Again, this is simply a rushing in of energy where it was most needed, once the barriers have been removed. This is a natural reaction. (Long pause.) Whenever the ego gains over control, or sets itself up to oppose deep and basic action within the whole personality, then in doing so it also blocks to some considerable extent the passage or use of the whole personality's vital energy.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这不过是能量在障碍移除后涌入最需要之处，是一种自然反应。（长停顿。）每当自我获得过度控制，或自设立场以对抗整个人格深层而基础的行动时，它便在相当程度上阻塞了整个人格生命能量的通道或运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now in many ways this applies to Ruburt also. The two of you seek refreshment together, then plunge into your inner realities. He is more Emotionally attuned than you, in that it is easier for him, when coming out of his private world, to rush toward you with spontaneity. You are both equally dependent however, basically, on this necessary Emotional refreshment. You both drink it in, and it sustains you for some period. It is used in your work, and in your joint work. It forms an inner framework of which you are sometimes aware. (Smile.) Without your feeling toward Ruburt and the resulting urge to Emotionally actualize yourself to another personality, your background could have prevented even artistic development. (Pause.) Rather than serve as a springboard for creativity.
quotes.translation: 现在，这在许多方面也适用于鲁柏。你们俩共同寻求焕然一新，然后潜入内在实相。他比你在情感上更协调，因为当他走出私人世界时，更容易自发地冲向你。然而，你们俩在根本上都同样依赖这种必要的情感焕新。你们汲取它，它滋养你们一段时间，被用于你们各自的工作及共同工作中。它形成一种内在架构，你们有时能意识到它。（微笑。）若没有你对鲁柏的情感，以及由此产生的将情感向另一个人格实现的冲动，你的背景甚至可能阻碍艺术发展。（停顿。）而非成为创造力的跳板。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In nature nothing is wasted, so the luxurious growth of man's dream landscapes are also utilized. Whether or not these are physically actualized, they have their own reality. Your own personalities are to some extent the result of your waking experience. But they are also formed equally by your dreaming experience, by the learning and knowledge and encounters that occur when many would tell you that you are beyond legitimate perception. Dreams, then, are deeply involved with the learning processes. Dreams of walking and running occur in infants long before they crawl, and serve as impetuses.
quotes.translation: 自然界中无一物被浪费，因此人类梦境景观的繁茂生长也被充分利用。无论它们是否在物质层面实现，都拥有自身的实相。你们的人格在某种程度上是清醒经验的结果，但同样由梦境经验、学习、知识及遭遇所塑造——当许多人告诉你们这些已超出合理感知范围时，它们仍在发生。梦境因此与学习过程深度相关。婴儿在爬行前很久就出现行走与奔跑的梦境，这些梦成为推动力。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In a fashion, the intellect goes hand-in-hand with the imagination under such conditions. It is not that man stressed physical data less, but that he put it together differently -- that in the darkness he relied upon his inner and outer senses in a more unified fashion. The nightly portions of your personalities have become strangers to you -- for as you identify with what you think of as your rational intellect, then you identify it further with the daytime hours, with the objective world that becomes visible in the morning, with the clearcut physical objects that are then before your view.
quotes.translation: 在某种方式下，理智与想象力在此类条件下携手并进。并非人类对物质资料重视不足，而是以不同方式整合它们——在黑暗中，他以更统一的方式依赖内在与外在感官。你们人格的夜间部分已成为陌生人——因为当你们认同自己所谓的理性智性时，便进一步将其与白昼时光、清晨可见的客观世界、以及眼前清晰的物质物体等同起来。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: Such alternative reactions frighten the ego because they seem to injure the ego's self-image. Yet all characteristic reactions, whether denied by the ego or not, are kept for use as alternative actions. In many cases actions unacceptable to the ego may be precisely those actions that are necessary for whole other areas of the personality. When too many actions are restricted by the ego, they may begin to form impulse patterns or groupings of various rejected impulses. These then adhere through attraction, and attempt to find expression regardless of the ego's attempts to restrict expression.
quotes.translation: 这类替代性反应令自我恐惧，因为它们似乎损害了自我的自我形象。然而，所有特征性反应——无论自我是否否认——都被保留作为替代行动。在许多情况下，自我无法接受的行为，恰恰可能是人格其他完整领域所必需的行动。当过多行动被自我限制时，它们可能开始形成冲动模式或各种被拒冲动的集群。这些集群通过吸引而凝聚，并试图不顾自我的限制而寻求表达。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: At one time or another all of us on my plane give such lessons, but psychic bonds between teacher and pupils are necessary, which means that we must wait until personalities on your plane have progressed sufficiently for lessons to begin. To explain more clearly, lessons are conducted with those who are psychically bound to us, although reason is extremely important and I do not mean to minimize its value. Nevertheless, what you call emotion or feeling is the connective between us, and it is the connective that most clearly represents the life force on any plane and under any circumstances.
quotes.translation: 在我所处的层面，我们所有人都会在某个时刻传授此类课程，但师生之间的心灵纽带必不可少——这意味着我们必须等待你们层面的人格进步到足以开始课程。更清楚地说，课程是与那些与我们心灵相连的人进行的，尽管理性极为重要，我并非要贬低其价值。然而，你们所谓的情感或感受，正是我们之间的连接物，也是任何层面、任何情况下最能代表生命力的连接物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The type of telepathy which is most commonly thought of as telepathy is of course not the elemental type of which I spoke earlier, but a different variety. This particular, more advanced telepathy could not and did not occur in its most complicated form until the development within your plane of psychically developed personalities. This development involved separations and concentrations of energy into self-conscious identities. This development was an advancement, yet this advancement led also to a separation and objectifying of consciousness, into dual segments of subject and object.
quotes.translation: 通常被视为心灵感应的那种类型，当然不是我之前提到的基本类型，而是另一种变体。这种特定的、更高级的心灵感应，在你们层面发展出具有心灵能力的人格之前，无法也不可能以其最复杂的形式出现。这种发展涉及能量分裂与凝聚成自我意识本体。这种发展是一种进步，然而这种进步也导致了意识的分裂与客体化，分裂成主体与客体的二元片段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: These dream personalities or fragments indeed have their own consciousness. They are as unaware, and as aware, of you as you are of them. They exist once you have created them. No action can be ？？2withdrawn. It must complete its nature according to the dimensions in which it exists, and so the dream personalities or fragments continue to exist whether or not you are aware of them.
quotes.translation: 这些梦境人格或片段确实拥有自己的意识。它们对你的无知与知晓，正如你对它们的无知与知晓。一旦你创造了它们，它们便存在。任何行为都无法撤回。它必须根据其存在的维度完成其本性，因此无论你是否意识到它们，这些梦境人格或片段都会继续存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. It is a subtle thing. I am now closely allied with Ruburt, and yet in another way, a new way, there is a balance so that his personality can be the surface, dominant one. He can operate as himself and my heavy hand is not so in evidence. He is simply more quiet than usual. This takes some control, since it is his mannerisms that are retained in a large manner.
