I am directly beneath, you see. This is a state in which we can do some excellent work as he learns to help me sustain it. His facial expressions are fairly well his own. Does he not look perfectly normal to our cat lover?
quotes.translation: 现在。这是一件微妙的事。我现在与鲁柏紧密相连，然而在另一种方式、一种新的方式中，存在着一种平衡，使得他的人格能够成为表面的、主导的那一个。他可以以他自己的身份运作，而我沉重的手并不那么明显。他只是比平时更安静一些。这需要一些控制，因为他的举止在很大程度上被保留了下来。我就在正下方，你明白吗。这是一种状态，在他学会帮助我维持这种状态的过程中，我们可以做一些出色的工作。他的面部表情相当是他自己的。在我们爱猫的朋友看来，他看起来不是完全正常吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The reincarnating personality enters the new fetus according to its own inclinations, desires, and characteristics, with some built-in safeguards. However there is no rule, then, saying that the reincarnating personality must take over the new form prepared for it either at the point of conception, in the very earliest months of the fetus's growth, or even at the point of birth.
quotes.translation: 转世人格根据其自身的倾向、欲望和特征进入新的胎儿，并带有一些内置的保护机制。然而，并没有规则规定转世人格必须在受孕时刻、胎儿生长的最早几个月、甚至出生时刻接管为其准备的新形态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: ...and is an apex point. The personality without realizing it also operates as a transmitter, sending messages to other portions of reality. The abilities must be used, the creative urges therefore fully utilized in all areas--the psychic, the spiritual (pause), the more earthy writing and painting, for this energy sweeps through the personality and cannot be dammed up. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: ……并且是一个顶点。人格在未意识到的情况下也作为一个发射器运作，向实相的其他部分发送信息。这些能力必须被使用，因此创造性的冲动必须在所有领域被充分利用——心灵领域、灵性领域（停顿）、更世俗的写作和绘画，因为这股能量席卷人格，无法被堵塞。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The self becomes operationally scattered or divided, so that if one portion of it is attacked, the other portions can rise up in defense. Such persons use the various elements of the personality as spies or soldiers, scattering their forces (pause), and forced under those conditions to set up elaborate communication systems to keep those portions of the self in contact with each other. In times of stress, they set up an even greater isolation of one part of the self from another, which puts stress upon the system of communication, of course, so that it must be used constantly.
quotes.translation: 自我在运作上变得分散或分裂，因此如果它的一部分受到攻击，其他部分可以奋起防御。这样的人将人格的各种元素用作间谍或士兵，分散他们的力量（停顿），并在那些条件下被迫建立复杂的沟通系统，以保持自我的那些部分相互联系。在压力时期，他们甚至将自我的一个部分与另一个部分更加隔离，这当然给沟通系统带来了压力，以至于它必须被持续使用。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: At the beginning of the notes for this 920th session I wrote that the session isn't dictation for Dreams. Yet it is, of course, since in it Seth illuminates from still another perspective his concept of value fulfillment.8 The session grew out of the encounter we had yesterday afternoon with an unexpected visitor from out of state. Seth hardly mentions the individual involved, however, but instead goes into the subject of mental illness in more inclusive terms. I see many correlations between this evening's material and that in Session 917 for Chapter 8; there, among other things, Seth had discussed the reasoning mind, the imaginative mind, and schizophrenia. That session had been triggered, at least in part, by a letter Jane had found to be quite upsetting.

quotes.text: The inner self does not feel threatened, therefore, only the part of the personality that is momentarily unaware of the true situation. Others also respond, and are in this drama for their own reasons. (Long pause.) The drama has a theme, and through working out the problems therein presented the theme becomes clear. In some psychological circles there are therapeutic groups that operate by setting up such dramas. Remember, the purpose is therapeutic, though it may not appear so. And none of this should be taken to mean that the sufferings are not quite real to those involved.
quotes.translation: 内在自体并不感到威胁，因此只有人格中暂时未能认清真实状况的部分才会如此。他人也会回应，并出于各自的原因参与这场戏剧。（长停顿。）这场戏剧有一个主题，通过解决其中呈现的问题，主题便会清晰。在某些心理学圈子里，存在通过设置此类戏剧来运作的治疗团体。请记住，其目的是治疗性的，尽管表面看来可能并非如此。这一切也不应被理解为，对参与者而言痛苦并非真实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: When you leave the physical system after reincarnations, you have learned the lessons, and you are literally no longer a member of the human race in those terms, for you elect to leave it. Only the conscious self dwells within it in any case, and it is other portions of your personality who simultaneously dwell within the other training systems. In other more advanced systems, thoughts and emotions are automatically and immediately translated into action, into camouflage, into whatever approximation of matter there exists. Therefore the lessons must be taught and learned well.
quotes.translation: 当你历经转世离开物质系统后，你已学会功课，从那个意义上说，你已不再是人类种族的一员，因为你选择离开它。无论如何，只有意识自我栖居其中，而你人格的其他部分同时栖居于其他训练系统。在更先进的系统中，思想和情绪会自动且立即转化为行动、幻相、以及任何近似物质的存在。因此，功课必须被教导并学好。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: (Her pace had been faster this evening with the new voice, especially toward the break. We thought her between worlds experience a very good sign, in that the new personality was already beginning to fulfill functions, to add new dimensions to the sessions. Before, we had wondered at the reasons for its appearance for it had seemed that Seth could have given the data as easily.
quotes.translation: （今晚她的语速随着新声音加快，尤其在休息前。我们认为她处于两界之间的体验是个好兆头，因为新人格已开始履行功能，为课程增添新维度。此前，我们曾对其出现的原因感到疑惑，因为赛斯似乎本可以轻易给出这些资料。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The voice mechanism, unfortunately, is something that we must work with, and to get my own personality across through the female image and vocal chords, certain adjustments must be made. Beyond this, however, as I have mentioned before in class, it is not out of the inner sense of my invisible heart, but out of the depths of your own psychologies that you make me into a wise old man, and project upon me the authority images that lurk in your own minds. I have always tried to keep you from making this error, and sought to release from within yourselves your own abilities.
quotes.translation: 不幸的是，声音机制是我们必须处理的，而要让我的自身人格通过女性形象和声带传达，必须做出某些调整。然而除此之外，正如我曾在课堂上提过的，并非出于我无形之心的内在感受，而是出于你们自身心理的深处，你们将我塑造成智慧老人，并将潜藏于自己心中的权威形象投射到我身上。我一直试图阻止你们犯这个错误，并寻求释放你们自身内在的能力。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The multiplicity of human experience would be impossible were it not for the inner self, and for the heritage that speaks through the cells of every human being. The perspectives and psychic relationships that make up the human personality simply could not have resulted through action within your field alone. It cannot be stressed too strongly that experience within the self can lead to at least some understanding of the nature of action in its pure form, for within your physical universe action is to some extent frozen, in so far as your perceptions of it are concerned.
quotes.translation: 若非内在自体，以及通过每个人细胞传达的传承，人类经验的多样性将不可能。构成人类人格的视角与心灵关系，绝不可能仅通过你们领域内的行动产生。再怎么强调也不为过：自体内的经验至少能让人对纯粹形式的行动本质有所理解，因为在你们的物质宇宙中，就你们的感知而言，行动在某种程度上是冻结的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: To a large extent the methods of communication may vary. A personality based within physical reality, between lives for example, would find entry in many ways easier. The information he would be able to give, however, would also be limited because of his experience. I do have a memory of physical existence however, and this automatically helps me in translating your mental data into physical form. I do perceive objects, for example. Using Ruburt's mechanism is of great help here also. At times I see the room and the people as he, or rather his perceptive mechanisms, do.
quotes.translation: 沟通方法在很大程度上可能有所不同。例如，一个基于物质现实的人格，在转世之间会发现许多方式更容易进入。然而，他能提供的信息也会因其经验而受限。不过，我确实拥有物质存在的记忆，这自动帮助我将你们的精神数据转化为物质形式。例如，我确实感知物体。使用鲁柏的机制在此也大有帮助。有时，我像他——或者说像他的感知机制——一样看到房间和人们。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If this is realized then the personality will not feel smothered. As it is, how can he dare express himself in the presence particularly of a man whom he feels he once betrayed? And when he speaks to him in syllables, he does not speak clearly. He does not owe the father any more than a normal filial devotion. He does not owe the father any more than that, and to seek the father's pleasure superficially, or to try to please the father in fields where he has no interest, will not lead either to personal development or success, and will not help the father in any way.
quotes.translation: 若明白此理，人格便不会感到窒息。但就目前而言，尤其在面对那个他自觉曾背叛过的人时，他如何敢于表达自我？当他用支离破碎的音节与之交谈时，他无法清晰表达。他对父亲所亏欠的，不过是正常的孝道而已。他并不欠父亲更多，而若只是表面迎合父亲的喜好，或在自己毫无兴趣的领域试图取悦父亲，既不会带来个人成长或成功，对父亲也毫无助益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The complicated organism which is the human personality with its physical structure, has evolved, along with many other structures, a highly differentiated "I" consciousness, whose very nature is such that it attempts to preserve the apparent boundaries of identity. To do so it chooses between actions, for the very choice, or act of choosing, and ability to do so, represents the nature of identity. But beneath this sophisticated gestalt are the simpler foundations of its being, and indeed the very acceptance of all stimuli without which identity would be impossible.
quotes.translation: 人类人格这个由生理结构构成的复杂有机体，与其他众多结构共同演化出了高度分化的"我"意识。其本质特性在于试图维系身份认同的明显边界。为此它必须在行动间做出选择——因为选择本身、选择的行为及选择能力，正体现了身份认同的本质。但在这精妙的完形之下，潜藏着更简单的存在根基，甚至包括对一切刺激的接纳——若无此接纳，身份认同根本不可能存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It understands, for example, that clairvoyant material is a part of the personality's overall characteristics, so it is not afraid of perceiving it -- and it is able to separate such information confusion from present physical sense perception. Orderliness, then, is one of its main characteristics. When it is given only one world view, and only one group of assumptions, its orderly nature causes it to throw out all information that does not fit. It is almost forced to make an orderly picture, say like a jigsaw puzzle picture, while being denied half of the pieces.
quotes.translation: 例如它明白，千里眼素材是人格整体特质的一部分，因此不会畏惧感知它——并能将此类信息混淆与当前物理感官知觉区分开来。秩序性正是其主要特征之一。当它仅被赋予单一世界观和单一假设体系时，其有序本性会迫使它摒弃所有不相符的信息。这几乎等同于被迫拼凑一幅拼图，却被人扣留了一半的碎片。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: Now. If you decide to devote this time, energy and concentration to these endeavors consistently, then you should indeed meet with success. Time is necessary, for certain portions of your personality must be given the opportunity to catch up with other portions. You have been doing very well. The breather and the change of environment is good for you just now. This is a rather a weighty endeavor, therefore you should indeed realize what it requires of you. If you are willing then you shall do well, for the abilities are indeed there, and you can learn to use them.
quotes.translation: 现在。若你决定持续将这段时间、精力与专注投入这些努力，那么你确实应当获得成功。时间必不可少，因为你人格的某些部分必须有机会追赶其他部分。你一直做得很好。此刻的喘息与环境转换对你大有裨益。这是一项相当艰巨的尝试，因此你确实应当认清它对你的要求。若你心甘情愿，必将有所成就——因为能力确实存在，而你可以学会运用它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: One symbol will be meaningful to many portions of the personality. The symbol will be the same. That is, any given symbol will be the same, but it will be so chosen by the mind that it will have definite meanings to various portions of the self, and the meanings may be quite different. In the breaking-down process the intensities are separated into the most minute values, each value an electrical impulse representing any one of many references. And all of these references are contained within a given impulse, electrical impulse, that will be decoded by the mind.
quotes.translation: 一个象征将对人格的诸多部分都具有意义。象征本身是相同的。也就是说，任何特定象征都是相同的，但心智会如此选择它，使其对自我的各个部分具有明确含义，而这些含义可能大相径庭。在分解过程中，强度被分离为最细微的数值，每个数值都是代表无数参照系中任一者的电脉冲。所有这些参照系都包含在特定脉冲（电脉冲）中，将由心智解码。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is an involvement that would seem, would seem, intense. The ego appears to be extremely intense, but to a large degree this is a deception, for the intenseness is caused by the attempt of the ego not to become involved with action, unless the ego can dominate action. There is no basic trust of the inner self. The personality does not basically recognize or trust the ability of the inner self, and this results in an intense inhibited fear.
quotes.translation: 存在一种看似强烈的卷入。自我看似极度强烈，但这在很大程度上是种假象——因为这种强烈感源于自我试图避免卷入行动，除非它能主导行动。自我对内在自体缺乏基本信任。人格从根本上不承认或不信任内在自体的能力，这导致了强烈的压抑性恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You may consider past, present and future then as a single-line delineation of experience in your terms, the line however continuing indefinitely. Other personality structures from other dimensions could theoretically then observe it from an infinity of viewpoints. However there is far more than this. The single line is merely the surface thread along which you seem to travel. It is all of you that you perceive, so when you envision other dimensions you are forced to think in terms of observers far above the thread, looking down at it from any given viewpoint.
quotes.translation: 你可以将过去、现在与未来视为一条单线式经验描绘，这条线在你看来会无限延伸。理论上，其他维度的其他人格结构可以从无限多的视角观察它。然而事实远不止于此。这条单线只是你似乎沿其行进的地表线索。它是你所感知的全部自我，因此当你想象其他维度时，你被迫设想在线索上方从任意视角俯瞰的观察者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This cleavage has been literally a torture to him. It has caused him to hold back from fully developing his abilities; not only his psychic abilities. It has caused him to hold back in the development of his full writing talents, for these specialized creative abilities, the writing techniques, will come into their own now that the personality is more fully behind our work.
quotes.translation: 这种分裂对他而言简直是种折磨。这导致他抑制了自身能力的充分发展——不仅是通灵能力，还包括写作天赋的完整开发。这些特殊的创造能力与写作技巧，如今随着人格更完整地支持我们的工作，终将各得其所。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The releases in his personality could have been achieved in other, easier methods. Nevertheless without these alterations our work could not be fulfilled in all the ways possible. His rigidity of attitude resulted in a trend for self destruction, tempered it is true, but dangerous. There was a resultant manufacture of various chemicals within his system that tended to reproduce and perpetuate the depressed state of mind. An overproduction of adrenaline that kept him stirred up, but also an overproduction of certain chemicals that physically slowed him down.
quotes.translation: 他的人格释放本可通过其他更轻松的方式达成。但若无这些改变，我们的工作就无法以所有可能的方式完成。他僵化的态度导致了自我毁灭的倾向——虽有所缓和，却依然危险。这在其系统内制造了各种化学物质，倾向于复制并延续抑郁心境。肾上腺素过度分泌使他持续亢奋，但某些化学物质的过量产生又从生理上拖慢了他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is interesting to note also that these personalities did alternate, and all were in existence at once, so to speak, even though only one was dominant at a given time. In the same way all so-called past personalities are present in your now, but not dominant. Obviously also any future reincarnations are present for those who have other lives still to live in your terms.
quotes.translation: 有趣的是，这些人格确实交替存在，且可以说同时并存——即便特定时刻只有一人主导。同理，所有所谓的过去人格都存在于你的当下，只是不占主导地位。显然，任何未来的转世也存在于那些按你们说法仍有其他生命需要经历的人身上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Because the personality is that part of the individual which is conscious of itself as a part of action, and therefore aware of its relation with action, the personality is that part of the individual which survives physical death.
quotes.translation: 由于人格是个体中将自己视为行动一部分、因而觉察自身与行动关系的部分，人格正是个体中能在肉体死亡后存续的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I will have more to say concerning the connection between the two fields and their manifestation in action, for one of the closest glimpses you can get of pure action is action as it is involved within the dream universe, and in this mobility as the personality passes into and out of the dream field. Within your own universe you deal with the transformation of action into physical manipulations, but this involves but a small portion of the nature of action, and it is my purpose to familiarize you with action as it exists more or less in its pure form.
quotes.translation: 关于这两个场域及其在行动中的显化关联，我后续会详述——因为你能最接近纯粹行动的瞥见之一，便是行动卷入梦境宇宙时的状态，以及人格进出梦境场域时的流动性。在你的宇宙中，你处理的是行动转化为物质操作的过程，但这仅涉及行动本质的一小部分。我的目的是让你熟悉行动或多或少以其纯粹形式存在的样貌。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: On some occasions our separate personalities may merge during sessions. At other times Ruburt may be projecting so well that his personality is relatively absent, and my projection in his place is relatively (underlined) complete.
quotes.translation: 在某些场合，我们各自的独立人格可能在课中融合。其他时候，鲁柏可能投射得如此完美，以至于他的人格相对缺席，而我在他位置上的投射则相对（强调）完整。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In physical existence a certain portion of the inner self 's electromagnetic properties are used by the physical structure of the body. Subtle changes occur in the body when the inner self projects. This projection is not dependent upon physical life--that is, the survival of the human personality also is then not dependent upon physical survival, nor need it be supported by physical life. The electromagnetic properties simply revert to their original source with the inner self, and are no longer utilized in the construction of a corporeal image.
quotes.translation: 在物质存在中，内在自体的一部分电磁特性被身体的物理结构所利用。当内在自体投射时，身体会发生微妙的变化。这种投射并不依赖于物质生命——也就是说，人类人格的存续也不依赖于物质生存，也无需物质生命来支撑。电磁特性只是随内在自体回归其原始源头，不再用于构建物质形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The cells combine into other patterns, forming finally into your physical organs. When the whole physical body is constructed, the individual personality- consciousness is again more than the sum of its component parts. It is more than the combined consciousness of its atoms. Here is your creation; this creation, occurring constantly, is as I have said one of the laws of the inner universe. We know now that the consciousness behind each atom and molecule gave physical construction to the atom and molecule. That is, the consciousness came first.
quotes.translation: 细胞组合成其他模式，最终形成你们的身体器官。当整个物质身体构建完成后，个体人格意识再次超越了其组成部分的总和。它超越了其原子的组合意识。这就是你们的创造；这种持续发生的创造，正如我所说，是内在宇宙的法则之一。我们现在知道，每个原子和分子背后的意识赋予了原子和分子物质结构。也就是说，意识先于物质存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I will give you theoretical material, and I hope that we shall implement it with our own demonstrations. The coming sessions will of necessity involve us thoroughly in the nature of human personality in its psychic electromagnetic properties. Reincarnation will, of course, enter in here, for you cannot separate it. I am more solidly here in our sessions now (smile, eyes open) than I was permitted to be in the past. It goes without saying that there is no other place in those terms, into which those who have survived physical death disappear.
quotes.translation: 我将给你们理论材料，希望我们能通过自己的示范来实践它。未来的课程必然会使我们深入探讨人类人格在其灵性电磁特性中的本质。轮回当然会介入其中，因为你们无法将其分离。我现在在我们的课中比过去被允许时更扎实地存在（微笑，睁眼）。不言而喻，在那些术语中，并没有其他空间让那些经历物质死亡的人消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Obviously the cause behind illness is not always the same. In a re-incarnational sense, the personality for a while takes the role of a sick person, as an actor would, and is completely immersed in it. Obviously again, more dimensions are involved here than in an actor's role. The actor would merely try to imagine how it would be like to be in such a position. The person in the re-incarnational role is as immersed in it as possible. He decides to take the role for various reasons of his own, and the inner self knows that the role was chosen.
quotes.translation: 显然，疾病背后的原因并不总是相同的。从轮回的角度看，人格会暂时扮演病人的角色，就像演员一样，并完全沉浸其中。同样明显的是，这里涉及的维度比演员的角色更多。演员只是试图想象处于那种境地会是什么样子。而处于轮回角色中的人则尽可能沉浸其中。他出于自己的各种原因决定扮演这个角色，内在自体知道这个角色是被选择的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You remember this from our material on action and the personality. The ego therefore is pleased when information is proven correct. (Long pause.) If the nature of perception were clearly understood then the nature of reality as you know it would also be understood much more clearly. Only half the process of perception, so-called, is even considered, however. Only half of the circle is known. The entire circle consists of those projections outward that form events, as well as the mechanisms by which the events are then physically perceived.
quotes.translation: 你们从我们关于行动和人格的材料中记得这一点。因此，当信息被证明正确时，自我会感到高兴。（长停顿。）如果感知的本质被清楚理解，那么你们所知的实相本质也会被更清楚地理解。然而，所谓的感知过程只有一半被考虑。只有圆圈的一半被知晓。整个圆圈包括那些向外投射形成事件的过程，以及随后物质感知这些事件的机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You can indeed to a large measure train yourself to react to constructive rather than impeding suggestions. This merely means that you will, or may to some extent, choose the direction in which action within you will move. This also implies that some part of the personality does the choosing, and is capable of distinguishing a constructive suggestion from an impeding one. And here it is necessary that we discuss more thoroughly the nature or characteristics of constructive suggestions versus impeding ones, for one may turn into the other.
quotes.translation: 你确实可以在很大程度上训练自己对建设性而非阻碍性暗示做出反应。这仅仅意味着你将会，或在某种程度上可以选择内在行动的方向。这也暗示人格的某部分在进行选择，并且能够区分建设性暗示与阻碍性暗示。在此我们必须更深入地讨论建设性暗示与阻碍性暗示的性质或特征，因为两者可能相互转化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: This discipline however should be followed rigorously only with a program of ego orientation, in which the ego tries to discipline itself in the most difficult manner, for this particular personality, toward freedom. He should express himself when he feels a diverse opinion, when he feels wronged. It is only when aggressions are unexpressed that they are dangerous, and the repressed rage will hold back the desired psychic development. Even chemically such anger causes reactions that will make desired states of being difficult to achieve.
quotes.translation: 然而，这种自律应严格遵循一套自我导向的规划，其中自我试图以最艰难的方式——针对这个特定人格——朝向自由进行自律。当他感到意见相左、感到受委屈时，他应当表达自己。唯有当攻击性未表达时才会危险，而压抑的愤怒会阻碍所渴望的心灵发展。即使在化学层面，这种愤怒也会引发反应，使理想的存在状态难以达成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You see however he felt that he was learning maturity by ignoring the subconscious. This is at the base of these problems. He mistrusted the most reliable portion of his present personality. He automatically rejected the sweaters as giving warmth on a subconscious basis. Even then, however, the subconscious would not be forced too far, and a good deal of the time the sweaters sat in his drawer. They were not his style, they were his mother's style and in wearing them he felt further alarm that he was being cast in her world, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 但你看，他以为忽视潜意识就是在学习成熟。这正是这些问题的根源。他不信任自己当前人格中最可靠的部分。他自动拒绝那些毛衣，认为它们无法在潜意识层面提供温暖。然而即便如此，潜意识也不会被过度强迫，大部分时间那些毛衣都躺在抽屉里。那不是他的风格，而是他母亲的风格，穿上它们时他更感警觉——仿佛被抛入她的世界，可以这么说。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In traveling through the states of consciousness, these other personalities would try to attain some focus and perceive your environment, trying to make sense of data with which they are largely unacquainted. Since many of them are unaware of your idea of time, they would find it difficult to understand that you perceive events with intervals between, and would not perceive the inner organization that you thrust upon your normal environment. Yours is obviously a probable system to other fields also touched by the field of probabilities.
quotes.translation: 在穿越意识状态的过程中，这些其他人格会试图获得某种焦点并感知你的环境，试图理解他们大多不熟悉的数据。由于他们中许多人不了解你的时间概念，他们会难以理解你感知事件时存在间隔，也无法察觉你强加于正常环境的内在组织。你的系统显然也是一个可能性系统，与其他被可能性场触及的领域相交。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: While such help may be welcomed, the kind of value I offer is of a different nature. In larger terms one of my most important messages is simply this: "You are a multidimensional personality, and within you lies all the knowledge about yourself, your challenges and problems, that you will ever need to know. Others can help you in their own way, and at certain levels of development such help is necessary and good. But my mission is to remind you of the incredible power within your own being, and to encourage you to recognize and use it."
quotes.translation: 虽然这类帮助可能受欢迎，但我所提供的价值本质不同。从更宏观的角度看，我最重要的信息之一就是："你是一个多维人格，在你之内蕴藏着关于你自己、你的挑战和问题的一切知识——那些你永远需要知道的知识。他人可以以自己的方式帮助你，在特定发展阶段这种帮助是必要且有益的。但我的使命是提醒你自身存在中那不可思议的力量，并鼓励你认识并运用它。"
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: That view itself is a symptom of the intellect's difficulty. In the position in which your culture places the intellect, it does (underlined) see itself quite alone, separated both from other portions of the personality, from other creatures, and from nature itself. Therefore science, for example, says that creatures -- except for man -- operate by blind instinct, and that term is meant to explain all of the complicated behavior of the other species. Therefore the gulf between man and animals, the intellect and nature, seems to deepen.
quotes.translation: 这种观点本身就是理智困境的症状。在你的文化赋予理智的位置上，它确实（强调）感到自己完全孤独，既与人格的其他部分分离，也与其他生物乃至自然本身分离。因此，例如科学声称生物——除了人类——都凭盲目本能运作，这个术语旨在解释其他物种所有复杂行为。因此人与动物、理智与自然之间的鸿沟似乎日益加深。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: In other words, an action cannot be judged as an impeding one without a thorough knowledge of the other actions that result in the makeup of any given personality. This is extremely important. To overlook this point is to risk the adoption on the part of the personality of a more serious illness.
quotes.translation: 换言之，若不彻底了解构成任何特定人格的其他行动，就无法判断某个行动是否为阻碍性的。这一点极为重要。忽视此点可能导致人格本身陷入更严重的疾病。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The personality is busy transforming literally infinite data. Much of this work has already been done by the third month of pregnancy. As quickly as the new data forms the fetus and the physical structure, the self from the previous reincarnation must begin to withdraw its hold. It enters briefly then into this process. It does not become the new individual however.
quotes.translation: 人格正忙于转化近乎无限的数据。这项工作在怀孕第三个月时便已完成大半。当新数据形成胎儿与身体结构时，前世的自我必须开始抽离其掌控。它短暂进入此过程，但并不会成为新的个体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This out ego, among its purposes, has the duty of expressing not only itself but to a lesser extent those various hidden personalities which compose the subconscious. In larger terms and in more comprehensive terms, the whole self, the whole field of the complete subconscious and inner self, reaches back to the entity. There is no end to the past projection or existence of the subconscious of any given self; and though it is not understood in your field, there is no end to the forward thrust of the subconscious of any given self.
quotes.translation: 这个外在自我，其目的之一不仅是表达自身，也在较小程度上表达构成潜意识的那些隐藏人格。从更宏观全面的角度来看，整个自我、整个完整潜意识与内在自我的场域，都回溯至存有。任何特定自我的潜意识，其过去的投射或存在永无止境；尽管在你们的场域中无法理解，但任何特定自我的潜意识向前推进的动能同样永无止境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your so-called mediums are simply people who know more about what they are doing. You are learning step by step how to gain access to abilities that you have always enjoyed, always used to some extent, and which have helped mold the exterior circumstances of your life and given your personality much of its meaning. You will learn more. You can use these abilities in a practical manner and you have already begun to do so to some extent. I have given you enough personal data for a time but I will add to this material as I see fit.
quotes.translation: 你们所谓的通灵者，不过是更清楚自己在做什么的人。你们正逐步学习如何运用那些始终拥有、始终在某种程度上使用的能力，这些能力曾帮助塑造你们生命的外在环境，并赋予人格诸多意义。你们将学到更多。你们能以实际方式运用这些能力，且已在一定程度上开始实践。我已给予你们足够一段时间的个人资料，但我会视情况补充这些材料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In this time of rest and choosing, all counsel is given. Some personalities do reincarnate before they are advised to, for many reasons. This is usually unfortunate in the short run, for the necessary planning has not taken place. But in the long run great lessons will still be learned from the "error." There is no time schedule, and yet it is very unusual for an individual to wait for anything over three centuries between lives, for this makes the orientation very difficult, and the emotional ties with earth have become weak.
quotes.translation: 在这休憩与选择的时期，所有建议都会被给予。有些人格因种种原因，会在被建议之前就转世。短期来看这通常是不幸的，因为必要的规划尚未完成。但从长远来看，伟大的教训仍会从这"错误"中习得。虽无时间表，但个体在两次生命间等待超过三个世纪极为罕见，因为这会使得定向变得非常困难，与地球的情感联结也会变得薄弱。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: From Ruburt you are receiving needed freedoms and necessary confidence in your own intuitional powers. There are strange aspects, or should I say contradictory aspects, in your personality. For instance intuitively you have always felt a unity with nature, yet at the same time you distrusted what could not be proven in material terms. You had a natural affinity with things behind nature, that is you sensed the spirit of nature, and at the same time you had a tendency to distrust what you could not actually see, smell or touch.
quotes.translation: 从鲁柏那里，你们正获得所需的自由，以及对自身直觉能力的必要信心。你们的人格中存在奇特面向，或该说是矛盾面向。例如，你们直觉上始终与自然合一，却又同时怀疑无法以物质方式证明的事物。你们对自然背后的事物有天然亲和力——即感知到自然之灵——同时又倾向于怀疑那些无法实际看见、闻到或触摸到的事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The entity in this case would be compared to the mind. The brain would be more or less what it is, that is, the brain of the present personality existing on a camouflaged plane. As the brain gives orders and communicates messages to the various parts of the physical body, so would the mind or entity do in like manner. The mind would contain all data having to do with past existences and intertwining purposes, problems and relationships, but it would only give such data to the brain as was necessary for its present existence.
quotes.translation: 在此例中，本体可比拟为心智。大脑或多或少就是它本身，即存在于伪装层面上的当前人格的大脑。正如大脑向物质身体各部分下达指令并传递信息，心智或本体也以类似方式运作。心智包含所有与过去存在、交织的目的、问题及关系相关的资料，但只会将当前存在所必需的那些资料传递给大脑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It begins to travel down safe paths, and out of fear it continually enlarges the scope of limitations. In the particular personality's case, perception becomes also limited, and rejections occur. In this as in many such cases foods are rejected. In many such cases the ego itself chooses to perceive only within those areas where it feels safe, and it rejects more and more any involvement that it can avoid. And now the ego has the self-created ulcer to blame, and it rejects many foods, for foods are symbolistic of involvement.
quotes.translation: 它开始沿着安全的路径行进，出于恐惧，它不断扩展限制的范围。在这个特定人格的案例中，感知也变得受限，并产生排斥。在此类及许多类似案例中，食物被排斥。在许多此类案例中，自我本身选择只在其感到安全的领域内感知，并越来越多地排斥任何它能避免的涉入。如今，自我有了自创的溃疡作为借口，它排斥许多食物，因为食物象征着涉入。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: These secondary personalities, known to psychologists, have a much more important place within reality than is suspected. No psychic action is invalid. Every psychic action exists, has an effect and has durability in terms of value fulfillment. Every psychic action, and a psychic action is any psychic happening such as a dream, or thought, that may have no existence in terms of space and time, every psychic action then contains within it the potentialities of value fulfillment, transference, and even energy transformation.
quotes.translation: 心理学家所知的这些次人格，在实相中占据着比人们所猜想的更重要的位置。没有心灵行动是无效的。每个心灵行动都存在、产生效果，并在价值完成方面具有持久性。每个心灵行动——而心灵行动是指任何心灵事件，如梦境或思想，可能在时空方面没有存在——每个心灵行动都内含着价值完成、转移乃至能量转化的潜能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Any dream is experienced differently by these various aspects of the self. There is not one objective dream that is merely perceived in various fashions. The various levels of the self create their own dreams, which do have meanings to all layers of the personality. But you cannot think of a dream as a concrete block that is for example chipped off in pieces that then apply to these imaginary levels. All of these aspects of the self are so intertwined that arbitrary distinctions must be made for you simply to explain them.
quotes.translation: 任何梦境都会被自我的这些不同面向以不同方式体验。并不存在一个仅仅以不同方式被感知的客观梦境。自我的各个层面创造它们自己的梦境，这些梦境对人格的所有层次确实具有意义。但你不能把梦境想象成一个具体的区块，例如被切成碎片，然后适用于这些假想的层面。自我的所有这些面向如此交织在一起，以至于必须为你做出人为的区分，仅仅是为了向你解释它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now. You must realize that within this room, and within any room, at any time there are other personalities that you do not perceive. There are ways of perceiving them if they choose to be perceived. Possibly, with some help from certain directions, we shall see what we can do in other classes. And our friend Ruburt is quite correct, you (WL) learn the nature of the inner self first.... and then we shall help you in the development of your own abilities. And before too long, we will have a message for you to take to heart.
quotes.translation: 现在。你必须认识到，在这个房间里，在任何房间里，任何时候都有其他你感知不到的人格存在。如果他们选择被感知，是有办法感知到他们的。或许，在某些方向的帮助下，我们将在其他课程中看看我们能做些什么。我们的朋友鲁柏说得非常正确，你（WL）首先学习内在自我的本质……然后我们将帮助你发展你自己的能力。不久之后，我们将给你一个信息，让你铭记在心。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The physical senses usually blind you to these open channels, for they perceive reality only in their own image. To some extent, then, I enter your reality through a psychological warp in your space and time. In a manner of speaking, such an open channel serves much as a pathway between Ruburt's personality and my own, so that communication is possible between. Such psychological and psychic warps between dimensions of existence are not infrequent. They are merely recognized as such infrequently and utilized even less so.
quotes.translation: 物质感官通常使你对这些开放通道视而不见，因为它们只以自己的形象感知实相。因此，在某种程度上，我通过你们时空中的一个心理扭曲进入你们的实相。打个比方说，这样的开放通道就像鲁柏的人格与我的人格之间的一条路径，使得沟通成为可能。存在维度之间的这种心理和心灵扭曲并不罕见。它们只是很少被如此认知，更少被利用。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Still, to the unconscious the problem has been set and given. In the following deep protected areas of sleep, the higher centers of the inner self are allowed to function and come to the aid of the three-dimensionally oriented portion of the personality. This more liberated self sees the situation much more clearly, suggests a given line of action (but does not order it), and informs the dreaming self. The dreaming self then manufactures a group of dreams in which the solution is stated within a symbolic dream situation.
quotes.translation: 然而，问题已被设定并赋予潜意识。在睡眠的深层保护区中，内在自我的更高中心得以运作，并协助人格中面向三维现实的部分。这个更自由的自我更清晰地看清情境，建议特定的行动路线（但不命令它），并告知做梦的自我。做梦的自我随后制造一组梦境，在其中解决方案被陈述于象征性的梦境情境中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Phis characteristic way of interpreting perceived data, and of reacting to it, is not as constant as it appears to be however. The stability and illusion of permanence is highly misleading. The four manifestations of personality all belonged to one identity, and this is perhaps the main point missed. For if the authors say that oftentimes a subordinate or potential ego will rake over control when necessary in order to insure the survival of the whole, then this implies a decision that has been made; and who has made it?
quotes.translation: 然而，个人诠释感知数据及对其作出反应的特征方式，并不像表面看来那样恒定。稳定性和恒常性的错觉极具误导性。人格的四种显现都属于同一个本体，而这或许是被忽略的主要关键。因为如果作者们说，一个从属或潜在的自我常常会在必要时接管控制，以确保整体的生存，那么这暗示了一个已经做出的决定；而又是谁做出了这个决定？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Personality is a gestalt of ever-changing perception. It is the part of the identity which perceives. I do not force my perceptions upon the woman through whom I speak, nor is her consciousness blotted out during our communications. Instead there is an expansion of her consciousness and a projection of energy that is directed away from three-dimensional reality.
quotes.translation: 人格是不断变化的感知的完形。它是本体中感知的部分。我并未将我的感知强加于借之说话的女士，在我们的沟通中她的意识也未被抹除。相反，她的意识得到扩展，能量被投射而远离三维实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am not giving you some kind of disembodied knowledge, however. Knowledge itself (Pause, smile) is conscious. It is not a dead thing transmitted, since it has no meaning without personality and realization, and since it changes the personalities through whom it seems to flow. In changing them it of necessity is part of the awareness of the very cells it alters.
quotes.translation: 然而，我并非在给你们某种脱离肉体的知识。知识本身（停顿，微笑）是有意识的。它不是被传递的死物，因为没有人格与体悟它便毫无意义，并且它会改变那些看似经由其流动的人格。在改变它们的同时，它必然成为它所改变的细胞本身意识的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The ulcer simply can be cured, but this will involve on the part of the personality a disciplined program of self-understanding. Certainly such a program will be worthwhile. We do not want, for example, the personality to plunge into a solution. Instead what is advisable is a gradual but definite program that will result in a legitimate and a long-lasting cure.
quotes.translation: 溃疡当然可以被治愈，但这需要人格方面进行一套有纪律的自我理解计划。当然，这样的计划是值得的。例如，我们不希望人格仓促投入某个解决方案。相反，可取的是渐进但明确的计划，以达成合法且持久的治愈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now any individual can pass through these levels and remain relatively untouched and unaware, can travel through them unperceiving. The overall intentions and characteristics of the personality will determine the quality of perception and understanding. The material mentioned is available in each of the levels of consciousness given, but it must be sought out, either through conscious desire or strong unconscious desire. If it is not, then the gifts available and the potentials simply remain unused and unclaimed.
quotes.translation: 现在，任何个体都可以穿越这些层次而相对不受触动、毫无察觉，可以在不知不觉中穿行其间。人格的整体意图与特性将决定感知与理解的质量。所提及的材料在给出的每个意识层次中都可获得，但必须通过有意识的渴望或强烈的无意识渴望去寻求。否则，可得的礼物与潜能便只是未被使用、未被认领。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The energy that composes personality therefore consists of an inconceivable number of separate identities. These separate identities form what we call the inner self, which retains its individuality even while the energy that composes it constantly changes. There are continual groupings and regroupings, but basic identities are always retained. The potential egos within any given identity therefore retain their own individuality and self-knowledge, regardless of their relative importance in the order of command.
quotes.translation: 构成人格的能量因此包含了无数个独立的身份。这些独立的身份形成了我们所谓的内在自体，即使构成它的能量不断变化，它仍保持其个体性。持续存在各种组合与重组，但基本身份始终被保留。因此，任何特定身份中的潜在自我都保持其自身的个体性与自我认知，无论它们在指挥层级中的相对重要性如何。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: We were speaking, among other things, of intensities, and this is connected with both dream symbols and other such data. Dreams, having an electrical reality as I explained, must be decoded to have meaning to various levels of the subconscious and the personality. In Ruburt's predictions he has only begun. There will be other significant data that will be observed, as he learns to use his ability. And much of this significant material that he will observe from his predictions will also apply to dream symbols.
quotes.translation: 我们之前谈到过强度，这与梦象征及其他此类数据有关。正如我所解释的，梦具有电性实相，必须被解码才能对潜意识与人格的各个层次产生意义。在鲁柏的预测中，他仅仅是个开始。随着他学会运用自己的能力，将会观察到其他重要的数据。而他通过预测所观察到的这些重要材料，其中许多也将适用于梦象征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It does mean that action is turned into channels that are not to the best interests of the whole personality. The energies appear concentrated and turn inward, affecting the whole system. They represent offshoots, again not necessarily detrimental in themselves, but only when viewed from the standpoint of the other actions that form the personality framework.
quotes.translation: 这确实意味着行动被导向了不符合整体人格最佳利益的渠道。能量看似集中并转向内在，影响整个系统。它们代表分支，本身未必有害，但若从构成人格框架的其他行动角度来看则不然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: My environment, as I mentioned earlier, is not one of a personality recently dead in your terms, but later I will describe what you can expect under those conditions. One large difference between your environment and mine is that you must physically materialize mental acts as physical matter. We understand the reality of mental acts and recognize their brilliant validity. We accept them for what they are, and therefore we are beyond the necessity to materialize them and interpret them in such a rigid manner.
quotes.translation: 如我之前所述，我的环境并非你们所谓刚死之人的人格所在。但稍后我会描述在那些条件下你可以期待什么。你们环境与我环境的一大区别在于：你们必须将心智行为实质化为物质实体。我们理解心智行为的实相，并认可其辉煌的有效性。我们接受它们的本来面目，因此无需以如此僵化的方式将其实质化并加以诠释。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This should be of benefit. Also the slow breathing habits you began to acquire with your yoga exercises will be beneficial. Giving up the smoking habit will also help you in this respect. You are strongly intuitive and very quick, but you can learn to have a more relaxed body. A fear has been developed by the present personality resulting directly from early circumstances. Ruburt is afraid that if he does not operate quickly he will be symbolically caught and crippled as is the case with his present mother.
quotes.translation: 这应该会有益处。此外，你通过瑜伽练习开始养成的缓慢呼吸习惯也将有益。戒烟习惯在这方面也会对你有帮助。你直觉强烈且反应极快，但你可以学会拥有更放松的身体。当前人格因早期环境直接发展出一种恐惧：鲁柏害怕若不能快速行动，就会像他母亲的情况那样被象征性地困住并残废。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: If the books are children symbolically, then in those same terms his representation of my reality is a far more living, three-dimensional aspect. He has at various times wondered about schizophrenia, for example. He does not realize that on this level, now, and regardless of my independence and other issues involved, that he creates the personalities free of time, organizes them under the leadership of the conscious mind, and assigns them tasks of great validity and importance, which are then carried out.
quotes.translation: 如果书籍是象征性的孩子，那么用同样的说法，他对我的实相之呈现是一个远更鲜活、立体的面向。例如，他曾在不同时期思考过精神分裂症。他并未意识到，在这个层面上，此刻，无论我的独立性及其他相关议题如何，他创造了不受时间限制的人格，在意识心的领导下组织它们，并赋予它们极具效力与重要性的任务，而这些任务随后被付诸执行。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I am what I have always said that I was, and I said it in as Emotionally neutral terms as possible: --an energy essence personality. It is he who adds any other coloration here, and then reacts to those. I have reincarnated, as the material mentions, and so have you both. I have tried to explain personality gestalts and the connections that exist between us.
quotes.translation: 我始终如我所言，并以尽可能情感中性的措辞表述：一个能量本质人格。是他在此添加了其他色彩，然后对这些色彩做出反应。如资料所述，我曾转世，你们二位亦然。我试图解释人格完形以及我们之间存在的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It helps form the new individual, and then it must withdraw. The new self unit must be free and not hampered by the demands that could otherwise be put upon it. The new individual has a deeply buried memory of its past lives, but the personal consciousness of the last reincarnated self must not be superimposed upon this new identity. The new personality, in its small astral body, does visit with other portions of the entire identity. It is even given lessons of a kind, but it is very much its own self.
quotes.translation: 它协助形成新个体，而后必须退隐。新的自体单元必须自由，不受可能强加于它的要求所束缚。新个体深埋着对前世的记忆，但最后一世转世自我的个人意识不得叠加于这个新身份之上。新人格在其微小的星光体中，确实会与整体身份的其他部分交流，甚至接受某种形式的教导，但它始终是独立的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The same personalities are not always reborn for example in the same race. It is true that your history shows a continuity of Jewish persecutions, that is persecutions of Jews. The fact is that many personalities who have been famous in many eras have also been proud, brilliant and cruel, and have belittled and persecuted those they considered beneath them.
quotes.translation: 相同的人格并非总在相同种族中转世。诚然，你们的历史显示了对犹太人的迫害具有连续性。事实上，许多在多个时代声名显赫的人格也曾骄傲、才华横溢且残忍，他们轻视并迫害那些自认为低等的人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You must also realize that the entity who became her son also chose the circumstances, knowing of them in advance, for his own purposes. There are many character aspects to be considered here. For if each personality is an energy gestalt, then also each family group is also an energy gestalt. The actions and interactions form its characteristics and nature.
quotes.translation: 你们也必须认识到，成为她儿子的那个存有也选择了这些境遇，并事先知晓其目的。这里需考量诸多性格面向。因为若每个人格都是能量完形，那么每个家庭群体同样也是能量完形。其行动与互动构成了它的特性与本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now: One point here before we close. I would like to give some hint as to the psychological realities that form personality structures on higher levels than your own. These personalities are able to deepen value fulfillment amazingly through an expansion of consciousness that allows them to focus into many areas within the systems and planes simultaneously.
quotes.translation: 现在：在结束前需强调一点。我想就高于你们层面的心理实相如何形成人格结构提供一些线索。这些人格能通过意识扩展，惊人地深化价值实现，使其能同时聚焦于系统与层面内的多个领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The separate incarnated personalities however are still separate identities. This is no contradiction at all. The personality structures of which I am speaking are far more advanced than this example. They are aware of many existences within many systems. They organize the basic ground reality into many patterns, and then operate and manipulate within them.
quotes.translation: 然而，各自转世的人格仍是独立的身份。这绝非矛盾。我所言的人格结构远比此例先进。它们知晓多个系统中的多重存在，将基本实相组织成多种模式，并在其中运作与操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I did not realize that this particular experience would occur so early. It actually represents an amazing ability to focus the complete inner energy. In other words, to command and focus the entire amount of energy inherent within the personality from the inner universe, and as such it must be used with discretion and discipline. It should never be allowed to be used for the purposes of the emotions belonging to the outer ego.
quotes.translation: 我并未预料到这次特殊经历会来得如此之早。它实际上代表着一种将全部内在能量聚焦的惊人能力。换言之，即从内在宇宙中调集并聚焦人格所固有的全部能量，因此必须谨慎而有纪律地运用。绝不可允许其服务于外在自我所属的情绪目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The feeling of unreality is not felt when the dream experience is being participated in by the dreamer. At that time the experience is felt to be real, and some dreams indeed are more vivid than waking experience. It is only when the personality passes out of the dream experience, or the dream universe, that the dream experience in retrospect may appear unreal. For now, again, the focus of attention and energy is in the physical universe. Reality then is a result of the focus of energy and attention.
quotes.translation: 当做梦者亲身参与梦境体验时，并不会感到不真实。彼时体验被感知为真实，有些梦境甚至比清醒体验更为鲜活。只有当人格脱离梦境体验或梦境宇宙时，回溯中的梦境体验才可能显得不真实。因为此时注意力与能量的焦点再次落回物质宇宙。所谓实相，正是能量与注意力聚焦的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: No. It is his tendency to gobble here that is important. He has given up in this life gobbling food and drink. In past lives he was never temperate, neither in a physical sense, emotionally or intellectually. This was not in many ways bad. However when the intemperate personality does not discriminate then the basic characteristic can cause unpleasantness. He was always very generous for example and kind, even overly kind. On the other hand he ate and drank too much. He was just overeager as a rule.
quotes.translation: 不。关键在于他此生狼吞虎咽的倾向。他今生已戒除暴饮暴食。前世他从未节制——无论是生理层面、情绪层面还是心智层面。这在许多方面并非坏事。然而当放纵型人格不加辨别时，这种基本特质便会引发不快。例如他向来慷慨仁慈，甚至过分仁慈。另一方面他又饮食无度。总体而言，他不过是过于急切。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is an interesting hypothesis. In fact, Seth speaks about multidimensional art in his book. But Seth does more than write books. He is a fully developed personality with a variety of interests: writing, teaching, helping others. His sense of humor is quite individualistic and unlike mine. He is shrewd; in his manner more earthy than ethereal. He knows how to explain complex theories simply, in person-to-person contact. Perhaps more important, he is able to relate these ideas to ordinary living.
quotes.translation: 这是个有趣的假设。事实上，赛斯在其著作中确实谈及多维艺术。但赛斯远不止著书立说。他是个兴趣广泛、充分发展的人格：写作、教学、助人。他的幽默感极具个性，与我的截然不同。他精明务实，作风比空灵更接地气。他懂得在面对面交流中如何将复杂理论简明阐释。或许更重要的是，他能将这些理念与日常生活相关联。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: In such cases the ego is too rigid, and does not expand with the nature of the personality's whole creative experience. Of course this could happen with mediumship, as with any other such activity. In this case, however, Ruburt's ego gradually began to let its rigidity go, in a gradual process that allowed the whole personality, itself included, to expand.
quotes.translation: 此类情形中，自我过于僵化，未能随人格整体创造性经验的本质而扩展。当然，这可能在通灵术或其他类似活动中发生。但在此案例中，鲁柏的自我通过渐进过程逐渐放下僵化，使得包括自我在内的整体人格得以扩展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The personal subconscious and the ego are indeed equal partners in the formation of any given present personality. Ruburt's results are evidence that his training is bearing fruit. Once such a relationship is set up between the ego and the subconscious, then communication in general between the two will always improve. The subconscious, even the personal subconscious, is much freer from the moment point than is the ego, and it can inform the ego of important developments which can be of great help.
quotes.translation: 个人潜意识与自我在塑造任何特定当下人格时，确实是平等的伙伴。鲁柏的成果证明其训练已见成效。一旦自我与潜意识建立这种关系，两者间的整体沟通将持续改善。潜意识——即便是个人潜意识——比自我更不受当下时刻的束缚，它能将重要进展告知自我，这对自我大有裨益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There is one difference of course. The star does not know upon whom its light falls. It is blind to the landscape that it brightens. It cannot see that which it illuminates. In the case of these psychological structures however, because of the multidimensional aspects, there is understanding and purpose. A portion of that kind of personality structure knows well that while its main focus of consciousness has gone into other dimensions, it will nevertheless be perceived by others at any given point.
quotes.translation: 当然有一个区别。星辰不知其光芒落于谁身。它照亮风景，却对风景视而不见。它无法看见自己所照亮之物。然而就这些心理结构而言，由于多维度特性，其中蕴含着理解与目的。这类人格结构的一部分深知：当其意识的主要焦点已进入其他维度时，它仍会在任何特定时刻被他人感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The teacher is within the tape. The personality is condensed. Your question stems however from the idea that if I am here I cannot be somewhere else at the same time, or that all of my energies must be focused here at the session. There are aspects of my identity with which you are not acquainted, though you may be at some later date in your terms. (Smile.
quotes.translation: 老师就在磁带里。人格是浓缩的。但你的问题源于这样的观念：如果我在此处，就不能同时身处别处，或者我所有的能量都必须集中在此次课程中。我的身份中有你们不熟悉的面向，尽管按你们的时间尺度，日后或许会有所了解。（微笑）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This experience will be most beneficial. It will enable your present personalities to operate in a much more enjoyable esthetic, psychic and practically efficient manner. As you realize, I have little to do with the personal layer of Ruburt's subconscious. It is merely something through which I pass. I have explained through which layer of the subconscious I come, but my origin has nothing to do with any portion of Ruburt's subconscious, not even those vast areas beneath the personal subconscious.
quotes.translation: 这次体验将大有裨益。它能使你们当前的人格以更愉悦的审美、灵性与实际高效的方式运作。如你所知，我与鲁柏潜意识中的个人层面几乎无关。那不过是我穿过的某种介质。我已解释过我是通过潜意识的哪个层面而来，但我的起源与鲁柏潜意识的任何部分都无关，甚至与个人潜意识之下那些广袤领域也无关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Whenever circumstances tend to revitalize such a charged emotion, that particular now will be re-created. The emotion will once again rush into the psychic space which is formed by elements in the personality's psychological environment. The immediate emotion of any moment, therefore, forms the framework of your present time within the waking state. As the emotion diminishes it takes up less of your psychic space, fills up less of your inner environment, and you seem to yourself to recede from it.
quotes.translation: 每当环境倾向于重振这种充满能量的情绪时，那个特定的"当下"就会被重新创造。情绪将再次涌入由人格心理环境中的元素所构成的灵性空间。因此，任何时刻的即时情绪，都在清醒状态下构成了你们当下时间的框架。随着情绪减弱，它占据的灵性空间减少，内在环境被填充的部分减少，你便感觉自己正从其中抽离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In their materialization upon your plane, and as seen from your own camouflage perspective, you seem to be aware of new entities, but this is because of your own limited viewpoint. In your time scheme entities have had time to produce more fragmentary personalities, but in truth from your viewpoint these personalities can be seen to have changed long ago.
quotes.translation: 当它们显现在你们的层面，从你们自身的伪装视角来看，你们似乎意识到新的存有，但这源于你们有限的视点。在你们的时间架构中，存有已有足够时间产生更多碎片化人格，但事实上从你们的视角来看，这些人格早已发生改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It would seem to be that the waking personality could learn much from his sleeping counterpart, and this is indeed the case. Theoretically speaking, and in theory only, anything that a personality can do or achieve in the sleeping state, he can do and achieve in the waking state. The limitations are those adopted by the ego, in many cases for good reason.
quotes.translation: 清醒人格似乎能从其睡眠对应体那里学到很多，事实也确实如此。理论上讲——且仅限理论——人格在睡眠状态所能做或达成的一切，在清醒状态同样能够做到。这些限制是由自我所采纳的，在许多情况下出于充分的理由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: The beliefs of his intellect will be found in the general nonfiction. The acceptance, the intuitional developments, will always appear initially in the poetry. Therefore any large and overall hedging, any significant difference in commitment between the poetry and the nonfiction, can be taken as a sign that the whole personality is divided to that extent.
quotes.translation: 他的知性信念将见于一般非虚构作品，而直觉的接纳与发展则始终首先出现在诗歌中。因此，任何重大而全面的回避，任何诗歌与非虚构作品之间在投入程度上的显著差异，都可视为整个人格在相应程度上分裂的征兆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The ego is scarcely conscious of these. Your experiences occurred when the ego, because of your illness, was momentarily exhausted, its control lessened. The personality was then momentarily aware of realities that the ego would ordinarily attempt to block. These were pulsations, in actuality of corresponding strength, but interpreted differently by you.
quotes.translation: 自我几乎意识不到这些。你的经历发生时，由于疾病，自我暂时疲惫，其控制力减弱。人格于是短暂意识到自我通常试图阻挡的实相。这些实际上是强度对应的脉动，但被你以不同方式解读。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The well-advanced personality then is aware of nontime, but can use the time illusions of others and can enter the particular camouflage structures. The nontime principle however operates in such a manner that a personality can only participate in the ways that I have described, in systems with which he has some familiarity because of his own experience.
quotes.translation: 高度发展的人格因而能觉察无时间性，但能运用他人的时间幻相，并进入特定的伪装结构。然而，无时间性原则的运作方式，使得人格只能以我所描述的方式，参与那些因其自身经验而有所熟悉的系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Events are processed in dreams, put in the necessary perspective, sorted and arranged. This is done when the conscious mind is separated from direct involvement with physical events. Dreams serve to dull the impact of the day's events just past, while the meaning of those activities sifts through the various levels of the personality, settling into compartments of intent and belief. Often the true impact of an event does not occur until it has been interpreted or reexperienced through a dream.
quotes.translation: 事件在梦中被处理，置于必要的视角中，被分类和整理。这是在意识心与物质事件的直接参与分离时进行的。梦的作用是缓和刚过去的一日事件的影响，同时让这些活动的意义渗透人格的各个层面，沉淀到意图与信念的隔间中。通常，一个事件的真正冲击要等到通过梦被诠释或重新体验后才会发生。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: He simply adds some of his energy to that present in the animal, mixing this vitality with the animal's own. This does not mean that all animals are fragments in this manner, however. Animals, as any pet owner knows, have their own personalities and characteristics, and individual ways of perceiving the reality available to them. Some gobble experience. Their consciousness can be immeasurably quickened by contact with friendly humans, and emotional involvement with life is strongly developed.
quotes.translation: 他只是将自己的一部分能量加入动物现有的能量中，将这生命力与动物自身的生命力混合。但这并不意味着所有动物都是以这种方式形成的碎片。然而，正如任何宠物主人所知，动物有其自身的人格与特性，以及感知其可得实相的个体方式。有些动物狼吞虎咽地体验。它们与友善人类的接触能极大地加速其意识，与生命的情感牵连也得到强烈发展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You must realize, again, that we are speaking of divisions for convenience's sake, where none really exists. At the same "time," so to speak, that this personality is born into a minority race, in a completely different era it may be born rich, secure and aristocratic. It is searching out different methods of experience and expansion. Do you follow me?
quotes.translation: 你必须再次认识到，我们是为了方便而谈论划分，实则并无真正划分。可以这么说，在同一个“时间”，当这个人格出生于一个少数种族时，在完全不同的时代，它可能生于富裕、安稳、贵族的家庭。它正在探寻不同的体验与扩展方式。你明白我的意思吗？
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In the dream world, you do and perform more than you realize. Secondary personality problems that cannot be taken up by the personality in regular life, for various reasons, are worked out as you know. What you do not realize, however, is that these images that you all create, have an existence independent of your knowledge, once you have created them.
quotes.translation: 在梦境世界中，你所做和所成就的远超你的认知。那些因种种原因无法在常规生活中被人格处理的次要人格问题，正如你所知，会在梦中得到解决。然而你未曾意识到的是，这些由你们共同创造的意象，一旦被创造出来，便拥有独立于你认知之外的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The sleeping personality is as close to the inner self as you will come in this existence, for here the personality is soon free of the camouflage concerns with which it must be involved in the waking condition.
quotes.translation: 睡眠中的人格是此生最接近内在自性的状态，此时人格得以摆脱清醒状态下必须应对的伪装性关切。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: Now. The answer is no. When you understand my idea of life, then you do not destroy yourself in any form. You do not take it for granted that in the next life you will solve your problems. You take it for granted that this form and this personality, like all your other personalities, is unique, with purpose that it alone can best (underlined) achieve.
quotes.translation: 答案是否定的。当你理解我对生命的理念，就不会以任何形式毁灭自己。你不会理所当然地认为来世能解决所有问题，而是会明白：这个形态与这个人格，如同你所有其他的人格一样，是独一无二的，承载着唯有它才能最佳（着重号）实现的特定目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: A strong part of your personalities is therefore a product of the physical system in which you have physical existence. All ideas of reality must be glimpsed through the physical net which is the materialized form of these assumptions. You are, in other words, physically able to observe reality in a highly specialized fashion. You must, physically speaking, interpret existence in terms of these very definite assumptions.
quotes.translation: 因此，你们人格中相当一部分是物质系统的产物——你们正是在这个系统中获得肉身存在。所有关于实相的概念都必须透过物质之网才能窥见，而这物质之网正是这些假设的具现化形式。换言之，你们在物质层面得以用高度专门化的方式观察实相。从物质角度而言，你们必须依据这些明确的假设来诠释存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is no point in giving you a superficial analysis, since dreams usually impart knowledge that can be utilized by several levels of the personality; though consciously the information perceived and brought into meaningful context by the subconscious may not be at all comprehensible to the ego, it is nevertheless utilized by the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 给予你肤浅的分析毫无意义，因为梦境通常传递能被人格多个层面运用的知识。虽然潜意识所感知并赋予意义的信息可能完全不为自我所理解，但整个人格仍会加以运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The rigidity of a personality is its downfall. We will have some sessions dealing with dream therapy. Through such therapy actions would be allowed greater spontaneity, and channels would not be clogged by impeding actions to any great degree. Dream therapy would actually involve no more than lending a helping hand to a phenomena that already occurs.
quotes.translation: 人格的僵化正是其败亡之因。我们将安排几节探讨梦境疗愈的课程。通过这种疗愈，行动将获得更大的自发性，通道也不会被阻碍性行动过度堵塞。梦境疗愈实际上不过是助长已然发生的现象一臂之力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is true that as a rule you are not aware of your whole entity, which as a rule does not reside within your boundaries. But there is no reason why you must be blind to the whole self of your present personality, which is part of your entity, and which can be glimpsed on your plane in terms of the breathing and dreaming self of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 诚然，你通常并不觉知自己的整体存有——而整体存有通常并不栖居于你的界限之内。但你没有理由必须对你当前人格的整体自我视而不见，这整体自我是你存有的一部分，且能通过我提及的呼吸与做梦的自我，在你的层面上被瞥见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Its nature becomes known, for the personality, again, is not an object, nor is it an unchanging unit. You have been studying it in the past in a very superficial manner. It should be remembered however that hypnotism is also an action, and as such hypnotism will change the personality to some extent, as all action changes and affects other actions.
quotes.translation: 其本质会逐渐显现，因为人格再次强调并非一个客体，也不是一个恒定不变的单元。过去你们一直以非常肤浅的方式研究它。但需谨记催眠本身也是一种行动，因此催眠会在某种程度上改变人格，正如所有行动都会改变并影响其他行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I'm glad to see you have had a good think session. Now. If you are thinking in terms of secondary personalities, you can prove nothing one way or another. A secondary personality could indeed use gestures that are different （with humor）. Either way, this would be no proof as to my independent nature. I am glad to see that it has been bothering you.
quotes.translation: 很高兴看到你们进行了一次良好的思考会。现在，若你们以次级人格的角度思考，将无法证明任何一方的观点。次级人格确实可能使用不同的手势（带着幽默）。无论哪种情况，这都无法证明我独立存在的本质。很高兴看到这个问题一直困扰着你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The energy generated by some such experiences is enough to change a life in a matter of moments, and to affect the understanding and behavior of others. These are intrusions of knowledge from one dimension of activity to another. They are highly charged and volatile. Unknowingly, the individual who receives such information is himself a part of it. The entire feeling-tone of his present personality is changed -- and directly -- by the information he receives.
quotes.translation: 某些此类经历所激发的能量，足以在瞬间改变一个人的生命，并影响他人的理解与行为。这些是从一个活动维度向另一个活动维度侵入的知识。它们高度带电且不稳定。接收此类信息的个体，在不知不觉中已成为信息本身的一部分。他当前人格的整体感受基调——会因所接收的信息而直接改变。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I also know that in a couple of chapters for Dreams itself Seth referred to the genetic factors involving reincarnation. He said that basically both our genetic structure and our reincarnational history are systems of consciousness, that they're "intermixed." The former is physical, the latter is psychic, a part of our inner bank of knowledge. I don't doubt that he's right--that is, in our temporal lifetimes we call upon whatever systems of consciousness we desire to, at whatever "time": a matter of choice and free will operating within the broad parameters of our sexual orientation and other personality factors.
quotes.translation: 我也知道在《梦》的几章中，赛斯提到了涉及转世的遗传因素。他说我们的遗传结构与转世历史本质上是意识系统，且是"相互交织"的。前者是物质性的，后者是心灵性的，是我们内在知识库的一部分。我毫不怀疑他是对的——也就是说，在我们现世的生命中，我们可以在任何"时间"召唤任何我们渴望的意识系统：这是在性取向及其他人格因素的广泛参数内，由选择与自由意志运作的结果。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: I referred to a "successful" progression because reaching into the future is evidently much more difficult. By its very nature a future life cannot be proven--records checked, and so forth. Anything goes. Jane and I have read of many systems designed to regress the individual to past lives. Often such "trips" are mediated by hypnosis. It can even happen spontaneously, and I had a most exhilarating glimpse of a past life of my own that way. (See Session 721 in Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality.) However, neither of us have had such an outright encounter with a future self--that we know of. I'd say that under hypnosis the urge to fantasize the future lives must be a tempting one; but what's the explanation for achieving little more than a formless future state while "under," no matter how hard one tries? The failure to get there, to turn time around, could be taken as a sign of resistance on the part of the present self. (Or even a past self or selves, but that's too complicated a subject to go into here.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: They exist within the cells, or I should more properly say that the cells form about them. These electric coded signals then form electric counterparts of complete experience, as it has been felt by any given individual. It is, the pattern is, then independent of the physical system, while residing within it. In other words, each individual from birth on forms his own counterpart from built up, individual, continuous electric signals. At physical death his personality then exists in its complete form, and of course escapes the sort of ending that it would suffer if it were an integral part of the physical system.
quotes.translation: 它们存在于细胞之内，或者更准确地说，细胞围绕它们而形成。这些电性编码信号随后形成完整经验的电性对应物，如同任何特定个体所感受的那样。这个模式独立于物质系统，却又栖居于其中。换言之，每个个体从出生起，便通过累积的、个体化的、连续的电性信号构建自己的对应物。在肉体死亡时，他的人格便以完整形态存在，自然逃脱了若作为物质系统不可分割部分所会遭受的终结。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I realize that this is somewhat difficult, but when you reread the last two sessions you will understand this material completely. Ruburt is now the result of the Seth that I once was, for I have changed since then. Ruburt represents, and is, a personality formed by that Seth which was myself, by focusing upon and using a peculiar set of attributes and abilities. To make it simpler, perhaps, we split, this being necessary always so that various possibilities can be brought into action.
quotes.translation: 我明白这有些难以理解，但当你重读最近两节课程时，就会完全明白这些资料。鲁柏现在是我曾经是的赛斯的结果，因为自那以后我已经改变了。鲁柏代表并成为了一个由曾经是我的那个赛斯所形成的人格，通过聚焦并运用一组特定的特质与能力。说得更简单些，或许我们分裂了，这是必要的，以便各种可能性都能被带入行动中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: （The word fragment was first used in the 4th session, Volume 1, page 22, by Frank Watts. Actually the Frank Watts personality was in the process of being superseded by Seth then, and on the next page Seth announced his presence by name. This was on December 8,1963. The word compartment had been used in the third session, with a similar meaning.）
quotes.translation: （"片段"一词首次出现在第4节课程中，第一卷，第22页，由弗兰克·沃茨使用。实际上，当时弗兰克·沃茨人格正在被赛斯取代，而在下一页，赛斯以名字宣布了他的存在。这是在1963年12月8日。"隔间"一词曾在第3节课程中使用过，含义类似。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Mental energy, indeed, is an attribute of personality; but personality survives the physical frame as it existed before the physical frame, and indeed created the physical frame. You can see therefore how unimaginative and basically unworkable the idea of a closed system is.
