Yet it is, of course, since in it Seth illuminates from still another perspective his concept of value fulfillment.8 The session grew out of the encounter we had yesterday afternoon with an unexpected visitor from out of state. Seth hardly mentions the individual involved, however, but instead goes into the subject of mental illness in more inclusive terms. I see many correlations between this evening's material and that in Session 917 for Chapter 8; there, among other things, Seth had discussed the reasoning mind, the imaginative mind, and schizophrenia. That session had been triggered, at least in part, by a letter Jane had found to be quite upsetting.

quotes.text: He was also angry that friends arrived near midnight, since already he felt poorly. Again he said nothing and the symptoms grew all the stronger as his desire grew to tell them to leave. The night symptoms should vanish. Without intensive constructive suggestions before sleep the personality shows the status quo relationship of its condition, whatever it is. If it is poor, the sleep is poor, and the inner intuitions denied their therapeutic functions.
quotes.translation: 他也对朋友们将近午夜才到访感到生气，因为他已经感觉不舒服了。他再次什么也没说，而随着他想叫他们离开的欲望增强，症状也变得更严重。夜间的症状应该会消失。如果没有在睡前进行强烈的建设性暗示，人格就会展现其状况的现状关系——无论那状况是什么。如果状况不佳，睡眠就会不好，内在直觉也被剥夺了其治疗功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Nevertheless in his case an excess, fervent nature has always been in existence, and even now his enthusiasms are extremely fervent, and although a humorous exterior personality now shows its face, nevertheless the extremely authoritative and sometimes too rigid nature holds the personality presently in bounds.
quotes.translation: 然而，在他的案例中，一种过度、热烈的本性一直存在，即使现在他的热情仍然极为炽烈，尽管一个幽默的外在人格现在显现出来，但那种极其权威、有时过于僵硬的本质仍将人格束缚在界限之内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: He had retreated into the formlessness that he had himself created. He will come out on the other side. There will be some distortions. (Pause.) Within three months' time there should be a noticeable improvement. Now by improvement I mean an indication that a central core of personality is once again in charge.
quotes.translation: 他退入了自己创造的无形状态。他会从另一侧走出来。会有一些扭曲。（停顿。）三个月内应该会有明显的改善。这里我说的改善，是指有一个迹象表明人格的核心再次掌控了局面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Some personalities are prone to this sort of activity. Until they realize the nature of such actions, two or three personalities may join as partners in such a endeavor, in which case the situation is more difficult to untangle. Here there is simply an arrangement and rearrangement of a time already dealt with.
quotes.translation: 某些人格类型容易从事这类活动。除非他们认清此类行为的本质，否则两三个人格可能结为伙伴共同进行这种尝试，这种情况下局面会更难理清。这不过是对已处理过的时间进行重新排列组合而已。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Of course some restraint is necessary, but he has been leaning toward too much restraint in this respect, trying to be what he is not. His personality pattern is not quiet, nor aloof, but given to spontaneous inner motion that maintains its own individualistic balance. He has attempted to tamper with it. Part of this is caused by a misconception, and it is because of this misconception that he found it difficult to see himself as a so-called psychic.
quotes.translation: 当然需要适度约束，但他在这方面已偏向过度约束，试图成为并非本真的自己。他的人格模式并非沉静或疏离，而是倾向于保持自发内在运动以维持其独特平衡。他曾试图篡改这种模式，部分原因源于误解——正是这种误解让他难以将自己视为所谓的通灵者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You are beginning to form this psychological bridge. Now when you form it you do so with the inner realization that it reaches from you outward and you expect something to be on the other side, or the bridge would be useless. Do not, however, identify the bridge with what waits on the other side. The bridge is a living psychological bridge because in this type of communication feelings and emotions are involved. A steel bridge would get you nowhere. You are weaving threads of psychic energy, insights, and realizations, and also certain personality characteristics to form this bridge outward. Now you are beginning at your end and in doing so you form the initial version of your Adam. As this, Adam is highly legitimate and an aid.
quotes.translation: 你正在构建这座心理桥梁。当你构建它时，内心要明白这是从你向外延伸的，并期待彼岸有物存在，否则桥梁便毫无意义。但切勿将桥梁与彼岸之物等同。这座桥是活生生的心理桥梁，因为此类沟通涉及情感与情绪。钢铁桥梁将毫无用处。你正在编织心灵能量、洞见、领悟以及某些人格特质，以构建这座向外延伸的桥梁。此刻你正从自身这端开始，由此形成你最初的亚当版本。作为这样的存在，亚当具有高度正当性且能提供助益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I am not comparing personality to an orange or an onion, but I want to emphasize that as these things grow from within outward, so does each fragment of the entire self. You observe the outside aspect of objects. Your physical senses permit you to perceive the exterior forms to which you then react, but your physical senses to some extent force you to perceive reality in this manner, and the inside vitality within matter and form is not so apparent.
quotes.translation: 我并非将人格比作橙子或洋葱，但我想强调：正如这些事物由内向外生长，整个自我的每个碎片亦是如此。你观察物体的外在表象，肉体感官让你感知并反应于外在形态，但肉体感官在某种程度上迫使你以这种方式认知实相，而物质与形态内在的生命力却并不显见。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: No permanent part, unless drastic changes occur in both of your personalities, and this does not seem possible now. There is a psychic connection here, however, and the possibility much stronger in the past. Your ambitions should stand in the way of such a development, and the other personality realizes this.
quotes.translation: 除非你们两人格都发生剧烈改变，否则没有永久结合的可能——目前看来这似乎不可能。不过这里存在心灵联结，且过去这种可能性更强。你的抱负应当阻碍此类发展，另一个人格也明白这点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There are no real barriers to separate the systems of which I speak. The only separation is brought about by the varying abilities of personalities to perceive and manipulate. You exist in the midst of many other systems of reality, for example, but you do not perceive them. And even when some event intrudes from these systems into your own three-dimensional existence, you are not able to interpret it, for it is distorted by the very fact of entry.
quotes.translation: 我所谈论的诸系统之间并无真正屏障。唯一的区隔源于各人格感知与操控能力的差异。例如你存在于许多其他实相系统之中，却无法感知它们。即便某些事件从这些系统侵入你的三维存在，你也无法解读——因为入侵行为本身已使其扭曲。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are a few points that I would like to make of a general nature. Ruburt has been reading Jung, though not consistently. The libido does not originate in the individual subconscious of the present personality. It originates instead in the energy of the entity and inner self, and is directed by means of the inner senses, outward so to speak, through the deeper layers of the individual subconscious mind, then through the outer or personal layers.
quotes.translation: 我想先谈几点一般性的看法。鲁柏一直在读荣格的书，虽然并非持续不断。力比多并非源自当前人格的个体潜意识，而是源自存有与内在自体的能量，并通过内在感官向外导向——可以说是经由个体潜意识的深层，再通过外在或个人层面的潜意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The sexes will be reversed and your mother will make a fine husband. Your father has been twice a male, successively. He will adopt the female role, which is more natural to his personality, and be more at ease with creative functions at the spontaneous level. Your mother has been a female now twice in a row, and is ill at ease, and will do much better as a male. The mother-love experience has done much however to balance a too-aggressive nature.
quotes.translation: 性别将会反转，你母亲会成为一个好丈夫。你父亲已经连续两次为男性，他将扮演女性角色，这更符合他的人格特质，并在自发层面更自在地发挥创造性功能。你母亲已连续两次为女性，感到不自在，作为男性会表现得好得多。不过，母爱经验已大大平衡了她过于侵略性的天性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego must sit lightly, otherwise it can smother the talent that lies beneath. This is very properly your talent, your talent as a personality at this particular time. However, you are also more than you know. Your subconscious is a greater part of you than you know, and the ego is nothing more than the topmost portion of the subconscious. There is after all no dividing line, and you are as much your subconscious as you are your ego, and more.
quotes.translation: 自我必须保持轻灵，否则它会窒息潜藏的天赋。这恰是你此刻的天赋，作为人格的天赋。然而，你远比自己认知的更广大。你的潜意识比你认知的更宏大，而自我不过是潜意识最表层的部分。毕竟没有分界线，你既是你的潜意识，也是你的自我，甚至更多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Throughout the ages some have recognized the fact that there is self consciousness and purpose in certain dream and sleep states, and have maintained, even in waking life, the sense of continuity of this inner self. To such people it is no longer possible to identify completely with the ego consciousness. They are too obviously aware of themselves as more. When such knowledge is gained, the ego can accept it, for it finds to its surprise that it is not less conscious, but more conscious, that its limitations are dissipated; now it is not true, and I emphasize this strongly, that so-called unconscious material, given any freedom, will draw energy away from the egotistically organized self in a normal personality.
quotes.translation: 古往今来，有人已认识到某些梦境与睡眠状态中存在自我意识与目的，甚至在清醒生活中也保持着这种内在自体的连续感。对这样的人而言，已不可能完全认同于自我意识。他们太明显地意识到自己远不止于此。当获得这种认知时，自我能够接纳它，因为它惊讶地发现自己并未变得意识更少，反而意识更多，其局限消散了。我要强烈强调：所谓无意识材料，若给予任何自由，绝不会从正常人格中以自我为中心组织起来的自我中抽走能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The blandness, comparatively speaking, in previous paintings of your apartment did not overall reflect Ruburt's personality, which is given to contrasts. He is correct. The bathroom should be redone, and gaily. For too long it has represented the place where he faced the results of conflict--his symptoms.
quotes.translation: 相对而言，你公寓先前画作中的平淡感，并未全面反映鲁柏那偏好对比的人格特质。他说得对，浴室应该重新装修，要色彩明快。长久以来，那里代表着他面对冲突结果——他的症状——的地方。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Sometimes the road or path may be used by others, and sometimes not. Now, many personalities may work together to form a time system, as many men may labor to form a national highway. One personality may also form for his own purposes a time system of his own, as a man might make a path to his own garden.
quotes.translation: 有时这条路可能被他人使用，有时则不然。许多人格可能共同协作形成一个时间系统，如同许多人合力修建国道。一个人格也可能为自己目的形成专属的时间系统，如同一个人为自家花园开辟小径。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Basically speaking of course the matter of the cell does not exist. You were correct in the assumption that upon death the personality sends out signals; but the personality constantly sends out signals, in any condition of existence.
quotes.translation: 基本上，细胞的物质当然并不存在。你们假设人格在死后会发出信号是正确的；但人格在任何存在状态下都持续不断地发出信号。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You will see why this is an important point when you reread this material. You will see why, although the conscious human being may seem to be the result of this combination and recombination, he is, nevertheless, more than that result. He is a particular personality formed purposely, and not in a random fashion, the inner ego creating a replica of itself to function within a definite, peculiar set of circumstances. This is extremely important.
quotes.translation: 当你们重读这段资料时，就会明白为何这是重点。你们会理解，尽管有意识的人类看似是这些组合与重组的结果，但他却远不止于此。他是一个特意形成而非随机形成的特定人格，内在自我创造了一个自身的复制品，以便在特定而独特的环境条件下运作。这一点极为重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: He does have a purpose, that is one of several courses that he can follow, that will enable him to fulfill the purpose, which is his during this existence. He wanted to understand at one time the heredity of seeds and plants. Now he will work to understand the nature and makeup of those in quotes "unorthodox" seeds within mankinds personality. He will learn to use his intellect as a fine tool, while his intuitions point to the proper direction.
quotes.translation: 他确实有一个目的，那是他可以遵循的几条路径之一，能让他完成此生属于他的目的。他曾一度想了解种子与植物的遗传。现在他将致力于理解人类人格中那些所谓"非正统"种子的本质与构成。他将学会把智力当作精良工具来运用，而直觉则指引正确的方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego chooses channels of reception with great discrimination; and, again, it censors anything which it feels is a threat to its own dominance. In sleep however many dreams are of a telepathic nature, with strong clairvoyant overtones. It is the ego's persistent discrimination in choosing the stimuli to which it will react that in a large measure determines the nature of physical time as it appears to the personality. The ego, because of its function and basic characteristics, cannot make swift decisions as can the intuitive self. Therefore it perceives events in a peculiar manner, almost in slow motion, so that the whole effect is of a series of separate events, one happening before or after the other.
quotes.translation: 自我以极大的辨别力选择接收渠道；并且，它会审查任何它认为威胁其主导地位的事物。然而在睡眠中，许多梦境具有心电感应性质，并带有强烈的千里眼色彩。正是自我在选择性反应刺激时的持续辨别力，在很大程度上决定了物理时间呈现给人格的本质。由于自我的功能与基本特性，它无法像直觉自我那样做出快速决定。因此它以独特的方式感知事件，几乎如同慢动作，使得整体效果呈现为一系列独立事件，一个发生在另一个之前或之后。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: He projected a meaninglessness upon reality, and then fell prey to it. Here the senses themselves can help revive him. (Long pause.) He seems now to be choosing between identities, but there is one waiting for him, and it is a probable ego that he did not adopt as a child. He has been plunged back into a physical universe that he would not accept even as a valid mirage. This time he will be able to find himself within it. (Long pause.) In his case he must accept himself as a human being before he can hope to discover the inner self. The ego got no help from him, and it could not carry on alone. There was a definite splitting of personality elements, and a complete abandonment by the inner self of the ego.
quotes.translation: 他将无意义投射到实相上，然后沦为它的牺牲品。此时感官本身可以帮助唤醒他。（长停顿。）他似乎正在身份之间做选择，但有一个身份正等待着他，那是他童年时未曾采纳的一个可能自我。他被抛回一个甚至不愿将其视为有效幻象的物质宇宙中。这一次他将能在其中找到自己。（长停顿。）在他的案例中，他必须先接纳自己作为人类，才能有望发现内在自我。自我未从他那里获得任何帮助，也无法独自支撑。人格要素出现了明确的分裂，内在自我完全抛弃了自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now. I have said that any of you and all of you create a dream universe of validity, actuality, durability, and for Philip's benefit, self-determination, in the same manner that the entity projects the reality of its various personalities. As there is no contact between the entity and the ordinary conscious ego, so there is no contact on a conscious level between the self who dreams and the dream world which has its own independent existence.
quotes.translation: 现在。我说过，你们中的任何一人以及所有人，都创造了一个具有有效性、真实性、持久性，并且为了菲利普的利益，具有自决性的梦境宇宙，其方式与存有投射其各种人格的实相相同。正如存与普通有意识自我之间没有接触，做梦的自我与拥有独立存在的梦境世界之间，在有意识层面上也没有接触。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You recall that I told you animals relied upon the psychic energy of their owners. So do weaker personalities to some extent rely upon stronger ones. Now this could result in a draining of available energies, but when this occurs it is only because you are not as strong as usual. When energy is withdrawn for this reason, the individual who is used to relying upon it will feel bewildered and resentful, and abandoned without knowing the reason.
quotes.translation: 你记得我曾说过动物依赖主人的心灵能量。较弱的性格在某种程度上也依赖较强的性格。这可能导致可用能量的耗损，但这种情况发生时，仅仅是因为你不如平时强大。当能量因此被抽离时，习惯依赖它的人会感到困惑、怨恨，并在不知缘由的情况下感到被遗弃。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Once symptoms are accepted they can return, for the memory pattern is never completely erased, but only bypassed. For various reasons having to do with past-life experiences, writing has become a structure within which the personality best operates. Psychic development has been welded onto this. As long as he faithfully and consistently follows these lines he will operate at maximum levels. When he falters he lets himself in for difficulties.
quotes.translation: 一旦症状被接受，它们就可能复发，因为记忆模式从未被完全抹除，只是被绕过了。由于与前世经历相关的各种原因，写作已成为一种结构，性格在其中运作最佳。心灵发展已与此结构融合。只要他忠实而持续地遵循这些路线，他就能以最高水平运作。当他动摇时，就会让自己陷入困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: All this involves training. It involves discipline, and then there is freedom. The esthetic nature inherent in Roarcks personality will equip him to follow along very well. Let him also take to heart my little sermon on humility. Mark can forget it. His personality needs all the building up it can get.
quotes.translation: 这一切涉及训练。它涉及纪律，然后才有自由。罗阿克性格中固有的审美本质将使他能够很好地遵循这些路线。也让他牢记我关于谦逊的小小训诫。马克可以忘记它。他的性格需要所有能得到的建设。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In other words, portions of the inner self have joined the strictly egotistical functions. The ego in such cases is so attuned that it becomes almost something else. We are coming here toward a definition of illumination in psychic terms. The ego is not, underlined, banished. It joins with portions of the inner self previously unconscious, and illuminates the whole personality. It is no longer primarily physically oriented. Therefore it is no longer an ego in the terms usually meant.
quotes.translation: 换句话说，内在自我的部分已与严格自我中心的功能结合。在这种情况下，自我如此协调，以至于几乎变成了别的东西。我们在此正接近以心灵术语定义"明悟"。自我并未被放逐。它与先前无意识的内在自我部分结合，并照亮整个性格。它不再主要面向物质。因此，它不再是通常意义上的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Your own personality as you know it, that portion of you that you consider most precious, most uniquely you, will also never be destroyed or lost. It is a portion of the soul. It will not be gobbled by the soul, nor erased by it, nor subjugated by it; nor on the other hand can it ever be separated. It is, nevertheless, only one aspect of your soul. Your individuality, in whatever way you want to think of it, continues to exist in your terms.
quotes.translation: 你所知的自己的性格，你认为最珍贵、最独特的那部分自我，也永远不会被摧毁或丢失。它是灵魂的一部分。它不会被灵魂吞噬、抹除或征服；另一方面，它也永远无法分离。然而，它只是你灵魂的一个面向。你的个体性，无论你如何想象它，都会以你的方式继续存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In such a state the personality is free from the limitations of a closed system concept. Identity is not really lost though you may seem to forget yourself, but the props of identity are lost. It is in this same sort of state that the most significant and beneficial inner sense experiments take place.
quotes.translation: 在这种状态下，性格摆脱了封闭系统概念的限制。身份并未真正丧失，尽管你可能看似忘记了自己，但身份的支撑物却丧失了。正是在这种状态下，最重大且有益的内在感官实验得以发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In denying life to yourself you end up by denying life to others. Now I wish this session was recorded so you could hear me, for I hold you, as Ruburt does, closely and dearly as a friend. But you are bound to misinterpret what I say in some sessions, and so it behooves me to speak more plainly. You do not realize now, you do not let yourself realize, the beauty and the complicated reality of your being. You do not let yourself realize the spontaneity and joyful burst that is your inner self, that results in this present human personality that you call yourself. Nor the effort and creative energy that has gone into your making, and that sings within your being like the first morning of creation.
quotes.translation: 否定自身生命，最终会导致否定他人生命。此刻我多希望这场课能被录下来，好让你听见我的声音——因为正如鲁柏那样，我将你视为亲密而珍贵的朋友。但你难免会曲解某些课中的话语，因此我更应直言相告。你尚未意识到，也不愿让自己意识到，你存在的美丽与复杂实相。你不愿让自己看见那内在自发性与喜悦的迸发——正是这股力量造就了你称之为"自己"的当前人格，以及塑造你存在所付出的努力与创造力，它们如创世之晨般在你体内歌唱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is even a certain feedback system that operates here, and yet you must understand that all of these other identities are independent and fully individual. They exist in codified psychological structures within your personality, as you exist in the same manner within each of their personalities.
quotes.translation: 这里甚至存在某种反馈系统在运作，但你必须明白：所有这些其他身份都是独立且完全个体化的。它们以编码心理结构的形式存在于你的人格之中，正如你以同样方式存在于它们每个人格之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The pent-up spontaneity, too long restrained, then latches upon normal low periods when the personality is tired, and comes out as strong discouragement, feelings of desolation, aggravating normal low periods. It can turn a minor annoyance into anger for example; a rainy day into a creative disaster.
quotes.translation: 被压抑过久的自发性，会趁人格疲惫时的正常低潮期突然发作，表现为强烈的沮丧与荒芜感，加剧了本已低落的情绪。它可能将微小烦恼转化为愤怒，将雨天变成创造力的灾难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Once more, your personality is creative and constructive even when it is tuned to a destructive trend. Therefore more than is normal you must be aware of this problem. The very fact that the images were so solid and real, and so vested with physical attributes shows how strong your aggressions were.
quotes.translation: 再次强调：即使当人格转向破坏性倾向时，它依然是创造性与建设性的。因此你必须比常人更警觉这个问题。那些意象之所以如此坚实逼真、充满物质属性，恰恰证明你的攻击性有多强烈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The impulsive and warm quality began with that Midwest existence as a woman. Through the erratic nature of the woman's personality he was actually able to be much kinder. A male's personality at that point would have held too many temptations as far as over aggressiveness and cruelty were concerned.
quotes.translation: 那种冲动而温暖的品质始于中西部作为女性的那次存在。通过该女性人格不稳定的特质，他反而得以展现更多仁慈。若当时是男性人格，在过度攻击性与残忍方面将面临太多诱惑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There is no such thing as division as far as the personality is concerned. Even a full-fledged fragment can turn into an entity in certain cases. There are no rules that hold any living thing down to one form or one kind of existence. And now, dear patient friends, I bid you a most fond good night.
quotes.translation: 就人格而言，根本不存在分裂这回事。即使完全成熟的片段，在某些情况下也能转化为存有。没有任何规则能将生命束缚于单一形态或存在方式。此刻，亲爱的耐心朋友们，我向你们致以最深情的晚安。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: But the legs do walk, and the dream universe does exist. As the entity expands and originates new personalities, and these personalities then become independent individuals, so do the individuals create dream or so-called dream realities and individuals of the dream universe, which are independent.
quotes.translation: 但双腿确实在行走，梦境宇宙也确实存在。当存有扩展并创造新的人格，而这些人格随后成为独立的个体时，这些个体也会创造梦境或所谓的梦境实相，以及梦境宇宙中的独立个体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It was correct, even to the percentage. This is not unusual however, but happens often. When the whole personality is in a high period of stress, and unbalanced, it works against itself even chemically. Various foods are then used in a destructive way, representing the Emotional conflicting forces.
quotes.translation: 这个比例完全正确。不过这并不罕见，而是经常发生。当整个人格处于高度压力且失衡状态时，它甚至会在化学层面与自身对抗。各种食物随后被以破坏性的方式使用，代表着情感冲突的力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Your main sense of identity is involved with your physical body, so that it is, for example, extremely difficult for you to imagine yourself without it, or outside it, or in any way disconnected from it. Form is the result of concentrated energy, the pattern for it caused by vividly directed emotional or psychic idea images. The intensity is all important. If you have, for example, a highly vivid desire to be somewhere else, then without realizing it consciously a pseudophysical form, identical with your own, may appear in that very spot. The desire will carry the imprint of your personality and image, even though you remain unaware of the image or its appearance in the other location.
quotes.translation: 你主要的身份认同与肉体紧密相连，以至于你极难想象没有身体、置身身体之外、或以任何方式与身体分离的状态。形态是浓缩能量的结果，其模式由强烈定向的情感或心灵意念影像所引发。强度至关重要。例如，若你怀有极其强烈的欲望想去别处，那么在你毫无意识的情况下，一个与你自身完全相同的伪物理形态可能就会出现在那个地点。这个欲望会携带你人格与形象的印记，即使你并未察觉那个影像或其出现在另一地点的事实。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are various types of dreams and dream fragments. I will follow this through also later, since in these beginning sessions I am giving you what may be considered a broad outline to be filled in. These dissociated states often occur in sleep, an excellent time since the ego is quieted. At such times it is extremely possible for present personalities to be visited by others such as myself, but only on the bidding of the entity itself.
quotes.translation: 梦境与梦的片段有多种类型。我稍后也会继续探讨这一点，因为在最初这几节课中，我正为你们提供可视为待填充的宽泛纲要。这些解离状态常发生于睡眠中——这是绝佳时机，因为自我已趋于平静。此时，现有人格极有可能被如我这般的存在造访，但唯有在存有本身发出召唤时才会发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your discipline in working habits and in living habits is admirable. Through your past life, that is the life before this one, you progressed along these lines. You do not have to forge them with steel now. They are sufficiently strong and dependable. You do not have to feel that they will let you down. Now for your own sake and for the sake of the art that you follow, you must allow yourself more inner freedom. There is a tendency in your present personality for forging discipline into a bond that could tie down your strong creative tendencies. It is true you needed controls. Now you have them. You stamped down upon your impulses with a frenzy, since once you felt they betrayed you.
quotes.translation: 你在工作习惯与生活习惯上的自律令人钦佩。通过你的前世（即此生之前的那一世），你沿着这些方向取得了进展。如今你无需再用钢铁锻造它们——它们已足够坚固可靠，你无需担心它们会辜负你。现在，为了你自己以及你所追随的艺术，你必须允许自己拥有更多内在自由。在你当前的人格中，存在一种将自律锻造成枷锁的倾向，这可能会束缚你强大的创造倾向。诚然，你曾需要约束。如今你已拥有它们。你曾以狂热之势压制冲动，只因你一度觉得它们背叛了你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is great struggle within the personality however, shown in the sketches--an infantile nature that yet has abilities and struggles to use them. The man reminds Ruburt personality-wise of your mother, hence his dislike of seeing the characteristics so similar in the male and younger portrait.
quotes.translation: 然而，素描中显示出人格内部的巨大挣扎——一种兼具能力并奋力运用这些能力的幼稚天性。这个男人在人格特质上让鲁柏想起你的母亲，因此他不愿看到男性与年轻肖像中如此相似的特征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I risk repeating myself, but I want these steps to be plain. This vital data is sent to the mind by the inner senses. Any material that is important for the body's contact with outer camouflage patterns is given to the brain. The subconscious, so-called, is a connective between mind and brain, between the inner senses and the outer senses. It is actually partly on your plane and partly on other planes. Portions of it do deal with camouflage patterns, with the personal past of the present personality, with racial camouflage memories; and the greater portion belongs to the inner world, and as data comes into it from the inner world, so can it reach far into the inner world itself.
quotes.translation: 我冒着重复的风险，但我要把这些步骤说得清楚明白。这些至关重要的数据由内在感官传送给心智。任何对肉体与外在伪装模式接触重要的资料，都会被传递给大脑。所谓的潜意识，是心智与大脑之间、内在感官与外在感官之间的连接体。它实际上部分存在于你们的层面，部分存在于其他层面。它的一部分确实处理伪装模式、处理当前人格的个人过去、处理种族伪装记忆；而更大部分则属于内在世界，当数据从内在世界进入它时，它也能深入内在世界本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Despite this, I'm aware of the fact that I was necessary to the production of Seth's book. He needs my ability with words; even, I think, my turn of mind. Certainly my writing training aids in the translation of his material and helps give it form, no matter how unconsciously this is done. Certain personality characteristics are important too, I imagine -- the agility with which I can switch the focus of my consciousness, for example.
quotes.translation: 尽管如此，我意识到我对赛斯书的产生是必要的。他需要我的语言能力；甚至，我认为，需要我的思维方式。当然，我的写作训练有助于翻译他的资料，并帮助赋予它形式，无论这是多么无意识地完成的。某些人格特征也很重要，我想——比如我能够灵活切换意识焦点的能力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: We will also be concerned with the framework of the human personality as it exists within several levels of reality. We will conclude our discussion concerning the nature of action, in so far as action is considered by itself. We will always be concerned with a discussion of action, even though other subjects are under consideration however, since it is impossible to divide action into various parts even for the purpose of discussion.
quotes.translation: 我们也将关注人类人格的架构，因为它存在于几个实相层面中。我们将结束关于行动本质的讨论，就行动本身被考虑而言。我们将始终关注对行动的讨论，即使其他主题正在被考虑，因为即使为了讨论的目的，也不可能将行动分割成不同的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Only when such nourishment is for some reason cut off to a considerable degree, is the ego threatened by starvation... We will have more to say concerning the ego's relationship with the so-called unconscious. In a healthy personality the inner self easily projects all experience into EE units, where they are translated into actuality. Physical matter therefore acts as a feedback. Now we will end our session unless you have questions.
quotes.translation: 只有当这种滋养因某种原因被相当程度地切断时，自我才会受到饥饿的威胁……我们将进一步讨论自我与所谓无意识的关系。在健康的人格中，内在自我轻松地将所有经验投射到EE单位中，在那里它们被转化为实相。因此，物质作为反馈。现在我们将结束这一节，除非你们有问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: To say I am energy is no lie. It is actually truer than many designations that would sound more authentic and complicated. I am a personality in essence-energy form. This in no way implies that I am a spirit, nor does it imply that I am some weird sort of granddaddy longlegs of science fiction. What I am is difficult to explain because of the limits set not only by your own knowledge but by the present method of our communications.
quotes.translation: 说我是能量并非谎言。实际上，这比许多听起来更真实、更复杂的称谓更真实。我本质上是一种能量形式的人格。这绝不意味着我是灵体，也不意味着我是某种科幻小说中奇怪的巨型长腿生物。我是什么很难解释，因为不仅受限于你们自己的知识，还受限于我们当前沟通的方法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: And so, Joseph, should you. Problems might arise but you are fully capable of handling them if they do. And no problems means no growth, and no growth means no value fulfillment. You do not have to worry, Joseph, about isolation. It is a main core of your personality. Ruburt does not have to worry any longer about being undisciplined. He is now plenty disciplined enough. His abilities will smother if he applies too much discipline.
quotes.translation: 所以，约瑟夫，你也应该如此。问题可能会出现，但如果出现，你完全有能力处理它们。没有问题意味着没有成长，没有成长意味着没有价值完成。约瑟夫，你不必担心孤立。它是你人格的核心。鲁柏不必再担心缺乏纪律。他现在已经足够自律了。如果他施加太多纪律，他的能力将会窒息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As we have to some extent mentioned earlier, here we have travel through probable actions, where each conceivable action is experienced. The self allows itself to change while retaining knowledge that it is the self who changes. It develops through the changes. Time can only be measured through experience. It is obvious that other gestalt personalities experience more in an equivalent amount of your time, but this is not the point.
quotes.translation: 如我们先前多少提及的，此处我们穿越了可能性的行动，其中每个可想象到的行动都被经验。自我允许自身改变，同时保有"是自我在改变"的认知。它通过改变而发展。时间只能通过经验来衡量。显然其他完形人格在你们同等的时间量中经验得更多，但重点不在此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is no danger, and I will repeat this: There is no danger of dissociation grabbing a hold of him like some black, vague and furry monster, carrying him away to the netherlands of hysteria, schizophrenia, or insanity ... Withdrawal into dissociation as a hiding place from the world could, of course, have dire consequences. Certain personalities could, and have, fallen prey here, but with you, with Ruburt, this is not the case.
quotes.translation: 毫无危险，我将重申：绝无可能让解离像某种漆黑模糊的毛茸怪物般攫住他，将他拖入歇斯底里、精神分裂或疯狂的迷境……当然，退入解离作为逃避世界的藏身处可能带来可怕后果。某些人格确实曾在此处沦陷，但对你和鲁柏而言，情况并非如此。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: No. I was aware that she made the trip. These sessions of trying to give up smoking are a definite help and the habit will finally give way. The personality is becoming stronger and will be able to deal with the problem, as in the past it conquered a gluttony toward food and other elements.
quotes.translation: 不。我知晓她完成了这趟旅程。这些试图戒烟的课程确有助益，这个习惯终将退让。人格正变得更强健，将能处理这个问题，正如过去它曾克服对食物及其他元素的贪欲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: As it is, he does not have sufficient inner confidence to give reign to his abilities, for changing his focus point. It was the outlet of creative writing, early adopted, that saved him from becoming a most rigid and frozen personality; and if he had adopted such a stone-like ego, then indeed he would now be in dangerous circumstances, since his strong creative nature would finally and disastrously have shattered the stone image.
quotes.translation: 事实上，他缺乏足够的内在自信来释放自身能力以转换焦点。早期采用的创作性写作出口，使他免于成为最僵化冻结的人格；若他真采纳了那般石化的自我，此刻确实会处于危险境地——因他强烈的创造本性终将以灾难性方式粉碎那石像。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This may not seem so to you, but because subconsciously and basically, though not consciously, Ruburt trusts both his own intuition and the validity of our sessions. He will not allow the rambunctious portion of his personality to upset our schedule, but because he trusts all this subconsciously, he will not be as disturbed as you are if a session is missed.
quotes.translation: 这对你而言或许不显，但因鲁柏在潜意识与根本层面（虽非意识层面）信任自己的直觉与课程的真实性，他不会允许人格中狂野的部分扰乱我们的日程。正因他潜意识中全然信任，错过课程时他也不会如你般焦虑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is also possible that these secondary personalities, emerging, give access to buried abilities and benign constructive abilities which had been buried beneath heavier fears that weighed them down. In any case this level represents the last division of what we may call the present personal subconscious, and still only accounts for a small dimension of the inner self, being composed of only the most easily accessible portions.
quotes.translation: 这些次人格浮现时，也可能开启被沉重恐惧压抑的潜藏能力与良性建设性特质。无论如何，这个层次代表我们所谓"当前个人潜意识"的最后分野，且仅由最易触及的部分构成，仍只占内在自性的微小维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The ego must be understood as having certain general necessary characteristics. Again, it must attempt to see itself as apart from action, even though basically the attempt to do so must fail. The attempt however allows the ego to act as a front man, so to speak, an organized and disciplined agent to deal with physical environment for the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 自我必须被理解为具有某些普遍的必要特征。它必须试图将自己视为与行动分离的存在，尽管这种尝试从根本上注定失败。然而，这种尝试使自我得以充当"前台人物"——一个组织有序、训练有素的代理人，为整个人格处理物质环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I have mentioned this many times. There are no boundaries to the self, and no barriers put upon its development. A personality may "originally" be a part of a given entity, and on its own develop interests quite different. It can on its own take a lonely way, or it can instead attach itself or gravitate toward other entities with interests like its own. The original connection will not be severed, but new ones made and formed.
quotes.translation: 我曾多次提及：自我没有边界，其发展也不受任何限制。人格可能"最初"是某个实体的组成部分，并自行发展出截然不同的兴趣。它可以选择独行其道，也可以依附或趋向其他具有相似兴趣的实体。原始联系不会断裂，但新的联系会建立并形成。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If you say that the personality cannot take any choice of which the entity is not aware, then this is true; but it is also true that the entity is utterly incapable of changing that choice made by the personality, even though the entity knows about the choice ahead of time, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 若说人格无法做出实体不知晓的选择，此言不虚；但同样真实的是，实体完全无力改变人格做出的选择——即便实体"事先"知晓该选择。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The energy must be directed toward the personality's main work, the two books at hand, if the personality is to progress along its chosen lines.
quotes.translation: 若人格要沿着既定路线前进，能量必须导向其核心工作——即手头的两本书。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: M-A-U-B-U-N-D-U, in Africa, 14 B.C. The Speakers, more than most, are highly active through all aspects of existence, whether physical or nonphysical, waking or sleeping, between lives or at other levels of reality. As certain physical data are carried along in the gene structure, so this inner information is codified within whatever psychological structures the Speakers may inhabit; but far more readily available than it is to other personalities. It needs, often, trigger points to release it, however. These can take place in either the waking or dream state, and they serve to open up the reservoirs of knowledge and make past training available.
quotes.translation: 公元前14年非洲的M-A-U-B-U-N-D-U。传道者比大多数存在更活跃于存在的所有层面——无论是物质或非物质、清醒或沉睡、转世间隙或其他实相层面。正如某些物质数据通过基因结构传递，这种内在信息被编码在传道者可能栖居的任何心理结构中；但较之其他人格，这些信息更易获取。不过，它们常需触发点才能释放。这些触发点可在清醒或梦境状态发生，用以开启知识宝库，使过往训练得以应用。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is enough evidence to build an excellent case for life after death. All of this involves direct experience--episodes, encountered by individuals, [that are] highly suggestive of the after death hypothesis; but the hypothesis is never taken seriously by your established sciences. There is far more evidence for reincarnation and life after death than there is, for example, for the existence of black holes. (With amusement:) Few people have seen a black hole, to make the most generous statement possible, while countless people have had private reincarnational experiences, or encounters that suggest the survival of the personality beyond death.
quotes.translation: 已有充分证据可为死后生命构建有力论证。这一切涉及直接体验——个体遭遇的、强烈暗示死后假说的事件片段；但该假说从未被你们的正统科学认真对待。轮回与死后生命的证据，远多于黑洞存在的证据（以戏谑口吻说）：最宽容地说，鲜有人见过黑洞，而无数人曾拥有私密的轮回体验，或遭遇暗示人格死后存续的事件。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As individual reliance upon the outer senses develops, the personality to a large degree relies upon them, and gradually loses the habit of relying upon the more familiar inner senses utilized mainly in infancy and childhood. This is usually a matter of practicality; yet there are those who continue stubbornly this older and basic reliance upon the inner senses, and these individuals utilize the realization of an open system.
quotes.translation: 随着个体对外在感官的依赖逐渐发展，人格在很大程度上依赖它们，并逐渐失去依赖主要在婴儿期和童年期使用的更熟悉的内在感官的习惯。这通常是实用性的问题；然而，有些人仍顽固地坚持这种对内在感官更古老、更基本的依赖，这些人利用了对开放系统的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: These personalities, often talented in many directions and often with past experiences of wealth and power, choose to be born as Jews of their own volition, and this is a karmic compensation, not in any sense punishment but a needed adjustment on the part of the personalities involved.
quotes.translation: 这些人格往往在多个方面才华横溢，且常有财富与权力的过往经验，他们自愿选择生为犹太人，这是一种业力补偿，绝非任何意义上的惩罚，而是相关人格所需的调整。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. There is someone else who has been here and who is connected with our new student. But our new student does not know this person... It is no one with whom she has previously communicated. Because she was not ready. This personality is also a student of mine and a practice teacher.
quotes.translation: 现在。还有一位曾在此处的人，与我们这位新学生有关联。但我们的新学生并不认识此人……她此前从未与这人交流过。因为她尚未准备好。这个人格也是我的学生，且是一位实习教师。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This is extremely important, since the dream world operates within the dimensions of your own psychic field, but utterly divorced from both space-time continuum and physical construction. Here you see the self truly spills over, not only into what you would call not-self, but into areas with which the conscious self is barely familiar. On an unconscious level however the self is very aware of the progress of these secondary personalities, and indeed uses this plane itself for the fulfillment and development of qualities originally attached to it, but incompatible with its main intents. The two planes constantly enrich and affect each other.
quotes.translation: 这一点极为重要，因为梦境世界运作于你自身心灵场的维度之内，却完全脱离时空连续体与物质构造。在此，你看到自我真正地溢出，不仅进入你所谓的非我领域，更进入意识自我几乎陌生的领域。然而在无意识层面，自我对这些次级人格的进展非常清楚，实际上它利用这个层面本身来成就和发展最初附属于它、却与其主要意图不相容的特质。这两个层面不断相互丰富与影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The situations had changed but the ego framework had grown rigid, rigid enough so that it could in a large degree dominate certain normally subconscious processes, bringing forth the physical symptoms. Now there is always an imprinting process within the personality, belonging to past experience. A previous inclination to gluttony had once led him to some slight gout, and in the present case there was a swelling of the feet.
quotes.translation: 情境已然改变，但自我框架变得僵化，僵化到足以在很大程度上支配某些通常属于潜意识的过程，从而引发身体症状。人格内部始终存在一个属于过往经验的印记过程。先前贪食的倾向曾使他患过轻微痛风，而当前案例中则出现了足部肿胀。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now. (Pause.) Ruburt has only now begun to take those necessary steps that lead to total commitment. His personality is so constructed that he cannot give time, without conflict, to any matter to which he is not totally committed, or to any matter about which he has any serious doubt.
quotes.translation: 现在。（停顿。）鲁柏直到此刻才开始采取那些通往全然承诺的必要步骤。他的人格结构如此：若非全然投入或对任何事存有严重疑虑，他无法毫无冲突地付出时间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now you think of dogs as friends of man, and you personify gods in human terms. You think of them sometimes as guardians. In those terms, now, trees are also guardians. They are attached to the people they know. You cannot put a leash on them and walk them around the block, yet trees form a protective barrier about, say, a home or a neighborhood. They are actively concerned. They have personalities -- certainly to the same extent that dogs do, yet of an entirely different nature. They respond to you. The trees in that (hill house) neighborhood then are particularly friendly, strong, and protective, and they will help renew your energies.
quotes.translation: 你们现在视狗为人类的朋友，并以人类的形象将神人格化。有时你们认为它们是守护者。以此类推，树木也是守护者。它们依恋所认识的人。你无法给它们套上狗绳牵着绕街区散步，但树木会为家园或社区形成保护屏障。它们积极关切着周遭，拥有与狗同等程度的个性——只是性质截然不同。它们会回应你。那栋（山丘房屋）社区的树木格外友善、强壮且具有保护性，它们将助你重焕活力。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 739
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The word "passive" is a poor one to describe the characteristics of the anima, in that it suggests a lack of motion, and this is hardly the case. It is true that the anima allows itself to be acted upon, but the motive behind this is the desire and the necessity to tune into other forces that are supremely powerful. The desire to be swept along, therefore, is as strong with the anima as the opposite desire for rest. The characteristics of the animus provide the aggressive thrust that returns the personality back outward into physical activities, triumphantly holding the products of creativity that the anima characteristics have secured.
quotes.translation: 用"被动"一词描述阿尼玛的特性并不恰当，因为这暗示着缺乏运动，而事实绝非如此。阿尼玛确实允许自己被作用，但其背后的动机是渴望并必须调谐至其他至高力量。因此，被裹挟而行的渴望与寻求休憩的渴望在阿尼玛中同样强烈。阿尼姆斯的特性则提供进取的推力，将人格重新导向外在物质活动，凯旋般持守着阿尼玛特性所获取的创造力产物。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I will never either suggest or condone a wholesale letting go of outer personality defenses. I am attempting to build up your outer personalities in their dealings with the outside world, while at the same time teaching the inner self spontaneity and freedom. This is quite a project.
quotes.translation: 我绝不会建议或纵容彻底放弃外在人格防御。我正试图在应对外在世界时强化你们的外在人格，同时教导内在自我自发与自由。这实属浩大工程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The survival personality for example relies mainly upon telepathic communication. The survival personality does not think in terms of words, but experiences concepts in a much more direct manner. This sort of thing simply could not be understood by the physically-oriented individual.
quotes.translation: 例如，生存人格主要依赖心灵感应交流。生存人格不以词语思考，而是以更直接的方式体验概念。这类事物绝非物质导向的个体所能理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is a materialization of an inner framework, an inner psychic framework. Many other personality structures do not need a materialized perceptive frame-work, such as this, but an inner psychic organization is always present. It also represents the personality's present capabilities.
quotes.translation: 这是内在架构——内在心灵架构的物质化呈现。许多其他人格结构无需此类物质化的感知框架，但内在心灵组织始终存在。它也代表着人格当前的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: His abilities are considerable in the healing line, and again for this reason it is extremely important that he is understanding of himself as well as others. His ego is (underlined) a kind one, but the structure of any ego is such that it considers, or can consider easily, psychic ability as a sign of its own power; or feel possessive of the ability, and overly proud of it, even when it knows it originates in other layers of the self. We want our friend to have a strong and healthy overall personality balance, for this will allow him to use his abilities well, and then the abilities themselves will further add to his own development.
quotes.translation: 他在疗愈领域能力卓著，正因如此，理解自我与他人对他至关重要。他的自我（着重强调）是仁慈的，但任何自我的结构都会——或轻易将心灵能力视为自身力量的标志；或对其产生占有欲并过度骄傲，即便明知其源于自我的其他层面。我们希望这位朋友拥有强健平衡的整体人格，这将使他善用自身能力，而这些能力本身将进一步促进他的成长。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You may think of your soul or entity -- though only briefly and for the sake of this analogy -- as some conscious and living, divinely inspired computer who programs its own existences and lifetimes. But this computer is so highly endowed with creativity that each of the various personalities it programs spring into consciousness and song, and in turn create realities that may have been undreamed of by the computer itself.
quotes.translation: 你可以将你的灵魂或存有——仅为了这个类比而简短地思考——视为某种有意识且活生生的、受神圣启发的计算机，它编程自己的存在与生命。但这台计算机如此高度赋有创造力，以至于它编程的每一个不同人格都迸发出意识与歌声，并反过来创造出计算机本身可能未曾梦想过的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are reasons why certain personalities have been drawn to our sessions. This is obvious. Some of you have known each other in past lives. There are other reasons which, if you will excuse me, we shall not consider this evening simply because you do not yet have a basic understanding of certain issues which are involved. You can be assured of my interest and concern. My scope of activity is simply larger than your own.
quotes.translation: 某些人格被吸引到我们的课程中是有原因的。这很明显。你们中的一些人在前世就彼此相识。还有其他原因，如果你允许的话，我们今晚就不考虑了，仅仅是因为你们对涉及的一些基本问题还没有理解。你可以确信我的兴趣与关怀。我的活动范围只是比你们自己的更大。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The experiences at these various levels may be interpreted symbolically. They may appear in the form of fantasy, fiction, or art work, without the conscious self realizing their origin. Now at any of these various stages of consciousness, other phenomena may also be perceived -- thought-forms for example, energy manifestations, projections from the personal subconscious, and projections from the collective unconscious. Any or all of these may take symbolic form, and may appear beneficial or threatening according to the attitude of the personality involved. They should be regarded as quite natural phenomena, often neutral in intent.
quotes.translation: 在这些不同层面的体验可能被象征性地解读。它们可能以幻想、虚构或艺术作品的形式出现，而意识自我并未意识到其来源。现在，在这些意识的不同阶段中，其他现象也可能被感知——例如思想形态、能量显现、个人潜意识的投射，以及集体潜意识的投射。这些中的任何一个或全部可能采取象征形式，并根据所涉及人格的态度，显得有益或具有威胁性。它们应被视为相当自然的现象，通常意图中立。

quotes.text: Our communications are not of this type. As an overall personality, I have always been concerned with ideas. I am not emotionally in strong connection with any personalities known to Frank Watts, for example. He is a part of, or a fragment of, my whole self, and an independent one.
quotes.translation: 我们的通讯并非此类。作为一个整体人格，我一直关注理念。例如，我与弗兰克·沃茨所知的任何人格没有强烈的情感联系。他是我整体自我的一部分或一个片段，并且是一个独立的部分。

quotes.text: The body's innate knowledge, then, will try to translate itself often into psychological activity that may result in hunches, premonitions, and so forth. The senses may be utilized to clarify the message. You might hear a voice mentally, for example, or see a flashing image. According to your beliefs, you may interpret such data in any of many ways, but because such experiences are not an accepted part of recognized, official activity, they can appear frightening. Period. You may assign them to "spirits" or disembodied personalities, but in such a way that these are thrown together in a confusing mass of dogma or superstition.
quotes.translation: 因此，身体的先天知识往往会试图将其自身转化为心理活动，可能产生直觉、预感等。感官可能被用来澄清信息。例如，你可能会在脑海中听到声音，或看到闪动的影像。根据你的信念，你可能以多种方式解读这些数据，但由于这类体验并非公认的官方活动的一部分，它们可能显得令人恐惧。句号。你可能将它们归因于“灵体”或无形的人格，但以这种方式，它们被混入一团混乱的教条或迷信中。

quotes.text: It is possible (underlined) that the psychedelic experience for these individuals would involve consciousness expansion directed toward (underlined) usual physical reality, and bring about a more unified personality structure from society's standpoint. Insanity as a term means nothing. All mental life is characterized by divergent perceptions of any given set of Sense data that is recognized as Reality, with a capital R.
quotes.translation: 对于这些个体来说，迷幻体验可能涉及意识扩展，指向（强调）通常的物理实相，并从社会的角度带来更统一的人格结构。疯狂这个词毫无意义。所有心理生活的特征是对任何被认定为实相（大写R）的给定感官数据集合产生不同的感知。

quotes.text: He was determined to find the kind of mate that would best suit him and his own unique characteristics. That intent was in his mind. When that challenge was met he used his will and mobilized all of his power to fulfill his abilities, and to bring about conditions in which he hoped Joseph (as Seth calls me) could also fulfill his. The will, again, operates according to the personality's beliefs about reality, so its desires are sometimes tempered as those beliefs change. In his own way Ruburt always concentrated upon one challenge at a time -- boring in, so to speak, and ignoring anything else that might distract him.
quotes.translation: 他决心找到最适合自己独特个性的伴侣。这个意图一直存在于他的心智中。当这个挑战被克服后，他运用意志力调动所有能力来实现自身潜能，并创造条件希望约瑟夫（赛斯对我的称呼）也能实现其潜能。意志力再次根据人格对实相的看法运作，因此其欲望会随着信念的改变而有所调整。鲁柏总是以他自己的方式专注于每次一个挑战——可以说是深入钻研，忽略任何可能分散注意力的事物。

quotes.text: (From the 54th session for May 18, 1964:) Your Ruburt was, indeed, Seth ... I have promised to give you more material dealing with the psychic construction of the entity, and its relationship with its various [physical] personalities. In the beginning, I could not tell you in so many words that Ruburt is myself, because you would have leaped to the conclusion that I was Ruburt's subconscious mind, and this is not so.
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年5月18日第54节课：）你的鲁柏确实是赛斯……我承诺过会提供更多关于存有心灵结构及其与各个[物质]人格关系的资料。起初我不能直接告诉你鲁柏就是我，因为你会立刻得出结论说我是鲁柏的潜意识，但事实并非如此。

quotes.text: Its dimensions are in terms of values and value fulfillments. The apparent shapes, if you could see them within the electrical system, would seem to appear and disappear as pulses became stronger or weaker. Each and every thought and dream and experience that any human being has had exists as an individual, distinct electrical impulse of particular, unduplicated intensity. It exists not only isolated for example, or detached, but it exists as a part of the electrical pattern of that personality who originally created it. It is still a part of his electrical pattern, but it does also exist independently of him.
quotes.translation: 其维度以价值与价值实现来衡量。若能在电性系统中看见这些显形，它们会随着脉冲强弱变化而显现消失。人类产生的每一个思想、梦境与体验，都作为独特、不可复制的特定强度电性脉冲而存在。它不仅作为孤立或分离的存在，更是作为创造它的人格电性模式的一部分。它仍是该人格电性模式的组成部分，但也独立于他而存在。

quotes.text: To some extent it also acts like a director of experience and action. It is not actually composed of the past egos, but of those dominant aspects of the various personalities. The inner ego, as action, thrusts in an inward direction; that is, back toward the originating impulse. The outside ego thrusts outward. They are two faces, therefore, and form one of many spheres of action, one pulling inward and one outward.
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上它也充当经验与行动的导演。它实际上并非由过去自我构成，而是由各人格的主导面向组成。内在自我作为行动向内推进，即朝向原始冲动回溯；外在自我则向外推进。因此它们是两个面向，构成众多行动球体之一，一个向内牵引，一个向外牵引。

quotes.text: With his superior knowledge the entity must leave hands off. His, the entity's, only hope is to allow the personality complete independence, for it is the personality who understands more clearly than he the conditions of the particular plane upon which his existence happens.
quotes.translation: 拥有更高知识的存有必须放手。存有唯一的希望是让人格完全独立，因为人格比他更清楚理解其存在所发生的特定层面的条件。

quotes.text: The authors instead tell you to be positive, compassionate, strong, optimistic, filled with joy and enthusiasm, without telling you what to do to get out of the predicament you may be in, and without understanding the vicious circle that may seem to entrap you. Such books, again, while sometimes of value, do not explain how thoughts and emotions cause reality. They do not take into consideration the multidimensional aspects of the self or the fact that ultimately each personality, while following definite general laws, must still find and follow his or her own way of adapting these to personal circumstances.
quotes.translation: 作者们反而告诉你要积极、慈悲、坚强、乐观、充满喜悦与热忱，却不告诉你如何摆脱可能陷入的困境，也不理解似乎困住你的恶性循环。这类书籍虽然有时有价值，但并未解释思想与情感如何创造实相。它们既未考虑自我的多维度面向，也未考虑最终每个人格在遵循特定普遍法则的同时，仍必须找到并遵循自己将法则应用于个人境况的方式。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I also said that new entities were being formed, but in the framework of the spacious present all this is spontaneous. The contradiction seems a contradiction only on your terms. On my terms there is none. For practical purposes you may say, in truth on your own terms, that entities simply have had time to develop further personalities. But I want it understood that this is true only within your own time framework.
quotes.translation: 我也说过新的存有正在形成，但在广袤现在的架构中这一切都是自发的。矛盾只在你们的认知中才是矛盾。在我的认知中并无矛盾。就实际目的而言，你们可以按自己的认知如实说：存有只是有时间发展出更多人格。但我希望你们明白，这仅在你们自己的时间框架内成立。

quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: When this solution fails the impeding action will then materialize as a physical illness, or as an undesirable psychological condition. The dream experience however is much more richly varied than you suppose. There are ways which we shall discuss that will enable a personality to deal more effectively with the dream situation, and to use it more effectively with the dream situation, and to use it more effectively.
quotes.translation: 当这种解决方式失败时，阻碍性的行动就会物质化为身体疾病或不良心理状态。然而梦境体验远比你们想象的丰富多变。我们将讨论一些方法，使人格能更有效地处理梦境情境，并更有效地运用它。

quotes.text: In all instances of ill health, the psychic inner forces are being misdirected. The aim of medicine should then be to aid the inner self to direct its own energy along other lines. Now. With the above, the psychic forces may be misdirected in several main ways, and with several resulting malfunctions. Energy may not be properly directed toward releasing from the physical field of the body excess chemicals into other fields. A buildup of such chemicals can be deadly, leading to among other things forms of insanity, schizophrenia, and other disorders which show themselves in mental or personality symptoms.
quotes.translation: 在所有健康不良的案例中，内在心灵力量都被错误引导。医学的目标应是协助内在自我将其能量导向其他方向。现在，基于上述情况，心灵力量可能通过几种主要方式被错误引导，并导致若干功能失调。能量可能未被适当引导，以将体内过剩化学物质从物理场域释放到其他场域。这类化学物质的累积可能致命，导致精神错乱、精神分裂症及其他表现为精神或人格症状的失调。

quotes.text: The subconscious however is not so limited. If you consider the ego at the apex of the moment point, and imprisoned therefore within the realm of its own before-and-after, cause-and-effect experience, then you can imagine the subconscious reaching further outward and seizing upon many other moment points. It should be easy to see then why the focus of the ego is so sharp and brilliant. Within its limited scope there is intensity of stimuli and response. Indeed, the ego is that portion of the personality which is plunged into a specific and intense preoccupation with a given field of action or dimension.
quotes.translation: 然而潜意识并不如此受限。若你将自我视为时间点顶端的尖峰，因而被囚禁于其自身的前后因果经验领域，那么你可以想象潜意识向更远处延伸，捕捉许多其他时间点。由此便容易理解为何自我的焦点如此锐利明亮。在其有限范围内，刺激与反应具有强烈强度。事实上，自我正是人格中投入特定维度或行动领域、并与之产生强烈专注的那部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: To a lesser degree, you function along these lines in varying roles when you exist simultaneously as a member of a family, a member of a community, a nation, and as an artist or a writer. As you attempt to use your abilities so does the entity attempt to use his abilities, and he organizes his various personalities and to some extent directs their activities while still allowing them what you would call free will.
quotes.translation: 在较小程度上，当你同时作为家庭成员、社区成员、国家成员以及艺术家或作家存在时，你会沿着这些路线以不同角色运作。正如你试图运用自己的能力，存有也试图运用他的能力，他组织自己的各种人格，并在一定程度上指导它们的活动，同时仍允许它们拥有你们所谓的自由意志。
