quotes.text: For such material to be made meaningful to the conscious personality, a training of abilities along the lines of interpretation is definitely required in most cases. Such material is a part of what we termed the initial experience, which is of electrical nature, received through the mind, broken down there as explained, and then received by the brain where it is changed or interpreted to psychological symbol form.
quotes.translation: 要使这类材料对意识人格具有意义，在大多数情况下，确实需要沿着解读路线进行能力训练。这类材料是我们所称的初始经验的一部分，具有电性本质，通过心智接收，在那里按所述方式分解，然后由大脑接收，在那里被转化或解读为心理符号形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The very journey involved in self-discovery, the very self-questioning involved, is indeed part of the process of recovery. The energy being used in the maintenance of the ulcer will already begin to take new channels. The thoughts and anticipations of the personality have already begun to stray from the all important ulcer to the causes behind it, for in this case, as in many others, we find a strange phenomenon.
quotes.translation: 自我发现所涉及的旅程本身，自我质疑本身，确实是康复过程的一部分。用于维持溃疡的能量将已经开始转向新的渠道。人格的思想和预期已经开始从至关重要的溃疡转向其背后的原因，因为在这种情况下，如同许多其他情况一样，我们发现了一种奇怪的现象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Returning to a previous discussion, I would like to make it plain once more that dream images are not pseudo realities. They exist as fact, though in a different dimension from physical reality. Again, no one would deny the reality of psychological experience when it is felt by the waking personality. Yet such experience also does not have a physical reality, to the same degree that a definite physical object has.
quotes.translation: 回到之前的讨论，我想再次明确说明，梦境意象并非伪现实。它们作为事实存在，尽管处于与物质现实不同的维度。再次强调，当清醒人格感受到心理经验时，没有人会否认其现实性。然而，这类经验也不具有与明确物质对象相同程度的物质现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In very important aspects it always escapes you, though you are partially what it is. Men speak of having their own personalities, as if the personality were a thing that they had in their possession, a thing fairly permanent, a concrete, always-to-be-counted-on possession.
quotes.translation: 在非常重要的方面，它总是逃脱你的理解，尽管你部分地就是它。人们谈论拥有自己的人格，仿佛人格是他们拥有的一件东西，一件相当永久的东西，一件具体的、永远可以依赖的财产。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It dwells in the physical universe, but it can indeed also perceive and appreciate other realities. The ego is part of the personality, and as such it can partake of sturdier, heartier, more vivid realities. The personality can dwell, and does dwell, in many worlds at once.
quotes.translation: 它居于物质宇宙中，但确实也能感知和欣赏其他现实。自我是人格的一部分，因此它可以参与更坚实、更热烈、更生动的现实。人格可以同时居于许多世界，也确实居于许多世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I will discuss our dream material for a short while, for it is important that you understand it. For in the same way that dream images are projected outward from the personality, so also are thoughts projected, and all influences that extend from one personality to another.
quotes.translation: 我将简短讨论你们的梦材料，因为理解它很重要。正如梦意象从人格向外投射，思想也是如此，所有从一个人格延伸到另一个人格的影响亦然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The patterns evolve according to certain laws. They merely reflect the ideas behind them, and these ideas you must realize originate from different sources. They originate in the subconscious, it is true, but before this an idea quality is received by the inner senses. Sometimes this idea quality is received as intuition, where it sparks into the conscious mind. But the conscious ego is the primary manipulator of camouflage patterns and the obvious mover. The actual material from which camouflage patterns are formed is the vitality which exists and which is unconsciously used by your personalities.
quotes.translation: 这些模式根据特定法则演化。它们仅仅反映其背后的理念，而你必须明白这些理念源自不同来源。它们确实源于潜意识，但在此之前，一种理念特质已被内在感官接收。有时这种理念特质作为直觉被接收，在此处它闪入意识心智。但意识自我是伪装模式的主要操纵者和显性推动者。形成伪装模式的实际材料是存在的活力，它被你们的人格无意识地使用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is unfortunately true that the dominant present ego can be degraded on your plane to an amazing degree, through for example brainwashing and so forth. However this situation, while bad enough, is not as dire as you might think. When you are considering the human personality as a thing of this time only and destroyed by death, then its disintegration for any reason seems truly a tragic thing. And it is tragic.
quotes.translation: 不幸的是，主导的当下自我在你们层面可能退化到惊人程度，例如通过洗脑等手段。然而这种情况虽然糟糕，却并非如你所想那般可怕。当你将人类人格视为仅存于当下且被死亡摧毁之物时，那么它因任何原因的解体都显得真正悲惨。而它确实是悲惨的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Once the personality was blind, physically, and evolved a communication by means of the texture of a particular type of cloth, the hemp. He could, for he was then a male, he could by educating his fingers, distinguish the most slightest variation of roughness and texture.
quotes.translation: 这个人格曾盲目于物质层面，并通过某种特定布料——麻布的纹理演化出沟通方式。他当时是男性，能通过训练手指分辨最细微的粗糙度和纹理差异。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It can however be taught a very valuable function here. The first prerequisite is that the ego understand both the nature of its dependence upon the whole personality, and the nature of its peculiar directive abilities in relation with the physical universe. When there is good communication between all areas of the self, and this is a big when, then the judgment of the ego can be trusted to some greater extent.
quotes.translation: 然而在此处它可被教导一项极有价值的功能。首要前提是自我理解其依赖整体人格的本质，以及与物质宇宙相关的独特导向能力之本质。当自我所有区域间存在良好沟通时——这是个很大的前提——那么自我的判断可在更大程度上被信赖。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: To refrain from using energy is to have less of it. The use of energy is the basis for personality and the intensity of experience. There is no such thing as hoarding energy. The creative individual has more vivid dream experiences and more vivid waking experiences than other individuals. Creativity should not be considered as the property of those who work in the arts however, for it is not theirs exclusively.
quotes.translation: 避免使用能量会导致能量减少。能量的使用是人格与经验强度的基础。不存在囤积能量这种事。创造性个体比其他人拥有更生动的梦境体验和更生动的清醒体验。然而创造力不应被视为艺术工作者的专属属性，因为它并非他们独有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Because of some matters we have not yet discussed, at any rate deeply, it is possible to meet your own projection. You are accountable for acts committed during projections, of course, and these alter the personality as any acts do. If you have your wits about you, you can gain information concerning the future by studying your projection environment, if for any reason you suppose it to be ahead of you in time.
quotes.translation: 由于某些我们尚未深入探讨的问题，你有可能遇见自己的投射。当然，你要为投射期间的行为负责，这些行为会像任何其他行为一样改变人格。如果你保持警觉，可以通过研究投射环境来获取关于未来的信息——假如你出于某种原因认为该环境在时间上领先于你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: There are also other considerations. This is a last reincarnation. The personality could choose, and attempt, a partial recovery. There is no predestination. Until the personality itself has definitely decided whether or not to end a life situation, no one else can know.
quotes.translation: 还有其他考量。这是最后一次转世。人格可以选择并尝试部分恢复。没有宿命。除非人格本身明确决定是否结束某个生命情境，否则无人能知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The personality who sometimes speaks (Seth's larger entity), can change form at will. He was never imprisoned by believing that one personality existed within one form. To your way of thinking he would change form according to his mood; as he thinks, he is. (Emphasized.)
quotes.translation: 那个偶尔发言的人格（赛斯的较大本体）能随意改变形态。他从未被"一个人格只能存在于一个形态中"的信念所禁锢。以你们的思维方式，他会根据心情改变形态；他思即他在。（强调）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It will manipulate those memories in its own way, and alter them, and add to the pool of energy from which it has emerged. It is quite familiar with me, now, through your experience. At this moment, in your terms, its view of reality is more pure than your own. It is aware of you both as psychic entities, and retains strong and unclouded perceptions of your past relationship. These connections must pass from its memory as it matures. The memories can be retained, but the primary focus of activity and the intensity must deal with this personality, and with this existence as you think of it.
quotes.translation: 它将用自己的方式处理那些记忆，加以改变，并为其所源自的能量池增添能量。通过你们的经验，它现在已相当熟悉我。此刻，以你们的时间观而言，它对实相的看法比你们更纯粹。它视你们二人为灵性实体，并保留着对你们过去关系的清晰无碍的认知。随着它的成熟，这些联结必须从记忆中淡出。记忆可以保留，但活动的主要焦点与强度必须专注于这个当下的人格，以及你们所认知的此世存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: When man realizes that he creates his own image now, he will not find it so startling to believe that he creates other images in other times. Only after such a basis will the idea of reincarnation achieve its natural validity, and only when it is understood that the subconscious, certain layers of it, is a link between the present personality and past ones, will the theory of reincarnation be accepted as fact.
quotes.translation: 当人类意识到自己此刻正在创造自身形象时，就不会震惊于相信自己在其他时空创造其他形象。唯有在此基础之上，转世观念才能获得其自然效力；唯有当人们理解潜意识（其特定层面）是连接当前人格与过去人格的桥梁时，转世理论才会被接受为事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The consciousness of the personality has not left too soon, or unusually soon, as in your father's case, but stubbornly persists. It is as if an artist found the last painting showing up over and over in the next one. In such cases there is a lack of understanding. The inner identity does not understand that it is simply taking a different guise, fulfilling different obligations, or using unfulfilled energies.
quotes.translation: 人格的意识并未像你父亲案例那样过早或异常迅速地离开，而是顽固地持续存在。这好比一位艺术家发现上一幅画的痕迹反复出现在下一幅作品中。此类情况源于缺乏理解。内在本体不明白自己只是换了个不同伪装，履行不同义务，或运用未竟的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: However, a certain portion of the energy practically available to it is therefore spent in the maintenance of this impeding action. It is obvious therefore that less energy is available to the personality for actions more beneficial to the personality system as a whole.
quotes.translation: 然而，它实际可用的能量中有一部分因此耗费在维持这种阻碍作用上。显然，人格能够用于对整个人格系统更有益的行动的能量就更少了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The next chapter will deal with the basic methods of communication that are used by any consciousness, according to its degree, whether or not it is physical. This will lead up to the basic communication used by human personalities as you understand them, and point out these inner communications as existing independently of the physical senses (Pause), which are merely physical extensions of inner perception.
quotes.translation: 下一章将讨论任何意识根据其程度所使用的基本沟通方法，无论它是否具有物质形态。这将引出你们所理解的人类人格使用的基本沟通方式，并指出这些内在沟通独立于物质感官而存在（停顿），物质感官仅仅是内在感知的物质延伸。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now. Time then is an aid in one way, and it is used by multidimensional personalities for their own benefit. Use again the analogy of a road. Other dimensional personalities realize that they are perfectly free to leave the road, and that much more exists on all sides.
quotes.translation: 现在。时间在某种程度上是一种辅助工具，被多维度人格用于自身利益。再次使用道路的类比。其他维度的人格意识到他们完全自由地离开道路，并且周围存在着更多的事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Your own multidimensional personality is so endowed that it can have these experiences and still retain its identity. It is, of course, affected by the various plays in which it takes part. There is instant communication and an instant, if you prefer, feedback system.
quotes.translation: 你们自己的多维度人格被赋予如此能力，以至于它可以拥有这些体验，同时仍然保持其身份。当然，它受到它所参与的各种戏剧的影响。存在即时沟通，以及如果你愿意，一个即时反馈系统。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Human personality will reap benefits that now would seem unbelievable. An open-ended consciousness will imply far greater freedom. From birth, children will be taught that basic identity is not dependent upon the body, and that time as you know it is an illusion. The child will be aware of many of its past existences, and will be able to identify with the old man or woman that in your terms it will become.
quotes.translation: 人类人格将获得现在看似难以置信的益处。开放式的意识将意味着更大的自由。从出生起，孩子们将被教导基本身份不依赖于身体，而你们所认知的时间是一种幻觉。孩子将意识到自己的许多过去存在，并能认同那个在你们看来将成为的老人或老妇。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Our ego must have its feet upon the solid earth, it is out of its element, naked and in an unfamiliar environment, outside of the normal characteristics of physical existence. Its basic distrust of dream experience is necessary for the overall balance of the personality. Physical reality is a rock to which the ego must cling, and from which it achieves its power, energy, position, and reason for existence.
quotes.translation: 我们的自我必须立足于坚实的土地，它脱离了其元素，赤裸裸地处于不熟悉的环境中，超出了物质存在的正常特征。它对梦境体验的基本不信任对于人格的整体平衡是必要的。物质现实是自我必须紧抓的岩石，它从中获得其力量、能量、位置和存在的理由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We have been speaking of ascending selves in your terms. In your (underlined) terms, there are also, of course, descending selves, in that each atom and molecule has its own consciousness and contains all the characteristics inherent in consciousness itself. It is individualistic, it contains qualities you term personality qualities. It adopts form, gains experience, and develops through value fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 我们一直在以你们的时间术语讨论上升的自我。在你们（强调）的术语中，当然也存在下降的自我，因为每个原子和分子都拥有自己的意识，并包含意识本身固有的一切特性。它是个体化的，包含你们称为人格特质的品质。它采取形态，获取经验，并通过价值完成而发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is easier then for similar thoughts to follow. So in a larger sense , as personalities leave your system, as they travel into other dimensions, they also set up electrical pathways, and each personality who does so makes those paths easier for others. Do you see?
quotes.translation: 因此，类似的思想更容易随之而来。所以从更广的意义上说，当人格离开你们的系统，进入其他维度时，它们也会建立电力路径，而每个这样做的人格都会使这些路径对他人更容易通行。你明白吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The urge between the child's desire to do so, the basically kind nature, and the inability to carry out any such actions in any case, led to an over guarding ego. The ego did not appear rigid, for the inner seethings made it impossible, and spontaneity constantly erupted, but in ways the whole personality felt were the least dangerous.
quotes.translation: 孩子想要这样做的冲动、其本质上的善良天性，以及无论如何都无法实施任何此类行为的能力，导致了一个过度防御的自我。这个自我并未显得僵化，因为内在的翻腾使其无法做到，而自发性不断爆发，但却是以整个人格认为最不危险的方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: He also punishes himself rather unkindly, with sore muscles, incidentally. When he is working at full power he is quite beyond such physical symptoms. He is outside of them. This energy, the use of it, is a natural ability that is part of his personality, and he must use it. For him it results in a smooth performance, for when he does not use it fully then he is besieged by false starts and interruptions.
quotes.translation: 顺便提一下，他也相当不友善地惩罚自己，表现为肌肉酸痛。当他全力工作时，他完全超越这类身体症状。他处于这些症状之外。这种能量及其运用，是他与生俱来的能力，是其人格的一部分，他必须使用它。对他而言，这会导致流畅的表现，因为当他未能充分运用时，就会被错误的开始和中断所困扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In the experience of personalities outside of your system, events are not recalled nor held in such a manner. A personality outside of your system does not therefore recall events from so-called previous lives in any serial form. The events are held simultaneously.
quotes.translation: 在你们系统之外的人格经验中，事件并非以这种方式被回忆或保存。因此，你们系统之外的人格不会以任何序列形式回忆所谓的前世事件。这些事件是同时存在的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There are sessions dealing with these psychological bridge communications and it would be helpful if you read them. I want you to realize, however, the validity of the personality behind Adam, and the validity of Adam in relationship to you and to that personality.
quotes.translation: 有一些课程涉及这些心理桥梁沟通，如果你阅读它们会很有帮助。然而，我希望你认识到亚当背后人格的有效性，以及亚当相对于你和那个人格的有效性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I do not speak through Ruburt as one might through a telephone. Instead there is a psychological extension, a projection of characteristics on both of our parts, and this I use for our communications. Later I will explain how this psychological framework is created and maintained, for it is like a road that must be kept clear of debris. You would be much better off in reading this book if you asked yourself who you are, rather than asked who I am, for you cannot understand what I am unless you understand the nature of personality and the characteristics of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 我并非像人通过电话那样透过鲁柏说话。相反，存在一种心理延伸，一种我们双方特质的投射，我利用这种投射进行沟通。稍后我会解释这种心理架构如何被创造和维持——它就像一条必须保持畅通的道路。如果你在阅读本书时先自问"你是谁"，而非追问"我是谁"，你会获益更多，因为除非你理解人格的本质和意识的特性，否则你无法理解我是什么。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is, again, the ego's misguided attempt to stand apart to gain stability, that makes the ego react in such a manner. It fears loss of control and of discipline. But all appearances to the contrary, the emotions are natural controlling devices that in themselves aid discipline, since they allow for the spontaneous flow of energies outward. It is only when they are denied that they become explosive or dangerous to the personality. Then indeed they result in explosive barrages, ranting and shouting, organic and psychological illnesses, and of unfortunate manifestations.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，正是自我试图通过疏离来获得稳定的错误企图，导致它以这种方式反应。它害怕失去控制和纪律。但所有表象都恰恰相反——情绪本身就是自然的控制机制，它们本身就辅助纪律，因为情绪允许能量向外自发流动。只有当情绪被压抑时，它们才会变得具有爆炸性，或对人格构成危险。那时它们确实会导致爆发性的宣泄、咆哮、叫嚷、器质性和心理疾病，以及不幸的显化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The cults that have built up around such happenings are ludicrous, and in some cases unforgivable demonstrations of stupidity by well-meaning but imbecilic personalities. I dislike being so harsh and vindictive. However on a few occasions I have been involved, to my utter horror, on the other end of such performances. At a later date I will tell you about this. It is not important but it was distasteful.
quotes.translation: 围绕这类事件形成的崇拜团体荒谬至极，在某些情况下，这些善意但愚昧的人格所展现的愚蠢行径是不可原谅的。我不愿如此严厉和刻薄。然而有几次，令我极度惊恐的是，我竟被卷入这类表演的另一端。日后我会告诉你这件事。这并不重要，但令人作呕。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: And despite all comments to the contrary, this is by far the most difficult discipline; but without it the inner self is not secure in its journeys, and is like a boat with no harbor to receive it, and like the man without a country, with no place to return. The personality, to some （underline some） degree has been led astray by those who begin such a journey without first making certain of their return.
quotes.translation: 尽管有各种反对意见，这仍然是迄今为止最困难的纪律；但若没有它，内在自我在旅程中便不得安稳，如同没有港湾接纳的船只，又像没有祖国可归的人。人格在某种程度上已被那些尚未确保归途便踏上旅程的人引入歧途。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: (It must be emphasized that I did not know consciously that such an affair could even happen. I didn't know my abilities were that good, to tell the truth; and had no idea that there was any danger of acting as a medium without Seth. I used to worry that if Seth gave wrong data this would reflect on the legitimate nature of that personality. This time Seth was not present. Did this give me added freedom?
quotes.translation: （必须强调，我意识上根本不知道这种事可能发生。说实话，我不知道自己的能力有那么好；也完全没想过没有赛斯的情况下充当灵媒会有任何危险。我过去常担心，如果赛斯给出错误数据，这会反映那个合法人格的本质。这次赛斯不在场。这给了我额外的自由吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is no danger, and I will repeat this: There is no danger of dissociation grabbing a hold of him like some black, vague and furry monster, carrying him away to the Netherlands of hysteria, schizophrenia, or insanity... I have consistently advised contacts with the world at large, and I have advised you both to use your abilities to meet outside challenges. Withdrawal into dissociation as a hiding place from the world could, of course, have dire consequences. Certain personalities could, and have, fallen prey here, but with you, with Ruburt, this is not the case.
quotes.translation: 没有危险，我要重复：没有危险——解离不会像某个黑暗、模糊、毛茸茸的怪物般抓住他，把他拖到歇斯底里、精神分裂或疯狂的荷兰...我一贯建议与外界保持接触，也建议你们两人运用能力迎接外在挑战。当然，退入解离作为逃避世界的藏身之处，可能带来可怕后果。某些人格确实可能——也确实已经——在此沦陷，但对你和鲁柏而言，情况并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In a natural state, many children would die stillborn for the same reasons, or would be naturally aborted. There is a give-and-take between all elements of nature, so that such individuals often choose mothers, for example, who perhaps wanted the experience of pregnancy but not of birth -- where they choose the experience of the fetus but not necessarily [that] of the child. Often in such cases these are "fragment personalities," wanting to taste physical reality, but not being ready to deal with it. Each case is individual, however, so these are general statements.
quotes.translation: 在自然状态下，许多儿童会因相同原因胎死腹中，或自然流产。自然界的各元素之间存在相互给予与索取的关系，因此这类个体常会选择那些或许只想要怀孕体验而非生育体验的母亲——她们选择体验胎儿状态，却未必选择体验孩童状态。这类情况通常属于"片段人格"，渴望品尝物质实相，却尚未准备好应对它。不过每个案例都具有独特性，因此这些只是概括性陈述。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This time and particularly since adolescence ended he was able to let go the other types of greediness, letting the cigarette take place of all the rest. There is here also what I may call a sort of air panic, an insatiable taking in of air that the nervous puffing of a cigarette sometimes satisfies, even a basis in claustrophobia where the personality feels it is not getting enough air or is closed in.
quotes.translation: 这一时期，特别是青春期结束后，他得以放下其他类型的贪婪，让香烟取代其余一切。这里还存在一种我称之为"空气恐慌"的现象——一种对空气的贪得无厌的摄取，而香烟的神经质吞吐有时能缓解这种需求，甚至与幽闭恐惧症有关联，即人格感到无法获得足够空气或被封闭其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It made no difference to your history. The three men were part of one entity, gaining physical existence in one time. They were not born at the same date however. There are reasons why the entity did not return as one person. For one thing the full consciousness of an entity would be too strong for one physical vehicle. For another the entity wanted a more diversified environment than could otherwise be provided. The entity was born once as John the Baptist, and then he was born in two other forms. One of these is a personality that most stories of Christ refer to.
quotes.translation: 这对你们的历史毫无影响。这三人同属一个存有，在同一时间获得物质存在，但并非同日出生。该存有不以单一人物回归自有其因：其一，存有的完整意识对单一物质载具而言过于强大；其二，存有渴望比单一形式所能提供的更多元化的环境。该存有曾以施洗约翰的身份降生，随后又以另外两种形态降生。其中一种人格正是大多数基督故事所指涉的对象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This may cause bewilderment and disorientation to such a transforming personality. Later, so to speak, when entrance into another and higher is achieved, then such a higher-dimensioned personality may without difficulties of this sort communicate with your field.
quotes.translation: 这可能使此类转化中的人格感到困惑与迷失方向。可以这么说，当后来进入另一个更高维度时，这种高维度人格便能毫无障碍地与你们的场域沟通。

quotes.text: There is on the one hand a fear of demanding, and on the other hand a tendency to demand too much in personal relationships in which the other sex is involved. There is no commitment to an idea as such, and yet the personality is quite capable of such commitment.
quotes.translation: 一方面存在对索取的恐惧，另一方面在涉及异性的关系中又倾向于过度索取。这类人格对理念本身缺乏承诺，却又完全具备履行承诺的能力。

quotes.text: (From the ESP class session for April 20, 1971:) I am very afraid to tell [all of] you that I have forgotten what I considered to be secrets through the lives I have lived. I certainly know that like any of you I have not always been charitable in the past. I know that I have hated one parent or another. I know, certainly, that once I plundered in the wages of war. I do not come to you as someone who does not know what it is like to be human,26 and in those personality characteristics that I use when I speak to you, I show you that the emotional life continues....
quotes.translation: （摘自1971年4月20日ESP课记录：）我非常害怕告诉你们所有人，我已遗忘了在过往生命中视为秘密的事物。我当然知道，如同你们任何人一样，我过去并非始终慈悲。我知道我曾憎恨过某位父母。我当然知道，我曾参与过战争的掠夺。我并非以不知人间疾苦的姿态来到你们面前，26在我与你们交谈时所运用的人格特质中，我向你们展示：情感生活仍在延续……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: That which was is constantly taken into what you call the present. The ego may choose to use or not use various reactions. It may reject various reactions as a part of the past, for it is the ego alone who is concerned with past, present and future. The ego's denial of a reaction however does not cause the reaction to disappear from within the personality, at least as part of possible pattern reaction.
quotes.translation: 过去之物不断被纳入你们所谓的当下。自我可以选择利用或不利用各种反应。它可能将某些反应视为过去的一部分而加以排斥，因为唯有自我才关心过去、现在与未来。然而，自我对某一反应的否认并不会使该反应从人格中消失——至少作为可能模式反应的一部分时不会消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is true however to say that the memories of the physically-oriented ego take their place with memories that were once subconscious. I am speaking now of the psychological makeup of the survival personality. The memories remain in physical existence. There is no real distinction between psychological reality and physical reality. The physically-oriented ego manufactures this distinction of necessity.
quotes.translation: 但确实可以说，以物质为导向的自我的记忆，与曾经属于潜意识的记忆各安其位。我现在谈论的是生存人格的心理构成。这些记忆持续存在于物质实相中。心理实相与物质实相之间并无真正的区别。以物质为导向的自我出于必要才制造出这种区别。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The lag is partially the result of cues to action. These gradually lose their strength and as the personality, in a better state of mind, is no longer as sensitive to those cues. For a while it is still somewhat more sensitive, for example, to Moods or depressions that it would ordinarily sail through. The overall condition has indeed remarkably improved, as I told you, and there is no distortion here.
quotes.translation: 这种滞后部分源于行动线索。这些线索逐渐失去效力，当人格处于较佳心境时，便不再对这些线索那么敏感。例如，有一段时间它仍会对原本能轻松度过的情绪或抑郁较为敏感。如我所言，整体状况确实已显著改善，此处并无扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now as you know, I am a teacher, and interested in instruction. I am not a doctor. This means that my approach to a given problem will be vastly different than the approach of another personality, even on my plane, who has different interests. Therefore I am concerned with, and I emphasize, the importance of inner knowledge, and see physical symptoms for what they are--a reflection of an inner reality.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，我是一位教师，专注于教导。我并非医生。这意味着我处理特定问题的方式，将与我所在层面中其他具有不同兴趣的人格截然不同。因此，我关注并强调内在知识的重要性，并将身体症状视为其本质——内在实相的一种反映。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I am explaining this matter rather thoroughly because we will be getting to matters concerning the entity and its personality developments. The entity, for example, works with the same sort of individual cooperation, and uses building blocks of energy in much the same manner, that the atoms and molecules in the physical world combine to form cells, organs, and the whole structure of the physical body.
quotes.translation: 我之所以相当详尽地解释此事，是因为我们将涉及存有及其人格发展的议题。例如，存有运用与物质世界中原子分子结合成细胞、器官及整个身体结构相同的方式，进行个体间的协作，并以极为相似的方式运用能量积木。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Theoretically, the self is unlimited, if you will recall. The ego within your field is limited because of the nature of its rigidity. The ego operates as a partitioning agent. It directs and uses the abilities of the personality for manipulation in the physical universe. It can mobilize a smaller or larger amount of these energies according to its own strength. It has a small focus but a powerful one.
quotes.translation: 若你记得，理论上自我是无限的。但在你们领域中的自我因僵化本质而受限。自我扮演着划分者的角色。它引导并运用人格的能力以操控物质宇宙。它能根据自身强度调动或多或少的这些能量。它的焦点虽小，却极为强大。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. All of this does not mean that personalities within other systems do not construct their own kind of time structures, but in all of these cases the personalities realize quite well that the structures are adapted for the sake of organization of experience.
quotes.translation: 现在。这一切并不意味着其他系统内的人格不构建自己的时间结构，但在所有这些情况下，人格都相当清楚这些结构是为了组织经验而改编的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is no particular and definite line between the ego and the personality and the inner self. They must merely be discussed in such terms. There is, believe it or not, no particular and specific and definite boundary between what is self and not self. If we isolate such portions of reality for the sake of discussion, such isolation is artificial, and in no way affects the nature of reality itself.
quotes.translation: 自我、人格与内在自体之间并没有明确的分界线。它们只是必须用这样的术语来讨论。信不信由你，在自我与非自我之间并没有明确、具体且特定的界限。如果我们为了讨论而隔离现实的这些部分，这种隔离是人为的，绝不会影响现实本身的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Form adopts mass within the physical system, but form is not dependent upon it. Form can exist and does exist without mass and without physical matter. Form, like time, is an aid, an organization of experience. Form is used as time structures may be used, but multidimensional personalities know that they construct form as they may construct various time systems as an aid toward organizing perception.
quotes.translation: 形态在物质系统内采用质量，但形态并不依赖质量。形态可以存在且确实存在，无需质量或物质。形态如同时间，是一种辅助，一种经验的组织方式。形态被使用的方式如同时间结构可能被使用，但多维度人格知道他们构建形态，就像他们可能构建各种时间系统作为组织感知的辅助一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The topmost layer of the subconscious contains predominantly present associations, but in these are mixed and interwoven associations which have their origin elsewhere. These may be called self-unifying associations, since merely by their presence in the uppermost layers of the subconscious they provide a unifying sense of psychic continuity; of which however the ego is not aware. For one thing, there are basic similarities between an individual's personality in various existences, so that quite naturally many associations of the same nature will arise.
quotes.translation: 潜意识的最上层主要包含当下的联想，但这些联想中混合交织着源自别处的联想。这些可称为自体统一联想，因为它们仅凭存在于潜意识的最上层，就提供了心灵连续性的统一感；然而自我对此并不察觉。一方面，个体在不同存在中的人格之间存在基本相似性，因此很自然地会产生许多相同性质的联想。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have told you that through many existences you don egos for the purposes set by the inner self. It is necessary of course that you believe in your role. The difficulty is that you must believe in your role, and yet also realize that it is a role that you, the inner self, have chosen. Otherwise your connections with the inner self are nearly forgotten. The ego forgets that it is only a part of a much more complete personality structure, and therefore cuts itself off from abilities and insights that are necessary, even for its own comfort and stability.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你，通过许多存在，你为了内在自体设定的目的而穿上自我。当然，你必须相信你的角色。困难在于你必须相信你的角色，同时也要认识到这是你——内在自体——所选择的角色。否则你与内在自体的联系几乎会被遗忘。自我忘记了自己只是一个更完整人格结构的一部分，因此切断了与必要的能力和洞见的联系，这些甚至对其自身的舒适和稳定都是必需的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You are meant to understand the nature of your inner self, and to manifest it outward. As this is done, the exterior circumstances should change for the better as the inner self becomes more aware of its own nature and capabilities. Theoretically, then, in each life you would become stronger, healthier, wealthier, and wiser, but it does not work that way, for many reasons. As mentioned earlier, many personalities adopt different kinds of experiences, focusing upon development in certain specific areas, and ignoring others perhaps for a series of lives.
quotes.translation: 你本应理解内在自体的本质，并将其向外彰显。随着这一过程的进行，外在环境应会改善，因为内在自体对其自身本质和能力变得更加觉察。理论上，在每一生中你会变得更强壮、更健康、更富有、更智慧，但由于许多原因，情况并非如此。如前所述，许多人格采用不同类型的经验，专注于某些特定领域的发展，而可能忽略其他领域，甚至一连串的转世。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Communications exist between all portions of the self, and all parts of the personality; or parts of the whole self, rather, operate as what you may call a supraself. Ruburt has referred to this as a supraconsciousness. This is the identity, the whole identity, of the various portions of the self that operate within various systems. To this supraself, of course, your ego future can be easily viewed.
quotes.translation: 自我的所有部分以及人格的所有部分之间都存在沟通；或者更确切地说，整个自我的各个部分运作着，形成你们所谓的超我。鲁柏曾将此称为超意识。这是在不同系统中运作的自我各个部分的身份，即整体身份。对于这个超我而言，你们自我未来的景象当然可以轻易被看见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I do not want to take any more time with this episode. I should emphasize however that full control is possible, and with practice will be achieved rather easily. Ruburt's personality is so constructed that he would not allow himself to take any real chances.
quotes.translation: 我不想再花时间讨论这个插曲。然而，我应该强调，完全的控制是可能的，并且通过练习可以相当容易地实现。鲁柏的人格结构使他不会允许自己冒任何真正的风险。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Physical reality is therefore glimpsed by other kinds of personalities in other systems, from their own unique viewpoint. Peering at it from this angle, so to speak, you would not recognize it as your own home system. From some of these viewpoints, your physical matter has little or no permanency, while to others your own thoughts have a shape and form, perceived by observers but not by yourselves.
quotes.translation: 因此，其他系统中的其他类型人格，会从他们独特的视角瞥见物质实相。打个比方，从这个角度窥视，你们不会认出这是自己的家园系统。从某些视角来看，你们的物质几乎没有或根本没有恒久性，而对另一些视角而言，你们自己的思想具有形状和形式，能被观察者感知，但你们自己却无法察觉。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The third personality of Christ will indeed be known as a great psychic, for it is he who will teach humanity to use those inner senses that alone make true spirituality possible. Slayers and victims will change roles as reincarnational memories rise to the surface of consciousness. Through the development of these abilities, the sacredness of all life will be intimately recognized and appreciated.
quotes.translation: 基督的第三人格确实会被视为一位伟大的通灵者，因为他将教导人类运用那些内在感官，唯有这些感官才能使真正的灵性成为可能。随着转世记忆浮现到意识表面，杀戮者和受害者将互换角色。通过这些能力的发展，所有生命的神圣性将被深切地认识和珍视。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: She is sincere, and sincerely deluded, a psychopathic personality who delights in arousing fear in others. (Pause.) And for our romantic Boston friend (smile), the following: at this time you are (smile) not wasting your time with your fine gentleman friend. No more should be read into that last sentence than I have given you, however, for I will not predict for you the outcome of the relationship.
quotes.translation: 她是真诚的，但也真诚地受骗，是一个喜欢在他人心中激起恐惧的病态人格。（停顿。）至于我们那位浪漫的波士顿朋友（微笑），以下是给你的信息：此刻你（微笑）并没有在与你的那位优秀绅士朋友浪费时间。然而，不要在我刚才那句话中解读出更多含义，因为我不会为你预测这段关系的结局。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The validity and quality of any communications will rest primarily with the energy with which you are willing to develop your abilities. Halfway measures will not give you clear reception, nor reliable material. The systems with which we deal are too delicate, too finely balanced, to operate with any efficiency unless there is constant study, application, and devotion to the attempt. I tell you this because you are young, and must make your own decision. Halfway measures are not beneficial to the overall personality. They can lead to difficulties.
quotes.translation: 任何沟通的有效性和质量，主要取决于你愿意投入多少能量来发展你的能力。半心半意无法带来清晰的接收，也无法获得可靠的资料。我们处理的系统过于精微、过于精细平衡，除非有持续的学习、应用和对尝试的投入，否则无法有效运作。我告诉你这些，是因为你年轻，必须自己做决定。半心半意对整体人格没有益处，反而可能导致困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: As a personality learns to use its abilities it becomes more aware of complexity, and able to operate as an identity within it. Since I have known your time it is meaningful for me, though it no longer hampers me. I merely understand its reality for you. Other psychological structures have not been initially aware of this peculiar relationship between your physical framework and your time concept.
quotes.translation: 当人格学会运用自身能力时，它会更清晰地觉察到复杂性，并能在其中作为本体运作。既然我已知晓你们的时间概念，这对我就有了意义，尽管它已不再束缚我。我只是理解它对你而言的真实性。其他心理结构最初并未意识到你们物理框架与时间概念之间的这种特殊关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: These may come to the foreground in bad circumstances, and actually save the basic personality itself from what would certainly be disintegration. It is as if the basic personality throws the dirty dogs bone after bone, all the while saving the real morsel.
quotes.translation: 在恶劣环境中，这些特质可能浮出水面，实际上能拯救基本人格本身免于必然的解体。这就像基本人格不断抛出骨头给恶犬，同时保全真正的精华。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: We will later be concerned more deeply with this transparent mobility, for it operates within all systems. And without it your own physical system would not exist. When the nature and behavior of energy as it is seen in action is understood, and when it is applied to the mobility of the human personality, then such sessions as ours will be taken for granted, though this I admit will take a while.
quotes.translation: 我们稍后将更深入地探讨这种透明的流动性，因为它运作于所有系统之中。没有它，你们自身的物理系统就不会存在。当能量在行动中的本质与行为被理解，并应用于人类人格的流动性时，像我们这样的课程就会被视为理所当然——尽管我承认这需要时间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The adjustments necessary are not all on your part, but your adjustments can initiate hers. You are concerned, and have made efforts, but you are better equipped, simply because of your personality structure, to make these efforts. She is at this point like a child in the woods, but the potentialities are there for an excellent relationship. We will take a break or end the session, as you prefer.
quotes.translation: 必要的调整并不全在你这边，但你的调整可以引发她的调整。你确实关心并付出了努力，但仅凭你的人格结构，你更有能力做出这些努力。她此刻如同林中的孩童，但建立卓越关系的潜能已然存在。我们可以休息或结束课程，随你选择。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It must, of course, succeed to some extent, or the physically oriented personality as you know it would not exist. The ego is of course a part of action. There are endless levels of action however, which the ego does not perceive. It is possible for the inner and outer egos to merge to some extent, and this merging when it occurs does indeed represent the formation of a new kind of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 它当然必须在某种程度上成功，否则你所知的物理导向人格就不会存在。自我自然是行动的一部分。然而，存在自我无法感知的无穷层次行动。内在自我与外在自我有可能在某种程度上融合，这种融合发生时，确实代表了一种新型意识的形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Beneath these root assumptions however portions of the self perceive physical reality in an entirely different fashion, free of the tyranny of objects and material form. Here you experience concepts directly, without the need for symbolisms. Here you experience the spacious present directly. Here you have knowledge of your past personalities, and know that they exist simultaneously with your own.
quotes.translation: 然而在这些根本假设之下，自我的某些部分以全然不同的方式感知物理实相，摆脱了物体与物质形态的暴政。在此你直接体验概念，无需象征符号。在此你直接体验广袤的当下。在此你知晓自己过去的人格，并知道它们与你的当下同时存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The decision is your own according to your understanding. You cannot be hounded from one level of reality to another by a fear that you do not understand. You cannot be threatened in this life by fears from your early childhood, or by so-called past existences, unless you so thoroughly believe in the nature of fear that you allow yourselves to be conquered by it. Each of your personalities are free to accept and develop, from the miraculous banks of reality, those experiences and emotions that you want, and to reject those you do not want.
quotes.translation: 决定权在你手中，取决于你的理解。你无法被一种你不理解的恐惧从一个实相层面驱赶到另一个。你无法被童年早期的恐惧或所谓的前世经历所威胁，除非你如此彻底地相信恐惧的本质，以至于允许自己被它征服。你的每个人格都可以自由地从实相的神奇宝库中接受并发展你所想要的经验和情感，同时拒绝那些你不想要的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If your mother or father found continued life together completely unbearable, which incidentally they do not, then in all likelihood one of their entities would suggest through the inner senses that the relationship be discontinued. If the advice was not heeded, and as the situation grew worse, a danger point would arise beyond which the personalities could not safely continue their association.
quotes.translation: 如果你的母亲或父亲发现共同生活完全无法忍受——顺便说一句，他们并非如此——那么他们的存有之一很可能会通过内在感官建议结束这段关系。如果建议未被采纳，且情况恶化，就会达到一个危险点，超过这个点，人格就无法安全地继续他们的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It does originate in the inner self that exists in your world, but is not of your world. The inner self-conscious ego as I have said--and this is for Philip's edification--the inner self-conscious ego can be compared to another face, looking out upon a different world. And yet it is the driving personality and force in your world, and you use its energy as you construct your camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 它确实源自存在于你世界中的内在自己，但并不属于你的世界。内在自我意识自我——正如我所说，这是为了菲利普的启发——内在自我意识自我可以比作另一张面孔，注视着另一个不同的世界。然而，它却是你世界中的驱动人格和力量，你在构建你的伪装模式时使用它的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The human personality has no limitations except those which it accepts. There are no limits to its development or growth, if it will accept no limits. There are no boundaries to the self except those boundaries which the self arbitrarily creates and perpetuates. There is no veil through which human perception cannot see, except the veil of ignorance which is pulled down by the materialistic ego.
quotes.translation: 人类人格除了它自己所接受的限制外，没有任何限制。如果它不接受任何限制，其发展或成长就没有极限。自我除了它自己任意创造并延续的边界外，没有其他边界。没有人类知觉无法穿透的面纱，除了被物质自我拉下的无知面纱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: While there is a portion of All That Is, that is aware of itself as you, for example, a portion that is indeed focused within your existence, whose energy is directed within you, and to whom you can call for help when necessary, there is also an overall god-personality that is aware of itself also as something that is more than the sum of its creations. This is All That Is, in the deepest sense.
quotes.translation: 虽然万有中有一部分意识到它自己就是你——例如，有一部分确实聚焦在你的存在中，其能量导向你之内，并且你在必要时可以向它求助——但也存在一个整体的神性人格，它意识到自己不仅仅是其创造的总和。这就是万有，在最深层的意义上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Such resulting knowledge would be practical. I am not only speaking in terms of your limited sense of what is practical, but what is truly practical for your personality is the full use of your abilities, and not stunting them through studied hypocrisies.
quotes.translation: 由此产生的知识将是实用的。我不仅是在你们有限的实用意义上说话，而且对你的人格真正实用的是充分运用你的能力，而不是通过刻意的虚伪来阻碍它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: That is the meaning of spirituality; and as I have told you before, if I could I would do a merry dance about the room to show you that your vitality is not dependent upon a physical image. It is not dependent upon your youth, it is not dependent upon your body. It rings and sings through the universe, and through your entire personality. It is a sense of joy that makes all creativity probable.
quotes.translation: 这就是灵性的意义；正如我之前告诉你们的，如果可能的话，我宁愿在房间里欢快地跳舞，向你们展示你们的活力并不依赖于物质形象。它不依赖于你们的青春，也不依赖于你们的身体。它通过宇宙、通过你们整个的人格回响歌唱。这是一种让一切创造力成为可能的喜悦感。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now I will let you end the session, but this is information that is highly valuable. The spontaneous self is also highly relieved that it is on good terms again with the ego, and that the personality is establishing itself and the main work is beginning.
quotes.translation: 现在我将让你们结束这堂课，但这是极具价值的信息。自发性自我也大大松了一口气，因为它再次与自我和睦相处，人格正在确立自身，主要工作即将开始。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The part of you who dreams is the "I" as much as the part of you that operates in any other manner. The part of you who dreams is the part of you who breathes. And this part is certainly as legitimate and actually more necessary to you as a whole unit, as far as survival on your physical plane is concerned, than the part that also plays bridge or Scrabble. It would seem ludicrous to suppose that such a vital matter as breathing would be left to a subordinate and almost completely divorced poor-relative sort of a lesser personality.
quotes.translation: 你们做梦的那部分与以任何其他方式运作的那部分一样，都是"我"。做梦的那部分就是呼吸的那部分。就你们在物质层面的生存而言，这部分作为整体单元，当然与玩桥牌或拼字游戏的那部分同样合法，实际上对你们更为必要。如果认为呼吸这样至关重要的事情会交给一个次要的、几乎完全分离的、像穷亲戚般的次等人格来处理，那将是荒谬可笑的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now, in so far as everything is basically action, the personality is affected by outside agencies, but in a most basic manner it chooses those actions which it will accept or reject.
quotes.translation: 既然一切基本上都是行动，人格会受到外在因素的影响，但从最根本的层面来说，它选择接受或拒绝哪些行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We will use an analogy for its excellent implications. It is as if the personality in sleep projected out of himself bits of himself, of his own physical matter, thinned out, stretched into an amazing plasticity; plastic properties that can change instantly from one form to another. He goes out with these portions of himself, but because of the nature of reality projections cannot be recalled.
quotes.translation: 我们将用一个极具启发性的比喻。仿佛睡眠中的人格从自身投射出自己的一部分，即自身物质的一部分，这些物质被稀释、拉伸成惊人的可塑性；这种可塑特性可以瞬间从一种形态转变为另一种形态。他带着自身的这些部分外出，但由于实相投射的本质，这些投射无法被召回。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Others of a more placid nature will take their problems one at a time. Rest periods may also be taken, and they are highly therapeutic. For example, an excellent, satisfying life with a minimum of problems may be chosen either as a prelude to a life of concentrated challenge or as a self-adopted reward for a previous difficult life. Those that thoroughly enjoy the physical medium, without being obsessed by it, however, do very well indeed. The "laws" of reincarnation are adapted by the individual personalities to suit themselves.
quotes.translation: 其他性情更平和的人会一次处理一个问题。也可以安排休息时段，这些时段具有高度疗愈性。例如，可以选择一个问题最少、令人满意且充实的生活，作为集中挑战人生的前奏，或作为对先前艰难人生的自我奖励。那些充分享受物质媒介却不受其困扰的人，确实会过得很好。转世的"法则"会被个体人格根据自身情况加以调整。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The personality also contains good intellectual capacities, and he should examine psychic experience in the light of his intelligence also. There are truths which the intellect cannot perceive, but the intellect knows the ego, and represents a firm and reliable pathway between the inner self and the ego; and psychic experience--I repeat, psychic experience--will not suffer from such scrutiny.
quotes.translation: 人格也包含良好的智力能力，他同样应该运用自己的智力来检视通灵经验。有些真理是智力无法感知的，但智力了解自我，代表着内在自我与自我之间一条坚实可靠的通道；而通灵经验——我重复一遍，通灵经验——不会因这种审视而受损。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You need the excitement vivid in the pursuit, but this excitement will be increased by far when your energy is used to perfect and develop your own personality. You are in effect putting the responsibility for your own development where it does not belong, and turning your destiny over to another person in a very real manner, in order to escape taking full responsibility for your own destiny.
quotes.translation: 你需要追求中的生动兴奋，但当你的能量用于完善和发展自己的人格时，这种兴奋会大大增加。实际上，你正在把自身发展的责任推给不该承担的人，并以一种非常真实的方式将自己的命运交给另一个人，以逃避对自己命运承担全部责任。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This will then allow us to proceed into the relationship between the waking and sleeping personality, and discover the many ways in which the personality's aims and goals are not only reflected but sometimes achieved in and through the dream condition.
quotes.translation: 这将使我们能够进一步探讨清醒人格与睡眠人格之间的关系，并发现人格的目标与宗旨不仅被反映在梦境状态中，有时甚至在其中得以实现的多种方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now there is even something like the idea of a personality god, but hardly in the terms used by theologians. The personality of God, as it is generally conceived is again a one-dimensional concept based upon man's small knowledge of his own psychology.
quotes.translation: 现在甚至存在类似人格神的概念，但几乎不是神学家所用的术语。通常所构想的神的人格，再次是基于人类对自己心理学的浅薄认知而形成的一维概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Dream dramas are not nebulous theater-like productions. Their own dimensions, in their way, are every bit as valid as those of waking life. They are as coherent. They affect the self sometimes to an even greater degree. The dream personalities are indeed fragments, projections of the self, all working out various roles, seeking various experiences, searching for solutions and gratifications.
quotes.translation: 梦剧并非模糊的剧场式产物。它们自身的维度，就其方式而言，与清醒生活的维度同样真实。它们同样连贯。它们对自体的影响有时甚至更为深刻。梦中人格确实是碎片，是自体的投射，都在扮演各种角色，寻求各种体验，寻找解决方案和满足感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now I understand that to one closely and daily involved with the woman, it is difficult to see purpose or reason in the condition. Since the egotistical knowledge of the woman does not include this data, there are of course difficulties here also. But the inner self of the woman knows that in facing such a condition and finding nevertheless some moments of joy, even some compassion for others, that the personality has satisfied many of those feelings of inadequacy from the past existence. (One minute pause, eyes closed.)
quotes.translation: 现在我明白，对于一个每天与这位女性密切相处的人来说，很难在这种状况中看到目的或理由。由于这位女性的自我认知并不包含这些数据，这里当然也存在困难。但这位女性的内在自体知道，在面对这样的状况时，仍能找到片刻的喜悦，甚至对他人的同情，人格已经满足了前世中许多那些不足感。（闭眼停顿一分钟。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: He becomes trapped by his own artificially-divided self. He looks for gods, anything at all, to explain perfectly natural functions that belong to him. This beautifully absolves him in his own eyes from all responsibility, but it does not. I have been speaking here only, if you will believe it, of personalities in their particular lives as they operate on your plane, and I have much to say.
quotes.translation: 他被自己人为分割的自我所困。他寻找神祇或任何事物，只为解释那些本属于他的完全自然的功能。这在他自己眼中巧妙地免除了他的一切责任，但事实并非如此。如果你愿意相信，我在此只谈论人格在你们层面运作时的特定生命，而我还有许多话要说。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: However, when it is enabled to let go its preoccupation with the camouflage universe, it can receive and be aware of data received by the inner senses. Such data does not have to be retained on a subconscious level. The conscious personality can be trained to receive, interpret and retain such knowledge. Otherwise such knowledge would be relatively without value in your camouflage universe.
quotes.translation: 然而，当它能够放下对伪装宇宙的执念时，便能接收并觉察内在感官所获取的资料。这类资料不必保留在潜意识层面。有意识的人格可以被训练来接收、诠释并保存这类知识。否则，这类知识在你们的伪装宇宙中将相对毫无价值。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Any art form touches the generations. Karma can be worked out in many ways, and here again we return to Mark's earlier male oriented, aggressive personality. This time, through the creation of beauty in paintings, he more than makes up for past errors; not only because paintings certainly should possess beauty, but because they instill positive creative thoughts in the mind of the beholder.
quotes.translation: 任何艺术形式都能触动世代。业力可以通过多种方式化解，而这里我们再次回到马克早期那偏向男性、侵略性的人格。这一次，通过绘画创造美，他不仅弥补了过去的错误——不仅因为画作当然应具备美感，更因为它们能在观者心中注入积极的创造性思想。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now, if you err, it is far less dangerous to err on the side of spontaneity, given your personalities, than it is to use too much restraint. Too much restraint could eventually make the abilities inoperable. Too much spontaneity at worst could only cause some embarrassing moments. I am speaking of your personal cases only. The ability grows as it is used. This cannot be stressed too highly.
quotes.translation: 现在，如果你们犯错，以你们的人格特质而言，宁可因自发性而犯错，也远比过度克制危险得多。过度克制终将使能力无法运作。而过度自发性最坏的情况，也只会造成一些尴尬时刻。我仅针对你们个人的情况而言。能力在使用中成长，这一点再怎么强调也不为过。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: When we make contact his personality and consciousness in concentrated form makes its journey, in your terms like a speck in space, the consciousness reduced to its essence, and from this experience we then let him fall back into the physical system. (Pause.) Children's blocks then become massive by contrast. It was an experience in concepts, and therefore an advance on your parts. (Smile.)
quotes.translation: 当我们建立联系时，他的人格与意识以浓缩形态进行旅程——用你们的话说，如同空间中的一个微粒，意识缩减至本质。从这经验中，我们让他落回物质系统。（停顿。）相比之下，孩童的积木变得巨大。这是一次概念上的体验，因此是你们层面的进步。（微笑。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The letter that Ruburt has written is significant in ways that you have not seen. (Pause.) Mr. Edwards admits that he calls upon surviving personalities, healers who have survived death in your terms. In the past Ruburt would not admit, basically, that such survival was a fact, much less ask for help from such quarters.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏写的那封信，其重要性你们尚未察觉。（停顿。）爱德华兹先生承认他召唤的是存活的人格——以你们的话说，是死后存活的疗愈者。过去鲁柏基本上不愿承认这种存活是事实，更遑论向这类存在求助了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Did those "genetically inferior," for example, have the right to reproduce?1 Illness was thought to come like a storm, the result of physical forces against which the individual had little recourse. The "new" Freudian ideas of the unsavory unconscious led further to a new dilemma, for it was then--as it is now--widely believed that as the result of experiences in infancy the subconscious, or unconscious, might very well sabotage the best interests of the conscious personality, and trick it into illness and disaster.
quotes.translation: 例如，那些"基因低劣"者是否有权繁衍后代？疾病曾被视为如风暴般降临，是个人几乎无法抗拒的物理力量所致。弗洛伊德关于"不洁潜意识"的新观念进一步引发了新的困境——因为当时（正如现在）普遍认为，婴儿时期的经历会导致潜意识或下意识很可能破坏意识人格的最大利益，诱使其陷入疾病与灾难。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I spoke, for example, of the acquiescence of action at certain levels to any kind of stimuli, indiscriminately, whether painful or pleasurable. Without this basic acquiescence, actions would not have been given the freedom to break patterns down and evolve new ones of them. This is not necessarily a more primitive aspect. It is simply a basic characteristic of action at certain levels, and the human personality, with its complicated ego structure, is nevertheless composed of many actions that operate at this level.
quotes.translation: 例如，我曾提到行动在特定层面会不加区分地默许任何刺激——无论是痛苦还是愉悦。没有这种基本默许，行动便无法获得打破旧模式、演化新模式的自由。这未必是更原始的面向，而只是行动在特定层面的基本特性。人类人格虽具有复杂的自我结构，却仍由许多在此层面运作的行动所构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Ruburt acts as a receiver when I speak, and so I must make certain adjustments so that my message can be channeled under conditions that involve, among other things, his nervous system and physical apparatus. That evening, through using what I call interior sound,5 I let Ruburt become acquainted with the power at my disposal so that he could realize that it did, basically now, come from beyond his personality as he understands it.
quotes.translation: 当我说话时，鲁柏充当接收器，因此我必须做出某些调整，使我的讯息能在涉及其神经系统与身体装置等条件下被传递。那晚，通过运用我所谓的"内在声音"，我让鲁柏得以熟悉我所掌控的力量，使他能意识到——这力量本质上确实源自他认知中的人格之外。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 711
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The psychic centers would be activated more frequently, and the entire identity of the personality would be better strengthened and maintained. The resulting mobility and flexibility of consciousness would cause an added dividend in increased conscious concentration, and fatigue levels would always remain below danger points. A greater equalization, both physical and mental, would result.
quotes.translation: 灵性中心将被更频繁地激活，人格的整体身份将得到更好的强化与维系。由此产生的意识流动性与灵活性，将带来意识专注度提升的额外红利，而疲劳程度将始终维持在危险阈值之下。身心两方面都将达成更均衡的状态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I do not mean to speak as if there were any great danger involved. It is only that I want him to progress at a steady rate, with the overall personality in good balance all the while. The personality must learn to understand and use the abilities.
quotes.translation: 我并非暗示存在任何重大危险。只是希望他能以稳定速率进步，同时保持整体人格的良好平衡。人格必须学会理解并运用这些能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now. First of all, my greeting to Marleno. She is always welcome. There is on her part a block, that operates in much the same manner as Ruburt's ego on occasion, as far as our sessions are concerned. This is caused by an inner willingness to believe, though this is a bad word, in the legitimate nature of my existence; a willingness however that is sometimes so desperate, if you will forgive the term, and so wholehearted, that it sets up automatic barriers on the part of other portions of the personality.
quotes.translation: 现在。首先，向玛莲诺致意。她始终受欢迎。就我们的课程而言，她存在一个障碍——其运作方式有时与鲁柏的自我相似。这源于一种内在的相信意愿（尽管"相信"一词不妥），即对我存在的正当本质的认可；然而这种意愿有时过于迫切（请原谅这个用词），过于全心全意，反而导致人格其他部分自动设下屏障。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The focus of attention cannot be as strong as it was in physical life, hence the inability to deal with energy in those terms. The personality insists on behaving as if it were in the physical condition however, and out of habit attempts to construct a physical form. He is not imprisoned within this pseudo image, since he forms it, but the energy used is misdirected and largely futile.
quotes.translation: 注意力的集中程度无法像在物质生活中那样强烈，因此无法以那种方式处理能量。然而，人格坚持表现得仿佛仍处于物质状态，并出于习惯试图构建一个物质形态。他并非被囚禁于这个伪形象中，因为他塑造了它，但所使用的能量被误导且基本徒劳。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: When you sleep the ego becomes unfocused, but still present, and its goals and attitudes to some extent do color dream experiences. The survival personality has somewhat the same relationship to the ego as the dreaming personality has to it now.
quotes.translation: 当你睡眠时，自我变得不聚焦，但仍存在，其目标和态度在某种程度上确实会为梦境体验着色。生存人格与自我的关系，有些类似于现在做梦人格与自我的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now. As you know, the inner senses belong to that part of human personality that is not physically materialized. At various times I have spoken concerning the reality of what you refer to as the astral body. You must remember that over a year ago we discussed tissue capsules. The astral body is of this nature. It is composed of electromagnetic components. It is simply the unseen self.
quotes.translation: 现在。如你所知，内在感官属于人类人格中未物质化的部分。我曾多次谈及你们所谓的星光体的实相。你必须记得，一年多前我们讨论过组织囊。星光体具有这种性质。它由电磁成分组成，它只是那不可见的自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There will also be suggestions given as to needed adjustments on the part of the personality during his business hours. In other words, there are small but important adjustments that can be made within the framework of his present working life. Also perhaps an adjustment here on the woman's part that will aid him.
quotes.translation: 还会给出关于人格在工作时间内所需调整的建议。换句话说，在他当前工作生活的框架内，可以做出微小但重要的调整。或许女性方面也需要做出调整来帮助他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: On the other hand, all probable existence is open, and consciousness can make a door where there was none in those terms. There are guides and teachers in this time of choosing and decision, to point out alternatives and to explain the nature of existence. All personalities are not at the same level of development. There are therefore advanced teachers and teachers at "lower" levels.
quotes.translation: 另一方面，所有可能的存在都是开放的，意识可以在那些术语中原本无门之处造出一扇门。在这个选择与决定的时刻，有向导和老师指出替代方案并解释存在的本质。所有人格并非处于相同的发展水平。因此有高级教师和"较低"层次的教师。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The particular atmosphere surrounding your personalities just prior to the animals' deaths was destructive, short-circuited and filled with inner panics. I do not want to hurt your feelings. This is, I am sorry to say, a natural occurrence on your plane. The fact is that the animals caught your emotional contagion, and according to their lesser abilities translated it for themselves.
quotes.translation: 在动物死亡前，环绕你们人格的特定氛围是破坏性的、短路的，并充满内在恐慌。我不想伤害你的感情。很遗憾，这在你们的层面上是自然发生的事。事实是动物感染了你们的情感传染，并根据它们较低的能力为自己进行了转化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: What I want you to know is this: I come here, I hope, as an endearing personality with characteristics that you can understand. Now these characteristics have been mine, and they are mine, and I am who I say I am. And yet, the Seth that you know, and that you find so endearing and understandable is but a small portion of my reality... the portion that can relate with you most easily.
quotes.translation: 我要你们知道的是：我来到这里，希望以一个你们能够理解的、讨人喜爱的人格特质出现。这些特质曾属于我，现在仍属于我，我就是我所宣称的那个存在。然而，你们所认识的那个赛斯，那个令你们觉得如此亲切易懂的赛斯，不过是我实相的一小部分……是那个最能与你产生联结的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: With him, however, the reinforcements are so perilously intertwined that I will make no attempt to straighten this out. His framework of personality is now so bound to this nonexistent truth that it would be dangerous for me to tamper with it.
quotes.translation: 然而，与他相关的那些强化作用已危险地交织在一起，我无意去理清这些纠葛。他的人格架构如今已与这个不存在的"真相"紧密捆绑，若我贸然干预，恐将造成危险。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Your particular personality is not helped if I should tell you what to do in the specific incidents that are requested. For you would not be strengthened, but you would be relying upon me; and any errors, dear friend, would also be laid to me.
quotes.translation: 若我直接告诉你具体事件中该怎么做，对你独特的人格并无助益。因为你不会因此获得力量，反而会依赖我；而任何差错，亲爱的朋友，也都会归咎于我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now it takes study, development, and experience before an identity can learn to hold its own stability in the face of such constant stimuli; and many of us have gotten lost, even forgetting who we were until we once more awakened to ourselves. Much of this is quite automatic to us now. In the infinite varieties of consciousness, we are still aware of a small percentage of the entire banks of personalities that exist. For our "vacations" we visit amid quite simple life forms, and blend with them.
quotes.translation: 一个存有需要经过学习、发展与经验积累，才能在持续不断的刺激中保持自身稳定；许多存有曾迷失方向，甚至忘记自己是谁，直到再度觉醒。如今这对我们而言已是自动化的过程。在意识的无限变体中，我们仍只能感知到全部人格库中的一小部分。至于我们的"假期"，则会造访简单的生命形态，与之融合。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A chronically ill existence, for example, might also be a measure of discipline, enabling you to use deeper abilities that you ignored in a life of good health. The perfectly happy life for example, on the surface, may appear splendid, but it may also be basically shallow and do little to develop the personality.
quotes.translation: 举例来说，长期病痛的存在也可能是一种自律的衡量，让你得以运用在健康生活中被忽视的深层能力。表面上完美幸福的人生看似辉煌，但可能本质肤浅，对人格发展助益甚微。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is a delicate connection here with the dream universe that is somewhat difficult to explain. The dream universe, however, pervades many other fields. It does not exist outside or apart from your own universe, but simultaneously with it. It appears, and is a reality, to all aspects or portions of the self, and often it is only within the dream universe that the personality can change focus easily or efficiently enough so that he can perceive the variety of roles that he himself has played.
quotes.translation: 这里与梦境宇宙存在着微妙的关联，这有些难以解释。然而，梦境宇宙渗透了许多其他领域。它并非独立于你的宇宙之外，而是与之同时存在。它对自我的所有面向或部分而言都是真实的，往往只有在梦境宇宙中，人格才能足够轻松或有效地转换焦点，从而感知到自己曾扮演过的各种角色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now: You have heard of ghost hunters. I can quite literally be called a ghost writer, though I do not approve of the term "ghost." It is true that I am usually not seen in physical terms. I do not like the word "spirit," either; and yet if your definition of that word implies the idea of a personality without a physical body, then I would have to agree that the description fits me.
quotes.translation: 现在：你们听说过鬼魂猎人。我完全可以被称为一个代笔作家，尽管我不赞同"鬼魂"这个词。确实，我通常不以物质形态被看见。我也不喜欢"灵"这个词；但如果你们对这个词的定义暗示了没有物质身体的人格概念，那么我不得不承认这个描述符合我。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now to return to our discussion. The matter of time is highly important if you have any hopes of understanding the self in its entirety, or other personalities that do not operate within your system. The Psychological frameworks are so different. The apparent cause and effect sequence is absent, and identity knows itself as itself through other means than continuity, in your terms.
quotes.translation: 现在回到我们的讨论。如果你们有任何希望理解完整的自我，或理解那些不在你们系统内运作的其他人格，时间问题就极为重要。心理框架是如此不同。明显的因果序列并不存在，而身份认同通过不同于你们所说的连续性的其他方式认识自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You must remember, and this is I'm afraid a sideline: but I must communicate this data to you by words which must necessarily be strung out in order, end to end, when now to me there is no such necessity, and I will go into this further. As I began to say, I have been speaking of your plane and the personalities upon it. Now I will go into this further, into the entities involved.
quotes.translation: 你们必须记住——这恐怕是个题外话：但我必须通过词语将这些数据传达给你们，这些词语必须按顺序首尾相连地排列，而对我来说现在并没有这种必要，我会进一步探讨这一点。正如我开始所说，我一直在谈论你们的层面及其上的人格。现在我将进一步探讨，涉及相关的存有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is for this reason that such a rich diversity in such symbols is possible, and it is for this reason that one symbol can have various meanings to different levels of the personality. The various meanings of any given symbol are expressed and recognized as the intensity ever so minutely changes. This, as I have explained, also has something to do with your idea of physical time.
quotes.translation: 正因如此，这些符号才可能具有如此丰富的多样性，也正因如此，一个符号才能对人格的不同层次具有不同含义。任何给定符号的各种含义，都会随着强度极其细微的变化而被表达和识别。正如我所解释的，这也与你们对物理时间的观念有关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inner self chooses from its available potential personalities the one that it finds most adequate. Sometimes it simply makes an error, for the inner self is not a perfected thing, any more than the ego is. But identity does exist, and the ego is but a pseudo identity formed for utilitarian reasons, and as such it is of course a part of the basic identity from which it springs.
quotes.translation: 内在自我从其可用的潜在人格中选择它认为最合适的一个。有时它只是犯了个错误，因为内在自我并非完美之物，就像自我也不是完美的一样。但身份认同确实存在，而自我不过是为实用目的形成的伪身份，因此它当然是从其源出的基本身份的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json
