quotes.text: Egos concept of itself as a rock of unchanging identity is highly ludicrous, since its perceptions constantly change it from what it was. It is not a thing proceeding, by any means. This is not to deny the human aspects of the ego, for the ego is also somewhat like a light carried in front of the inner self, a light that gives meaning to the physical universe and to its objects. It enables the inner self to manipulate within physical reality. It translates outer data to the inner personality.
quotes.translation: 自我将自己视为不变身份之岩石的概念极为可笑，因为它的感知不断改变着它原有的状态。它绝非一个持续前进的事物。这并非否定自我的人类面向，因为自我也多少像内在自我前方的一盏灯，这盏灯赋予物质宇宙及其物体以意义。它使内在自我能在物质实相中运作。它将外在数据翻译给内在人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Using this third form, there would be a tendency for you not to recognize your own physical situation. It would be difficult to carry the memories of the present ego personality with you. This third form is the vehicle of the inner self. The disorientation that it feels is the disorientation, you see, that it will feel when the physical body is deserted, or at the point of death.
quotes.translation: 使用这第三种形态时，你往往会认不出自己的物质处境。带着当前自我人格的记忆将变得困难。这第三种形态是内在自性的载体。它所感受到的迷失方向，就是当肉体被舍弃时，或在死亡关头，它将会感受到的那种迷失方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: One part of his whole personality is able to help me very much at times, but other portions simply cannot. I mentioned specifically Ruburts impression that the item had to do with a particular letter purposely, to tip him off, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 他整体人格的一部分有时能极大地帮助我，但其他部分却完全无能为力。我特别提到鲁柏的印象，即那个项目刻意与某个特定字母有关，可以说是为了给他提示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is precisely in the low points of fluctuation that such experiences originate, for normal consciousness is momentarily at a weak state and in a period of rest. The whole physical organism undergoes such normal fluctuations, again, that are usually quite unnoticed. These periods also fluctuate, following rhythms that have to do with the characteristic personality. In some the waves of motion are comparatively long and slow, the valleys within being sloped; with others, the reverse is true.
quotes.translation: 恰恰是在波动的低点，这类体验才会产生，因为正常意识暂时处于虚弱状态和休息期。整个物质有机体都会经历这种通常不被注意的正常波动。这些周期也遵循着与人格特征相关的节奏而波动。在有些人身上，波动幅度相对较长而缓慢，波谷呈斜坡状；而在另一些人身上，情况则相反。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The disability of the present mother is a result of that personality's own problems, and Ruburt does not have to fear such a circumstance in his own condition. However a relaxed attitude is extremely important to counteract other tendencies. His fear of relaxation is actually rather simply based and superficial, in that it does not have its source in a past life but in this one.
quotes.translation: 现任母亲的身体残疾是那个人格自身问题的结果，鲁柏不必担心自己也会遭遇这种情况。然而，放松的态度对于抵消其他倾向极为重要。他对放松的恐惧实际上相当简单且表面化，其根源并非来自前世，而是来自今生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The dream sequence for that group of days involved perception, first, of Ruburt's actual previous death, and then leaped that same evening back furl her to much earlier events. The purpose of the whole sequence was reassuring, and in overall nature had to do with the personality's inner reaction to the season of an approaching winter and the ever symbolic death that it suggests.
quotes.translation: 那几天的梦境序列首先涉及对鲁柏实际前次死亡的感知，然后在同一个晚上又回溯到更早的事件。整个序列的目的是令人安心的，其整体性质与人格对即将到来的冬季及其所象征的永恒死亡的内在反应有关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When consciousness leaves the body and is away for some time then the connection is, of course, broken. In out-of-body states the connection still holds. Now it is possible for an individual who has died to completely misinterpret the experience and attempt to reenter the corpse. This can happen when the personality identified himself almost exclusively with the physical image.
quotes.translation: 当意识离开身体并离开一段时间时，连接当然就断裂了。在出体状态中，连接仍然保持。现在，一个已死之人有可能完全误解这种体验，并试图重新进入尸体。当人格几乎完全认同于物质形象时，这种情况就可能发生。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Lack of this last factor can cause a personality to be reborn more times on your plane than would be necessary if only the role requirement operated. This requirement for fullest use of capabilities has nothing to do with opportunity in the social sense, although of course the particular social framework will have much to do with the particular development of certain abilities.
quotes.translation: 缺乏最后这个因素可能导致人格在你们层面转世更多次，而如果仅凭角色要求运作本不必如此。这种充分发挥能力的需求与社会意义上的机会无关，尽管特定的社会框架确实会与某些能力的特定发展密切相关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: For most people this censoring process is valuable, since it prevents the personality from being snowed under by data it is not equipped to handle. The ability to retain experience gained within other fields is the trend of further development. You are at least however to some extent familiar with this field of dream action, and every man intuitively knows his involvement here.
quotes.translation: 对大多数人而言，这种审查过程很有价值，因为它防止人格被其无法处理的数据淹没。保留在其他领域获得的经验的能力是进一步发展的趋势。然而，你们至少在一定程度上熟悉这个梦境活动的领域，每个人都直觉地知道自己在此处的参与。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now there are personalities developed enough to do this. And each act of leaping, so to speak, forms a new thread. Now following through with our analogy, imagine yourself A. We will start you off in physical reality at thread A, though you have already traversed many other threads to get where you are. We are merely beginning with thread A since this is your present situation.
quotes.translation: 现在确实有发展足够成熟的人格能做到这一点。可以说，每一次跳跃行为都会形成一条新线。继续我们的类比，想象你是A。我们将从线A开始你在物质实相中的旅程，尽管你已经穿越了许多其他线才到达现在的位置。我们只是从线A开始，因为这是你目前的情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This reassembled ego then attempts to perceive these concepts in terms of sense perceptions, which are sent as communications to the physical individual at the other end. Sometimes the communications are made directly, though they must be sifted through the subconscious of the physical individual. When the physical individual is trained along these lines however, he helps in this process, and a psychological framework, like a bridge, is erected that serves to connect the two personalities.
quotes.translation: 这个重新组合的自我随后试图以感官知觉的方式来理解这些概念，这些知觉作为信息被发送给另一端的物质个体。有时这些信息是直接传递的，尽管它们必须经过物质个体潜意识的筛选。然而，当物质个体沿着这些方向接受训练时，他会协助这个过程，一个心理框架——如同桥梁般——被建立起来，用以连接这两个人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The inner senses operate on all planes and under all circumstances. The outer senses vary according to plane and circumstance. The outer senses are dependable only in terms of the definite plane for which they were constructed. Their purpose of course is to enable the conscious personality to recognize as valid camouflage patterns which are only valid under certain conditions.
quotes.translation: 内在感官在所有层面和所有情况下运作。外在感官则根据层面和情况而变化。外在感官仅在其被构建的特定层面范围内可靠。它们的目的当然是让意识人格能够识别出仅在特定条件下才有效的伪装模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The questioner is obviously the hunter. The questioner also enjoys the chase for the sake of a chase. It is the chase that is important to both personalities. The questioner deludes herself. The object of the chase is not the important point. The excitement involved in the chase is important, and the energy, the vital energy used is being directed away from its proper purpose.
quotes.translation: 提问者显然是猎人。提问者也享受为追逐而追逐的过程。对双方人格而言，重要的是追逐本身。提问者欺骗了自己。追逐的目标并非重点。追逐过程中产生的兴奋感才是重要的，而能量——那生命力——正被从它应有的目的上转移开。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In such a case, this is simply a regression that often passes. Here we become concerned again with the animus and the anima. If a personality believes that it is doing a poor job in a male life, it may activate the anima's qualities, taking on the characteristics of a past female existence in which it handled itself well. Reversing the picture, the same can happen to a woman.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，这通常只是一种会过去的退行。我们再次涉及阿尼姆斯与阿尼玛。如果一个人格认为自己作为男性生命表现不佳，它可能会激活阿尼玛的特质，采用过去某次女性存在中表现良好的特征。反过来，同样的情况也可能发生在女性身上。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Neither of you have a need for children in your present personalities. You are almost finished with incarnations on the earth, so much so that the physical bodies will return completely and unfragmented upon your physical death. This is always the case in the final earth life. The physical property is left behind, no portion of it being carried on that plane through children.
quotes.translation: 你们两人在目前的人格中都不需要孩子。你们几乎完成了地球上的转世，以至于在肉体死亡时，身体将完全且完整地回归。这总是最后一次地球生命的情况。物质属性被留在身后，没有任何部分通过孩子延续到那个层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is only the sense of duality, of which we have spoken, that makes death appear as such a dreadful thing. Once the personality realizes that even in life on your plane he is not always bound by physical data, and that even in physical life the most real portion of him is independent of physical matter, and in a personal way, then he will not fear death as a personal ending.
quotes.translation: 只有我们谈过的二元感，才使死亡显得如此可怕。一旦人格认识到，即使在你们层面的生命中，他并非总是受物质资料束缚，即使在物质生命中，他最真实的部分也独立于物质，并以个人方式存在，那么他就不会将死亡视为个人的终结。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You will need perhaps to reread your material on the spacious present, since our explanation here will be necessarily in terms of sequence of events, when as you know in the spacious present events are actually simultaneous. When the personality withdraws itself from the physical image therefore, in a sort of slow motion of actual simultaneous happenings, this is what occurs.
quotes.translation: 你们可能需要重读关于广袤现在的资料，因为我们的解释必然涉及事件序列，而如你们所知，在广袤现在中事件实际上是同时发生的。因此，当人格以实际同时发生事件的慢动作方式从物质形象中撤离时，就会发生以下情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: These personality intensities are themselves formed within ranges that would appear minute, but contain within them, truly, eons of experience. In our further discussions concerning the nature of electrical reality, we will also come closer to an understanding of those pyramid gestalts of which I have spoken. See the 81st session for some material on psychic pyramid gestalts.
quotes.translation: 这些人格强度本身形成于看似微小的范围内，但其中确实包含着亿万年的经验。在我们进一步讨论电性实相的本质时，我们也将更接近理解我谈过的那些金字塔形完形。关于心灵金字塔形完形的资料，请参阅第81节。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is even difficult for me to answer that, since you are partly on the track and partly way off. The emotional aspect of course would be the personality- essence. However it also has a structure that is very simple, but to you would appear complicated to the extreme. This is because of your present habit of thinking in word patterns rather than energy transferral complexes.
quotes.translation: 我甚至很难回答这个问题，因为你们部分正确，部分偏离。情感方面当然是人格-本质。然而它也有一个非常简单的结构，但对你们来说却显得极其复杂。这是因为你们目前习惯于用文字模式而非能量传递复合体来思考。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: They are aware of themselves as a part of action, and therefore through capsule comprehension, which we have discussed, the simple atoms and molecules are aware of their own basic immortality. All this is basic knowledge, if you would understand why the personality accepts even an impeding action, or pain or illness, as a part of itself, despite the ego's resistance to pain.
quotes.translation: 他们觉察到自己是行动的一部分，因此通过我们讨论过的胶囊式理解，简单的原子和分子也知晓自身基本的不朽性。若想理解人格为何会将阻碍性的行动、痛苦或疾病也视为自身的一部分——尽管自我抗拒痛苦——这些便是基本知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: （Seth remarked that our weather neither excited or concerned him, and that personality affects weather. He then threw out the God concept as a question for general discussion. He was greeted with a large silence momentarily. Seth asked for ideas from Bill and Peg; it will be remembered that in past sessions he said he would go into this question when they witnessed sessions.
quotes.translation: （赛斯提到我们的天气既未令他兴奋也不使他担忧，并指出人格会影响天气。随后他抛出"神"的概念作为讨论议题。现场陷入短暂沉默。赛斯请比尔和佩格提出见解；须知在过往课程中他曾表示，待他们见证课程时便会探讨此问题。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is very possible that physics rather than psychology will give the first hint that human personality is multidimensional and that the inner reality of the mind far surpasses the physical universe that it attempts to probe. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 极有可能的是，物理学而非心理学将率先揭示：人类人格是多维度的，而心灵的内在实相远超越它试图探知的物质宇宙。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The stubborn part of his nature has been a characteristic of most of his past lives. It is basically a resolute characteristic with great potential for balance, a characteristic that can keep him headed, despite any disappointments in the proper directions. When the ego controls this resoluteness however, it turns into stubbornness, and works against the personality. Perseverance becomes pigheadedness then, you see.
quotes.translation: 他本性中固执的部分贯穿了大多数前世。这本质上是具有巨大平衡潜能的坚定特质——即便遭遇挫折，也能引领他朝向正确方向。但当自我掌控这份坚定时，它便转化为固执，反而与人格相悖。你看，这时毅力就变成了冥顽不灵。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now in his own mind Ruburt has been highly critical of that neighbor, and so have you at times. There is one area you see where he (Leonard) is thus far entirely blocked, for he cannot love another person wholeheartedly, nor imagine himself in that position. This lack is always with him, and it is caused by a particular shallow area in his personality that is not developed.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏内心对那位邻居始终持批判态度，你有时也是如此。你们注意到，他（伦纳德）在某个领域至今完全受阻——他无法全心爱另一个人，也无法设想自己处于那种情境。这种缺失如影随形，源于其人格中某个未发展的浅薄区域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Human personality entails more than three dimensions. There are abilities that you do not use, so you must learn what they are. This is a portion of your personality that speaks to you in your dreams. This is the inner part of you...
quotes.translation: 人类人格包含超过三个维度。你们拥有尚未运用的能力，因此必须学习辨识它们。这是你人格中在梦境里与你对话的部分。这是你的内在自我...
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The actions result in concrete physical materiaizationls. These are all highly colored and charged, however, and the stuff of physical materiaizationl is in itself conscious and alive. There are hidden but very definite connections between the self and the objects of which it has created in its environment. The environment is simply an extension of the self, and those objects within it are a part of the physical or the physically materialized personality. Hence your ideas of ownership.
quotes.translation: 这些行动导致具体物质实相的形成。然而，这些物质实相都带有强烈的色彩和电荷，而物质实相本身即是具有意识且活生生的。自我与其在环境中创造的对象之间存在着隐藏但非常明确的联系。环境只是自我的延伸，其中的对象是物质或物质化人格的一部分。因此，你们产生了所有权的观念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is an extremely interesting one, though somewhat complicated. This ability is a natural one, operating to some degree or another within every personality. It is a natural protective mechanism of inner origin, directly affecting matter. It is a self-correcting mechanism. The individual's health is determined by his ability to take advantage of, or to use, this mechanism.
quotes.translation: 这是一个极其有趣的问题，尽管有些复杂。这种能力是一种自然能力，在每个人格中都或多或少地运作着。它是一种源自内在的自然保护机制，直接影响物质。它是一种自我修正机制。个体的健康取决于他利用或使用这种机制的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There is a strong and rather aggressive nature beneath the surface personality of the questioner, of which the questioner is frightened, to some extent therefore a divided self. The male is passive and of a submissive mind, and given to an obsession with over consideration for security. He will always seek security, but he enjoys being the object of a chase of this nature.
quotes.translation: 提问者表面人格之下隐藏着一种强烈且相当侵略性的本性，提问者对此感到恐惧，因此在某种程度上存在分裂的自我。男性部分是被动且顺从的思维，过度执着于对安全的考量。他始终寻求安全，但他享受成为这种性质追逐的对象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There was some question in the article about long-term and short-term memory. Now basically the original intensity of the charge determines its duration in your time structure. The intensity of particular charges can completely reorganize the personality structure through changes in the RNA formations.
quotes.translation: 文章中提到了长期记忆与短期记忆的问题。基本上，原始电荷的强度决定了它在你们时间结构中的持续时间。特定电荷的强度可以通过RNA结构的变化完全重组人格结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: First here a small note. Much later there will be other suggestions for you, in which you will direct your sleeping self to perform various activities in sleep, visit certain locations, bring back information and so forth. This is obviously still very much in the future, but it is well within the abilities of human personality, and within the realms of your own abilities.
quotes.translation: 首先这里有个小提示。在更晚的时候，会有其他建议给你们，你们将引导自己的睡眠自我在睡眠中执行各种活动，访问特定地点，带回信息等等。这显然仍是非常未来的事，但这完全在人类人格的能力范围之内，也在你们自身能力的领域之内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now: I bring up these matters here because such changes in habitual patterns would definitely result in greater understanding of the nature of the self. The inner dreaming portions of the personality seem strange to you not only because of a basic difference of focus, but because you clearly devote opposite portions of a twenty-four hour cycle to these areas of the self.
quotes.translation: 现在：我在这里提出这些事项，是因为习惯模式的这种改变肯定会带来对自我本质更深刻的理解。人格的内在梦境部分对你们来说显得陌生，不仅因为焦点的基本差异，还因为你们明确地将二十四小时周期中的对立部分用于这些自我的领域。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your talent is indeed excellent, and of the highest quality. Many artists have produced and received profit for their productions. There is certain work that you could do that could be compared to Ruburt's science fiction; that is, commercial in that it brings in money, and yet expresses an intuitive and creative part of the personality and is not, as you say, hack work.
quotes.translation: 你的天赋确实卓越，且品质最高。许多艺术家都曾因创作而获利。有些工作你可以胜任，其性质可与鲁柏的科幻作品相提并论——即具有商业价值能带来收入，却又表达出人格中直觉与创造性的部分，绝非你所说的粗制滥造之作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The whole self not only perceives these limitless moment points, but being a part of action, each whole self projects fragments and personalities from itself to all these points, creating therefore other egos, other intense focus points which are independent, which work out their own destinies and experiences, which in turn perceive any given moment point in slow motion.
quotes.translation: 整体自己不仅感知这些无限的时间点，作为行动的一部分，每个整体自己还会将自身碎片化的人格投射到所有时间点，由此创造出其他独立运作的自我、其他强烈的聚焦点，它们各自发展命运与经验，反过来以慢动作感知任何特定时间点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now the moment points could also represent various personalities belonging to the entity, portions of its own consciousness that it sends upon the journeys of exploration and discovery. It is as if the nuclei of a cell could travel through itself. The boundaries of the entity would be imaginary, taking in as many moment points as the entity felt it could handle. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 这些时间点也可代表属于存有的各种人格，即存有派往探索与发现之旅的自身意识片段。这就像细胞核能在自身内部旅行。存有的边界将是虚构的，只纳入它自认能处理的时间点。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is however an inner communication, and the knowledge of one is available to any -- not after physical death, but now in your present moment. Now the soul itself, as mentioned earlier, is not static. It grows and develops even through the experience of those personalities that compose it, and it is, to put it as simply as possible, more than the sum of its parts.
quotes.translation: 然而存在内在沟通，任一存有所知皆可为其他存有所用——并非在肉体死亡之后，而是在你们当下的此刻。如前所述，灵魂本身并非静止。它甚至通过构成它的那些人格的经验而成长发展，简单来说，它大于其组成部分的总和。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This does not mean that you must not manipulate within the physical universe. I am not telling you that you should forget your responsibilities in physical life. I am telling you that the origin and ability and power and identity has its origins deep within the personality, and that these origins have little to do with the waking self of which you are all so familiar.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着你们不该在物质宇宙中运作。我并非告诉你们应忘记物质生活的责任。我要说的是，起源、能力、力量与身份认同都深植于人格之内，而这些起源与你们如此熟悉的清醒自我几乎毫无关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Indeed as you may have observed, the personality continues in a rather unruffled fashion, considering the circumstances. This is why valid communications can occur between us, and it is also the reason why such communications rarely occur, generally speaking. In the case of an insecure ego you have two immediate problems, and are involved instantly with difficulties:
quotes.translation: 确实如你所见，考虑到当前情况，人格仍以相当平稳的方式延续。这正是我们之间能进行有效沟通的原因，也是这类沟通通常极少发生的原因。当面对不安全的自我时，你会立即面临两个问题，并瞬间陷入困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: And here you see an example of my sly nature, for Ruburt （louder） will present my material for me. Regardless of its source, the material speaks loud and clear. It is largely disregarded, the sort of personality which is required in this endeavor. It simply happens that because of past relationships I know Ruburt well, and Ruburt knows me far better than he imagines.
quotes.translation: 这里你便见识到我狡黠的本性了，因为鲁柏（提高音量）将替我呈现我的资料。无论其来源为何，这资料都清晰响亮地传达着。人们大多忽略了这项努力所需的那种人格特质。只是由于过往的关系，我深知鲁柏，而鲁柏对我的了解远比他自以为的更深。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. You have become somewhat aware of the subconscious. This means that your ego has enlarged its conception of the self, of itself, to include certain activities of which it is now aware. Progress in the development of personality in the long run will be determined by the ability of the whole self to recognize and become aware of all of its self-conscious portions.
quotes.translation: 现在。你们对潜意识已稍有认识。这意味着你们的自我已扩展了它对自身、对自我的概念，将某些它如今觉察到的活动纳入其中。长远来看，人格发展的进展将由整个自体识别并觉察其所有自觉部分的能力所决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The peculiar chemical changes that occur are often precisely those that lead to greater conceptions and experience, but these are free from what you think of as practical application. There is a trigger set off then, an impetus in which the personality tries to free itself from time-space orientation released from the usual necessity to participate in "adult" terms.
quotes.translation: 那些特殊的化学变化往往恰恰导向更宏大的概念与体验，但这些却脱离了你们所谓的实际应用范畴。于是便触发了某种机制，一种动力，使人格试图挣脱时空定向，从通常必须参与"成人"模式的必要性中解放出来。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I am writing this book to assure you that this is not the case. Basically you are no more of a physical being than I am, and I have donned and discarded more bodies than I care to tell. Personalities who do not exist do not write books. I am quite independent of a physical image, and so are you.
quotes.translation: 我写这本书是为了向你们保证事实并非如此。基本上，你们并不比我更是个物质性的存有，而我曾穿上又丢弃过的身体多到我不愿细数。不存在的人格不会写书。我完全独立于物质形象之外，你们亦然。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are specific functions brought into operation quite naturally that are scarcely perceived by your scientists, much less understood. As the mind within the body clearly sees its earthly time coming to an end, mental and psychic accelerations take place. These are in many ways like adolescent experiences in their great bursts of creative activity, with the resulting formation of questions, and the preparation for a completely new kind of personality growth and fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 某些特定功能会自然而然地启动运作，你们的科学家几乎察觉不到，更遑论理解。当身体内的心灵清晰看见其尘世时光即将终结时，心智与心灵的加速便发生了。这些在许多方面都像青春期的体验，伴随着创造力的巨大迸发，从而形成问题，并为全新的人格成长与圆满做准备。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This provides necessary balance and necessary control, and results in the sturdy anchorage of the personality in the environment in which it must survive. You have here one of the main reasons why you must request the subconscious to enable you to recall your dreams. The ego would see no reason for such a memory, and on general principles attempts to repress them.
quotes.translation: 这提供了必要的平衡与必要的控制，使人格得以在其必须存续的环境中稳固扎根。这便是你们必须请求潜意识协助回忆梦境的主要原因之一。自我看不出记住这些梦境有何必要，并且基于一般原则试图压抑它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: For such habits operate not only in the waking state but in the sleeping state also, where the personality is even more open to suggestion. A vicious circle is therefore formed. It is often broken however, and in many ways.
quotes.translation: 这类习惯不仅在清醒状态运作，在睡眠状态亦然——此时人格对暗示更为开放。于是便形成了恶性循环。然而这种循环常被打破，且方式多样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Ego also fears spontaneity, for it cannot control action; being a part of action, most of its efforts of necessity are thwarted. Yet it is precisely this struggle between ego's struggles for stability, and the personality's attempt to expand spontaneously, that is at the basis of much of mankind's achievements, and that is certainly the basis for much of his art.
quotes.translation: 自我同样恐惧自发性，因其无法控制行动；作为行动的一部分，自我大多数努力必然受挫。但正是自我追求稳定与人格自发扩展之间的这种挣扎，构成了人类诸多成就的基础，也无疑是众多艺术创作的根基。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I believe that now you can trust this prediction: By summer he will have broken the habit for good, and it will no longer be a worry. The various unfortunate effects that seem to be caused by smoking are not caused by the cigarettes so much, as by those psychic habits which cause a personality to seek security within such habitual patterns that become compulsive.
quotes.translation: 我相信现在你们可以信任这个预测：到夏天他将彻底戒除这个习惯，这不再会成为困扰。那些看似由吸烟引起的各种不良影响，与其说是香烟所致，不如说是那些导致人格在强迫性习惯模式中寻求安全感的心理习惯造成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The motivating force is still All That Is, but the individuality is no illusion. Now in this same way do you give freedom to the personality fragments within your own dreams, and for the same reason. And you create for the same reason, and within all of you is the memory of that primal agony--that urge to create and free all probable consciousness into actuality.
quotes.translation: 驱动力仍是"一切万有"，但个体性绝非幻象。同样地，你们也在自己的梦境中给予人格片段自由，出于相同的原因。你们也因相同的原因进行创造，在你们所有人内在都存有那原始剧痛的记忆——那将一切可能意识释放为实相的创造冲动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: For example, the main character in a religious historical drama may or may not consciously be aware of the ways in which such information is given to him. And yet it may seem to him that he does know, for the nature of a dogma's origin will be explained in terms that this main character can understand. The historical Jesus knew who he was, but he also knew that he was one of three personalities composing one entity. To a large extent he shared in the memory of the other two.
quotes.translation: 例如，宗教历史剧中的主角可能未必有意识地知晓这类信息传递的方式。但他或许自认为知晓，因为教义起源的本质会以主角能理解的方式被阐释。历史上的耶稣知晓自己的身份，但他也明白自己是构成一个存有的三个人格之一。在很大程度上，他共享着另外两位的记忆。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Since both space and time are camouflages, to speak of traveling through them is basically meaningless. What is involved here is a transformation of energy, and on your plane an extension of personality essence that permits an extension of perception. I will make this clearer at a later date.
quotes.translation: 既然时空皆为伪装，谈论穿越时空本质上毫无意义。这里涉及的是能量的转化，在你们的层面上则是人格本质的延伸，这种延伸允许知觉的扩展。日后我会对此作更清晰的说明。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In Ruburt's years with Zeh, there was severe splitting of the personality. It is not a new thing with him to push aside the subconscious at all. In all cases when he does, an explosion of one kind occurs. His subconscious intuitive self, you see, is extremely vital, alive, and unusually insistent for expression, even for the subconscious which is known for this.
quotes.translation: 在鲁柏与泽赫相处的岁月里，其人格曾出现严重分裂。对他而言，压抑潜意识绝非新鲜事。每当他这样做时，总会引发某种形式的爆发。你看，他的潜意识直觉自我极其鲜活、充满生命力，且异常执着于表达——即便对以执着著称的潜意识而言也是如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In any fairly normal personality the intellect will indeed stand guard. There is no need to fear identity's complete immersion into emotional sensation. Such emotional experience actually strengthens not only the ego, but it opens communications between the ego and the subconscious, and allows for a much greater flow of energy from the primary source of action.
quotes.translation: 任何相当正常的人格中，理智确实会担任守卫。无需担忧身份会完全沉溺于情感体验。这种情感经验实际上不仅强化了自我，更开启了自我与潜意识之间的沟通管道，让来自行动原初源头的能量得以更充沛地流动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The consciousness therefore would never be destroyed in reality. The most minute blossom within it would experience only an almost instantaneous change of form, and all of this would transpire in the breath of an instant. The individual petals would merely change, as the personalities of men change in what seems like a series of before and after reincarnations.
quotes.translation: 因此意识在实相中永不会被摧毁。其中最微小的花苞只会经历近乎瞬间的形态转变，这一切都将在刹那呼吸间完成。如同人类人格在看似前后相继的转世序列中变化，个体花瓣只是改变了形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This paced release allows the personality to face these problems slowly so that it is not overly frightened. Yet even then the personality will resent any healing of the body to a marked degree, and will show resentment.
quotes.translation: 这种渐进式的释放让人格得以缓慢面对问题，不致过度惊惶。但即便如此，人格仍会对身体疗愈产生显著抗拒，并显露出不满。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The atoms that compose the fetus have their own kind of consciousness. The volatile awareness-consciousnesses that exist independently of matter, form matter according to their ability and degree. The fetus, therefore, has its own consciousness, the simple component consciousness made up of the atoms that compose it. This exists before any reincarnating personality enters it. The consciousness of matter is present in any matter -- a fetus, a rock, a blade of grass, a nail.
quotes.translation: 构成胎儿的原子拥有其自身的意识。独立于物质存在的那些跃动觉知-意识，会依其能力与程度塑造物质。因此胎儿拥有其自身意识——由构成它的原子组成的简单成分意识。这存在于任何转世人格进入之前。物质的意识存在于一切物质中——胎儿、岩石、草叶、指甲。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is indeed a basic anxiety and fear. The personality can express himself very well. In the 1500's he was eloquent, and it is precisely because this eloquence, so persuasive, so smooth-tongued, caused his superiors at that time to believe the accusations against the innocent man, that he now fears to use an eloquence, because he once let it run away with him.
quotes.translation: 这确实是根本性的焦虑与恐惧。此人的人格表达能力极佳。在十六世纪时他曾能言善辩，正因这份极具说服力、巧舌如簧的辩才，导致当时的上司相信了对无辜者的指控，如今他才畏惧运用这份口才——因为他曾放任其失控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now this is indeed a personal seminar that you attend, and in the terms used by Bernard. I am speaking to you from a particular point of my personality, the part which you can easily understand. I believe my way of teaching to be the best one for our purposes. Ruburt's abilities are very strong. They must be nurtured in such a way that stability is maintained.
quotes.translation: 这确实是一场你亲身参与的个人性研讨会，用伯纳德的话来说。我是从我人格的特定面向——那个你容易理解的部分——对你们说话。我相信我的教学方式最适合我们的目标。鲁柏的能力非常强大，它们必须以维持稳定的方式来培育。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Someone who sees him, a male, is not doing him good at this time. It is important to realize that the condition would have erupted in any case. The usual ego would have been much more serviceable however, for a longer period of time, had he not taken the drugs. The whole personality however needed a readjustment, though this is more drastic than was necessary.
quotes.translation: 此时，某个见到他的男性对他并无助益。必须认识到，这种状况无论如何都会爆发。若非他服用药物，通常的自我本可更有效地运作更长时间。然而，整个人格确实需要重新调整，尽管这比必要程度更为剧烈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You do not need to justify your existence by painting. It is impossible to do so. (Pause.) There are two approaches, either of which would be highly beneficial. The first is to paint a portrait of a person whom you know, trying to portray the essence of that person, their deepest agonies and highest joys, their highest capabilities and fears of failure. (Pause.) This would induce on your part an honest effort to face the raw emotion of another personality, and portray it.
quotes.translation: 你无需通过绘画来证明自己的存在。这是不可能的。（停顿。）有两种方法，任何一种都极为有益。第一种是为你认识的人画肖像，试图描绘那个人的本质——他们最深沉的痛苦与最崇高的喜悦，他们最高的能力与对失败的恐惧。（停顿。）这将促使你诚实地面对另一个人格的原始情感，并将其描绘出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: (From the 82nd session for August 27, 1964:) When man realizes that he creates his own image now, he will not find it so startling to believe that he creates other images in other times. Only after such a basis [is established] will the idea of reincarnation achieve its natural validity, and only when it is understood that the subconscious, certain layers of it, is a link between the present personality and past ones, will the theory of reincarnation be accepted as fact.
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年8月27日第82节：）当人认识到自己此刻正在创造自己的形象时，就不会觉得相信自己在其他时间创造其他形象如此惊人了。只有在这种基础建立之后，转世的概念才能获得其自然的有效性；只有当人们理解潜意识——其特定层面——是当前人格与过去人格之间的联结时，转世理论才会被接受为事实。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Such people realize their deficiency, yet conversely because they do have a distorted but seemingly dominant "I" they are only all the more furious and confused. There is no basic unifying factor to give them consistency, and no unifying subconscious memories to give them true inner identity. This is one of the main reasons why they strike out at strongly integrated personalities, and why it is so easy for them to be catapulted by raw emotion into tragedies of this sort.
quotes.translation: 这类人意识到自己的缺陷，但正因如此，由于他们确实拥有一个扭曲却看似主导的"我"，他们只会更加狂怒与困惑。没有基本的统合因素赋予他们一致性，也没有统合的潜意识记忆赋予他们真正的内在身份。这就是他们为何会攻击整合度强的人格的主要原因之一，也是他们为何如此容易被原始情感抛入此类悲剧的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In the past we have spoken briefly concerning a tricky subject, the relationship of intensity and the nature of distance. The electromagnetic identity of any given individual contains the past identity systems, again in coded form. In other words, the previous personalities of past lives.
quotes.translation: 过去我们曾简要讨论过一个棘手的话题：强度与距离本质的关系。任何特定个体的电磁身份都包含过去的身份系统，同样以编码形式存在。换言之，即前世的过往人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The personality structure does not make sense unless such past experience is taken into consideration. Potentials do not simply appear, they evolve. I have told you that the most minute portion of energy possesses consciousness and has its own identity. This identity of itself is never annihilated. It may form into new gestalts but the identity is retained.
quotes.translation: 若不考虑这类过往经验，人格结构便毫无意义。潜能并非凭空出现，而是逐渐演化而成。我曾告诉过你们，最微小的能量单位也拥有意识与自身身份。这身份本身永不会湮灭，它可能形成新的完形，但身份始终被保留。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: There has been in past existences, in your terms, some experience with what is termed occult knowledge, though it is not my term. The personality has been used to depending upon inner intuitions, and knew it had further abilities to develop now. But there was a laxness within, and a lack of inner concentration that in this life hampered earlier development.
quotes.translation: 以你们的时间观而言，在过往存在中曾有过与所谓神秘知识相关的经验——尽管这不是我的术语。此人已习惯于依赖内在直觉，并知晓自己尚有可发展的能力。但内在存在某种懈怠，缺乏内在专注，这在此生阻碍了早期发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: But there are other plays going on simultaneously, in which you also have a part to play. These have their own scenery, their own props. They take place in different periods of time. One may be called "Life in the twelfth century A.D." One may be called "Life in the eighteenth century," or "in 500 B.C.," or "in A.D. 3000." You also create these plays and act in them. These settings also represent your environment, the environment that surrounds your entire personality.
quotes.translation: 然而同时还有另一些戏剧正在上演，你也在其中扮演角色。这些戏剧各有其布景与道具，发生在不同的时间段落。其中一部或可称为"公元十二世纪的生活"，另一部或可称为"十八世纪的生活"，或"公元前五百年"，或"公元三千年"。你既创造这些戏剧，也参与演出。这些场景同样代表你的环境——环绕你整个人格的环境。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If you have a limited conception of the nature of reality, then your ego will do its best to keep you in the small enclosed area of your accepted reality. If, on the other hand, your intuitions and creative instincts are allowed freedom, then they communicate some knowledge of greater dimensions to this most physically oriented portion of your personality.
quotes.translation: 若你对实相本质持有局限认知，那么你的自我便会竭力将你困在已接纳实相的小小封闭区域中。反之，若允许直觉与创造本能获得自由，它们便会将更大维度的知识传递给你这人格中最具物质导向的部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: His present desire for expression will certainly not change. It is therefore the fear of expression that must be erased. Nor can this erasure occur without the realization by this personality that he can indeed trust himself. For both the fear and the anxiety is based simply upon a resulting distrust of his ability to handle eloquence or verbal expression.
quotes.translation: 他当前对表达的渴望绝不会改变。因此必须消除的是对表达的恐惧。除非此人意识到自己确实可以信任自己，否则这种消除无法实现。因为恐惧与焦虑都仅仅源于他对自己处理雄辩或言语表达能力的信任缺失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now, if you will follow me closely you will obtain a hint at least of the structure of the inner self. It is composed, that is, each inner self is composed, structurally of a particular range of electrical intensities with which various personalities have their identities insured, since their identity is composed of particular intensities within the range.
quotes.translation: 现在，若你们仔细跟随我的思路，至少能获得关于内在自我结构的线索。每个内在自我在结构上均由特定范围的电磁强度构成——各种人格的身份正是通过这个范围得到保障，因为其身份由该范围内的特定强度组合而成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now this distortion may possibly be a hangover from a previous existence, but it is a distortion. Projections in fact should give you an excellent idea of the reality of reincarnations. In an excellent projection you forget the self on the bed. You are in an entirely new environment, but you are still beset by certain personality tendencies that are yours.
quotes.translation: 这种扭曲可能是前世的残留，但它确实是扭曲。事实上，出体经验能让你极好地理解转世的实相。在完美的出体状态中，你会忘记床上的那个自我。你身处全新的环境，却仍被自身某些人格倾向所困扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Your present personalities need sexual fulfillment, but the main energy of your life is in other directions. This is why you did not marry young, Joseph, and why Ruburt first chose a man in whom he was not sexually interested. Your deep attraction in this life has strong sexual connotations that must and will be satisfied, but it goes beyond this. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 你们当前的人格需要性满足，但生命的主要能量却指向其他方向。这就是为何你约瑟夫年轻时未结婚，而鲁柏最初选择了一个他并无性趣的男人。你们此生深刻的吸引力带有强烈的性意涵，这些必须且终将得到满足，但其意义远不止于此。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The physical system suffers. It is impossible for the ego to block off specific connections with the whole personality, therefore any barriers effectively impede whole blocks of active and necessary vitality. In Ruburt's case now, the floodgates to the inner self are opened, so that the vitality rushes into those areas that have been to some extent denied.
quotes.translation: 物质系统承受着痛苦。自我不可能完全阻断与整体人格的特定连接，因此任何屏障都会有效阻碍整块活跃且必要的生命力。以鲁柏目前的情况而言，内在自我的闸门已然开启，生命力正涌入那些曾被部分否定的领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The Seth personality has been an intermediary, and a legitimate one. (Pause.) The information already given to you regarding the nature of personality gestalts should make this development seem indeed a fitting one.
quotes.translation: 赛斯人格一直扮演着中介角色，且是合理的中介。（停顿。）关于人格完形本质的信息已给予你们，这应使此发展显得恰如其分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Reality is not limited. There is no past, present and future. These only appear to those who exist within three-dimensional reality. Since I am no longer within it, I can perceive what you do not see. But there is a part of you that is not imprisoned within three-dimensional reality, and that part of you knows that there is no time, that there is only an eternal now; and that part of you that knows is the whole self, the inner personality that knows all of your lives.
quotes.translation: 实相不受限制。没有过去、现在与未来。这些仅对存在于三维实相中的个体显现。既然我已不在其中，便能感知你们所不见之物。但你们之中有部分并不受困于三维实相，那部分知道时间并不存在，唯有永恒的当下；那知晓的部分便是整体自我，是知晓你们所有生命的内在人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (And once again, as she'd done for the session of last December 28, she wanted tonight's material to be presented as part of regular Session 393. I was glad to do it--and note that Jane's class sessions usually are in marked contrast to those we hold for ourselves, for books or whatever in the future. As would be expected of a gathering, class sessions were full of energy and repartee and questions and serious thinking both with and without Seth.

quotes.text: An illness can be rejected by the personality. The habit of illness can be rejected. Illness is sometimes in the overall, however, beneficial. A given illness, that is, may be beneficial. When action is allowed to flow freely, then neurotic rejections of action will not occur; and it is neurotic rejections of action that often cause unnecessary illnesses.
quotes.translation: 疾病可以被人格拒绝。疾病的习惯也可以被拒绝。然而疾病有时在整体上是有益的。即特定疾病可能具有益处。当行动被允许自由流动时，就不会产生对行动的神经过敏式拒绝；而正是这种对行动的神经过敏式拒绝，常常导致不必要的疾病。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You want to create a whole new world of your own making, in your own art form, and you will not be satisfied with less. In your paintings the people will be in control of the environment. It will not overwhelm them, and yet they will definitely emerge from it, and psychologically this will represent to you a triumphant emergence of individual personality.
quotes.translation: 你渴望以自己独特的艺术形式，创造一个完全由你亲手构建的全新世界，任何低于此标准的成就都无法令你满足。在你的画作中，人物将掌控环境，而非被环境所压倒。他们必将从环境中脱颖而出，而心理上，这于你而言将象征着个体人格的凯旋式彰显。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Here the personality was born only fifty miles away, in space, from the earlier existence; and as the wife of a wealthy landowner, often drove through the very land where the small house still stood, with its farm.
quotes.translation: 在此案例中，人格在空间上仅距前世存在五十英里处诞生；作为一位富裕地主的妻子，她曾多次驾车穿越那片土地——那栋附带农场的小屋至今仍矗立于此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The fabric of the present self is interwoven with these reincarnational "pasts," and from them the present self draws unconsciously from its own bank of personality characteristics, activities, and insights. Often past-life memories come to the surface but are not recognized as such, since they appear in fantasy form, or are projected into art creations.
quotes.translation: 当前自我的结构，与这些转世“过往”交织缠绕，而当前自我正无意识地从自身的人格特质、行为模式与洞见宝库中汲取养分。前世记忆常浮现至意识表层，却因以幻想形态显现或投射于艺术创作中，而未被辨识其本质。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are various kinds and stages in such cases. Each individual is unique. Sometimes the framework includes another method of cure, in which portions of each conflicting side of the personality break off to form a clearer psychological structure which can communicate with the other two, act as a referee, and reconcile the opposing beliefs held by each.
quotes.translation: 此类情况存在多种类型与阶段。每个个体皆独一无二。有时其框架包含另一种疗愈方式：人格中相互冲突的各方会分裂出部分碎片，形成更清晰的心理结构，该结构既能与另外两方沟通，又能担任仲裁者，调和彼此持有的对立信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: She sees herself supported in a religious senseby conventional figures from the Bible. These personalities will explain the nature of reality to her in vocabulary that will make senseto her. She has solved the problems that she set, and brought forth in her husband compassion and understanding--qualities that greatly help in his own development. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 她感受到圣经中传统人物在宗教层面给予支持。这些人格将用她能理解的词汇，向她阐释实相的本质。她已解决自己设定的课题，并在丈夫心中唤起了慈悲与理解——这些品质极大促进了他自身的发展。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is almost impossible to speak of when the personality enters the physical body without discussing the ways in which it leaves it, for all this is highly dependent upon personal characteristics and attitudes toward physical reality. Decisions as to future lives may be made not only in between-life conditions but also in dream states in any given life.
quotes.translation: 若不讨论人格离开肉体的方式，几乎无法言说其进入肉体的时机，因为这一切高度取决于个体特质及对物质实相的态度。关于未来转世的决定，不仅可在两世之间的状态中做出，亦可在任何一世中的梦境状态里完成。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The whole personality has for a long time been waiting in another system of reality. There is no law that says that a personality must fully materialize within a given system, though it is usually wiser to do so.
quotes.translation: 整个人格长久以来一直在另一实相系统中等待。没有任何法则规定人格必须在某个特定系统中完全具体化，尽管这样做通常更为明智。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now, while it is basically true that the personality is composed of action, and that its very awareness and identity is a result of action--
quotes.translation: 现在，虽然人格由行动构成，其觉知与身份认同也是行动的结果，这基本上是真实的——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This involves on the part of the entity the use of personalities, which are in a manner capsules of itself or even compartments--part of the whole entity but neatly divided as far as memory and so forth is concerned. Nor is this the only universe which you have helped construct. This is rather difficult but you will see that it is really quite logical.
quotes.translation: 这涉及存有对人格的运用，这些人格在某种程度上是存有的胶囊，甚至可以说是隔间——它们是整体存有的一部分，但在记忆等方面被清晰地划分开来。这也不是你们协助构建的唯一宇宙。这相当难以理解，但你们会发现它其实非常合乎逻辑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Discipline then should not only be considered, as it is by some schools of thought, as a mere mental discipline over the muscles, or various portions of the body by the inner self, but indeed a discipline in terms of training of the ego by the inner self, so that the ego as a personality achieves a well-balanced relationship with the physical universe.
quotes.translation: 因此，纪律不应像某些思想学派所认为的那样，仅仅被视为内在自我对肌肉或身体各部分的单纯心智训练，而应被理解为内在自我对自我（ego）的训练，使自我作为人格与物质宇宙达成平衡的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This density is extremely important, for it is a density of intensities. And it is the infinite variety and gradations of intensity that makes all identities possible, and all gestalts, all identities in terms of personalities and fields and universes. It is this density, this infinite variety of intensity, which allows for both identity and of change.
quotes.translation: 这个密度极为重要，因为它是强度的密度。正是强度那无限的多样性与层次，使得所有身份认同、所有完形、所有以人格、场域和宇宙形式存在的身份认同成为可能。正是这个密度，这种强度的无限多样性，同时允许了身份认同与变化的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am very happy that I have been allowed to speak directly to you. There is in our material, if you will forgive my lack of humility, some hints and some specific remarks that will show the direction in which we can operate. I will be more than happy to work for our common goal when I am dealing with a personality who is not stupid, who is open-minded.
quotes.translation: 我非常高兴能被允许直接与你们对话。在我们的资料中，请原谅我缺乏谦逊，有一些提示和具体评论将指明我们可以运作的方向。当我与一个不愚钝、思想开明的人格打交道时，我将非常乐意为我们的共同目标而努力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This usually requires more effort, and there will be no messages on these occasions. In this method detailed above, there is cooperation between a survival personality and the person who is the operating sensitive. Some contact between the fingertips and table is necessary here, to set up the proper requirements for this particular kind of force field.
quotes.translation: 这通常需要更多努力，且在这些场合不会有讯息。在上述方法中，存续人格与作为操作敏感者的人之间存在合作。指尖与桌面之间需要一定接触，以便为此特定类型的力场建立适当条件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I will try to put this as simply as possible. There are presently invisible layers within the body, the topmost layer that you see representing, of course, the present physical form. But enmeshed within this there are what amount to invisible layers, "shadow," latent layers that represent previous physical images that have belonged to the personality.
quotes.translation: 我将尽量简单地说明这一点。目前身体内部存在不可见的层次，你们所看到的最外层当然代表当前的物质形态。但在这之中交织着相当于不可见层次、"阴影"、潜在层次，它们代表了曾属于该人格的先前物质形象。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is also here connected only with his present personality an ego image of the writer with a cigarette. In this case the cigarette represents independence and even individuality, and even female emancipation. So it is all bound up together in a rather mazelike web. I hope that when Ruburt understands this it will make the situation easier for him.
quotes.translation: 这里还仅与他当前人格相关，有一个作家拿着香烟的自我形象。在这种情况下，香烟代表着独立甚至个性，甚至女性解放。所以这一切都纠缠在一个相当迷宫般的网络中。我希望当鲁柏理解这一点时，这会让情况对他更容易些。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I am not sugarcoating the process for you, for this would not be to your advantage. Nor will I understate the advantages that can be yours if you do so continue, for there are many. There will be direct experience of inner reality that is encountered most infrequently, and expansion of consciousness and a resulting fulfillment of your own personality.
quotes.translation: 我不会为你们粉饰这个过程，因为这对你们不利。我也不会低估如果你们继续下去所能获得的优势，因为优势很多。你们将获得极少遇到的内在实相的直接体验，以及意识的扩展和随之而来的人格完满实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The personality necessarily continues to change after physical death. After physical death the personality simply ceases to project itself, as a rule, within the physical field, and no longer focuses within it.
quotes.translation: 人格在物质死亡后必然继续改变。物质死亡后，人格通常只是停止在物质场域中投射自身，不再聚焦其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Many abortions, natural ones, are caused when the new personality is having difficulty constructing the new form, projects to others for advice, and is advised not to return. Now you had better take your break.
quotes.translation: 许多自然流产，是在新人格难以构建新形态时发生的，它向他人投射以寻求建议，并被建议不要返回。现在你们最好休息一下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner self does indeed have an overall conception of the goals and strengths of the personality. It is then this inner self that must be searched for the answers. I mentioned earlier in another session that the very attempt to seek for an answer to the basic problem will indeed automatically release some of that energy for a constructive purpose.
quotes.translation: 内在自体确实对人格的目标与力量有着整体性的概念。因此，必须向内寻求答案。我在之前的另一节课中提过，仅仅尝试寻找基本问题的答案，就会自动释放部分能量用于建设性目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You will see when and how Ruburts personal associations help us, and when and how they do not help us. As result Ruburt will be able, finally, to screen out the incorrect data. This is difficult simply because the data is legitimate to important layers of the personality, and you can see extrasensory perceptions as they merge with other associations.
quotes.translation: 你们将看到鲁柏的个人联想何时、以何种方式协助我们，以及何时、以何种方式不协助我们。最终鲁柏将能筛选出错误数据。这之所以困难，是因为这些数据对人格的重要层次而言是合理的，而你们可以看到超感官知觉如何与其他联想融合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The sensitivities are vanishing. Improvements come as the personality learns intuitively, you see, having nothing to do with time in a basic manner. An intuitive grasp may come suddenly with an equally fast disappearance of blocks of symptoms. The spontaneous self is being allowed more freedom now, this is the source of the intuitional understanding.
quotes.translation: 敏感度正在消退。当人格凭直觉学习时，改善便会发生——从根本上说，这与时间无关。直觉领悟可能突然降临，同时症状区块也会迅速消失。自发自体现在被允许获得更多自由，这正是直觉性理解的源头。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In our sessions I use, with Ruburts permission, his intellectual abilities also (Pause), in an organized fashion. Poetry was far less (humorously) dependable. Now. Many of these reasons are the personality's own reasons for (louder, abruptly) opening up the revelationary channels, and they would be legitimate regardless of the nature of my existence.
quotes.translation: 在我们的课程中，经鲁柏允许，我以有条理的方式运用他的智力能力（停顿）。诗歌则远为（幽默地）不可靠。现在。这些原因中有许多是人格自身开启启示通道的理由（突然提高音量），无论我的存在本质为何，这些理由都是合理的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The son is even now coming to an inner understanding. Indeed much of this I gain for Ruburt through subconscious telepathy from the personality involved. Were this not so it would be more difficult, but possible, for me to tell you what I do. And if I sound dour and heavy-handed it is only because I must sometimes deal with Ruburt with a heavy hand.
quotes.translation: 儿子此刻正在获得内在理解。事实上，我通过潜意识心灵感应从相关人格处为鲁柏获取了大量信息。若非如此，要告知你们这些内容会更困难——但并非不可能。若我听起来严厉而专横，那只是因为我有时必须对鲁柏采取强硬手段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In the first stage, Ruburt projected through physical reality and saw personalities who had very recently died in physical terms. Now, it is very difficult to tell you simply what happens at physical death, for the conditions vary considerably, according to the individual; his abilities and beliefs will largely determine what happens in those terms.
quotes.translation: 在第一阶段，鲁柏投射穿越物质实相，看见了在物质层面刚去世不久的人格。现在，要简单告诉你们肉体死亡时发生的事非常困难，因为情况因人而异：个体的能力与信念将很大程度上决定那些层面的经历。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In a certain way the Christ personality was a manifestation of the evolution of consciousness, leading the race beyond the violent concepts of the times, and altering behavior that had prevailed to that time.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度来看，基督人格是意识进化的显现，引领人类超越当时暴力观念，并改变此前盛行的行为模式。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Nevertheless it is known that cases of legitimate multiple personality exist. Here we have several personalities, all operating within one self, each unaware of the other, and each going his own separate way.
quotes.translation: 然而，已知确实存在合法的多重人格案例。在此我们拥有多个人格，全部运作于同一个自我之内，彼此互不知晓，各自走向不同的道路。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your mental processes are formed and developed as a result of this conditioning. The intuitive portions of the personality are not so formed, and these will operate to your advantage in any inner exploration.
quotes.translation: 你的心智过程因这种制约而形成并发展。人格的直觉部分并非如此形成，它们将在任何内在探索中为你所用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Planets have been used as planes and used again as other planes. A plane is not a cosmic location. It is oftentimes practical that entities or their various personalities visit one plane before another. This does not necessarily mean that one plane must be visited before another. A certain succession is merely more useful for the entity as a whole.
quotes.translation: 行星曾被用作层面，又被再次用作其他层面。层面并非宇宙中的位置。实体或其各种人格依次访问一个层面再访问另一个，这往往是实用的。这并不必然意味着必须按顺序访问层面。某种顺序仅对实体整体更为有益。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 713)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Suggestions should also be given so that a harmonious relationship be maintained among all levels of the personality structure. Suggestions should be given that constructive tendencies are given free reign. Perhaps more important, suggestions should be given that only constructive suggestions will be reacted to. These suggestions give you a leeway.
quotes.translation: 也应给予暗示，以便在人格结构的所有层面之间维持和谐关系。应给予暗示，让建设性倾向得以自由发挥。或许更重要的是，应给予暗示，只有建设性的暗示才会被回应。这些暗示为你提供了回旋余地。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: The personality itself therefore, as a mental action, is responsible for the point or mid-plane, for without the personality or mental act, this particular reference point or mid-plane would have no meaning.
quotes.translation: 因此，人格本身作为一种心智行动，对点或中平面负责，因为没有人格或心智行动，这个特定的参考点或中平面将毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: He is in the process of freeing himself, but the assurances from you can quicken the process considerably. The working schedule will help also, for as he sees the product of his spontaneity, he knows he can trust it. The body worked overtime in quelling spontaneity, and used needed reserves to maintain the symptoms. The same reserves, you see, can be used to construct images. When images of survival personalities appear, they must also utilize such properties.
quotes.translation: 他正在解放自己的过程中，但你的保证能大大加快这一进程。工作计划也会有所帮助，因为当他看到自发性的产物时，他就知道可以信任它。身体在压制自发性方面过度工作，并动用了必要的储备来维持症状。你看，同样的储备可以被用来构建意象。当生存人格的意象出现时，它们也必须利用这样的属性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This same dream, however, will deal with many other actualities. It will serve as a method of communication between the various portions of the self. It will deliver information concerning past and future, and if proper suggestions are given it, then the self will use the dream drama particularly to better the overall condition of the personality.
quotes.translation: 然而，同一个梦会处理许多其他实相。它将作为自我各个部分之间的沟通方式。它会传递关于过去和未来的信息，如果给予适当的暗示，那么自我会特别利用梦境戏剧来改善人格的整体状况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: As leaves drop from the tree, so finally do dream images depart from close connection with the personality. Yet a psychic connection is always maintained to some degree. Dream images are often images which cannot be created for various reasons within physical reality at any particular time. Dream images may appear later however as physical images.
quotes.translation: 就像树叶从树上落下一样，梦境意象最终也会与人格的紧密联系分离。然而，某种程度的灵性联系始终存在。梦境意象往往是那些在特定时间内因各种原因无法在物质实相中创造出来的意象。不过，梦境意象后来可能会作为物质意象出现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is why there appears to be two such diverse tendencies that show themselves. The personality is indeed divided. The ego fights the inner self, which means of course that the self fights against itself.
quotes.translation: 这就是为什么会出现两种看似截然不同的倾向。人格确实分裂了。自我与内在自我对抗，这当然意味着自我与自己对抗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: His desire will also serve as a spur. Before we did not have it to work with. The personality is preparing itself, indeed, to enter completely and wholeheartedly into this adventure. It cannot be otherwise.
quotes.translation: 他的渴望也将起到激励作用。以前我们没有这个条件来运作。人格确实在准备自己，要全心全意地投入这场冒险。别无他途。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: A few mundane but helpful notes. He must of course be allowed some uninterrupted writing time. Neither of you understand your attitudes toward the bedroom. Both of you avoid making love in it. It is the one room that is not (pause) a part of your overall activities, of course. It seems isolated from your lives. You do not fix it up, for example. This is partially the result of old ideas, where sleep is a separate, isolated part of life, or of the personality.
quotes.translation: 一些世俗但有用的提示。当然，必须允许他有不间断的写作时间。你们俩都不理解自己对卧室的态度。你们都避免在其中做爱。这个房间（停顿）当然不是你们整体活动的一部分。它似乎与你们的生活隔绝。例如，你们不装饰它。这部分是旧观念的结果，即睡眠是生活或人格中一个分离、孤立的部分。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: From this focus position communication may be set up between personality essences no longer in the physical field, and those still in it, provided that those still in it are able to remove focus from the ego to this particular level. It is from this focus point then that communication between what is termed the living and the dead may take place.
quotes.translation: 从这个焦点位置，不再处于物质场域的人格本质与仍处于其中的人格本质之间可以建立沟通，前提是后者能够将焦点从自我转移到这个特定层面。正是从这个焦点位置，所谓的生者与死者之间的沟通才得以发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Any two or more individuals living together, live in a psychic environment formed by all involved. It is true that one in a period of illness habitually, to one extent or another, becomes susceptible to negative psychic environmentals. The other can indeed telepathically help change the inner climate by inserting ideas of confidence and strength, and thus changing the psychic climate enough so that the ailing personality can then do more on their own behalf.
quotes.translation: 任何两个或更多共同生活的个体，都生活在一个由所有参与者形成的灵性环境中。确实，一个人在患病期间，习惯性地会在某种程度上容易受到负面灵性环境的影响。另一方确实可以通过注入信心和力量的想法，在心灵感应上帮助改变内在氛围，从而充分改变灵性环境，使患病的人格能够为自己做更多事情。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Apexes are therefore formed within each self. These apexes serve as attractions, now opened, through which the magnified potency of the entity can flow. This may appear as erratic energy, however, an analogy being sunspots. Psychologically, great ferment occurs, and often the individual personalities involved organize themselves along new lines.
quotes.translation: 因此，每个自我内部都形成了顶点。这些顶点作为吸引力，现已开启，让存有被放大的力量得以流经。这可能表现为不稳定的能量，类比而言如同太阳黑子。在心理层面，巨大的发酵发生，通常所涉及的个体人格会沿着新的路线重新组织自己。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Upon proper suggestion the personality will work out specific problems in the dream state, as earlier mentioned. If the solution is not clear to the ego, this does not mean that the solution has not been found, necessarily. There may even be instances where it is not only unnecessary but undesirable that the ego be familiar with such a solution.
quotes.translation: 在适当的暗示下，人格会在梦境状态中解决特定问题，如前所述。如果解决方案对自我而言不清晰，这并不一定意味着解决方案未被找到。甚至可能存在这样的情况：自我熟悉这样的解决方案不仅不必要，而且不可取。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: He had been fighting his own intuitional knowledge. This is one of the main reasons that he did not publish a meaningful book earlier. He had the ability, very strong creative energies, but he did not have the idea or principle to unite him as a personality and focus his energies. This has been given to him, though it has taken work on his part.
quotes.translation: 他一直在对抗自己的直觉知识。这是他没有更早出版一本有意义书籍的主要原因之一。他有能力，有非常强大的创造性能量，但他缺乏一个理念或原则来将他统一为一个完整的人格并集中他的能量。这已经给予了他，尽管他需要付出努力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This allows you to take full advantage of knowledge you did not have when the sessions began. Let him, whenever possible, include along with the material on any given topic, my personal comments. It should be obvious in the book that the material is not disembodied but sifted through the personality that is mine. For this is part of the message.
quotes.translation: 这让你能够充分利用课程开始时你尚未拥有的知识。让他尽可能在涉及任何主题的材料中，包含我的个人评论。在书中应该显而易见的是，这些材料并非脱离肉体，而是经过我这个人格的筛选。因为这是信息的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is not something to be controlled. It is something that will take its place with the other elements of his personality, merge with it, add its strength, and set up its own system of balances with other groupings of characteristics. These groupings balance themselves. Tell him this. There is no need to treat one characteristic as a stepchild.
quotes.translation: 它不是需要被控制的东西。它将会与人格的其他元素各就其位，与之融合，增添其力量，并与其他特征群建立自身的平衡系统。这些群体会自行平衡。告诉他这些。无需将某一特征视为继子般对待。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You are Joseph, the Joseph you see in your mind, the blueprint. Wall or walls are the divisions between your various personalities, and also represent the times of incarnations. Sometimes you can see over the wall, sometimes it is 1 wall, and sometimes it is many. To the （wl no） whole Joseph there is no wall, but unity. I will call you Joseph.
quotes.translation: 你是约瑟，你心中所见的那个约瑟，那个蓝图。墙壁或墙壁们是你各种人格之间的分隔，也代表转世之间的时期。有时你能越过墙壁看到，有时它是一道墙，有时是许多道。对于（wl no）完整的约瑟而言，没有墙壁，只有统一。我将称你为约瑟。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I abhor fanaticism of any type yet I do not feel, myself, that a sincere request under ordinary circumstances should be denied. It is true that conditions were far from ordinary on the evening when Ruburt's father and the poor personality of the woman were here, and under such circumstances generally, I would certainly not recommend a session.
quotes.translation: 我厌恶任何形式的狂热，但我自己并不认为，在正常情况下一个真诚的请求应当被拒绝。确实，在鲁柏的父亲和那位可怜的女性人格来访的那个晚上，情况远非正常，而在这种情形下，我通常当然不会建议举行课。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I cannot stress too deeply this mixture of spontaneity, joyfulness and involvement with discipline, isolation and determination. In your case the involvement, the necessity for using your abilities in the outside world, also are extremely beneficial. You have no idea of the effect of your own personality upon others when you do not hold back.
quotes.translation: 我无法过分强调这种自发性、喜悦与投入，与纪律、孤立和决心的混合。就你的情况而言，投入、在外部世界运用你能力的必要性，也极为有益。当你不再退缩时，你完全不知道你的人格对他人产生的影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This is a rather simplified explanation. Consider however a situation in which the personality needs to express dependency, but feels that such an expression is not possible within his waking experience. If he is able to dream in such a manner that he can construct dream dramas in which he plays a dependent part, then the action is satisfied.
quotes.translation: 这是一个相当简化的解释。但请考虑这样一种情况：人格需要表达依赖，却觉得在其清醒体验中无法做到。如果他能以某种方式做梦，构建出他扮演依赖角色的梦境戏剧，那么这种行动便得到了满足。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now it is possible for someone within the physical body to perceive someone who is not, but it is not usual.
