And the perceiver must then be a person of strong psychic abilities, whether or not he realizes this. Or the projecting personality must be either driven by high Emotional intensity to make himself known, or be of exceptional ability.
quotes.translation: 现在，肉身中的人有可能感知到不在肉身中的人，但这并不常见。而感知者必须是一个拥有强大通灵能力的人，无论他是否意识到这一点。或者，投射的人格必须要么被强烈的情感强度驱使而让自己被知晓，要么拥有非凡的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now those tendencies are not natural to the intellect, but only appear when it is forced to operate in such an isolated fashion -- isolated not only in time and space, but psychologically isolated from other portions of the personality that are meant to bring it additional information that it does not possess, and a kind of magical support.
quotes.translation: 这些倾向并非理智天生具有，只有当理智被迫以如此孤立的方式运作时才会显现——这种孤立不仅存在于时空层面，更在心理上与人格其他部分割裂，而这些部分本应为其提供它自身不具备的额外信息及某种神奇支持。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: The whole creative venture may be the initiation of a personality, Seth, who then writes books. Seth may be as much of a creation as his book is. If so, this is an excellent instance of multidimensional art, done at such a rich level of unconsciousness that the "artist" is unaware of her own work and as much intrigued by it as anyone else.
quotes.translation: 整个创造性事业可能是一个人格——赛斯——的启动，随后这个人格开始撰写书籍。赛斯可能与其著作一样，都是某种创造物。若果真如此，这便是一个多维艺术的绝佳范例，其运作于如此深邃的无意识层面，以至于"艺术家"本人对自己的作品浑然不觉，且与他人一样为之着迷。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: The use of psychological time is a basic necessity for any experiment. Such use of psychological time is extremely important, since it enables the personality to bypass physical laws to a large extent; and also, and this is important, bypass certain chemical reactions that would ordinarily occur, and tend to overtax the physical structure.
quotes.translation: 运用心理时间是任何实验的基本必要条件。这种心理时间的运用极为重要，因为它使人格能够大幅绕过物理法则；同时——这一点至关重要——还能绕过通常会发生、且易使肉体结构超负荷的某些化学反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Suggestion is therefore one of the characteristics of action. The term suggestion is a poor one. As it operates within your system, and within the human personality, the word expectation is a much better term. Nevertheless, expectation is only one phase, for the same kind of inner directive activity is pertinent within all forms of action.
quotes.translation: 因此暗示是行动的特性之一。暗示这个术语并不恰当。在其于你们系统及人类人格中运作时，"期待"一词是更贴切的术语。然而期待仅是其中一个阶段，因为同类的内在导向活动适用于所有形式的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: The child's ego is not the adult's ego. As a rule you perceive the similarity, and overlook the differences of psychological patterns of this sort. The ego is not the most powerful or the most knowledgeable portion of the self. It is simply a well-specialized portion of the personality, well equipped to operate under certain circumstances.
quotes.translation: 儿童的自我并非成人的自我。通常你们只看到这类心理模式的相似性，却忽略了其差异。自我并非自身最强大或最博知的部分，它只是人格中一个高度专门化的部分，擅长在特定环境下运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I am not suggesting that you substitute dream reality for your so-called waking reality. I am mainly suggesting that the two can reinforce each other to a larger degree than you recognize. Also it is difficult for you to accept the idea that experience within dreams is as vivid and valid a part of the personality as its waking experience.
quotes.translation: 我并非建议你们用梦境实相替代所谓的醒时实相。我主要建议两者能在远超你们认知的程度上相互强化。此外，你们很难接受这样的观念：梦境中的体验与醒时体验一样，都是人格中鲜活而真实的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, the other smaller episodes involving Ruburt and the cat alone have always occurred during the same process, only when lesser emotional crises were involved. You were quite right in saying that Ruburt fears violence. This is one of the keynotes of his personality, and rather obviously this has to do with his early life and his mother.
quotes.translation: 现在，其他涉及鲁柏和猫的小事件，总是在同样的过程中发生，只是当涉及较小的情绪危机时。你说鲁柏害怕暴力，这完全正确。这是他性格的一个关键特征，很明显这与他的早年生活和母亲有关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Ruburt has been reading old poetry of his own, and he was appalled to find such beliefs in rather brutal, concentrated form. Until our sessions began, he followed the official line of consciousness, and though he railed against those precepts he could find no other solution. The self, so spectacularly alive, seemed equipped with reason to understand the great import of its own certain extinction. Such a tragedy to project upon the living personality.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏一直在读自己早年写的诗，他惊恐地发现其中以相当残酷、集中的形式存在的信念。在我们的课程开始之前，他遵循意识的官方路线，尽管他抨击那些戒律，却找不到其他解决方案。自我如此壮观地鲜活，似乎配备了理性来理解自身必然消亡的重大意义。将这样的悲剧投射到活生生的人格上。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 859, JUNE 6, 1979
9:14 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: There are certain manners that are more advantageous than others in the giving of such suggestions, and we will go into these at another session. We may also, indeed, begin at least a partial study of the framework of the personality as it is related to action, for such a discussion will follow along well with our material on suggestion.
quotes.translation: 在给予这类暗示时，某些方式比其他方式更有利，我们将在另一节课上深入探讨。我们也可以，事实上，至少开始部分研究人格的架构，因为它与行动相关，因为这样的讨论将很好地配合我们关于暗示的资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: You were quite correct, Joseph, in cautioning Ruburt against the poetry session the other evening. He knew this but was obstinate. It is not only a case of being obstinate, however. I have told you that it is extremely limiting to regard the ego as the complete self or personality, or to think that the ego makes up the entire identity.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，你提醒鲁柏不要参加那晚的诗会，完全正确。他知道这一点，但很固执。然而，这不仅仅是固执的问题。我告诉过你，将自我视为完整的自己或人格，或认为自我构成了整个身份，是极其局限的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: A portrait must contain a searching and a deep statement of the human condition, a reaching out toward the mystery that is another person, whether the person exists in your mind, or physical reality, or both. A portrait must contain a journey into personality, and the technique and the form will then follow naturally and spontaneously.
quotes.translation: 一幅肖像必须包含对人类处境的探索和深刻陈述，一种向另一个人的奥秘的延伸，无论那个人存在于你的心智中，还是物质实相中，或两者兼有。一幅肖像必须包含一次进入人格的旅程，而技巧和形式将随之自然而自发地出现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I have spoken of "you," yet this must not be confused with the "you" that you often think you are -- the ego alone, for the ego is only a portion of You; it is that expert part of your personality that deals directly with the contents of your conscious mind, and is concerned most directly with the material portions of your experience.
quotes.translation: 我谈到了“你”，但这绝不能与你常以为的“你”——仅仅是自我——混淆，因为自我只是你的一部分；它是你人格中直接处理意识心智内容的那部分专家，最直接地关注你经验的物质部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The emotional energy taken from individuals by nonidentity molecular structures is of course returned in a recharged and fresh fashion. Identity forms or personalities simply cannot handle great surpluses of energy at this time. Therefore the process mentioned indeed acts as an important safety valve. This cannot be stressed too much.
quotes.translation: 非同一性分子结构从个体身上汲取的情感能量，自然会以焕然一新的方式回馈。此时的人格形态或人格本身尚无法处理大量过剩能量，因此上述过程确实充当着重要的安全阀——这一点再怎么强调也不为过。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There is a subconscious domination of father over son, always an implied, always an insidious circle of reaction leading to reaction. It is not strictly necessary that the personality here involved change his environment drastically, If he can understand the circumstances that underlay the relationship between himself and the father.
quotes.translation: 父亲对儿子存在潜意识层面的支配，始终是隐晦而阴险的连锁反应循环。若当事人能理解自己与父亲关系背后的深层情境，便无需彻底改变所处环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Ego failure may result. Development of the inner senses is a much more effective method of perceiving other realities, and followed correctly, the ego is not only stronger but more flexible, and consciousness even of physical reality is increased. Such development becomes an unfolding and a natural expansion of the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 可能导致自我崩溃。发展内在感官是感知其他实相更有效的方式，正确遵循此法后，自我不仅更强大且更具弹性，对物质实相的意识也会增强。这种发展将成为整体人格的展开与自然延伸。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: With some, the lapses are more noticeable, outside of the norm. If the situation is not understood, then the personality may find it difficult to relate to physical events. If he is able to perceive the other areas of consciousness, he may find himself in still more difficulty -- not realizing that both systems of reality are valid.
quotes.translation: 对某些人而言，这种偏离常态的失序更为显著。若未能理解此情境，人格可能难以关联物质事件。若他能感知其他意识领域，反而可能陷入更大困境——因未能认识到两种实相系统皆具有效性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As a result in such instances, it is up to him to interpret the image correctly. The words that you hear are my words and not Ruburt's. However, they are representations of my thought, as they are sifted through various layers, first of all of our composite psychological framework, and then through layers of Ruburts own personality.
quotes.translation: 因此在此类情形中，他必须正确诠释该意象。你们听到的话语属于我而非鲁柏，但这些话语是我思想经过多重过滤后的呈现：首先通过我们复合的心理架构，再经由鲁柏自身人格的层层筛选。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

source_raw.title: （Seth began talking about moment points in the I49th-152nd sessions. He began on the spacious present in session 44 in Volume 2.

quotes.text: This attempt forms the ego, and is itself action. If illness were thrust upon action, or upon the personality from the outside, then the personality would be at the mercy of outside agencies.
quotes.translation: 这种尝试形成了自我，其本身即是行动。若疾病是从外部强加于行动或人格之上，那么人格将沦为外在力量的傀儡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We are working slow in some respects, but building a firm foundation. Experiments will be conducted, for example, as far as traveling through your camouflage space is concerned; and not only will this traveling be effected, but the physical form must be apparent to others in two places at once, so to speak. Material must be carefully gathered by the personality in its secondary location, to make such experiments effective in scientific circles.
quotes.translation: 我们在某些方面进展缓慢，但正在奠定坚实基础。例如，就穿越你们伪装空间而言，实验将会进行；这种旅行不仅会实现，而且可以说，物理形态必须同时在两个地方对他人显现。人格必须在其次要位置仔细收集物质，才能使这类实验在科学界产生效果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I do however find myself hampered at times, and it is for this reason that I have made my suggestion. I will indeed now close with my heartiest best wishes to you all, and indeed I will endeavor to lower my voice, so that it cannot be said that we are not decorous. But we have been so serious of late, we have dealt with such serious and weighty matters, that I have not had time to make my personality known, or to speak with you as I would wish.
quotes.translation: 然而我确实有时感到受阻，正因如此我才提出了我的建议。现在我确实要以最衷心的祝福向你们所有人告别，而且我确实会努力压低声音，这样就不能说我们不够庄重。但我们最近一直如此严肃，我们处理了如此沉重重大的事务，以至于我没有时间展现我的人格，或按我所愿与你们交谈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We do not know death in your terms. Our existence takes us into many other environments, and we blend (gesture) into these. We follow what rules of form exist within these environments. All of us here are teachers, and we therefore adapt our methods, also, so that they will make sense to personalities with varying ideas of reality.
quotes.translation: 我们并不以你们的方式理解死亡。我们的存在带我们进入许多其他环境，我们（手势）融入其中。我们遵循这些环境中存在的任何形式规则。我们这里所有人都是教师，因此我们也调整方法，使其对持有不同现实观念的人格有意义。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: My affection for you Joseph is extremely strong. If I speak heavy-handedly it is because I want you to have a light touch. Dissociation actually is a stronger unity with the creative aspects of your personality. It puts you back, or it puts your creative talents back, in the drivers seat. As yet you have no idea how strong you are.
quotes.translation: 约瑟夫，我对你的感情极为深厚。若我说话强硬，是因为我希望你能拥有轻巧的触感。解离实际上是与你们人格创造性面向更强烈的合一。它让你回归，或让你的创造天赋回归，坐在驾驶座上。你至今还不知道自己有多强大。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In many situations, the main personifications are instead of a ritual nature, taking advantage of psychological patterns already present in the culture's art or religion or science. You end up with Christs, spacemen, various saints or spirits, or other personality fabrications whose characteristics and abilities are already known.
quotes.translation: 在许多情况下，主要的人格化表现具有仪式性质，利用文化艺术、宗教或科学中已存在的心理模式。最终你们得到基督、太空人、各种圣灵或灵体，以及其他特征和能力已知的人格虚构。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is a cornerstone for consciousness and for personality development. It is only a first step, however. Without it, no further development of consciousness can occur. This particular step is not attained by all within your system. You are at this point now. This state has been called cosmic consciousness, but it is hardly that.
quotes.translation: 这是意识与人格发展的基石。然而这只是第一步。没有它，意识就无法进一步发展。并非你们系统中的所有人都能达到这一步。你们此刻正处在这个点上。这种状态曾被称作宇宙意识，但它远非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In their own way they become what we will call pure emotional constructions, forming patterns that operate through emotional impetus that is received from and transmitted by individuals who thereby discharge and yet direct excesses of emotional energy, which the various personalities can no longer hold within the personal domain.
quotes.translation: 它们以自身的方式成为我们所谓的纯粹情感构造，形成通过情感驱力运作的模式——这种驱力由个体接收并传递，个体借此释放并引导过度的情感能量，而各种人格已无法将这些能量保留在个人领域内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is true, generally speaking, generally speaking, that those personalities who fear their dependent leanings may develop ulcers. Dependent feelings are quite universal, however, and it is obvious that all human beings do not have ulcers. As far as the particular case is concerned, you will feel well for the rest of the evening.
quotes.translation: 一般而言，确实如此，那些恐惧自身依赖倾向的人格可能发展出溃疡。然而依赖感相当普遍，显然并非所有人类都患有溃疡。就这个特定案例而言，今晚剩余时间你会感觉良好。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is however most unfortunate that intelligent men will not listen to intelligent and sane and illuminating data without requiring such magicians tricks as this. I am however and always have been quite practical. And as a practical personality （loud） I am as sly as any psychologist ever thought of being. I will therefore manage.
quotes.translation: 但最不幸的是，明智之人竟不愿聆听明智、健全且具启发性的资料，除非借助此类魔术师把戏。不过我一向且始终相当务实。作为务实的人格（大声），我与任何心理学家曾设想的一样狡黠。因此我自有办法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As to facial expression, this again is somewhat the same matter, for in this case matter does not matter. Physical expression, facial expression, is again the result of the personality's characteristic method of manipulating the physical organism, and when I operated primarily as such I had my own characteristic way of doing so.
quotes.translation: 至于面部表情，这同样是类似的问题，因为在此案例中物质并不重要。身体表情与面部表情，再次源于人格操控物质有机体的特有方式——当我主要作为人格运作时，自有其独特的表现手法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Though this thought-image usually is not seen by others, it is quite possible that in the future scientific instruments may perceive it. As it is, such an image may be perceived by those who have developed use of the inner senses. Any intense mental act -- thought or emotion -- will not only be constructed in some physical or pseudophysical manner, but will also bear to some extent the imprint of the personality who originally conceived it.
quotes.translation: 尽管这种思想影像通常不为他人所见，但未来科学仪器极有可能感知到它。就目前而言，已发展出内在感官运用的人或能察觉此类影像。任何强烈的心理活动——思想或情感——不仅会以某种物质或类物质方式被建构，还会在某种程度上带有最初构想者的人格印记。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (With a smile:) My personality, as it so richly presents itself, is (louder) to some extent a joint creation of the two of you. This does not mean that I do not have my own reality, for I do, but in my relationship with you and Ruburt, and with your world, I do take certain characteristics that come from each of your realities.
quotes.translation: （微笑：）我的人格，以其如此丰沛的方式呈现，（提高音量）在某种程度上是你们二人的共同创造。这并非意味着我没有自己的实相——我确实拥有——但在与你们和鲁柏的关系中，在与你们世界的互动中，我确实会吸收来自你们各自实相中的某些特质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Now I'll refer the reader to Note 6 for Session 711, which is the session for which I'm assembling this chronology to begin with. In that note I presented some material on ancient connections with the name, Seth, then quoted Seth on the subject of names from the ESP class session for April 17, 1973. For instance:)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: --a characteristic method, and an unwholesome one, of satisfying needs, a characteristic method which has been built up through personality patterns that have been adopted through many existences. For example, in one past life you attacked quite forcibly the female physical organs: an ovary with which you had great difficulty.
quotes.translation: ——这是一种满足需求的典型方式，且是一种不健康的方式，这种典型方式是通过多世存在中采纳的人格模式建立起来的。例如，在某一前世中，你曾相当猛烈地攻击女性生殖器官：一个让你极为困扰的卵巢。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: But this is not the only reason that one man has an ulcer and the other man has none, for we are involved here with characteristic reactions and with habits that have been engraved within each personality since last physical birth, and before. I will now suggest your break, and we will continue with this particular discussion.
quotes.translation: 但这并非一个人患溃疡而另一个人没有的唯一原因，因为我们在此涉及的是自上次肉身出生以来，乃至更早之前，就铭刻在每个人格中的典型反应和习惯。现在我建议你休息一下，我们稍后继续讨论这个特定话题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: He may, for example, continue within it for several reincarnations. Reincarnated selves are no more than probable selves, choosing to experience various forms. In such circumstances, the personality does not leave your system, in your terms, for some time, though this is all subjective. Experience is the only reality, you see.
quotes.translation: 例如，他可能在其中持续数次转世。转世自我不过是可能性自我，选择体验各种形态。在这种情况下，用你们的话说，人格不会立即离开你们的系统，尽管这一切都是主观的。你看，经验才是唯一的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: This communication, while taking place in your time, and in your present, is nevertheless partially responsible in other dimensions for what you would call future developments in your own personalities, which you can now in turn contact. This is partially what I am, far more than you are, or that Seth is as you thought of him.
quotes.translation: 这种沟通虽然发生在你们的时间和当下，但在其他维度中，它部分促成了你们自身人格中所谓未来的发展，而你们现在又可以反过来接触这些发展。这就是我的一部分本质，远超过你们，也超过你们所认为的赛斯。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Each will itself learn to organize larger portions of energy. It is difficult to put this into words that you will understand. They are incipient and latent personalities. This does not mean however that they will all materialize within your own system, but they do represent in your terms the future inhabitants of your system.
quotes.translation: 每个自我都将学会组织更大份额的能量。这很难用你们能理解的言辞来表达。它们是初生且潜在的人格。但这并不意味着它们都会在你们自己的系统中具体化，不过用你们的话说，它们确实代表了你们系统未来的居民。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now I give our friend my most fond wishes, and I enjoyed, in quotes, our "mechanical" communication. He must also make sure of the integrity of his motives, and learn to recognize his own motives. This is not to imply that he does not, but it is a necessity for any personality who is working with psychic activity of this kind.
quotes.translation: 现在我向我们的朋友致以最亲切的祝愿，并且我享受了，用引号来说，我们"机械式"的沟通。他还必须确保自己动机的纯正，并学会识别自己的动机。这并非暗示他做不到，但对于任何从事此类灵性活动的人格而言，这是必要的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Paul also represented the militant nature of man, that had to be taken into consideration in line with man's development at the time. That militant quality in man will completely change its nature, and be dispensed with as you know it, when the next Christ personality emerges. It is therefore appropriate that Paul be present.
quotes.translation: 保罗也代表了人类的好战本性，这种本性必须与当时人类的发展阶段相协调。当下一个基督人格出现时，人类的好战特质将彻底改变其性质，并如你所知的那样被摒弃。因此保罗的出现是恰当的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: An expectation of danger will indeed create danger. An expectation of success will create success. This is put very simply and yet there is nothing, in practical terms, more valid, since expectation has behind it the motivating force of the personality, and utilizes on a subconscious level strong abilities and comprehensions.
quotes.translation: 对危险的期待确实会制造危险。对成功的期待则会创造成功。这说得非常简单，然而在实际层面上，没有什么比这更真实有效，因为期待背后有整个人格的驱动力，并在潜意识层面运用着强大的能力与领悟力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: ... You have a whole self, a multidimensional self of which your present personality is a small part. It is your responsibility to expand your awareness , to utilize these abilities...
quotes.translation: ……你拥有一个完整的自己，一个多重次元的自己，而你目前的人格只是其中一小部分。扩展你的觉知、运用这些能力是你的责任……
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In your family life in this reality, your parents acted opaquely to each other. There were strong energy shifts, so that the personalities did not meet directly. Give us a moment ... Some of this is difficult to explain. In a way they were unfocused, yet each with strong abilities, but dispersed. There was a reason for this.
quotes.translation: 在此实相的家庭生活中，你的父母彼此间表现得晦暗不明。存在强烈的能量转移，使得人格并未直接相遇。请稍等……这有些难以解释。某种程度上他们缺乏焦点，但各自拥有强大的能力，只是分散了。这自有其缘由。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: As mentioned, there is the same kind of connection between that personality and myself as the one that exists between Ruburt and myself. But in your terms, Seth Two is far further divorced from my reality than I am from Ruburt's. You can imagine Seth Two as a future portion of me if you prefer, and yet far more is involved.
quotes.translation: 如前所述，那个人格与我之间的关联，与鲁柏和我之间的关联性质相同。但以你们的说法，赛斯第二与我的实相之间的距离，远比我与鲁柏的实相之间的距离更大。若你愿意，可将赛斯第二视为我的未来部分，但其中牵涉的远不止如此。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Carried about. Expectation, perhaps more than any other quality, characterizes the individual, and represents the innermost aspects of his personality. It is the framework for his physical constructions, and more than atoms and molecules it represents the psychic building blocks from which his constructions will be erected.
quotes.translation: 被携带的期待。或许比其他任何特质更能定义个体，并代表其人格最内在的面向。它是物质建构的框架，比原子和分子更能代表构筑其建构的心灵基石。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is quite possible to meet survival personalities, incidentally, during such projections. This does not happen often, because so many other issues are necessary. It is also possible of course to move into your own future. This occurs regularly, though not always with awareness. Projections into the past are also frequent.
quotes.translation: 顺便一提，在这种投射过程中，确实有可能遇见生存人格。这种情况并不常见，因为还需要许多其他条件。当然，你也可能进入自己的未来。这经常发生，尽管并非总是有意识。进入过去的投射也很常见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now this is a more respectable theory than many, but in my case it is not the correct one. Again, the theories of personality that are taken for granted within your system still manage to confuse you. It is a highly simplified version of the truth to say that I am a spirit, in those terms, though in those terms I am indeed.
quotes.translation: 现在，这个理论比许多理论更受尊重，但就我而言，它并不正确。再次强调，你们系统内视为理所当然的人格理论仍然让你们感到困惑。用那些术语来说，说我是一个灵体，是真相的高度简化版本，尽管用那些术语来说，我确实如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The fluctuations mentioned earlier are often quite minute, yet highly significant. The conscious mind knows well of its own fluctuating state. When once it is led to face this, it finds not chaos, or worse, nonexistence, but the source of its own abilities and strength. The personality then begins to use its own potential.
quotes.translation: 前面提到的波动通常非常细微，却极其重要。意识心很清楚自己波动的状态。一旦它被引导去面对这一点，它发现的不是混乱，或更糟的不存在，而是自身能力与力量的源头。然后人格开始运用自己的潜能。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We must to some extent consider Ruburts own personality, and all protection that is possible should be given here. Doctor Instream can act in this behalf, and I will consider such actions as a gesture of his faith; though the word faith is not meant as any alternative to the word science, it is quite possible to have both.
quotes.translation: 我们必须在某种程度上考虑鲁柏特自身的人格，这里应给予一切可能的保护。因斯特里姆博士可以在这方面采取行动，我会将此类行动视为他信仰的姿态；尽管信仰这个词并非作为科学一词的替代品，两者完全可以并存。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is obvious that the dream images are not responsible to the ego, however. While they contain within them compositions that are also seen in the physical self, these properties appear in different percentages. As leaves bring vital nutrients to the tree trunk, so also do dream images bring nourishment to the personality.
quotes.translation: 然而，梦境意象显然不对自我负责。虽然它们包含也在物质自我中出现的构成，但这些属性以不同的比例呈现。正如树叶为树干提供重要养分，梦境意象也为人格提供滋养。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The selves who ride the wheel therefore also provide some of the power that runs the wheel. It is only because you stress similarities rather than differences that you do not realize that the self that you call the ego is but the appearance, in one particular perspective, of many quite different aspects of the personality.
quotes.translation: 因此，乘着轮子的自我也提供了驱动轮子的部分力量。只因为你们强调相似性而非差异性，才没有意识到你们称为自我的那个自我，只是人格许多不同面向在特定视角下的表象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: At physical death, in your terms, the personality structure is able to approach certain coordinates, to perceive them, and to change focus from one system to another. When this occurs the primary physical construction, the camouflage material, loses its power. The individual would seem to disappear with no trace remaining.
quotes.translation: 以你们的时间而言，在肉体死亡时，人格结构能够接近某些坐标，感知它们，并将焦点从一个系统转换到另一个系统。当这种情况发生时，主要的肉体构造——伪装材料——便失去了力量。个体似乎会消失得无影无踪。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I know this much and no more. He is not human. He is not "he," if you are thinking in terms of sex. Nor is he "she." Such separations and designations are merely arbitrary in your field. He is individual in the term that many energies are focused into one; and indeed there is one infinite personality, but it is a gestalt.
quotes.translation: 我只知道这么多，再没有更多了。他不是人类。如果你以性别来思考，他也不是“他”，也不是“她”。这种区分和命名在你们的领域里只是武断的。他是“个体”，意思是许多能量聚焦成一个；确实有一个无限的人格，但它是一个完形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The reality of dreams themselves can only be investigated through direct contact. Their reality cannot be probed by scientific devices, for dreams in this respect are as nebulous as the spirit, or soul, or inner self. Dreams are directly experienced. They have no meaning outside of their relationship with the personality.
quotes.translation: 梦本身的实相只能通过直接接触来探究。它们的实相无法用科学仪器探测，因为在这方面，梦就像精神、灵魂或内在自我一样缥缈。梦是直接体验的。它们在与人格的关系之外没有任何意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: For in my present in your terms, I am also the personality who is not speaking this evening, the Seth who does not have those characteristics with which you are so familiar. It is unfortunate that I must use terms of time to explain this to you, but as I told you many sessions ago, my time is not your time. (Humorously.)
quotes.translation: 因为以你们的时间而言，在当下，我也是那个今晚没有发言的人格，那个赛斯并不具有你们如此熟悉的那些特质。不幸的是，我必须使用时间术语向你们解释这一点，但正如我在许多节课前告诉你们的，我的时间不是你们的时间。（幽默地。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The personality exists in a diffused fashion within the physical system, and it therefore is most basically composed of those biological heritages, and those heritages that are a property of cellular structure, long preceding multicellular existence.
quotes.translation: 人格以扩散的方式存在于物质系统内，因此它最根本地由那些生物遗传，以及那些作为细胞结构属性的遗传所组成，这些遗传远在多细胞存在之前就已存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Free will as I mentioned earlier certainly does operate, but you must remember that while it does operate, personalities on your plane are extremely limited as to choice. They can only choose between alternatives with which they are familiar. They can only choose to operate within their own camouflage pattern framework.
quotes.translation: 正如我之前提到的，自由意志当然在运作，但你必须记住，虽然它在运作，你们层面上的个体在选择上极其有限。他们只能在熟悉的选择之间做决定。他们只能在自己的伪装模式框架内运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is necessary. I have no qualms with this, but it is possible, and in this stage of your evolution it is necessary, that the human personality learn to become flexible, to change the focus of awareness so that other realities can be perceived. There are indeed as I have said, effects that I can show you, and I will.
quotes.translation: 这是必要的。我对此并无异议，但在你们进化的现阶段，人类人格必须学会变得灵活，改变意识的焦点，以便感知其他实相。正如我所说，确实有一些效应我可以展示给你们，我会的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In many instances however, because of environment and other influences, the ego accepts few of the abilities available, and therefore hampers the full development of personality. Of necessity the ego discards more than it accepts, and this is why Ruburt runs into difficulties when he becomes too egotistically concerned.
quotes.translation: 然而，在许多情况下，由于环境和其他影响，自我只接受了少数可用的能力，从而阻碍了人格的全面发展。自我必然舍弃的比接受的更多，这就是为什么当鲁柏变得过于自我中心时，他会遇到困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Psychic identity does not need to set up barriers in order to recognize selfhoods. One personality can therefore be a portion of more than one entity, and still retain its own identity, its own individuality. Various groupings of experience exist. It is your concept of time that highly limits your idea of individuality.
quotes.translation: 心灵身份不需要设立屏障来认识自我。因此，一个人格可以是多个存有的一部分，同时仍保留自己的身份、自己的个体性。存在各种不同的经验组合。正是你们的时间概念极大地限制了你们对个体性的理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Either state, however, puts off the time of choosing and the next existence. There is one point I would like to mention here: In all cases, the individual creates his experience. I say this again at the risk of repeating myself because this is a basic fact of all consciousness and existence. There are no special "places" or situations or conditions set apart after physical death in which any given personality must have experience.
quotes.translation: 然而，这两种状态都会推迟选择的时间和下一次存在。我想在此提一点：在所有情况下，个体创造自己的经验。我冒着重复的风险再次强调这一点，因为这是所有意识和存在的基本事实。在肉体死亡后，并没有任何特殊的“地方”、情境或条件被预先设定，让任何特定人格必须经历。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Even my explanations to you involve a verbal dissection, which in itself distorts the very nature of the matter under examination. All our discussions concerning the electrical universe do not bring you closer to experience of it. You are in direct contact with it. But again, as you cannot hold your own breath, so you cannot hold that which is even more intimate, and which forms the very personality which attempts the examination.
quotes.translation: 即使我对你们的解释也涉及一种语言上的剖析，这本身就扭曲了所探讨事物的本质。我们所有关于电性宇宙的讨论并不会让你们更接近对它的体验。你们与它直接接触。但同样，正如你们无法屏住自己的呼吸，你们也无法把握那更为亲密的东西，那构成试图进行这种审视的人格本身的东西。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now there are indeed connections between these two conditions. And there are definite realities that exist in both states, and these uniting realities will be what you are looking for. For only by finding these can you discover the nature of the human personality and the nature of reality within which it must operate.
quotes.translation: 现在，这两种状态之间确实存在联系。而且，在这两种状态中都有确定的实相存在，这些统一的实相正是你们所要寻找的。因为只有找到这些，你们才能发现人类人格的本质以及它必须在其间运作的实相的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This automatic procedure works both ways, then, constantly. Various portions of the self retain memory of the information, still in the form in which they have interpreted it. The thoughts and images, while being condensed, are nevertheless then retained in their particular levels of the personality in their own form.
quotes.translation: 这种自动程序于是持续双向运作。自我的各个部分保留着对信息的记忆，仍以它们所诠释的形式存在。这些思想与影像在被浓缩的同时，仍以其自身形态保留在人格的特定层次中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This is done many times without the main personality realizing what is really going on. On occasion automatic writing is utilized, or the Ouija board. Both are methods to uncover invisible conscious beliefs -- that are accepted by you consciously at any given time, say, and deliberately ignored at another given time.
quotes.translation: 这种情况多次发生，而主要人格并未意识到真正发生了什么。有时会利用自动书写或灵应盘。这两种方法都是为了揭露那些无形的意识信念——这些信念在某个特定时刻被你自觉接受，却在另一时刻被刻意忽略。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This does not mean that they will not have to progress, that they will not have to learn, but it does mean that they will not be allowed to pass through without helping others regardless of their own intent. In some cases such a situation may be set up by a portion of the personality itself, though this is not usual.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着他们不必进步、不必学习，而是意味着无论他们自身意图如何，都不得不在帮助他人的过程中通过考验。在某些情况下，这种情境可能由人格的某个部分自行设定，尽管这并不常见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This is an extremely difficult subject. Certainly areas of the physical universe change form, are disassembled and reappear in other forms. This follows certain laws inherent in the field of nature as far as matter is concerned. Beyond this however, your idea would result in an end to your plane that was unavoidable. There are cycles, but they are brought about individually and en masse by the personalities active on your plane.
quotes.translation: 这是一个极其困难的课题。物质宇宙的某些领域确实会改变形态、分解并重新以其他形式出现。就物质而言，这遵循自然场域中固有的某些法则。然而除此之外，你的观念将导致你的层面无可避免地终结。确实存在循环，但这些循环是由活跃在你层面上的个体与群体人格共同促成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In other words I am telling you that your present beliefs, in a manner of speaking, are like the directions given to the entire personality, simultaneously organizing and reorganizing past experience according to your current concepts of reality.
quotes.translation: 换言之，我是在告诉你：你们当前的信念，从某种角度来说，就像是对整个人格下达的指令，同时根据你们当前对实相的概念来组织并重组过去的经验。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This will also have something to do with your life readings in some cases, where the personalities involved are closely entwined with your own. This is not to say that you will get false data. It is possible however that along the way true data will become distorted. I am in no way responsible for these distortions.
quotes.translation: 在某些情况下，这也与你们的人生解读有关——当涉及的人格与你们自身紧密交织时。这并非说你们会得到虚假数据，但真实数据在传递过程中确实可能被扭曲。我对这些扭曲概不负责。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: A young man can misuse and misunderstand his own abilities if they are stronger than the other personality frameworks that compose his identity. Many of your own experiences have strengthened your abilities. Your experiences did not prevent you from using them--the abilities--any more than they helped you form them.
quotes.translation: 一个年轻人若其能力远超构成其身份的其他人格框架，便可能误用并误解自身能力。你们许多经历已强化了这些能力。这些经历既未阻碍你们运用这些能力，亦未助你们塑造它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This is why you saw him as a woman, and why you did not recognize him. The next life will be forcibly one of a woman. Or rather, the personality will manifest itself forcibly as a woman in most flamboyant terms, because it has thus far not used its abilities nor expressed the strong intuitive portion of its nature.
quotes.translation: 这便是你视其为女性且未能认出他的缘由。下一世将强制成为女性。更确切地说，该人格将以最张扬的方式强制显现为女性，因其迄今既未运用自身能力，亦未表达天性中强烈的直觉部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Dream images are indeed, in density, between the tangible nature of physical objects and the intangible reality that is entirely independent of physical matter. The dream reality cannot be entirely disconnected from the material universe because of its connections with human personality. There is a dependence here.
quotes.translation: 梦境影像的密度确实介于物质实相的有形本质与完全独立于物质的无形实相之间。由于与人类人格的关联，梦境实相无法完全脱离物质宇宙，二者存在依存关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Yes, but you have had to put up with very much. This is indeed unfortunate. Your own potentials should have been given much greater reign. The human personality continually both amazes me, amuses me, and completely appalls me. Charlatans are often more deeply rewarded... I ask you to forgive my extended monologue.
quotes.translation: 是的，但你不得不承受太多。这确实不幸。你的潜能本应获得更大施展空间。人类人格始终令我既惊叹又莞尔，更令我彻底惊骇。江湖骗子往往获得更丰厚的回报……请原谅我冗长的独白。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is strongly aware of your feelings toward it. At times the personality traits that it had earlier color this perception. It pushes these aside impatiently. It has mental images of its own probable future, and parts of it do become frightened at times, to relinquish old adult powers for an infant's helplessness.
quotes.translation: 它强烈感知你对它的感受。早期的人格特质时常为这种感知染上色彩。它不耐烦地推开这些特质。它拥有自身可能未来的心灵意象，某些部分偶尔会因要放弃成人的力量而陷入婴儿的无助感到恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This inner ego knows the outer ego well. The outer ego is but a counterfeit image of the inner ego. The outer ego as a rule is not aware of what you may think of for now as the thoughts or communications of the inner ego; but the inner ego knows every step you take, every particle of air you breathe, every dream you have; and it is the source of your own personality and is the representative of the entity of which it is part.
quotes.translation: 这个内在自我深谙外在自我。外在自我不过是内在自我的仿冒影像。外在自我通常意识不到你们此刻可能视为内在自我思想或沟通的内容；但内在自我知晓你迈出的每一步、呼吸的每一粒空气、所做的每一个梦；它是你人格的源头，亦是其所隶属存有的代表。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There would have been no overwhelming conflict for him, hence no such physical symptoms as he has encountered, if he was content, you see, basically to let you carry the financial ball--in other words, if he were truly a dependent personality.
quotes.translation: 如果他甘于让你承担经济重担——换言之，若他本质上是个依赖型人格，那么他就不会遭遇如此剧烈的冲突，也不会出现这些身体症状。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The dream objects, then, are so cunningly, and if I may say so, almost slyly chosen, that the simplest of them may refer to instances in this existence, to personally subconsciously desired or feared objects or instances, to desired or feared objects or instances in past lives. They, such dream objects, may be the method or means with which the inner self warns the personality of future possible disappointments or disasters.
quotes.translation: 梦境中的物体被如此精巧——甚至可以说狡黠地选择，以至于最平凡的意象都可能指向此生的经历、潜意识中渴望或恐惧的事物与事件，乃至前世记忆中的类似对象。这些梦境元素，正是内在自我用以警示人格未来可能遭遇的失望或灾厄的方式或媒介。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Again, at best you get something like a mirror image which must be deciphered. This is rather difficult to get across to you. However, data received by the inner senses will have its own discernible impact upon the personality receiving it, and this impact is as strong as any impact caused by camouflage stimuli.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，你们至多只能获得必须破译的镜像投射。这很难向你们解释清楚。然而，内在感官接收的信息会对接收者的人格产生独特可辨的影响，其强度丝毫不亚于伪装刺激造成的冲击。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Also, I do not agree that it is beneficial for the personality to become used to dispensing so entirely with his camouflage pattern. It is necessary that the camouflage pattern be recognized for what it is, but on your plane it still must be manipulated, and the efficiency of manipulation is extremely necessary.
quotes.translation: 此外，我不同意让人格习惯于完全脱离伪装模式是有益的。虽然必须认清伪装模式的本质，但在你们的层面上仍需操控它，而操控的效率至关重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is true, as Ruburt has discovered, that these dream elements are interwound. Events are indeed clairvoyantly perceived in the dream state. On the other hand in many instances the sleeping personality solves a problem, and therefore causes the physical event because it is the result of the dream work involved.
quotes.translation: 正如鲁柏所发现的，这些梦境元素确实相互交织。在梦境状态中确实能超视感知事件。但另一方面，在许多情况下，沉睡的人格会解决某个问题，从而引发物质事件——因为该事件正是相关梦境运作的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Suggestion then can shape the future. Expectation enters in here particularly of course. Suggestion can shape dreams, and the dreams themselves then operate as action. A strong dream can be a more significant psychic action than any physical experience, and it can change the course of the personality completely.
quotes.translation: 因此暗示能够塑造未来。期待当然在此扮演关键角色。暗示能塑造梦境，而梦境本身会转化为行动。一个强烈的梦境可能比任何物质体验更具意义的心理行动，它能彻底改变人格的轨迹。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Some understanding is almost automatic, simply because some elements are unmistakably different. You must understand however that basic characteristics of the personality as a whole operate more fully after death. Subconscious drives for good are liberated from egotistical fears. Do you have any other questions?
quotes.translation: 有些理解几乎是自动发生的，仅仅因为某些元素明显不同。然而你必须明白，人格的基本特征在死后会更为充分地运作。潜意识中对善的驱动力会从自我中心的恐惧中解放出来。你还有其他问题吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Basic reality is not a chaos. It is a raw material. All diversity implies a whole, and if you theorize a whole then you must also imply diversity. These personality structures are like you a portion of basic reality, or All That Is. They are simply able to use and express and act within a larger framework of it.
quotes.translation: 基本实相并非混沌，而是原材料。所有多样性都暗示着一个整体，如果你理论化一个整体，那么你也必须暗示多样性。这些人格结构就像你一样，是基本实相或"一切万有"的一部分。它们只是能够在其中更广阔的框架内运用、表达和行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is aware of itself as the smallest seed, both those that grow and those that do not grow. The personality of this gestalt is beyond comprehension at this point. It is both demanding and compassionate. The word, justice, is a human one, always implying punishment. And it has nothing to do with the God concept.
quotes.translation: 它知晓自身如同最微小的种子，无论是那些生长的还是未生长的。这种完形人格在现阶段是难以理解的。它既严苛又慈悲。"正义"这个词是人类用语，总是暗含惩罚，与神的概念毫无关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Ruburt spoke before the session of handling aggression. Consciously you have the Emotions of one personality to contend with and to direct constructively. One set of responsibilities and potentials. At other levels you have the problems, potentials and responsibilities of many to contend with in the same manner.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在课前提及处理攻击性。在意识层面，你需应对一个人格的情绪并建设性地引导它们，这是一套责任与潜能。在其他层面，你同样需要以相同方式应对许多人格的问题、潜能与责任。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now it is quite possible for the advanced personalities of which I have spoken to take upon themselves the camouflage of a particular system, enter it, become for, in quotes "a time" dependent upon its rules in order to help those who dwell within it; and this has been done on occasions too countless to mention.
quotes.translation: 我所提及的进阶人格完全有可能为自己披上特定系统的伪装，进入其中，在"一段时间"内（加引号）依赖其规则，以帮助栖身其中的众生；这种事已发生过无数次，难以计数。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: First of all you must understand, again, that now you do not realize your true identity. You identify instead with your present ego, so when you think in terms of life after death you really mean a future life of the ego that you know. At the end of the reincarnational cycle you understand quite thoroughly that you, the basic identity, the inner core of your being, is more than the sum of your reincarnational personalities.
quotes.translation: 首先你必须再次明白，此刻你并未意识到自己的真实身份。你反而认同于当前的自我，因此当你思考死后生命时，你实际上指的是你所知的自我未来的生命。在轮回周期结束时，你会彻底明白：你——基本身份、存在的内在核心——远大于你所有轮回人格的总和。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is however a portion of you, the deeper identity who forms both the inner ego and the outer ego, who decided that you would be a physical being in this place and in this time. This is the core of your identity, the psychic seed from which you sprang, the multidimensional personality of which you are part.
quotes.translation: 然而，你有一部分更深层的身份，它同时形成了内在自我与外在自我，决定了你将在此时此地成为物质存在。这是你身份的核心，是你从中萌发的灵性种子，是你所属的多维人格。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When the offending emotion is recognized as a part of the self it can then be rather harmlessly dispensed with. It takes its place along with other personality traits. It gains its power and strength only when it is forcibly isolated, for it then cannot merge with the normal ebb and flow of subjective activity.
quotes.translation: 当冒犯性情绪被承认为自我的一部分时，它就能相当无害地被处理掉。它与其他人格特质各就其位。只有当它被强行孤立时，它才会获得力量与强度，因为那时它无法融入主观活动的正常涨落。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You felt that you wanted to give a life for the one you accidentally destroyed, but it need not have been the life of the same personality, had you chosen otherwise. You also still remember that the father of your child was a woman, and your sister, and so in this life you have found the relationship ambiguous.
quotes.translation: 你曾觉得要为意外摧毁的生命献出一条命，但若你当初另作选择，这生命不必是同一人格的。你还记得你孩子的父亲曾是女性，也是你的姐妹，因此今生你发现这段关系暧昧不明。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

source_raw.title: (Continuation of Session 458, January 20, 1969, after break at 9:47. This material is not included in the records.

quotes.text: You recall we spoke of primary and secondary physical constructions. These classifications apply regardless of the basic nature of the consciousness that is to be materially formed. An apparition constructed as a result of telepathic data, picked up by the perceiver in message form, will be constructed by him in precisely the same manner that an apparition will be constructed that is a reflection of a survival personality.
quotes.translation: 你记得我们谈过初级与次级物质建构。无论要被物质化的意识之基本性质为何，这些分类都适用。由感知者以讯息形式接收的通灵数据所建构的幻象，其建构方式与反映存续人格的幻象完全相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The alpha level is undifferentiated. The energy there is available to be used as you want to. It is the fountainhead or pool in which reservoirs of energy are held in reserve, pulled between the more interior self and the outer self. Into this area come signs and portents from deeper levels of the personality.
quotes.translation: 阿尔法层级是未分化的。那里的能量可随你意愿使用。它是源头或池子，能量储备在此蓄积，在更内在的自我与外在自我之间流动。来自人格更深层的征兆与预兆会进入这个区域。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The cue points began to break up of themselves, and your anticipated activities will further aid in their deterioration. The offending foods were cue points, you see. Once the reversal process has begun and the personality swung back toward health, then the process shows what seems to be remarkable recovery.
quotes.translation: 提示点开始自行瓦解，你预期的活动将进一步助其崩解。你看，那些有问题的食物就是提示点。一旦逆转过程开始，人格摆荡回健康状态，那么这个过程就会显现出看似惊人的康复。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: At this time of your lives it is important that you act. I am telling you that of the [Elmira] houses in your mind it really makes little difference which one you choose. Neither is perfect. You would find yourselves quite hampered in [any] idealistically perfect environment. You need some give-and-take. Either place could well be made to suit your specific needs, and each reflects strong elements of your personalities.
quotes.translation: 在你们人生的这个阶段，行动至关重要。我告诉你们，在你们心中那些[埃尔迈拉]的房屋里，选择哪一栋其实并无太大差别。没有一栋是完美的。你们会发现，在[任何]理想化的完美环境中，自己反而会受到诸多束缚。你们需要一些相互妥协。任何一处地方都能被很好地改造以适应你们的特定需求，而且每处都强烈反映了你们人格的某些特质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 738
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Only some of the data in projections is thus translated. Now, it is possible but difficult to catch your own consciousness in the act of its own natural perception, before impressions become crystallized in physical terms. Even the survival personality must translate perception into terms jt can understand.
quotes.translation: 投射中的资料只有一部分会以这种方式被转译。现在，在印象固化为物质形态之前，捕捉自身意识在其自然感知过程中的状态是可能的，但很困难。即使是存续人格也必须将感知转译成它能理解的术语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You do direct the focus of the material in that, again, your Emotional interests are important. They automatically reach out in certain directions. I respond to you as any personality responds and do not consider you simply as scribes, ready to write down my words of wisdom, regardless of your own interest.
quotes.translation: 你们确实在引导物质焦点的方向，因为你们的情绪兴趣至关重要。它们会自动向特定方向延伸。我像任何人格回应他人那样回应你们，而不仅仅把你们视为准备记录我智慧言辞的抄写员，不顾你们自身的兴趣。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: But this is not an instantaneous process, and in any projection attempt there is no need whatsoever for this to be carried any further. This form is used however for purposes of instruction. It is used now and then to acquaint the whole personality with those circumstances that shall at one time affect it.
quotes.translation: 但这并非一个瞬间完成的过程，在任何投射尝试中，都完全没有必要将这个过程推进得更远。然而，这种形式被用于教导目的。它不时被用来让整个人格熟悉那些终将影响它的情境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Every personality operates in this manner. These are simply his peculiar psychological necessities. This obviously does not mean he need never take time out. It does mean that his overall identity will not stand for a protracted period when concentration is not primarily locused within this work framework.
quotes.translation: 每个人格都以这种方式运作。这些只是他独特的心理需求。这显然并不意味着他永远不需要休息。这确实意味着，当注意力无法主要集中在这个工作框架内时，他的整体身份不会容忍这种状态持续太久。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Art of any kind is extremely important as a way of paying off debts, that is psychological debts. When you were a woman, Mark, and wealthy, you gave away money. Now like Joseph and Ruburt, you give away parts of yourself, fragments of yourself, made more or less into living psychological forms that according to your ability are free from not only time, but free from many of the defects of your own present personality.
quotes.translation: 任何形式的艺术都极为重要，是偿还债务——即心理债务——的一种方式。马克，当你曾是女性且富有时，你施舍金钱。如今，像约瑟夫和鲁柏一样，你施舍自己的一部分，自己的碎片，将它们或多或少塑造成活生生的心理形态，这些形态根据你的能力，不仅不受时间束缚，而且摆脱了你当前人格的许多缺陷。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The entity, after all, does just this in creating the various personalities. What are they but projections or fragments from the entity itself? What the entity does however it does consciously and with purpose, since it is by definition beneath consciousness, and without consciousness there is no purpose.
quotes.translation: 毕竟，本体在创造各种人格时正是如此。它们若非本体自身的投射或片段，又是什么呢？然而本体所做的一切都是有意识且有目的的，因为按定义它处于意识之下，而没有意识就没有目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Many people are unable to endow fragments with such physical reality, and thus shove them more or less harmlessly away at arm's length. It is as if in Ruburt's great experience the other night that the dissociated part of the personality donned another identity and battled with Ruburt's own for dominance.
quotes.translation: 许多人无法赋予这些片段如此具体的物质实相，于是便或多或少无害地将它们推离到一臂之遥。就像鲁柏那晚的重大体验中，人格中解离的部分披上了另一个身份，与鲁柏自身争夺主导权。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It provides for the deepest spontaneous expression of the subconscious, gives the ego a directive and sense of purpose, and develops the overall abilities of the personality, which in the past were completely denied, for lack of training and out of fear. The poetry was always a part of the psychic nature.
quotes.translation: 它提供了潜意识最深层的自发表达，赋予自我方向感和目的感，并发展人格的整体能力——这些能力在过去因缺乏训练和出于恐惧而被完全否定。诗歌始终是心灵本质的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: If the overall entity feels that the problem has been sufficiently solved, then it will end this life situation. But there is also a connection here with John, and the wife's personality will not leave until John has also sufficiently achieved all benefits from the relationship that h is entity hoped for.
quotes.translation: 如果整体本体认为问题已充分解决，它就会结束这一生命情境。但这里也与约翰有关联，妻子的个性不会离开，直到约翰也从这段关系中充分获得其本体所期望的所有益处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: （Malba said it takes time to prepare for a seance, 15 minutes at least in relaxation before; a black cloth on our table reaching to the floor would help, as well as drapes on the upper half of our windows, to cover the white Venetian blinds. She said that my old friend, Father Trainor was on her plane, and that both of them would probably reincarnate again. She is a female personality but does not operate sexually.
quotes.translation: （马尔巴说准备降灵会需要时间，至少要在之前放松15分钟；我们桌上铺到地面的黑布会有帮助，窗户上半部挂上帘子遮住白色百叶窗也有助益。她说我的老朋友特雷纳神父在她的层面上，他们俩都可能再次转世。她是一个女性人格，但并非以性方式运作。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is not so much that he personified the elements of nature as that he threw his personality into its elements and rode them, so to speak. As mentioned, love incites the desire to know, explore, and communicate with the beloved; so language began as man tried to express his love for the natural world.
quotes.translation: 与其说他将自然元素拟人化，不如说他把人格投入自然元素中并驾驭它们——可以这么说。如前所述，爱激发了对所爱之物的认知、探索和沟通的渴望；因此语言始于人类试图表达对自然世界的爱。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This function is extremely important, and represents one of the main ways in which problem-solving is dealt with by the personality. This is also the reason why the plays of Shakespeare have endured the centuries. The dramas are not true to life in physical terms, but are true to life in psychic terms.
quotes.translation: 这一功能极为重要，代表了人格处理问题的主要方式之一。这也是莎士比亚的戏剧能够流传数世纪的原因。这些戏剧在物质层面上并不符合现实生活，但在心灵层面上却与生活真相契合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As I mentioned earlier, you do often accompany each other in your projections and I often am with you also. I give you direct experience during your projections to implement our sessions. These lessons remain a part of your total personality, though they have not been remembered in your terms thus far.
quotes.translation: 如我之前所述，你们在投射中确实常彼此相伴，而我也常与你们同在。我在你们的投射期间给予你们直接体验，以辅助我们的课程。这些课程虽尚未以你们的方式被记忆，却已成为你们整体人格的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: When the ego is of such a rigid nature that it distorts physical reality out of all context, then however the personality had better rely upon the subconscious even in this respect, for the subconscious will at least perceive those elements of physical reality that immediately threaten the whole self.
quotes.translation: 当自我僵化到扭曲物质现实至完全脱离语境的程度时，即便在此方面，人格最好还是依赖潜意识，因为潜意识至少能感知那些直接威胁整体自我的物质现实要素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: (During break I wondered aloud if Seth's entity the larger Seth personality was listening in on Seth 's data, to pick it up effortlessly as it was being given.
quotes.translation: （休息时我大声猜想，赛斯的本体——那个更宏大的赛斯人格——是否正在同步接收赛斯传递的资料，毫不费力地获取这些信息。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: But in its overzealous behavior we find that it is instead threatening the self. Secondary personalities are caused by repressed emotions on a psychological basis that attempts to maintain an ascendancy. Your ulcer is indeed the same sort of growth, but on a physical and not on a psychological level.
quotes.translation: 但在其过度热切的行为中，我们发现它反而威胁到了自我。次要人格源于压抑的情感，其心理基础试图维持某种主导地位。你的溃疡确实是同类型的增生，只是发生在物质层面而非心理层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The protoplasm is not entirely physical, however, but in a basic manner is a meeting ground between physical matter and inner vitality. Therefore the characteristic ways used by any given personality, in connection with his or her physical image, will also be used in the construction of dream images.
quotes.translation: 然而原生质并非完全属于物质范畴，它在根本上是物质与内在生命力交汇的场域。因此，任何特定人格在构建其物质形象时所使用的独特方式，也将同样运用于梦境形象的构建中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: All of this is not as complicated as it sounds. If you have time left over you help others. If a personality is between systems it loans its energy to others.
quotes.translation: 这一切并不像听起来那么复杂。如果你还有余力，就去帮助他人。如果一个人格处于系统之间，它就会将自己的能量借给他人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Consciousness creates form. It is not the other way around. All personalities are not physical. It is only because you are so busily concerned with daily matters that you do not realize that there is a portion of you who knows that its own powers are far superior to those shown by the ordinary self.
quotes.translation: 意识创造形态，而非相反。并非所有人格都是物质的。只是因为你过于忙于日常事务，才没有意识到你内在有一部分知道自己拥有的力量远超普通自我所展现的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I can perceive much that you do not for example, but I hardly perceive all, and what I do perceive is but a fraction of All That Is. Survival personalities exist both as they were and as they are. This is an important point. What they were still exists, and under certain conditions can be perceived.
quotes.translation: 例如，我能感知许多你所不能感知的事物，但我几乎无法感知一切，我所感知的不过是"一切万有"的一小部分。存续人格既存在于它们过去的状态，也存在于它们现在的状态。这是很重要的一点。它们过去的状态依然存在，并且在特定条件下可以被感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Such individuals are usually beyond reach from anyone within your system. They are not beginning new reincarnations, nor resting, nor going on to new realities. They will eventually awaken to the nature of their activities, for there will be no counteraction of personalities, you see, and no growth.
quotes.translation: 这类个体通常超出了你们系统内任何人的触及范围。他们既没有开始新的转世，也没有休息，更没有进入新的实相。他们最终会觉醒于自身活动的本质，因为你看，没有人格的相互作用，也没有成长。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In nontime you perceive at your own rate. You organize experience in your own way. These experiences however will always involve you with others. Indeed you can go far further in such relationships. The relationships between multidimensional personalities is far more complicated than those you know.
quotes.translation: 在无时性中，你以自己的速率感知。你以自己的方式组织经验。然而这些经验总会让你与他人产生关联。事实上，你可以在这种关系中走得更远。多维人格之间的关系远比你所知的要复杂得多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now. There is a flowing of energy, of psychic energy, from the sitters, that does indeed affect and alter that molecular construction of the table. In this method the impetus comes from survival personalities, acting directly through the physical mechanism of the most sensitive person at the table.
quotes.translation: 现在。来自坐席者的能量流动——灵性能量——确实影响并改变了桌子的分子结构。在这种方法中，推动力来自存续人格，它们直接通过桌边最敏感者的物质机制运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The seance affair (last session) frightened the ego to some extent. As a whole personality now, Ruburt has found himself operating at prime efficiency in several late incidents, when the ego and intuitive self have worked in harmony. This is a promise of what he can expect with growing regularity.
quotes.translation: 上次的通灵事件在某种程度上惊吓到了自我。作为整体人格，鲁柏现在发现自己在几次后期事件中达到了最佳运作状态，此时自我与直觉自我和谐共处。这预示着他将能越来越规律地体验到这种状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: As the physical atoms and molecules combine to form cells, and the cells to form physical organs, and as they do not lose their individuality in so doing, and as the atoms and molecules themselves actually gain and share in higher perceptions because of this gestalt, so do the basic components or fragments of an entity constantly form new and varied personalities; and these in turn form entities of their own.
quotes.translation: 正如物理原子与分子结合形成细胞，细胞形成身体器官，且在此过程中并未丧失其个体性，原子与分子反而因这种完形而获得并共享更高层次的感知；同样地，一个存有的基本组成部分或片段也不断形成新的、多样的人格；而这些人格又反过来形成它们自己的存有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Events are not predestined. The framework for this emergence has already been set, however, within your system of probabilities. The emergence of this third personality will directly affect the original historical drama of Christ as it is now known. There is and must be interactions between them.
quotes.translation: 事件并非预先注定。然而，这种显现的框架已在你们的概率系统内设定。这第三人格的显现将直接影响目前已知的基督原始历史剧。它们之间存在着且必须存在互动。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Your father's inventiveness would also be used in the same manner, as source material, by whichever self you chose to become. There are many choices. I am using here three only to show you how those primary aspects of your personality operate now in your present condition ...
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……你父亲的创造力也会以同样的方式被运用，作为素材来源，由你选择成为的任何一个自我所使用。存在许多选择。我在此仅用三个例子来向你展示，你人格的这些主要面向如何在当前状态下运作……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: n mentioning my "sportsman self," Seth referred to information he'd given about three of my probable selves in a private session on January 30, 1974 -- just a few days before starting "Unknown" Reality. The session contains many personal insights that I now recognize as being quite true. But even without Seth's help, interesting results can flow from an awareness of the probable-self concept: The reader can begin to intuitively consider his or her own probable selves, or those of others who may be closely related psychically or physically. I'm not writing here about rationalizing the existence of one or more probable selves to account for personal shortcomings in this reality, however, but of simply using the idea to enlarge our basic notions of the human potential. See Note I for Session 679.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Survival personalities exist in a system that is within the same space as your own. They can perceive you, but you as a rule cannot perceive them. They pass beyond that system however, even as you pass through your system into theirs, and little by little they move away from your system entirely.
quotes.translation: 生存人格存在于一个与你们空间相同的系统内。它们能感知你们，但你们通常无法感知它们。然而，它们会超越那个系统，正如你们穿越自己的系统进入它们的系统一样，并逐渐完全离开你们的系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

source_raw.title: （Once before, in the first and 18th envelope experiments, an object was used that was similar but not identical by any means. In the first experiment in the 179th session, Seth came through with one accurate impression. In the 18th experiment, held during the 212th session, a few more impressions were obtained; but overall the results were interfered with by other factors in a way that doesn't seem to happen these days. See Session 179 in Volume 4, and Session 212 in Volume 5.

quotes.text: You may be born into your present family for many reasons. You may find after death a much stronger relationship emotionally with a personality from a past life. If you are married, for example, and have no true rapport with your mate, you may instead find a past wife or husband waiting for you.
quotes.translation: 你出生在现在的家庭可能有多种原因。你可能会在死后发现与前世人格有着更强烈的情感联系。例如，如果你已婚但与伴侣没有真正的默契，你可能会发现前世的妻子或丈夫在等待着你。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your father's greatest vitality was in the inventor's reality, and so in your terms this one suffered. This does not mean that each personality, regardless of probabilities, is not endowed with free will, and so forth. Each is born, in whatever system, from a source gestalt energy, and develops.
quotes.translation: 你父亲最伟大的活力存在于发明家的实相中，因此用你们的说法，这一部分受到了损害。这并不意味着每个人格，无论其可能性如何，都不被赋予自由意志等等。每个人格，无论在任何系统中，都源于一个源头的完形能量，并由此发展。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
