source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: It is true because everyone who is acquainted with a particular individual creates his own image of him, as he creates his own image of them. As long as memory of a particular individual is alive, that particular personality still exists upon your plane, and this is not always to his advantage.
quotes.translation: 这是真的，因为每个认识某个特定个体的人都会创造他自己的形象，正如他创造他对他们的形象一样。只要对某个特定个体的记忆仍然鲜活，那个人格就依然存在于你们的层面上，而这并不总是对他有利。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: When he was in kindergarten his mother was just becoming ill. Now, dealing with small children, this simply was added to the fuel. He can understand now however that this connection can be broken. He is himself and no one else. He is not his mother. They are worlds apart, the two personalities.
quotes.translation: 当他上幼儿园时，他母亲刚刚开始生病。现在，处理小孩子的事情，这不过是火上浇油。然而他现在可以明白，这种联系可以被打破。他就是他自己，而不是其他任何人。他不是他的母亲。这两个人格天差地别。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Some of the people in your dreams will be actual people you know who are also projecting. Others will he survival personalities. In some cases according to your own level of projection, some will be going about their normal lives within other planes or systems. They may or may not perceive you.
quotes.translation: 你梦中的一些人将是你认识的、也在出体的真实人物。其他人将是幸存的人格。在某些情况下，根据你自己的出体层次，有些人会在其他层面或系统中过着他们的正常生活。他们可能感知到你，也可能不会。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now. Knowledge exists as realizations, and realizations presuppose personalities. Knowledge does not exist, ideally, in abstract terms. It is true it must be interpreted in many cases so that it may seem to you that it exists as some sort of isolated principle, ultimately. This is not the case.
quotes.translation: 现在。知识作为了悟而存在，而了悟预设了人格的存在。知识在理想状态下并不以抽象术语存在。确实，在许多情况下它必须被诠释，以至于在你看来它最终可能像是某种孤立的原则。但事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is literally impossible for you, and it is a logistic contradiction to imagine, with your physical structures, that any perception can be received unless the perceiver's own inner situation is altered. I am trying to make it as clear as possible that information automatically blends with, is intermingled with, and enmeshed with, the entire (Pause), physically-valid (hyphen) structure of the personality.
quotes.translation: 对你而言，以你的身体结构，想象任何感知能被接收，除非接收者自己的内在状态被改变，这在逻辑上是矛盾的，实际上也是不可能的。我正试图尽可能清楚地说明，信息会自动与人格的整个（停顿）物质有效（连字符）结构融合、混合并交织在一起。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I am not perfect. I am a personality, not a deity, all understanding and all just, and I am at times irascible. I do not mean to be unreasonable. You do not have to worry that I will deliver only personal material, but this material tonight is important as far as our relationship is concerned.
quotes.translation: 我并不完美。我是一个人格，而非全知全善的神祇，有时也会暴躁易怒。我无意不讲道理。你们不必担心我只传递个人资料，但今晚这份资料就我们之间的关系而言至关重要。

quotes.text: When he is at work he thinks "This is not me, this is not myself." The inner self has not so far recognized this other portion of the personality. When our friend Philip sells he is thinking "This is me. You can like it or not, but buy what I am selling." But he believes in what he is selling.
quotes.translation: 他在工作时会想："这不是我，这不是真正的自己。"内在自我至今尚未认出人格的这个部分。当我们的朋友菲利普推销时，他想着："这就是我。你可以喜欢或不喜欢，但请买下我在卖的东西。"他深信自己所推销之物。

quotes.text: Certain strains were involved that in one way were as natural as growing pains. quotes.translation: 其中涉及某些张力，在某种程度上如同成长之痛般自然。这与所谓通灵现象无关，而是人格在试图超越自身时空脉络、接受此类挑战时自然发生的成长与发展。

quotes.text: He knew that he would never do this. There is a strange, indeed rock-bottom refusal here, on his part to hurt anyone deeply, for whatever reason. quotes.translation: 人格本身不仅独立于时空，更利用由此产生的幻相达成自身目的。万物皆有关联，但它们并非因你出生时行星处于某种位置而以特定方式运作。存在关联性，但并非因果关系。

quotes.text: Your feelings here largely result from a lack of understanding as to the nature of the subconscious. As I have told Ruburt often you cannot be a pure channel, through which information miraculously flows. You are a personality, and you must interpret the information that you receive.

quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: On leaving the dream state, he becomes more and more aware of the ego, and creates then activities which have meaning to it. In the deep dream state the inner purposes are more involved. As I have mentioned however, all dream symbols have meanings to all portions of the personality.
quotes.translation: 离开梦境状态时，他会逐渐觉察到自我，并创造出对其具有意义的活动。在深层梦境状态中，内在目的更为深入。不过正如我所提过的，所有梦境象征对人格的各个部分都具有意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Without a sense of joy and inner accomplishment and development of potential, the personality will not only fail to flourish, but the inner self will refuse to maintain the physical structure adequately. This is extremely important. Superficial measures will not fool the inner self.
quotes.translation: 若缺乏喜悦感、内在成就与潜能发展，人格不仅无法茁壮成长，内在自我更会拒绝充分维持肉体结构。这点极为重要。肤浅的措施无法欺骗内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is not to be overdone however. The daily exercise period is fine. The tendencies are used and developed for the good of the overall personality. It is important that they continue to be so disciplined. I do not suggest that you give more time to this daily period however, now.
quotes.translation: 然而这也不可过度。每日的练习时段是恰当的。这些倾向被用于并发展成整体人格的益处。重要的是它们继续受到这样的训练。不过我现在并不建议你在这个每日时段上投入更多时间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now. The nervous system connections have been largely returned to him. We do not strain them, and in this, one of our most familiar methods, I can make my personality plain to you, without any attempt made for any more severe change such as would follow in the method given earlier.
quotes.translation: 现在。神经系统的连接大多已恢复到他身上。我们不会过度牵拉它们，而通过我们最熟悉的方法之一，我能够让你清楚了解我的人格，无需像早期方法那样进行任何更剧烈的改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There are personalities who are naturally equipped to understand if not to flatter, while having at the same time keen minds. These men will flatter your head of state through understanding, and this is important. You will ride with these men if you are true to your own instincts.
quotes.translation: 有些人格天生具备理解能力——即便不是阿谀奉承——同时拥有敏锐的心智。这些人会通过理解来奉承你的国家元首，这很重要。如果你忠于自己的本能，你将与这些人同行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I have told you that energy always regenerates itself, but the implications here psychically are astounding, as the inward energy forms gestalt after gestalt; and each gestalt itself then continues to go on, itself regenerating, forming new personalities which are never destroyed.
quotes.translation: 我告诉过你能量总是自我再生，但这里在心灵层面的含义令人震惊，因为内在能量不断形成完形，而每个完形本身又继续运作、自我再生，形成永不毁灭的新人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Telepathically you were aware of the full nature of the males relationship with his mother. You chase him precisely because you were fairly certain you would not have him, for it was the search, again, that was important. It is a substitute for facing your own destiny. It is a counterfeit living pattern, and you are using it to avoid developing your full strength and stature as a personality.
quotes.translation: 通过心电感应你完全知晓那位男性与母亲关系的本质。你追逐他恰恰是因为你相当确定得不到他——因为重要的始终是追寻本身。这是逃避面对自身宿命的替代品。这是一种虚假的生活模式，你正用它来避免发展作为人格的完整力量与高度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Dreams are indeed symptomatic of the personality's overall condition at any given time, but they also help form that condition. The connections here are extremely complicated, and yet use of suggestion in bringing about constructive changes through dreams can be of great benefit.
quotes.translation: 梦境确实是人格在任何特定时刻整体状况的征兆，但它们也同时参与塑造这种状况。这里的关联极其复杂，然而通过暗示在梦中引发建设性改变的方法可以带来极大益处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There was no point in my mentioning this before. The Seth portion of me has been intimately connected with you both, and so in that respect have I. (Pause.) This is all closely related to the definition of a personality energy essence, from which of course all individuals spring.
quotes.translation: 我之前提这件事毫无意义。我的赛斯部分与你们两人有着密切的联系，因此我也如此。（停顿。）这一切都与人格能量本质的定义密切相关，当然所有个体都源于此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In a manner of speaking, humanity deals with different predominant themes at different times. There may be minor interweaving ones, but the nature of personality, religion, politics, the family, and the arts -- all of these are considered in the light of the predominating theme.
quotes.translation: 可以说，人类在不同时期处理不同的主导主题。可能会有次要的交织主题，但人格的本质、宗教、政治、家庭和艺术——所有这些都根据主导主题来考量。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You may take your break. I realize that I've run on. You are such a beloved friend that I want to help you along these lines as much as possible. Even then it is difficult to keep all aspects in mind, particularly as far as the present personality and its relation to past lives.
quotes.translation: 你可以休息一下。我意识到自己说得太多了。你是一位如此亲爱的朋友，我想在这些方面尽可能帮助你。即便如此，要记住所有方面仍然困难，尤其是涉及当前人格及其与过去世的关系时。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is an extremely fascinating area of study, and one that we shall pursue rather vigorously. The whole personality must be led to choose those actions which are of the most benefit to itself as a whole, and its integrity as a unit is determined by its choices in this matter.
quotes.translation: 这是一个极其迷人的研究领域，我们将相当积极地探索它。整个人格必须被引导去选择那些对其整体最有利的行动，而它作为一个单位的完整性取决于它在这件事上的选择。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The next chapter will relate what experience I have had in all my existences with those "pyramid gestalts" of which I speak in the material, and about my own relationship with the personality you call Seth Two, and with multidimensional consciousnesses far more evolved than I.
quotes.translation: 下一章将讲述我在所有存在中与那些我资料中提到的"金字塔完形"的经历，以及我与你们称为赛斯二的那个人格的关系，还有与比我进化得多的多维意识的关系。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Here is a copy of that outline, which was given to us in Session 510, January 19, 1970. As you'll see here, Seth calls me Ruburt, and Rob, Joseph. These names represent our entire personalities as distinguished from our present physically oriented selves.

quotes.text: The physical image does not immediately disappear, for a number of reasons. The personality, through the inner self, has indeed created or constructed the physical form, but the very material from which it was constructed also contains its peculiar consciousness, as you know.
quotes.translation: 由于多种原因，物质形象不会立即消失。人格通过内在自我确实创造或构建了物质形态，但构建它的材料本身也包含其独特的意识，如你所知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your own personalities will set the pace, for they are well-balanced ones. All of this demands spontaneity and control. This is the motion of consciousness. It is unfortunate that identity is considered generally as a rather static and permanent acknowledgment, for it is not.
quotes.translation: 你们自己的人格将设定步调，因为它们是平衡良好的。这一切都需要自发性和控制。这就是意识的运动。遗憾的是，身份通常被视为一种相当静态且永久的认知，但它并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Your psychological life is dependent upon your ability to perceive and react to such action events. Your reaction, of course, creates new ones. Your identity, your inner self, is a main action event, forming other such events that are the various portions of your personality.
quotes.translation: 你的心理生活依赖于你感知和回应这类行动事件的能力。当然，你的反应会创造新的事件。你的身份、你的内在自己，是一个主要的行动事件，它形成了构成你人格各个部分的其他此类事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Never think of it as static. There is constant give and take between all portions of the self, and the entity changes as it interacts with other levels of the personality. Any given thought experienced by you is experienced by all possible yourselves, though in various forms.
quotes.translation: 永远不要认为它是静态的。自己的所有部分之间不断进行着给予与索取，而存有在与人格的其他层面互动时也会发生变化。你所经历的任何特定思想，都会被所有可能的自己以各种形式所经历。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In the beginning, the womb state under these conditions is a dreamlike one, with the personality still focused mainly in the between-life existence. Gradually the situation reverses, until it becomes more difficult to retain clear concentration in the between-life situation.
quotes.translation: 起初，在这些条件下，子宫状态是一种如梦般的状态，人格仍主要聚焦于两世之间的存在。逐渐地，情况发生逆转，直到在两世之间的情境中保持清晰专注变得更加困难。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am primarily a teacher, but I have not been a man of letters per se. I am primarily a personality with a message: you create the world that you know. You have been given perhaps the most awesome gift of all: the ability to project your thoughts outward into physical form.
quotes.translation: 我主要是一位老师，但我本身并非文人。我主要是一个带有讯息的人格：你创造你所知的世界。你被赋予了或许是最令人敬畏的礼物：将你的思想向外投射到物质形态中的能力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The comprehension of itself and its workings, being an attribute and everywhere a part of energy, cannot be therefore pointed at, and is in no way distinguishable from energy itself, being a part and not an addition. It is distributed therefore throughout energy, or within it, in much the same way that creative ability is distributed throughout or within, say, a particular personality.
quotes.translation: 对自身及其运作的理解，作为能量的属性且无处不在，因此无法被指认，也绝不可能与能量本身区分开来，因为它是能量的一部分而非附加物。因此，它分布于能量之中或之内，其方式与创造力分布于或内在于某个特定人格的方式大致相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Also, your actions now can affect the future personality as well as the past one. You must try to stretch your imagination and feel these realities, because the intellect alone cannot comprehend them. Psychological time is your best method for perceiving these actualities.
quotes.translation: 此外，你现在的行动也能影响未来的人格以及过去的人格。你必须努力拓展想象力去感受这些实相，因为单凭智力无法理解它们。心理时间是你感知这些实相的最佳方法。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: One of us will give you directions shortly, and they should be followed when you are ready, without any changes made on your part. You will to some small extent at least experience for yourself what it is like to be a personality outside the context of time as you know it.
quotes.translation: 我们中的一位很快就会给你指示，当你准备好时应当遵循这些指示，不要做任何改动。至少在一定程度上，你将亲身体验在你知道的时间框架之外作为人格存在的感受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Knowledge automatically changes the personality and the camouflage structure through which it flows. Knowledge, in other words, is action. There is of course such action taking place in these sessions.
quotes.translation: 知识会自动改变人格以及它流经的伪装结构。换言之，知识就是行动。这些课程中当然也发生着这样的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Whole consciousness adopts various forms. It need not always be within a form. All forms are not physical ones. Some personalities, therefore, have never been physical. They have evolved along different lines, and their psychological structures would be alien to your own.
quotes.translation: 整体意识采取各种形式。它不必总是存在于形式之中。并非所有形式都是物质形式。因此，有些人格从未物质化过。它们沿着不同的路线演化，其心理结构对你而言会是陌生的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Hypnotism is important merely as a tool to release the conscious personality from the camouflage inhibitions. It then allows knowledge to rise up. In ordinary circumstances the conscious self deals mainly with camouflage existence. This is after all primarily its purpose.
quotes.translation: 催眠术的重要性仅在于作为释放意识人格脱离伪装抑制的工具。它随后让知识得以浮现。在通常情况下，意识自我主要处理伪装存在。毕竟这主要是它的目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Your Ella, then, reacted against the repressed violence which has always been a part of that family structure as it is composed of its various personalities. She reacted vehemently against this repressed violence. She married a man in whom there was little aggressiveness.
quotes.translation: 因此，你的埃拉对那个家庭结构中始终存在的压抑暴力做出了强烈反应，这个家庭由各种人格组成。她激烈地反抗这种压抑的暴力。她嫁给了一个几乎没有攻击性的男人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We can now begin shortly on other aspects of our program, the second. You are not unfamiliar with this program, Joseph, nor indeed is Ruburt. Your own inner knowledge is most adequate. It is Ruburt's independent ego that is here a strong helpmate to us, for since we have taken it into consideration it allows us leeway while automatically keeping the whole personality in good balance.
quotes.translation: 我们现在可以开始讨论我们计划的第二个方面。约瑟夫，你对这个计划并不陌生，鲁柏也同样熟悉。你内在的知识非常充足。鲁柏独立的自我在这里对我们是一个强大的帮手，因为既然我们已经将其纳入考量，它让我们有回旋余地，同时自动保持整个人格的良好平衡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is the prime identity of the whole present personality. In many cases it is the I of your dreams. It is definitely the I of your creative activity. It is the I, you see, which survives physical existence, and the physical, physically-oriented ego is only a part of it.
quotes.translation: 它是整个当前人格的主要身份。在许多情况下，它是你梦中的“我”。它绝对是你创造性活动中的“我”。你看，它是那个在肉体存在后仍存续的“我”，而那个以肉体为导向的自我只是它的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: First of all, the teaching ability is a good one, but it is being hampered and not developed simply because you are using vital energy in this counterfeit manner. Your abilities as a teacher will not be fully developed until you realize the potential of your personality.
quotes.translation: 首先，教学能力是好的，但它正受到阻碍且未得到发展，仅仅是因为你在以这种虚假的方式使用生命力。除非你认识到你人格的潜力，否则你作为教师的能力将不会得到充分发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Probable universes are by their very nature existing universes. You mentioned that when and if you become an entity, and send forth personalities, that they would gain existence in the first periods of another such cycle; in another newer, say, fourth or fifth century.
quotes.translation: 可能的宇宙就其本质而言是存在的宇宙。你提到，当你成为一个存有并派出人格时，它们将在另一个此类周期的初期阶段获得存在；在另一个更新的，比如说，第四或第五世纪。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I, who am the source (pause), sent a portion of myself, an independent portion, to you. Seth as you then thought of him, was far more than a delivery boy however, for it was his peculiar personality, and his particular qualities, which gave the material life for you.
quotes.translation: 我，作为源头（停顿），派出了一部分我自己，一个独立的部分，到你那里。你当时所认为的赛斯，远不止是一个传递者，因为正是他独特的人格和特质，赋予了这些资料生命。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Your own abilities, Joseph, have been at a plateau level, from which they will begin to rise, at which time another plateau will be reached, and the process continued. Such plateau levels are beneficial to the whole personality, since they allow time for adoptions.
quotes.translation: 约瑟夫，你自己的能力一直处于一个高原期，它们将从这里开始上升，届时将达到另一个高原期，这个过程将继续。这样的高原期对整个灵魂是有益的，因为它们为适应提供了时间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Egotistically he forced other aspects of his personality to accept what they feared. In times of high vitality the effects were minor. After the book's publication however the effects multiplied. A message to this effect was given him in a dream, and he ignored it.
quotes.translation: 他以自我为中心，强迫自己人格的其他面向接受它们所恐惧的事物。在生命力旺盛的时期，其影响尚微。然而，该书出版后，影响倍增。他在梦中收到与此相关的讯息，却置之不理。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There are personalities however to whom it is highly alien. It must be interpreted. Using concepts, I can relate my understanding of your time pattern to others clairvoyantly. Other portions of my entity are aware of it, by a process of mental osmosis, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 然而，有些人格对此感到极为陌生。这必须加以诠释。借助概念，我能以千里眼的方式，将我对你们时间模式的理解传达给他人。可以说，我本体中的其他部分，通过一种精神渗透的过程，也能感知到它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This psychological framework obviously must be receptive. It must also be formed by portions of my own essence, and by portions of Ruburt's personality. It can be thought of almost as a psychological protrusion, though this is not precisely the word to explain it.
quotes.translation: 这个心理架构显然必须具有接收性。它也必须由我自身本质的部分，以及鲁柏人格的部分所构成。它几乎可以被视为一种心理上的突出物，尽管这并非精确的用词。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now. For some belated notes on your wife's personality. They(smile) may be beneficial at this late date even. His loyalty is indeed deep and unswerving. It has been yours for several existences. It is given, his loyalty, to very few, even throughout various lives.
quotes.translation: 现在。关于你妻子人格的一些迟来的注解。它们（微笑）即便在此时也可能有所助益。他的忠诚确实深沉而坚定不移。这份忠诚已属于你数世之久。他的忠诚，即便历经多生，也只给予极少数人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Because of the true simultaneous nature of time, they are, of course, speaking to all of your ages at once through their various manifestations. On occasion they also serve as mediators, introducing to each other two incarnations of one personality, for example.
quotes.translation: 由于时间的真正同时性本质，他们当然是通过各自不同的显现，同时与你们所有年龄层的自己对话。举例来说，他们有时也充当调解者，将同一个人格的两次转世介绍给彼此。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The spacious present is much more a vivid reality to those outside of your system. Your time seems marked, individually, by birth and death. When these are known for what they are, when the personality can change form at will, such quote "timing" is meaningless.
quotes.translation: 对你们系统之外的存在而言，“广袤的当下”是更为生动的实相。你们的时间，对个体而言，似乎以出生与死亡为标记。当这些被认清其本质，当人格能随意改变形态时，这种所谓的“时机”便毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: And added to this, the training will give you valuable information regarding the nature of dreams in general, the stages of the subconscious, and the inner life of the personality when it is dissociated from its physical environment to some considerable extent.
quotes.translation: 此外，训练将为你提供关于梦境本质、潜意识层次，以及人格在相当程度上脱离物质环境时的内在生活的宝贵信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Your help, Joseph, has been most beneficial to him, and it is difficult naturally for him to manage this sort of data; but if he could not manage it he would not have received it, since we are developing an integration here. And I have protected him from a vulnerability to experiences that would be, or that would present, a danger to the overall balance of the personality.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，你的帮助对他极为有益，他自然很难处理这类资料；但若他无法处理，就不会接收到它，因为我们正在这里发展一种整合。我已保护他免于易受那些会或可能危及人格整体平衡的经历影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: His egotistical decisions therefore now more faithfully reflect the whole self, or the whole personality. There has been an integration. It is for this reason that his suggestions are taking hold so well, for they do not conflict with other layers of the self.
quotes.translation: 因此，他基于自我的决定如今更忠实地反映了整体自己或整体人格。整合已经发生。正因如此，他的建议才能如此稳固地扎根，因为它们与自己的其他层面并无冲突。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This is also another reason why you "picked out" in quotes this personality, through association. Give me a moment. I am not sure what I am after here. A change in your father's condition, in that the steadiness of his condition is not as you suppose. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 这也是你通过关联“选中”（引号内）这个人格的另一个原因。请稍等。我不确定我在此处追寻什么。你父亲状况的变化，在于其状况的稳定性并非如你所想。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Far be it from me to give either Ruburt or yourself swelled heads, but in your cases we see the male and female aspects well-balanced, one of the reasons why this is your last incarnation. These elements are highly unstable and each personality works them out.
quotes.translation: 我绝无意让鲁柏或你自大，但在你们的情况中，我们看到男性与女性面向平衡良好，这也是这是你们最后一次转世的原因之一。这些元素极不稳定，每个人格都在处理它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There was something rather important that I could not and would not force, and I have mentioned this before. There were several in quote "keys" that could unlock, direct and focus the full abilities in Ruburt's personality. Our sessions were one of these keys.
quotes.translation: 有些相当重要的事我无法也不愿强求，我之前提过这一点。有几个（引号内）“钥匙”能解锁、引导并聚焦鲁柏人格中的全部能力。我们的课就是这些钥匙之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Deepest abilities are not being developed because of the basic rigid attitudes. There is deep distrust of the male, but this is based mainly upon the difficulties in the 15th-century personality. These are projected outward, you see, and then reacted against.
quotes.translation: 最深层的才能未能得到发展，是因为根本性的僵化态度。对男性特质存在深度不信任，但这主要源于15世纪人格中的困境。这些困境被投射到外界，然后遭到对抗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

source_raw.title: (Meaning the Jane Fleming incident at The Elms in Elmira Heights; covered in Session 204, Volume 5 of The Early Sessions J

quotes.text: You hear me now. You recognize my personality as it is presented to you. Other aspects of it will become apparent as you are ready. I protect you both in psychic matters, if you ever wondered, and of course in other affairs when I think protection necessary.
quotes.translation: 你现在听到我的声音。你认出我呈现给你的人格。当你准备好时，我人格的其他面向会逐渐显现。我在灵性事务上保护你们两人——如果你们曾好奇过——当然在其他事务上，当我认为保护必要时也会如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The outer personality must be a strong yet resilient framework, able to dispense with its boundaries and allow the inner self its freedom, and yet strong enough to spring back and maintain its control over outward experience. This is certainly a discipline.
quotes.translation: 外在人格必须成为既坚强又富有弹性的框架，既能放下界限让内在自我获得自由，又能足够坚韧地恢复原状并维持对外在经验的控制。这无疑是一种修炼。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You may know that intense immersion into any particular activity results in a momentary loss, or seeming loss, of ego identity, in that the activity and the personality become one. Ruburt becomes his poem during such occasions, and you become your painting.
quotes.translation: 你或许知道，全神贯注投入任何特定活动会导致自我认同的短暂丧失——或看似丧失——此时活动与人格合为一体。在这种时刻，鲁柏成为他的诗，而你成为你的画。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We operate on a cooperative basis, and will continue to do so. I suggest that this material be sent with letters or other portions of the material, to whatever sources you have in mind. I say that I am an energy personality essence, since that is what I am.
quotes.translation: 我们在合作基础上运作，并将持续如此。我建议这份资料连同信件或其他资料片段，寄给你想到的任何来源。我说我是能量人格本质，因为那正是我的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: However, as I have said there is great similarity between your relationship to your dreams, and to the entity's relationship to his personality. What I did not make plain was that your dreams are part of a plane, and exist on it as you exist on your plane.
quotes.translation: 然而，如我所说，你与梦境的关系，与存有与其人格的关系，存在极大相似性。我没有阐明的是，你的梦境是某个层面的一部分，存在于该层面，正如你存在于你的层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: As such their positions demand outgoing natures. But one of our salesman has an ulcer and the other man does not. There are obvious reasons for this, and reasons that will allow us to delve more deeply into the nature of the human personality in general.
quotes.translation: 因此，他们的职位要求外向的个性。但我们的一位销售员患有胃溃疡，而另一位却没有。这其中有显而易见的原因，而这些原因将让我们更深入地探讨人类人格的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Sooner or later the man will cease walking merely from his house to his garden, and use other roads or forge new paths. Sooner or later the personality will use or form other time systems in which to achieve developments, but nothing forces him to do so.
quotes.translation: 这个人迟早会不再仅仅从房子走到花园，而是会使用其他道路或开辟新路径。人格迟早会利用或形成其他时间系统来实现发展，但没有任何事物强迫他这样做。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The personality, again, looks at the nature of experience in its purest terms. In some previous civilizations this was done within a natural framework (pause), in which the old were cared for physically while their words were listened to most carefully.
quotes.translation: 人格再次以最纯粹的方式审视经验的本质。在之前的某些文明中，这是在自然框架内进行的（停顿），老人得到身体上的照顾，而他们的话语则被最仔细地倾听。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This is also responsible for the fact that it is difficult to understand how one personality, while retaining its individuality, can be a portion of more than one entity, and we will have more to say on that subject as we continue with the time concept.
quotes.translation: 这也导致了这样一个事实：很难理解一个人格如何在保持其个体性的同时，成为多个存有的一部分。随着我们继续探讨时间概念，我们将对此主题有更多阐述。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The personality can indeed put itself together in multitudinous fashions. There is great leeway in the use of inner and outer perceptions, and the manners in which these are mixed and matched to form an acceptable picture of reality at any given time.
quotes.translation: 人格确实可以以多种方式重组自身。内在与外在感知的运用有极大的弹性空间，这些感知在特定时刻被混合搭配以形成可接受的实相画面。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: At the beginning of the notes for this 920th session I wrote that the session isn't dictation for Dreams. Yet it is, of course, since in it Seth illuminates from still another perspective his concept of value fulfillment.8 The session grew out of the encounter we had yesterday afternoon with an unexpected visitor from out of state. Seth hardly mentions the individual involved, however, but instead goes into the subject of mental illness in more inclusive terms. I see many correlations between this evening's material and that in Session 917 for Chapter 8; there, among other things, Seth had discussed the reasoning mind, the imaginative mind, and schizophrenia. That session had been triggered, at least in part, by a letter Jane had found to be quite upsetting.

quotes.text: This is extremely valuable information, particularly concerning the part played by expectation in the sifting of available data. Expectation is somewhat influenced also by past existences, and yet not enough to be binding upon the present personality.
quotes.translation: 这是极其宝贵的信息，尤其涉及期望在筛选可用数据中所扮演的角色。期望也受到过去存在的一定影响，但不足以束缚当前的人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is the clay which you form so that you can see the results of your mental work. You become extremely engrossed in the activity, but you also know in deeper layers of your personality that your existence and the existence of the race will continue.
quotes.translation: 它是你塑造的黏土，让你得以看见心智工作的成果。你全神贯注于这项活动，但在人格的更深层面，你深知你自身与族类的存在都将延续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In several ways. The relationship between you and Ruburt is now beginning (underlined) to approach a highly beneficial state, that will bring out the best in both of your personalities, and develop your artistic and psychic abilities to the fullest.
quotes.translation: 从几个方面来看。你与鲁柏的关系现在开始（强调）接近一种高度有益的状态，这将激发你们两人人格中最优秀的部分，并充分发展你们的艺术与通灵能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: And good evening, Ruburt, my nervous pigeon. Oh, how the ego fights. It is so sure of its dominance in all matters. Woe to anyone who gives a personality knowledge in the manner in which I am giving you knowledge. Oh, how the ego rises up in arms.
quotes.translation: 晚安，鲁柏，我紧张的小鸽子。哦，自我是如何挣扎的。它如此确信自己在所有事务中的主导地位。任何像我这样给予人格知识的人，都将招致自我的武装反抗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The whole energies of the personality will be behind this work, adding to its effectiveness, and I shall also be behind it and within it. As you suspected, this is an inevitable development, if he did give full commitment, which he has now done.
quotes.translation: 人格的全部能量将支持这项工作，增强其效力，而我也将置身其中、贯穿其内。如你所料，若他全心投入——正如他现在所做的——这便是一项必然的发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now: I am not saying that the human personality is "as significant as a cell -- no more and no less."
quotes.translation: 现在：我并非说人类人格"与一个细胞同等重要——不多也不少。"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 724
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Unifying principles are groups of actions about which the whole personality forms itself at any given time. These unifying principles may change, and do change, usually in a relatively smooth fashion, when action is allowed to flow unimpeded.
quotes.translation: 统合原则是行动群组，整个人格在任何特定时刻围绕它们形成自身。当行动得以无阻流动时，这些统合原则可能改变，也确实会改变，通常以相当平顺的方式进行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I am interested in adding now to our own discussions, for it is time that we enlarged both their quality and scope. We will almost immediately embark upon a more concentrated study of the personality as it operates within its dream reality.
quotes.translation: 我现在有兴趣为我们的讨论增添新内容，因为该是时候拓展其品质与范围了。我们即将更深入地研究人格在梦境实相中的运作方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: With training some direction can be given, so that the information can be effectively used by the normal waking personality. With such training these experiences will lead you to other portions of your own entity. This is rather important.
quotes.translation: 通过训练可以给予某种引导，使这些信息能被正常清醒人格有效运用。此类训练将引领你触及自身存有的其他部分，这相当重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This is the only basis for any belief, regardless of rationalization. Intellectual acceptance of me as a complete survival personality will follow the intuitive knowledge. The intellect will never, alone, convince the Emotions of any fact.
quotes.translation: 无论理性化如何，这是任何信念的唯一基础。对我作为完整存续人格的智性接纳，将紧随直觉认知之后。单凭智性永远无法说服情感接受任何事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There was however a telepathic connection. The present personality of our visitor was aware of the sessions before Philip mentioned them. I expect that the association will continue. The number fifteen is an important one to our visitor.
quotes.translation: 不过存在心电感应联系。在菲利普提及之前，我们访客的当前人格就已察觉这些课程。我预期这种关联将持续。数字十五对这位访客而言意义重大。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Death brings a certain knowledge that things have changed, as on earth you know when you have walked from one room to another, but nothing can automatically make the survival personality understand or perceive clearly the new conditions.
quotes.translation: 死亡带来事物已改变的明确认知，如同你在人间从一间房走到另一间房时能感知变化，但没有任何事物能自动让存续人格理解或清晰感知新境况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: As to the means, the very simplest and crudest but still to be adopted method will prove to be hypnotism, simply because at this point your personalities will not trust their own abilities but must rely upon suggestion from the outside.
quotes.translation: 至于方法，最简单粗陋却仍可采用的将是催眠术，只因现阶段你的人格不信任自身能力，必须依赖外界暗示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Otis's personality attains developments by its nature in great spurts and starts; intuitions; and then he must learn to handle them. At times they overburden him. It was like him to leap from one life into another, with a change of sex.
quotes.translation: 奥蒂斯的人格本质上是突飞猛进地发展的；直觉涌现后，他必须学会驾驭它们。有时这些直觉会令他不堪重负。跨越性别转换、从一世跃入另一世，正是他的典型作风。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You will perhaps think that some of your experiments had to do with secondary personalities, Joseph, but so far at least this is not so. Very soon now we will go into your experiences. I would now bid you both a most fond good evening.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，你或许认为某些实验涉及次人格，但至少目前并非如此。很快我们将深入探讨你的经历。此刻，我谨向二位致以最诚挚的晚安。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The term "dream" I use because you are familiar with it. It is not a good term necessarily. I will use the term, somewhat better, of hybrids, as the one to refer to personalities or individuals given existence by mankind in his dreams.
quotes.translation: 我使用"梦"这个术语，只因你们熟悉它。这未必是个恰当的词汇。我更倾向用"混合体"这个稍好些的称谓，指代人类在梦中赋予存在的人格或个体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is very susceptible to suggestion. Ruburt's jesting remark this evening that he would suggest refreshing dreams was actually an excellent one. The personality can indeed refresh itself in such a manner, and often does automatically.
quotes.translation: 它极易受暗示影响。今晚鲁柏戏言要建议做清爽的梦，这实则是个绝妙主意。人格确实能以此方式自我更新，且常自动运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is obvious that the ulcers are at this time serving a purpose for the personality. The purpose must be uncovered. It will be beneficial if we give, if you will forgive the term, and if Ruburt will forgive the term, a life reading.
quotes.translation: 显然，溃疡此刻正为人格服务。必须揭示其目的。若蒙允准——请恕我用词——且鲁柏亦不介意，进行一次生命解读将大有裨益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I will go into this also more deeply later. It is obvious by now that entities on any plane create that plane, and a strong portion of their personalities are similarly constructed to deal with the mechanics of the particular plane.
quotes.translation: 日后我会更深入探讨这点。如今已显而易见：任何层面的存有都创造该层面，其人格的强大部分亦以相似方式构建，以应对特定层面的运作机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: A panic reaction could be set off without the reasons for it known. This leads to ego confusion since the personality, trying hard to act in what it thinks is a reasonable manner, cannot understand the vehemence of its rebellion.
quotes.translation: 恐慌反应可能在不知原因的情况下被触发，这会导致自我困惑，因为人格竭力以自认为合理的方式行事，却无法理解自身反抗的激烈程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: My message to the reader will be: "Basically, you are no more of a physical personality than I am, and in telling you of my reality I tell you of your own."
quotes.translation: 我要对读者传达的信息是："本质上，你并不比我更是一个物质性的人格，而当我告诉你我的实相时，我也在告诉你你自己的实相。"
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Here is a copy of that outline, which was given to us in Session 510, January 19, 1970. As you'll see here, Seth calls me Ruburt, and Rob, Joseph. These names represent our entire personalities as distinguished from our present physically oriented selves.

quotes.text: Some of these have been within your system, in your terms of continuity, and are now beyond it. They also represent your personal connection with All That Is. At times these personalities do aid their own and give instructions.
quotes.translation: 其中一些人格曾存在于你们的系统内（以你们的时间连续性而言），如今已超越该系统。它们也代表你们与一切万有的个人连接。有时这些人格确实会协助同类并给予指引。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: A more powerful connection exists, you see, now; and this means you have reached, as you are well aware, somewhat beyond the personality by which I usually make myself known to you. Even if I continue to speak, end the trance.
quotes.translation: 你看，现在存在着更强大的连接；这意味着你已意识到，自己已略微超越了我通常用以显现在你面前的那个人格。即便我继续说话，也请结束出神状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Yes. I prefer not to be called Frank Watts. That personality was rather collarless.
quotes.translation: 是的。我不愿被称为弗兰克·瓦茨。那个人格相当缺乏教养。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Oh yes. This is the case in her particular type of withdrawal. In a sudden death the materialization is rather shocking for the personality; and the materialization is simultaneously made and leads in some cases to confusion.
quotes.translation: 哦是的。在她那种特定类型的退缩中正是如此。在突然死亡的情况下，物质化对人格而言相当震撼；而物质化同时发生，在某些情况下会导致混乱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You may take your break. I will then have a few words to say concerning the connection between diet, personality, and health. All of which incidentally is reflected in the dream state, and in the nature of dreams themselves.
quotes.translation: 你可以休息一下。之后我将就饮食、人格与健康之间的关联说几句话。这一切都间接反映在梦境状态以及梦境本身的本质中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This process is literally endless. The abundance of energy at your command is more vast than you suppose. Conscious projections are journeys into other non intervals, and they are extremely valuable to the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 这个过程实际上是无止境的。你所支配的能量之丰沛远超你的想象。有意识的投射是进入其他非间隔的旅程，它们对整个人格极为宝贵。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: We find in the present personality knots, whereby action is not allowed freedom, particularly in terms of expansion. There is strong concentrated energy turned inward, but it is not turned inward far enough to be effective.
quotes.translation: 我们在当前人格中发现一些纠结，使得行动无法获得自由，尤其是在扩展方面。有强烈集中的能量转向内在，但转向得还不够深入，未能产生效果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The other relative is in Australia. Give us a moment please. (Pause.) There was a relationship existing between our young friend and the personality known as Ferd back in the Polish existence. They were then contemporaries.
quotes.translation: 另一位亲戚在澳大利亚。请稍等片刻。（停顿。）我们这位年轻朋友与那个在波兰存在中被称为费尔德的人格之间曾存在某种关系。他们当时是同时代人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You have more than compensated now for past errors, not only in this life but in the previous life. Your painting is almost a direct result of a desire for creativity, to balance what was once your destructive personality.
quotes.translation: 你现在不仅在这一生，也在前世中，已经充分补偿了过去的错误。你的绘画几乎是创造欲望的直接结果，旨在平衡你曾经具有的破坏性人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: A personality may or may not realize the fact of physical death, for example. Literally, he may or may not find himself in a physical-seeming environment. He will be in a form, however, and will seem so to himself also.
quotes.translation: 例如，一个人格可能意识到或未意识到肉体死亡的事实。从字面上说，他可能发现自己身处看似物质的环境，也可能不会。然而，他将以某种形态存在，并且在他自己看来也是如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The nature and importance of belief appeared so eloquently that Ruburt was astounded, and found himself forced into some complicated psychological footwork. The two "personalities" were no longer separate, but merging.
quotes.translation: 信念的本质与重要性如此清晰地显现，以至于鲁柏大为震惊，发现自己被迫陷入复杂的心理周旋。这两个"人格"不再分离，而是正在融合。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In the first place you are looking at one version of the universe, as it seems to exist at the moment of your perception. The entire nature of a personality cannot be considered in its totality in that small context.
quotes.translation: 首先，你正在观察宇宙的一个版本，它似乎存在于你感知的当下。人格的完整本质无法在如此狭小的脉络中被全然考量。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 729
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: There are certain self-regulating devices at work here, psychologically speaking, that insure necessary periods of passivity and rest. In any well-balanced personality these operate automatically, as in Ruburts case.
quotes.translation: 从心理学角度而言，此处存在某些自动调节机制，确保必要的被动与休息周期。在任何平衡良好的人格中，这些机制都会自动运作，正如鲁柏的情况所示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There is a strong inclination toward protection in his personality. This is partially wholesome and partially the result of fear on his part. I hope that he will attend a regular session. He was also in Mesopotamia.
quotes.translation: 他的人格中存在着强烈的保护倾向。这既部分源于健康因素，也部分源于他自身的恐惧。我希望他能参加常规课程。他曾在美索不达米亚转世。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The fetus does have its own astral form. Now, this astral form belongs to the individual, the personality as it will be in this life. It is not the astral form that existed in a previous reincarnation, for example.
quotes.translation: 胎儿确实拥有自己的星光体。这个星光体属于个体，属于此生将展现的人格。它并非例如前世存在过的星光体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: John and the historical Christ each performed their roles and were satisfied that they had done so. Paul alone was left at the end unsatisfied, and so it is about his personality that the future Christ will form.
quotes.translation: 约翰与历史上的基督各自完成了他们的角色，并对此感到满意。唯有保罗最终未能满足，因此未来的基督将围绕他的人格形成。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is the present personality's desire to express himself, opposed by the subconscious memories of that past life, with its fear of the effects of eloquence used without discretion, that now cause his difficulty.
quotes.translation: 正是当前人格想要表达自己的渴望，受到前世潜意识记忆的阻碍——那记忆带着对不加节制使用口才之后果的恐惧——才导致了他现在的困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Survival personalities can recognize an earthly projectionist, for the form is not fully materialized in their terms. Many of you do, while projecting, council and help those who are newly dead in physical terms.
quotes.translation: 存续人格能够识别出尘世的投射者，因为其形态在他们看来尚未完全物质化。你们许多人在出体投射时，会为那些在物质层面刚死去的人提供咨询与帮助。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is no time boundary as you know it. This is obviously a gestalt. The experiences however of individual two, for example, are constantly being changed because of the intervention of the other personalities.
quotes.translation: 不存在你们所认知的时间界限。这显然是一个完形。然而，例如个体二的经验，会因其他人格的介入而持续改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The choice involved is of course determined by his own personality, its particular leanings, potentialities and limitations. We will discuss this later on in connection with illness, good health and treatment.
quotes.translation: 所涉及的选择当然由其自身人格决定，包括其特定倾向、潜能与局限。我们稍后将结合疾病、健康与治疗来讨论这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now. I will continue. Man will not learn the basic nature of reality by studying the physical universe alone, nor will he learn it by studying the personality as it operates within the physical universe alone.
quotes.translation: 现在，我将继续。人类若仅研究物质宇宙，便无法领悟实相的基本本质；若仅研究在物质宇宙中运作的人格，同样无法领悟。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is therefore impossible to consider an impeding action, such as an illness, without taking into consideration the particular structure-unifying devices, subconscious and conscious personality tendencies.
quotes.translation: 因此，若不考虑特定的结构统一机制、潜意识与意识人格倾向，便无法审视诸如疾病这类阻碍性行为。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your own personality, Joseph, has a beneficial effect upon others. You speak well for the material. You are not afraid of meeting people. You are afraid of the idea of meeting people. Now give us a moment.
quotes.translation: 约瑟夫，你自身的人格对他人有正面影响。你为这资料做了很好的诠释。你不害怕与人接触，却害怕与人接触的念头。现在请稍等片刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: He is extremely strong, open, and giving and spontaneous when he is functioning well. Any strong impediments cause him to retreat however, though for a while a smiling surface personality hides this fact.
quotes.translation: 当他运作良好时，他极为坚强、开放、慷慨且自发。然而任何重大阻碍都会使他退缩，尽管一段时间内微笑的表面人格会掩盖这个事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is possible but not inevitable, of course, that continued use of such drugs by certain types of personalities could over a period of time lead to complete disability to manipulate camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 当然，某些类型的人格持续使用这类药物，经过一段时间后，有可能——但非必然——导致完全丧失操控伪装模式的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. (Pause.) There are survival personalities who help you. They operate in several different ways. The methods vary according to their circumstances and your own. We will describe one method at a time.
quotes.translation: 现在。（停顿。）有些生存人格在协助你们。他们以多种不同方式运作，方法因应他们自身及你们的情况而异。我们将一次描述一种方法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now. Our friend (Tam) is in contact with another layer of his personality, and as I told him over the infernal machine (a humorous reference to the telephone), a dependable layer. This is an advancement.
quotes.translation: 现在。我们的朋友（谭）正与他另一层人格接触，正如我通过那地狱机器（幽默地指电话）告诉他的，那是可靠的一层。这是个进步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Many intuitions, hunches, and inner disturbances of this sort can be explained in like manner. It is always best to heed them, though the original wound to the psyche occurred to a previous personality.
quotes.translation: 许多直觉、预感及此类内在扰动皆可如此解释。尽管心灵最初的创伤发生于前世人格，但始终最好留意这些讯息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: However, I know too well this serious, and may I say mature, nature of your personality, though it was not so in Denmark. So I will, with my best respects, and with some regrets, close our session.
quotes.translation: 然而，我太了解你这人格的严肃——容我说是成熟——本质了，尽管在丹麦时并非如此。因此，我将怀着最崇高的敬意与些许遗憾，结束本次课程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I perceive people in a room in a far different manner than they perceive themselves; their various past and future reincarnated personalities, but not their probable selves, are perceivable to me.
quotes.translation: 我感知房间里人们的方式，与他们感知自己的方式截然不同；我能感知他们过去与未来的各种转世人格，但无法感知他们的可能自我。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As we mentioned in our last session, the personality cannot be considered alone, but it must be thought of in its relationship to action and to all those aspects of reality of which it is a part.
quotes.translation: 正如我们上次课程所提，人格不能孤立看待，而必须置于它与行动的关系中，以及它作为其组成部分的所有实相面向中来思考。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It becomes more and more a portion of the supraconsciousness. Its new function is to help direct the overall personality so that inner abilities and illuminations can also reach physical reality.
quotes.translation: 它逐渐成为超意识的一部分。其新功能是协助引导整体人格，使内在能力与启迪也能触及物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I would like to continue with our discussion concerning the nature of the human personality in its relationship to action, and in connection with the matter of illness and health in general.
quotes.translation: 我想继续讨论人类人格的本质，探讨它与行动的关系，以及它如何关联到疾病与健康的一般性问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. In some cases survival personalities, with experience, will directly affect matter, both assisting the sensitive and operating independently once the force field has been constructed.
quotes.translation: 现在。在某些情况下，具有经验的存续人格会直接影响物质，既协助敏感者，又能在力场构建完成后独立运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: On occasion, long before conception takes place, the personality who will end up as the future child will visit that environment of both parents-to-be, drawn again. This is quite natural.
quotes.translation: 有时，早在受孕发生之前，将成为未来孩子的那个性格就会再次被吸引，探访那对准父母的生存环境。这非常自然。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now, there is a point, quite important, that Ruburt will not consciously as yet accept, and that is the influence of telepathic and clairvoyant data. This does affect the personality.
quotes.translation: 现在，有一个相当重要的观点，鲁柏目前尚未有意识地接受，那就是心灵感应和千里眼数据的影响。这确实会影响性格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: --laughing, I must say, in overwhelming mirth at this esthetic nature of its own personalities, that so often closes out joy and freedom, and the pleasures of nature on your plane.
quotes.translation: ——我笑着说，必须说，我对自己性格的这种审美本质感到无比欢愉，而这种本质却常常在你们的层面上排斥喜悦、自由以及自然的乐趣。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I would here like to continue our discussion concerning the nature of the personality. Joseph, if I speak too quickly, I hope I can rest assured that you will ask me to slow down.
quotes.translation: 在此，我想继续讨论关于性格本质的话题。约瑟，如果我讲得太快，希望我能放心地请你放慢速度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, with all you have been told about the nature of personality, and of the many of which you are a part, it would now be a help if you could find the center of your larger self.
quotes.translation: 现在，既然你们已经被告知关于性格的本质，以及你们是其中一部分的众多面向，那么如果你们能找到更大自我的中心，将会有所帮助。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You must understand that to me now, mankind's insistence upon recognizing as alive only those personalities with which he deals in the physical field, is a most limiting concept.
quotes.translation: 你们必须明白，对我来说，人类坚持只承认在物质领域与之打交道的性格是活着的，这是一个最具局限性的概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is only lately that your psychologists have even begun to understand the connection between biology and personality, and they understand it in only the most simple of terms.
quotes.translation: 你们的心理学家直到最近才开始理解生物学与人格之间的关联，而且他们仅以最浅显的术语来理解这种关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I will now end the session, but it will indeed serve as a basis for many discussions, concerning the relationship between action, suggestion, personality, illness and health.
quotes.translation: 我现在将结束此节课，但它确实会成为许多讨论的基础，涉及行动、暗示、人格、疾病与健康之间的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: If this information comes from a personality no longer in physical form upon your earth, then surely this is an indication that death is but entrance into another dimension.
quotes.translation: 如果这些信息来自一个不再以肉体形态存在于你们地球的人格，那么这无疑表明死亡不过是进入另一个维度的入口。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The child who found her knew beforehand that this would occur. (Long pause.) The personalities involved in the family relationship have worked out many problems. (Pause.
quotes.translation: 那个找到她的孩子事先就知道这件事会发生。（长停顿。）家庭关系中涉及的人格已经解决了诸多问题。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: His ego is his ego, and because it is his he loves it indeed. All egos fear that which is not ego. A necessary defense mechanism, which is part of each personality.
quotes.translation: 他的自我就是他的自我，正因为属于他，他确实深爱着它。所有自我都恐惧非自我的事物。这是必要的防御机制，也是每个人格的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I will here close what can be an extremely productive session. Whether or not it is an extremely productive session will be determined by the personality involved.
quotes.translation: 我将在此结束这节可能极具成效的课。它是否真的极具成效，将由所涉及的人格来决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I prefer the method we are using, in that assimilation takes place more directly and immediately, and the personality involved makes an active contribution.
quotes.translation: 我偏好我们正在使用的方法，因为同化过程更直接即时，且涉及的人格会做出主动贡献。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: My own answer is that I am an energy personality essence, momentarily in contact with your physical system, and that I am allowed to operate through Ruburt.
quotes.translation: 我自己的答案是：我是一个能量人格本质，此刻正与你们的物质系统接触，并被允许通过鲁柏运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now: Let me make it clear once again: Your present personality as you think of it is indeed "indelible," and continues after death to grow and develop.
quotes.translation: 现在：让我再次明确说明：你们所认为的当前人格确实是"不可磨灭的"，并在死后继续成长发展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We have yet to discuss pain and pleasure. However the subject will be covered thoroughly, in sessions dealing with the nature of the human personality.
quotes.translation: 我们尚未讨论痛苦与快乐。然而，这个主题将在探讨人类人格本质的课程中被彻底涵盖。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is you, not I, who have been speaking of secondary personalities, and I will not here waste your time and mine in a discussion of why I am not one.
quotes.translation: 是你们，而非我，一直在谈论次人格，我不会在此浪费你我的时间来讨论为何我不是其中之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: While identity and consciousness are regarded as the result of primarily physical processes, then the nature of personality will never be understood.
quotes.translation: 只要身份认同与意识仍被视为主要源自物质过程的结果，人格的本质就永远无法被理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now, it directs and organizes this action, as for example your physical personality directs and organizes large portions of your physical image.
quotes.translation: 它引导并组织这种行动，例如你的物质人格引导并组织你物质形象的大部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You know the nature of personality now to some degree, and I am always to some degree present at your sessions. (Smile.) Now give us a moment.
quotes.translation: 你现在对人格的本质已有一定程度的了解，而我在你的课中总是以某种程度在场。（微笑）现在请稍等片刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: On a limited scale, very limited, this process is hinted at in the material having to do with moment points, action and personality.
quotes.translation: 在有限的范围内，非常有限的范围内，这个过程的线索出现在与“片刻点”、“行动”和“人格”相关的资料中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This discussion will necessarily involve us with the structure of personality, and with the nature of what you call suggestibility.
quotes.translation: 这个讨论必然会涉及人格的结构，以及你所谓的“暗示性”的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Some of the models for your paintings have been of thought forms sent out by others. Some, of personalities between reincarnations.
quotes.translation: 你画作中的一些模特是他人发出的思想形态。有些则是转世之间的人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now. Some personalities can be a part of more than one entity. This is something I do not believe we have discussed before.
quotes.translation: 现在。有些人格可能属于不止一个存有。我相信我们以前没有讨论过这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There was indeed an unhealthy effect that came from the womans personality, and you my friend were in immediate danger.
quotes.translation: 那个女人的个性确实产生了不健康的影响，而你，我的朋友，正处于直接的危险之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I will however begin a discussion concerning the personality and its relationship to those dreams which it creates.
quotes.translation: 然而，我将开始讨论人格及其与它所创造的梦境之间的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is true that the whole personality, or whole self, does not directly manifest itself within physical reality.
quotes.translation: 确实，整体人格或整体自己并不直接在物质实相中显现自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The planes represent the various levels upon which the personalities operate. I suggest a brief break.
quotes.translation: 这些层面代表了人格运作的各种层次。我建议短暂休息一下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When you perceive merely the present personality, you are simply perceiving a small portion of action.
quotes.translation: 当你只感知到当前的人格时，你只是感知到行动的一小部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Good events cannot help it, then, for the personality does not admit it is a portion of itself.
quotes.translation: 那么，好的事件也无能为力，因为人格不承认它是自身的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json
